title: The Death Row Inmate and the Demon
condition: A death row inmate met a demon and made a wish. The demon helped him. A few days later, pedestrians on the street were holding their noses and looking disgusted.
solution: The demon turned the inmate invisible, allowing him to successfully escape prison. However, he was hit and killed by a car on the road. A few days later, his body began to rot and stink, which was unbearable for the passersby.

zh.title: 死刑犯跟恶魔
zh.condition: 有个死刑犯遇到了恶魔,而他向恶魔许了个愿望。恶魔也帮助了他。数日后走在路上的行人都捂着鼻子面露难色。
zh.solution: 恶魔将死刑犯变成隐形人,让他成功逃狱,但是他却在马路上被车撞死了,几天后尸体发臭,让来往的路人难以忍受。

key_facts: The inmate's wish was about not being seen.
He successfully escaped from prison.
The wish granted by the demon led to his death.
He died in a traffic accident.
His body was left on the road.
The body was only noticed days later due to the smell of decay.
His invisibility was the cause of the accident.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.
Dataset repository includes an Apache-2.0 license.

alternate_formulations.condition: A death row inmate encounters a demon and makes a wish. The demon grants it. Days later, pedestrians on the street all hold their noses and look disgusted.
alternate_formulations.solution: The death row inmate wished to become invisible. The demon turned him invisible, allowing him to successfully escape prison. However, he was hit by a car on the street and died. A few days later, his invisible corpse began to rot, causing an unbearable stench for passersby.

title: The Woman in the Pink Dress
condition: Your new neighbor is a young man who lives alone. One day, coming home after a late-night snack, you see a long-haired woman in a pink dress and heavy makeup enter your neighbor's apartment. Late at night, you hear arguing and things being thrown from next door, which is especially loud in the quiet hallway. The next day, in the trash bag outside your neighbor's door, you see a shredded pink dress and a lock of long hair. You ask your neighbor about it, but he stammers and won't say anything... Should you call the police? What happened?
solution: The neighbor is a man with a cross-dressing fetish, which is why he has always been single. His family doesn't know about this and has been pressuring him to get married, so he moved out of his parents' house. That day, the neighbor was coming home after being dressed as a woman, and you saw him. Unexpectedly, his mother was already waiting for him at home. Seeing her son in women's clothing, they had a huge fight, and the mother cut up his pink dress and wig. This is what you saw.

zh.title: 粉色连衣裙的女人
zh.condition: 你的新邻居是一个独居的年轻男人,有一天你吃完宵夜回家看到一个穿粉色连衣裙浓妆艳抹的长发女人进了邻居家的门。深夜,隔壁传来争吵摔东西的声音,在安静的楼道里格外刺耳。第二天你在邻居家门口的垃圾袋里看到了被剪碎的粉色连衣裙和一把长发,你询问了邻居,他却支支吾吾不肯明说......你要报警吗?这是怎么一回事?
zh.solution: 邻居是一个有异装癖的男人,因此一直独身。邻居的家人不知道这个情况,一直催他结婚,他就从父母的家里搬了出来,这一天邻居女装完回家,被你看到了。没想到邻居的妈妈早就在家里等着他,看到女装的邻居,俩人大吵一架,母亲剪碎了他的粉色裙子和假发,这就是你所看到的事情。

key_facts: The 'woman' in the pink dress was the neighbor himself.
The neighbor is a man who cross-dresses.
The late-night argument was between the neighbor and his mother.
The neighbor's mother discovered his cross-dressing.
The mother was very angry about it.
The mother shredded the neighbor's pink dress.
The mother cut up the neighbor's wig.
The neighbor stammered because he wanted to hide his cross-dressing.
The neighbor's family does not accept his hobby.
The items in the trash bag were the result of a family conflict, not evidence of a crime.

Late at night, you hear arguing and things being thrown, which is particularly jarring in the quiet hallway. The next day, you see a shredded pink dress and a bunch of long hair in the garbage bag outside your neighbor's door. When you ask your neighbor about it, he stammers and refuses to explain... Should you call the police? What happened?
alternate_formulations.solution: Your neighbor is a man with a cross-dressing fetish, which is why he lives alone. His family doesn't know about this and keeps pressuring him to get married, so he moved out of his parents' home. That day, he returned home after cross-dressing and you saw him. Unexpectedly, his mother was waiting for him at home. Seeing her son in women's clothing, they had a big argument, and his mother cut up his pink dress and wig. This is what actually happened.

title: The Ritual
condition: Lately, your parents have been arguing a lot. You also feel your mother has been acting strangely. She's always distracted, secretly asking you how to transfer money to others... Sometimes she waves her hands silently at home as if performing some ritual. One evening after dinner, your father went out for a walk, and your mother also quietly left. Already suspicious, you followed her... Ah, so that's what it was...
solution: Your mother was practicing for her public square dancing group. Your father thought she was having an affair. The money transfer was to buy team outfits for dancing, and the hand-waving was to practice the dance moves. To avoid disturbing the neighbors, all the square-dancing ladies wear headphones and dance in silence, which looks like they're performing some mysterious ritual.

zh.title: 仪式
zh.condition: 最近你的父母总是吵架,你也觉得你的母亲状态有些奇怪,她总是心不在焉,偷偷问你怎么给别人转账......有时候会在家里无声地挥舞双手像在进行什么仪式。一天晚饭过后,你父亲出门去散步了,你母亲也悄悄出了门,已经起了疑心的你跟在她身后......啊,原来如此......
zh.solution: 你母亲跳广场舞,你父亲以为她外面有人了,转账是为了买跳舞用的团队服装,手舞足蹈是为了练习舞蹈。而且为了防止扰民,所有的广场舞阿姨都是戴着耳机无声跳舞的,看起来像是在进行什么神秘仪式似的。

key_facts: The mother's strange behavior was square dancing.
The father misunderstood the mother's actions.
The father suspected the mother was having an affair.
The mother asked about transferring money to buy dance costumes.
The mother waving her hands was her practicing dance moves.
The 'silence' was because they were dancing with headphones on.
Dancing with headphones was to avoid disturbing the neighbors.
The mother sneaking out was to go dance with her group.
The parents' arguments stemmed from the father's misunderstanding.

Ah, so that's what it is...
alternate_formulations.solution: Your mother is doing square dancing. Your father thought she was having an affair. The money transfers were for buying team dance costumes, and the hand-waving was dance practice. To avoid disturbing neighbors, all the square-dancing aunties wear headphones and dance silently, making it look like some mysterious ritual.

title: Counting
condition: I was counting, and he was counting too. I was terrified.
solution: I live in a high-rise building. Today, out of boredom, I looked out the window and accidentally witnessed a crime in the opposite building. A man seemed to have stabbed someone to death. I quickly took out my phone to call the police. The police asked for the floor where the incident occurred, so I started counting the floors to the man's level. When I reached his floor, I realized the man had noticed me and was counting the floors up to my level, holding a bloody knife and smiling eerily!

zh.title: 数数
zh.condition: 我数数,他也在数数,我毛骨悚然。
zh.solution: 我家住在高层,今天我闲着无聊向窗户外面看的时候,意外目击了一场案件,就发生在对面大楼里,一个男人像是刺死了一个人。我连忙掏出手机想要报警,警察问我发生事故的楼层,于是我数着男人所在的楼层。等数到男人那层时,我发现男人注意到了我,数着我所在的楼层,握着血淋淋的刀,露出诡异的笑容!

key_facts: I and the person in the opposite building were looking at each other through the windows.
The counting was to determine the floor number.
I was counting to specify a location.
A terrible event happened at that location.
The other person was counting the floors towards me.
The other person wanted to kill me.
I am in danger.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.
Dataset repository includes an Apache-2.0 license.

alternate_formulations.condition: I'm counting, and he's counting too. I'm terrified.
alternate_formulations.solution: I live in a high-rise building. Today, out of boredom, I was looking out the window when I accidentally witnessed a crime in the opposite building. A man seemed to have stabbed someone to death. I quickly took out my phone to call the police. The police asked which floor the incident occurred on, so I started counting the floors to the man's location. When I counted to his floor, I realized the man had noticed me and was counting the floors to my location, holding a bloody knife and showing a sinister smile!

title: The News
condition: A man came home from work, turned on the TV to watch the news, and then fainted from shock.
solution: The man worked at a haunted house and was responsible for cleaning up after it closed. The haunted house had many prop corpses. While cleaning, he saw a very realistic prop corpse. He didn't think much of it, marveling at the craftsmanship as he cleaned. After work, he went home, turned on the TV, and saw a news report about a missing person case. The report showed a photo of the missing person, who was the same person as the realistic prop he had seen in the haunted house. He fainted from shock.

zh.title: 新闻
zh.condition: 一男子工作下班回到家,打开电视看新闻,然后被吓晕了。
zh.solution: 男子是一名鬼屋工作人员,鬼屋打烊后他负责打扫。鬼屋里有许多道具尸体,在他打扫的时候,看见了一具非常逼真的道具尸体,男子没有多想,一边感叹道具制作用心边打扫。工作结束后他回到家,打开电视看新闻,新闻里播着一则失踪案件,有公布失踪者照片,照片上的人正是他在鬼屋中看到的逼真道具,被吓昏了过去。

key_facts: The man's workplace is a haunted house.
The man's job involves handling horror props.
He saw a very realistic 'corpse' at work.
He initially thought the realistic corpse was a prop.
The man watched the TV news after getting home from work.
The news reported a missing person case.
The news showed a photo of the missing person.
The missing person's photo matched the 'corpse' he saw at the haunted house.
The man realized what he saw was not a prop, but a real body.
He fainted from the shock.

alternate_formulations.condition: A man returns home from work, turns on the TV to watch the news, and faints.
alternate_formulations.solution: The man works at a haunted house attraction and is responsible for cleaning up after it closes. There are many prop corpses in the haunted house. While cleaning, he saw a very realistic prop corpse. He didn't think much of it, just admiring the craftsmanship of it while cleaning. After finishing work and returning home, he turned on the TV to watch the news. The news reported a missing person case and showed a photo of the missing person - it was the 'prop' he had seen in the haunted house. He fainted from shock.

title: The Slide
condition: Near programmer Wang's home, there is a park. Every day when Wang passed the park on his way home from working overtime, he would see a child in a plaid shirt standing by the slide with a terrified look. One day, Wang didn't work overtime and, on a whim, went down the slide. After sliding down, Wang was horrified. What did he see?
solution: It turned out Wang saw himself on his way home from work. The slide was a time machine. When Wang slid down, he turned into the child. The child's plaid shirt was actually programmer Wang's. The terrified child he saw every time was himself after sliding down.

zh.title: 滑梯
zh.condition: 程序员小王家附近有一个公园,小王每天加班回家经过公园时都能看到公园滑梯旁站着个穿着格子衫一脸惊恐的小孩。有一天小王没有加班,心血来潮的去滑了那个滑梯,滑下来后小王大惊失色。请问小王看到了什么?
zh.solution: 原来小王看到了下班回家时的自己,这个滑梯是个时光机器,小王从滑梯上滑下来的时候就变成了小孩。小孩的格子衫也其实是程序员小王的,他每次看到的一脸惊恐的小孩就是滑下来的自己。

key_facts: The slide has an unnatural function.
The slide is related to time.
The terrified child seen every day is the same person.
The child's plaid shirt is related to Wang.
After sliding down, Wang saw himself.
Sliding down caused a change in age.
The child was the younger version of Wang himself.

alternate_formulations.condition: There's a park near programmer Xiao Wang's home. alternate_formulations.solution: It turns out Xiao Wang saw himself as he usually is when returning home from work. The slide is a time machine, and when Xiao Wang slid down, he turned into a child. The plaid shirt the child was wearing is actually programmer Xiao Wang's shirt.

title: The Lost Phone
condition: My phone was missing. When I found it, I was terrified.
solution: I went clubbing with my best friend. After drinking a bit and dancing, I sat down to rest and realized my phone was gone. I asked my friend to call my number. A strange man's voice answered, but the club was too loud, and he hung up before we could ask anything. I went home feeling dejected, only to find my phone on my bedside table. I suddenly remembered I hadn't taken my phone out with me at all today, and I've always lived alone. I couldn't help but feel a chill down my spine...

zh.title: 丢失的手机
zh.condition: 我的手机不见了,当我找到它时,我吓了一跳。
zh.solution: 我和闺蜜去酒吧蹦迪,我喝了点酒蹦了一会儿,坐下来休息时才发现自己手机不见了,于是就让闺蜜给我手机打个电话,电话那头传来一位陌生男子的声音,酒吧太吵了,我们还没来得及问清楚,电话就被那头挂断了。我怀着郁闷的心情回到了家,结果发现我的手机就在床头,我忽然想起今天我根本就没把手机带出门,而我一直以来都是一个人居住,我不禁毛骨悚然...

key_facts: 'I' thought the phone was lost outside.
Someone answered the call 'I' made to the lost phone.
The person who answered was a strange man.
The phone was eventually found in 'my' house.
'I' live alone.
'I' did not take the phone out that day.
A stranger had entered the house.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

alternate_formulations.condition: My phone disappeared. When I found it, I was shocked.
alternate_formulations.solution: My friend and I went clubbing. After drinking and dancing for a while, I sat down to rest and realized my phone was missing. So I asked my friend to call my phone. A strange man's voice answered, but the club was too noisy and the call was cut off before we could ask anything. I returned home feeling dejected, only to find my phone on the bedside table. I suddenly remembered I hadn't taken my phone out at all that day. I've always lived alone, and I couldn't help but feel a chill run down my spine...

title: The Girl Who Jumped
condition: A college girl was working part-time during her vacation and not living at home. One night, she heard a noise and the sound of a door opening downstairs, so she immediately hid under the bed. The next day, she was found dead under the bed. Please deduce.
solution: A girl had previously jumped to her death from the dormitory building. That day happened to be the seventh day after her death, and she returned to find a replacement. Since the girl died by jumping, her ghost maintained an upside-down posture. When she entered the room, she came face-to-face with the girl hiding under the bed, who died of fright.

zh.title: 跳楼女
zh.condition: 一女子大学放假期间,因兼职没回家住,一天夜里听见楼下有声响和开门的声音,就马上躲到了床底下,第二天却发现死在了床底下。请推理。
zh.solution: 宿舍楼曾经有位跳楼死的女孩,这天刚好是死去女孩的头七,她回来是想找个替死鬼,而女孩是跳楼至死的,所以回来的样子仍然保持身体倒着向下的状况,进门时刚好就和躲床底的女子对视上了,所以女子吓死了。

key_facts: The girl died of extreme fright.
Someone had recently committed suicide by jumping from the dormitory building.
The event occurred on the 'seventh day' after the death, a significant day in some traditions.
The noise was made by the ghost of the girl who jumped.
The ghost maintained the posture it had at the time of death.
The ghost's posture was head-down, feet-up.
The girl hiding under the bed saw the ghost's face.
The ghost entered the room upside down.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Pregnant
condition: I'm pregnant... but ever since my sister came to my house, I'm the only one left in the house.
solution: My husband and I were very much in love. Shortly after we got married, I became pregnant. We finally had our first child, but I developed postpartum depression because of it. My mental state got worse and worse, and I had a strong lack of security. I imagined my child as my 'sister'. I saw that whenever the 'sister' cried, my husband would rush to comfort her, and even when the 'sister' ate, my husband had to feed her. I felt very angry and jealous. Why should my husband care so much for this 'sister'? He said he would only love me in his life. Overwhelmed by anger and jealousy, I killed both of them in a fit of rage.

zh.title: 怀孕
zh.condition: 我怀孕了..但自从妹妹来我家后,家就剩我一个人了
zh.solution: 我和我的丈夫很恩爱,结婚不久后我就怀孕了,我们终于有了属于我们的第一个孩子,但我却因此得了产后抑郁症,我的精神状态变得越来越差,强烈缺乏安全感,把我的孩子想像成了妹妹,我看到每当妹妹哭的时候,丈夫就会急忙上前哄,甚至妹妹连吃饭都要丈夫喂,我感到很愤怒嫉妒,凭什么我的丈夫要对妹妹这么关爱,他说过这辈子只会爱我一个人的,被愤怒与嫉妒冲上头的我一气之下杀了他们两个。

key_facts: The narrator recently gave birth to a child.
The narrator's mental state became unstable after childbirth.
The 'sister' mentioned in the story actually refers to the baby.
The narrator misunderstood and became jealous of her husband's care for the baby.
The other people in the house were killed by the narrator.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Bloody Prosperity
condition: That winter when many starved in cities, a mountain town's lumber industry strangely flourished. Why?
solution: During famine, urbanites returned to rural areas seeking food. Townspeople killed returnees, using their bodies as fertilizer to enrich poor soil for premium lumber - bringing prosperity built on mass murder.

zh.title: 血色繁荣
zh.condition: 那年冬天,城里饿死了无数的人,山区的小镇的林木业突然欣欣向荣了起来。为什么?
zh.solution: 那年闹饥荒,城里粮食紧缺,城里的人纷纷回到山区回到农村想要种粮谋生,山区小镇的人动了歪心思,将返乡的人们杀掉埋在土下化为肥料,肥沃本贫瘠的土壤,植树造林。拥有人肉肥料滋养的树木生长好品质好,小镇的人靠卖高等木材赚了不少钱,小镇由此欣欣向荣了 起来。

key_facts: The prosperity came from deaths
Returnees were all murdered
Bodies became tree fertilizer
Premium lumber came from human remains
Prosperity masked horrific crimes

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Auction
condition: Sam is a kind-hearted rich man. One day, he bid high at an auction for something he didn’t like. Six months later, he noticed that everyone except him at the auction had died. He felt proud of his actions.
solution: He was invited to an auction disguised as a charity event, but it was actually an auction for 'female slaves' organized by a criminal group. These slaves were female assassins, whose mission was to enter wealthy homes, rob them, and kill the owners. To protect these women from further exploitation, Sam bid high on one of the slaves and took her home. Sam treated her like a daughter, and the assassin was moved and quietly left his house. The other wealthy men were not so fortunate and were killed, their wealth stolen.

zh.title: 拍卖会
zh.condition: 山姆是一位心善的富翁,有天他在拍卖会上高价拍下一个他并不喜欢的东西。半年以后,他渐渐发现参加拍卖会的人除了自己全部都死了。他也为自己的行为感到骄傲。
zh.solution: 他有天被邀请参加一个以慈善为名的拍卖会。但是背后却是一个犯罪集团组织的‘女性奴隶’的拍卖会。而这些奴隶都是犯罪集团的女杀手,他们的目的是进入富豪家,然后将他们抢劫一空并杀害。山姆为了这些奴隶不被其他人所‘摧残’,只能高价拍下一个奴隶回家。回到家后,山姆对待她像对待女儿一样。女杀手被感动了,她就偷偷的离开了山姆家。而其他富翁并没有山姆那样,最终被杀害且财产被抢劫一空。

key_facts: The auction was not charity-based
The item bought was a human being
The item was inherently dangerous
The rich man’s kindness saved his own life
The other wealthy men were killed

title: Destruction
condition: This time, my work will destroy everyone.
solution: Back then, when I was just starting out, I didn't understand the unwritten rules and refused the critics' hints for bribes. As a result, my debut work received overwhelmingly negative reviews, and I myself was labeled notorious. Later, I learned the ways of the world, built good relationships with them through various means, and my works began to receive rave reviews. Today, I have become what people call an 'artist,' but I have never forgotten the initial humiliation. This time, I have meticulously prepared a shockingly bad film; every shot is infused with my fire of revenge. I can't wait to see how, when those critics who took my money praise this 'masterpiece' against their conscience, the discerning eyes of the audience will nail them to the pillar of shame. That day will be the day of their ruin and disgrace, and also the time for my sweet revenge.

zh.title: 毁灭
zh.condition: 这一次,我的作品会毁灭所有人。
zh.solution: 当年我初出茅庐,不懂规矩,拒绝了评论家们索要红包的暗示,结果处女作恶评如潮,我自己也被冠以恶名。后来,我学会了人情世故,与他们用各种手段打好关系,作品也开始好评如潮。时至今日,我应然变成人们口中的“艺术家”,但我从未忘记当初的羞辱。这一次,我精心筹备了一部惊世骇俗的烂片,每个镜头都凝聚着我的复仇之火。我已经迫不及待地想看到,当那些收了钱的评论家们昧着良心吹捧这部“杰作”时,观众雪亮的眼睛将如何把他们钉在耻辱柱上。那一天,将是他们身败名裂之日,也是我快意恩仇之时。

key_facts: My profession is a director or artist.
'Destruction' is not physical but refers to the destruction of reputation.
The 'everyone' to be destroyed specifically refers to those corrupt critics.
This 'work' is a terrible film I deliberately produced.
The critics, having received benefits from me, have to praise it against their conscience.
My ultimate goal is revenge, to make these critics lose their reputation and be disgraced.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Library Book Borrowing
condition: A woman went to the library to borrow a book, and when she opened it, she cried.
solution: The woman was the author of the book. She had inserted 100 yuan into the book and donated it to the library. Years later, she came back to borrow the book, and the money was still there, showing that no one had ever read her book.

zh.title: 图书馆借书
zh.condition: 女人去图书馆借了一本书,翻开以后她哭了。
zh.solution: 女人是这本书的作者,她在书中夹了 100元,捐给了图书馆,几年过去了,她再回来借这本书,但钱还在里面,说明根本没人看她的书。

key_facts: The woman was the author of the book
She placed money in the book as a donation
The money had never been touched over the years
The book had never been truly read by anyone
She was heartbroken because her work was ignored

title: Red is Destruction
condition: Red is destruction, blue is salvation, black is death.
solution: A building caught fire. The fire burned everything. Firefighters used water to extinguish the fire, trying to save the trapped residents. Unfortunately, some residents were still choked to death by the black smoke.

zh.title: 红色是毁灭
zh.condition: 红色是毁灭,蓝色是拯救,黑色是死亡。
zh.solution: 有个大楼起火了,火烧光了所有的东西,消防员用水灭火,想拯救被困的居民,可惜,还是有些居民活生生地被黑色的浓烟呛死了。

key_facts: This event involves a common disaster whose primary destructive force is often visualized as red.
The means used for 'salvation' is a common liquid, usually considered blue.
The fatal factor represented by the color 'black' is produced by the 'red' process of destruction.
The event took place in a building.
Despite the 'blue' rescue efforts, 'black' still caused fatalities.

title: The Fifth Person
condition: On a country road, five men walked together. It started to rain, and four of them quickened their pace. However, the fifth man wasn’t in a hurry. In the end, all five reached the destination at the same time. The four men who hurried got soaked, but the fifth man remained dry.
solution: The four men were carrying a coffin. The fifth person was lying in the coffin, already dead.

zh.title: 第五个人
zh.condition: 乡间小路上,五名男子一同前行。突然开始下雨,五人中的四人加快了步伐,然而第五人一点也不着急。最终,五人同时到达目的地。加快脚步的四人被淋成了落汤鸡,而第五个人身上却一点也没湿。
zh.solution: 四个人在抬棺材。第五个人是躺在棺材里的死人。

key_facts: The four men were carrying a coffin
The fifth person was lying in the coffin
He didn’t need to hurry because he was already dead
The four men were soaked while carrying the coffin
The coffin protected the fifth person from getting wet

title: Hide-and-Seek
condition: Mom taught me to play hide-and-seek, the rules were different from when I played with friends. I won, Mom died.
solution: I am 7 years old. My dad, mom, and I were once a happy family of three. But ever since Dad started drinking heavily, everything changed. He turned into a monster I didn't recognize. He started hitting Mom for no reason, each time beating her until she wouldn't move before he would stop. Once, after hitting Mom, he saw me crying loudly nearby. He raised his fist and walked towards me. Mom, seeing this, desperately crawled up and rushed over to hold his leg. Dad beat Mom again until she couldn't move, then went into the house. The next day, while Dad was away, I asked Mom: 'Mom, how can we stop Dad from hitting us? I don't want to see you get hit anymore, it hurts me so much...' Mom, with tears in her eyes, smiled and said: 'Sweetie, let's play hide-and-seek, okay? If you win, we won't be hit anymore. But this game is different from when you play with your friends. In this game, Dad and I are both looking for you. If I find you, you win. If Dad finds you, then you run downstairs quickly, don't let Dad catch you, okay?' 'Okay, Mom, I understand!' Another night, Dad came back drunk again. Unsurprisingly, he beat Mom again with fists and kicks. After a while, seeing Mom motionless, Dad went back to his room to rest. After Mom saw him go back, she carefully crawled over to me, curled up in a ball, and said: 'Sweetie, let's start playing hide-and-seek now.' I immediately got up and hid in the large wardrobe in my bedroom, not daring to make a sound. Through the crack in the door, I vaguely saw Mom holding a fruit knife, walking into Dad's bedroom. After a sound of fighting and things breaking, Mom staggered out slowly. Mom opened the wardrobe where I was hiding and said: 'Sweetie won, Dad will never hit us again, Mom will always love you...' After saying that, Mom collapsed, and bright red blood kept flowing from her neck. Mom closed her eyes forever... It turned out that when Mom was trying to kill Dad, Dad wasn't fast asleep. He was awakened by Mom's footsteps, saw Mom holding the knife, and started to struggle for it. During the struggle, Mom's hand holding the knife was grabbed by Dad, and it cut Mom's carotid artery. Blood gushed out continuously. At this moment, Dad was stunned, and Mom took this opportunity to stab the fruit knife into Dad's heart.

zh.title: 捉迷藏
zh.condition: 妈妈教我玩捉迷藏,和小朋友玩的规则不一样,我赢了,妈妈死了。
zh.solution: 我今年7岁,和爸爸妈妈曾经也是幸福的一家三口。 可是自从爸爸开始酗酒后,一切都变了,他变成了我不认识的怪物。他开始无缘无故的打妈妈,每次都打到妈妈一动不动才肯罢休。有一次他打完妈妈,看到了旁边哭的很大声的我。他抡起拳头就冲我走过来,妈妈看到后拼命爬起冲过来拖住他的腿,爸爸又把妈妈打到无法动弹,这才进屋。 第二天趁爸爸不在,我问妈妈:“妈妈,我们怎么才能不被爸爸打,我不想再看你被打了,我好心疼...”妈妈眼含泪水,微笑着说:“乖乖,我们玩捉迷藏好不好?只要你赢了,我们就不会再被打了,但是这个游戏和你平时跟小朋友们玩的不太一样,这个游戏里我和爸爸都是要找你的人,如果我找到你,你就赢了。如果是爸爸找到你,那你就赶快跑下楼,不能被爸爸抓住,好不好?” “好的妈妈,我知道啦!”又一天晚上,爸爸又醉醺醺的回来了。不出所料的对妈妈又是一顿拳打脚踢,过了一阵子看妈妈不动了,爸爸便回房间休息了。 妈妈看到他回去后,小心的爬过来和缩成一团的我讲:“乖乖,我们现在开始玩捉迷藏吧。”我马上起来躲到了自己卧室的大衣柜中,一声不敢吱。从门缝中隐约看到妈妈拿着一把水果刀,走进了爸爸的卧室,在一阵撕打声和东西摔碎的声音后,妈妈踉踉跄跄缓慢的走了出来。妈妈打开了我藏身的衣柜,说:“乖乖赢了,以后爸爸再也不会打咱们了,妈妈永远爱你...”说完,妈妈就倒下了,脖子处一直有鲜红的血液流出来。妈妈永远闭上了眼睛... 原来,妈妈在杀爸爸的时候,爸爸并没有熟睡,被妈妈的脚步声惊醒,看到妈妈举着刀就开始抢夺,抢夺过程中妈妈拿着刀的手被爸爸抓住,划到了妈妈的颈动脉,鲜血不断涌出,这一刻爸爸愣住了,而妈妈趁着这个时间把水果刀刺进了爸爸的心脏。

key_facts: This game of hide-and-seek was a plan designed by the mother to solve the problem of domestic violence.
The peculiarity of the game rules (e.g., Mom finding the child means winning) was to protect the child and execute the plan.
While the child was hiding, the mother took fatal action against the father.
The father also died during this 'game'.
The mother's cause of death was a fatal injury sustained during the struggle with the father.

title: He
condition:
Great, he's dead
Oh no, he's not dead
Damn it, he's dead
solution: He and I were generals of two opposing countries, deadlocked on the battlefield for many days. One day, I heard he was dead and happily ordered my troops to advance. Unexpectedly, I saw him again on the battlefield. I thought I had fallen into a trap and ordered a retreat. Later, I found out it was just his statue. I fell for his posthumous trick and missed the best opportunity to deploy my troops.

zh.title: 他
zh.condition:
太好了,他死了
不好,他没死
可恶,他死了
zh.solution: 我和他是两个对立国家的将军,已在阵前相持多日,一日我听说他死了,高兴的下令出兵,没想到又在阵前看见了他,我以为中计,下令退兵,后来才知道那只是他的雕像,我中了他的遗计,错失了用兵的最好时机。

key_facts: A visual misdirection was the key reason for the misjudgment (thinking the opponent wasn't dead).
The opponent used a posthumous stratagem.
The event takes place in the context of military confrontation or intense competition.
The narrator's final regret is related to missing a strategic opportunity, not just the opponent's life or death.
A non-living object was used as a key deception tool, creating the illusion that the opponent was still alive.

title: Unexpectedly Young
condition: One day, the idle Xiao Li was wandering the streets. He happened to be near a primary school as it was letting out. In the crowded stream of people, Xiao Li was unfortunately knocked over by a mischievous student, Xiao Ming. Not only did Xiao Ming not apologize, but he also provoked Xiao Li. However, Xiao Li wasn't angry and was instead very happy. Why?
solution: Xiao Ming angrily said, 'Which class are you in?' Xiao Li, who was nearly 30, never expected to look so young in a primary schooler's eyes and felt much better about himself.

zh.title: 意外年轻
zh.condition: 一天,游手好闲的小李在大街上游荡。正巧碰上一所小学放学,小李在拥挤的人流中不幸被无良小学生小明撞倒,小明不仅没有道歉而且还挑衅小李,小李却没有因此生气反而很高兴,这是为什么?
zh.solution: 小明很生气的说了一句:“你是哪个班的?”年近 30 的小李没想到自己在小学生眼之里看上去这么年轻,心里舒坦了很多。

key_facts: Xiao Li's actual age is close to 30.
Xiao Ming is a primary school student.
Xiao Ming said something to Xiao Li after knocking him over.
Xiao Ming asked Xiao Li which class he was in.
Xiao Ming mistook Xiao Li for a student.
Xiao Li was happy because of what Xiao Ming said.
Xiao Li was happy because he felt he looked young.
Xiao Li was not angry about being knocked over or provoked.

title: The Raging Fire
condition: The fire raged. He was a hero; he was a running dog.
solution: The hero and the running dog are the same person. As a hero, he was an undercover agent who made significant contributions by gathering intelligence from the enemy, with his deeds recorded only within his organization. As a running dog, to gather intelligence and protect his organization, he had to make many choices against his conscience, even eliminating former comrades, teachers, and innocent people. But later, he was betrayed. The traitor burned his identity documents and work records in front of him. Even if he survived, there would be no documents to prove his past and future sacrifices, and no one could step forward to vouch for his innocence.

zh.title: 烈火
zh.condition: 烈火熊熊燃烧,他是英雄,他是走狗。
zh.solution: 英雄和走狗是同一个人,英雄身份潜伏在敌方获取情报为组织做了重大贡献,只在组织中记录在案;走狗身份则是潜伏时为了获取情报和保护组织,不得不做出许多违背本心的选择,甚至要亲手清除曾经的战友、老师和无辜之人。但后来他被叛徒暗算,叛徒当着他的面烧掉了他的身份证明材料以及他的工作记录,就算他能活下来,但再也没有任何文件能证明他曾付出的和他未来将要付出的一切,也不会有任何人能站出来,为他所做的一切证明清白。

key_facts: The 'hero' and the 'running dog' are the same person.
His identity is an undercover agent or a spy.
The 'raging fire' destroyed important documents.
His true identity can no longer be proven.
The story involves betrayal and sacrifice.
He lost the chance to prove his innocence.

title: Piety
condition: The Creator God was very angry. With the efforts of the divine envoys, the God smiled many years later.
solution: The Creator God created the world. When He discovered that the created humans had greatly polluted the beautiful world, and that human hearts were no longer as pure and beautiful as when they were first created, the Creator God became very angry. He found His believing divine envoys, explained all of this to them, and warned them to make changes, otherwise the power He left behind would destroy this world. The divine envoys initially spread goodwill, advocated environmental protection, and led by example, but they found it was useless. Human inherent weaknesses persisted, and the world could never become beautiful. So the divine envoys ultimately used divine power to destroy the existing civilization. Many years later, the Earth, without human civilization, regained its former vitality and beauty, and forest apes, which had not evolved into humans, regained their 'purity' in biological thought. The God saw this scene, was very satisfied, and smiled.

zh.title: 虔诚
zh.condition: 创世神很生气。在神使们的努力下,多年后神笑了。
zh.solution: 创世神创造了世界,当祂发现被创造出的人类用极大污染了美丽的世界,人类的心灵也并不如刚创造出来那样纯洁美丽的时候,创世神很生气。祂找到信奉自己的神使,向他们阐述了这一切,并警告他们要做出改变,否则祂留下的力量将会毁灭这个世界。神使们最开始传播善意、提倡环保并以身作则,但他们发现这根本没有用,人类的劣根性始终存在,世界永远不能变得美好。所以神使们最终动用了神的力量摧毁了现有文明,许多年后,没有人类文明的地球恢复了以往的生机与美丽,没有进化成人类的森林古猿也恢复了生物思想上的"纯洁",神看到这一幕,很满意,于是笑了。

key_facts: The Creator God is angry about human pollution of the world and moral degradation
The divine envoys initially tried to change humanity through education
The divine envoys found that humanity's 'inherent weaknesses' could not be changed
The divine envoys ultimately chose to destroy existing civilization to 'purify' the world
God's smile stems from the Earth regaining its original vitality and the 'purity' of its creatures, not from human change

title: Red Clothes
condition: 'Do you want red clothes?',' Why is that salesman here again? I can't stand it anymore. How many red clothes do you have? I'll take them all. Stop bothering me!',' The next day, no one in the dormitory got up'.
solution: I am a college student. At night, a woman in red often comes to sell door-to-door late at night, knocking on each room every night. If someone opens the door, she asks, 'Do you want red clothes?'. In the previous nights, I was very angry after being disturbed and shouted 'No'. One night, the woman came again. I finally couldn't bear it and yelled at her, 'How many red clothes do you have? I'll take them all. Stop bothering me!' I only heard the woman chuckle, turned around, and left without giving me red clothes. That night, everyone slept well, and no one came to knock on the door again. The next day, no one got up. When the dorm supervisor checked the dormitory and lifted the quilt, it was found that the skin on the upper body of me and my roommates had been peeled off, looking like wearing a red dress.

zh.title: 红衣服
zh.condition: “要红衣服吗?”那个推销的怎么又来了?我再也忍受不了,你有多少红衣服,我都要了,别吵了!”第二天,宿舍没有人起床。
zh.solution: 我是一名大学生,夜里经常有一个穿红色衣服的女子深夜上门推销,天天夜里都来,一间间房间的敲,如果有人开门就问“要不要红衣服?前几夜由于我被吵后非常生气,都大叫着不要,一连几个晚上都这样,有一个晚上,那个女子又来了,我终于忍受不了,对她大吼:“你有多少红衣服,我都要了,别吵了!”只听那女子轻笑一声,转身走了,也没给我红色的衣服,那晚上大家都睡得很好,没有人再来敲门了。第二天,没有人起来,宿管来查寝,把大家的被子掀开,才发现我和室友上身的皮已经被剥掉了,看起来就像是穿了一件红衣服。

key_facts: Red-clothed woman knocks on the door to sell at night
Red clothes have a terrifying meaning
The protagonist angrily accepts the invitation
An angry word招致 (causes) a terrifying disaster
Roommates are all skinned and made into red clothes

title: Little Girl
condition: One day, the little girl asked her mother, "Who is that uncle?" A week later, the little girl died, and both her mother and the uncle were very sad.
solution: The 'little girl' was actually an elderly grandmother suffering from Alzheimer's disease. She mistook her daughter for her mother and her husband for an uncle. Ultimately, the grandmother died naturally. Her 'mother' (daughter) and 'uncle' (husband) were both very sad.

zh.title: 小女孩
zh.condition: 有一天,小女孩对妈妈说,那个伯伯是谁啊。一个礼拜后,小女孩死了,妈妈和伯伯都很伤心。
zh.solution: 小女孩其实不是小女孩。其实是一个奶奶,她得了老年痴呆症,把女孩认成了妈妈,丈夫认成了伯伯。最后那个奶奶自然死了。"妈妈"和"伯伯"都很伤心。

key_facts: The little girl is actually an elderly person with dementia
The daughter is mistaken for the mother
The husband is mistaken for an uncle
The death was due to natural causes
The sadness stems from the loss of a loved one

title: Date
condition: I've been confined for over three months. Today, light shone in. No, it's not time yet!
solution: I am a fetus. After three months, my mother was found to be pregnant. Instead of being happy, she became extremely anxious because I was the product of my parents' impulsive actions. Today was the day I was taken out. The operating room lights shone in, and I left this world.

zh.title: 日期
zh.condition: 我被关了三个多月了,这天有光照进来,不行,还没到时间!
zh.solution: 我是胎儿,三个月的时候我的母亲被查出怀孕了,得知消息后的母亲非但没有高兴,反而格外慌张,因为我是父母冲动的产物。今天是我被取出来的日子,手术室的灯光照了进来,我也离开了人世。

key_facts: My true identity is a fetus
"Confined" refers to being in the mother's womb
"Light" is the operating room light for an abortion
"Not time yet" refers to not being due for birth
The cause of death was an induced abortion

title: Too Late
condition: I started my homework on the last day of summer vacation. When I opened the first page, I realized it was too late.
solution: Opening the first page, I saw a note with the handwriting of my crush: 'I'm transferring schools, but I have something very important to tell you... Let's agree to meet.'

zh.condition: 暑假最后一天才开始写作业,翻开第一页时,我意识到来不及了。
zh.solution: 翻开第一页,我看到一张纸条,上面是我暗恋的人的笔迹:“我要转学了,但是有很重要的话想对你说......我们约定好见一面吧”

title: Son
condition: The son committed suicide and left a note. The mother went crazy after reading the note.
solution: After marrying a wealthy businessman, the woman killed the wealthy businessman's original son in an accident for property. Later, she gave birth to her own son, but the son committed suicide after learning that the woman was pregnant again. The note said: You killed me, so I will make you give birth to me repeatedly and lose me again.

zh.title: 儿子
zh.condition: 儿子自杀了,留了一张纸条,母亲看了纸条后疯了。
zh.solution: 女人嫁给富商后,为了财产制造意外杀了富商原配的儿子。后来生了一个自己的儿子,儿子却在得知女人又怀孕之后自杀了,纸条上写着:你杀了我,那我就让你反复生下我,再失去我。

title: Ghost Bride
condition: A man was found curled in an embrace in a courtyard, a smile on his lips, tightly clutching a rusty iron ring. Autopsy showed he died of cardiac arrest, but eerily, the forensic doctor found traces of certain scenes in his pupils.
solution: There was a legend of a ghost bride in this courtyard, and the man, out of curiosity, broke into the old house. She appeared and asked, "Will you stay with me forever?" The man feigned agreement to escape, but she took his lie as a vow, constructing a illusory wedding scene with her obsession. The man felt extreme happiness in the illusion, unaware that his life force was being devoured, eventually leading to cardiac arrest due to emotional overload. The rusty ring he clutched before death was the concretization of her imagined 'love token.' And the scenes in the man's eyes were reflections of the wedding scene.

zh.title: 鬼新娘
zh.condition: 一名男子被发现蜷缩成拥抱的姿势倒在一座庭院里,嘴角含笑,手中紧握一枚生锈的铁戒指。尸检显示他死于心脏骤停,但是诡异的是法医发现他的瞳孔残留某些场景。
zh.solution: 关于这座庭院一直有一个鬼新娘的传说,男子因好奇鬼新娘的传说闯入古宅。她现身询问:"你愿意永远陪着我吗?"男子为脱身假意答应,她却将他的谎言当作誓约,用执念构建出虚幻的婚礼场景。男子在幻境中感受到极致幸福,却不知自己的生命力正被吞噬,最终心脏因情绪过载停止跳动。他死前紧握的锈戒,正是她幻想中"爱情信物"的具象化。而男子眼中的场景正是婚礼现场的倒影。

key_facts: The man was in a happy hallucination before death
The man made some kind of 'promise' to the 'ghost bride' before death
The rusty ring in the man's hand was an 'love token' from the hallucination
The scenes remaining in the man's pupils were the illusions he saw before his death
The man's death from cardiac arrest was due to his life force being consumed by the illusion

title: Family Heirloom
condition: This 'family heirloom,' after all, ended in my hands.
solution: I knew that the widely rumored murderer in town was my father; my grandfather's past abuse towards him had twisted his personality. And I, too, had not escaped his clutches. In this oppressive family atmosphere, the evil thought of murder had been growing in my heart. Finally, after a fierce conflict, the long-suppressed anger, fear, and despair burst forth like a raging flood. I lost control and stabbed my father with a knife. Watching him fall, I was overcome with a mixture of grief and fear. I quickly wrote a suicide note, pouring out this twisted past, my father's crimes, and my inner struggles onto it. Then, I raised a gun and killed myself, hoping to end this evil legacy with my life.

zh.title: 传家宝
zh.condition: 这份“传家宝”,终究还是断在了我的手里。
zh.solution: 我知晓镇上盛传的杀人犯正是我的父亲,爷爷往昔对他的虐待,扭曲了他的心性。而我,也未曾逃过他的魔掌。在这压抑的家庭氛围里,我杀人的邪念一直在心底生长。终于,在一次激烈的冲突后,长期积压的愤怒、恐惧、绝望如洪水猛兽般决堤,我失控地拿刀刺向了父亲。望着他倒下,我悲恸、恐惧交织。我疾笔如飞写下遗书,将这扭曲的过往、父亲罪行、我内心的挣扎尽诉其上。然后,我举枪自尽,希望以命终止这罪恶的传承。

key_facts: 'Family heirloom' refers to the intergenerational transmission of violence or criminal tendencies in the family.
The father's violent behavior stemmed from the abuse he suffered in childhood.
I was also a victim of my father's abuse.
I eventually killed my father.
After killing my father, I also chose to commit suicide.
My suicide was to completely end this family's evil legacy.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Blind Masseuse
condition: I heard there was a new blind massage parlor. Dinglingling, I died.
solution: I went to the new blind massage parlor for a massage. During the session, my phone rang. The masseuse naturally handed it to me without asking where to place it, which made me suspect that he might not be blind. I thought about pretending not to know, but the caller ID made him realize that I had been a police officer. I lost my eyesight while fighting their criminal activities, and I came to this massage parlor to learn about the lives of blind people. However, I did not expect that by entering this parlor, I had walked into a trap.

zh.title: 盲人按摩师
zh.condition: 听说新开了一家盲人按摩店。叮铃铃铃,我死了。
zh.solution: 我来到新开的盲人按摩店按摩,在按摩过程中,我的手机铃声响了,他自然地递给我,但是竟然没有问我手机放哪了,我意识到他可能是假盲人,原想假装不知道,却没想到手机来电显示的内容使他知道了我以前是警察,我的眼睛由于在打击他们团体的犯罪活动时受伤,所以我失明了,我来到盲人按摩店原想了解一些盲人生活技巧,但是没想到此时的我进入到他的店却成了自投罗网。

key_facts: The fake blind masseuse harbors deadly intent
The phone call reveals the police officer's identity
A blind officer falls into danger
Danger hidden behind learning about blind people's lives
A trap set for the unsuspecting

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Frantic Knocking
condition: The person outside frantically knocked on the door; he ignored it. He heard a hammer smashing the door, and soon after, screams came from outside the door.
solution: He was a pilot suffering from depression. The doctor diagnosed his depression and reported it to the airline, hoping he would be grounded, but the company didn't care. One day on a civilian flight, he told the co-pilot to go to the restroom, sending him away. It was already the cruising phase, which should have been very safe. When the co-pilot returned, he found the cockpit door locked. He frantically knocked, but the pilot inside was unmoved. He started smashing the door, but airplane doors are very strong. Passengers gradually understood what was happening, and at the moment of impact with the mountain, the black box recorded the screams of all passengers.

zh.title: 发疯敲门
zh.condition:
外面的人发疯敲门,他置之不理。
他听到了锤子砸门的声音,不久后,门外传来惨叫。
zh.solution: 他是一个有抑郁症的机长。医生检查出了他的抑郁症,并报告给了航空公司,希望他可以停飞,但公司并不在意。某天民航,他对副机长说,你去上个厕所吧,就支走了副机长。当时已经是巡航阶段,应该是很安全的。副机长回来时,发现驾驶室门锁了。他发疯敲门,门里的机长无动于衷。他开始砸门,但飞机门是很坚固的。乘客们逐渐明白发生了什么,在即将撞山的瞬间,小黑盒录下了所有乘客的尖叫。

key_facts: The story takes place inside an airplane cockpit
The person inside the door is the pilot who intentionally locked it
The person outside the door is the co-pilot trying to enter
The pilot suffered from depression and was ignored
The final screams came from the plane crash

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Winter Break Homework
condition: I've been swamped trying to finish my winter break homework these past two days. Luckily, I finished it on the day school started. This morning, before my mom woke up, I went to school to register. But when I got to school, I went crazy.
solution: I'm a high school senior from a single-parent family. In the final six months of the sprint, my mom suddenly fell seriously ill. Thankfully, it was winter break, so I could take care of her. School starts tomorrow. After putting my mom to sleep, I continued with my homework. Before I knew it, it was dawn. To let my mom sleep a little longer, I tiptoed out of the house. At school, when I opened my homework, I found a piece of paper inside. Looking closely, it was a suicide note from my mom. In the note, she said that I could take care of myself even without her. But if I were all alone, what's the point of getting into a good university?

zh.title: 寒假作业
zh.condition: 这两天为了补寒假作业把我搞得晕头转向,还好在开学那天补完了。今天一早,还没等妈妈起床,我便去学校报道。可到了学校,我却疯了。
zh.solution: 我今年高三,来自单亲家庭。到了最后半年的冲刺阶段,妈妈却突然生了大病。还好现在是寒假,我可以照顾她。明天就要开学了。我把妈妈哄睡后,继续补作业。不知不觉天亮了,为了让妈妈多睡会儿,我蹑手蹑脚地出了门。到了学校打开寒假作业后,我在里面发现了一张纸。仔细看竟然是妈妈写的遗书,遗书里妈妈说到,即使没有她我也能照顾好自己。但如果只剩我一个人,考上好大学又有什么用呢?

key_facts: 'I' come from a single-parent family.
My mother is seriously ill.
'I' had to take care of my mother during the winter break.
'I' found something unusual when I opened my homework at school.
There was a piece of paper tucked inside the homework.
The note was written by my mother.
The piece of paper was my mother's suicide note.
My mother believed 'I' could live independently.
The content of the suicide note caused 'my' mental breakdown.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Hospital
condition: I got sick and went to the hospital. Soon after, my sister died. Why?
solution: I am congenitally intellectually disabled. When I was a child, I saw on TV that woodpeckers tap tree trunks to determine if there are insects inside. Recently, my mother took me to the hospital because of a stomachache. The doctor said I ate something unclean and had parasites in my stomach. Later, one day when my sister and I were at home, she suddenly cried out from a stomachache. I thought she also had worms in her stomach, so I imitated the woodpecker's method, found a tool, and chiseled at my sister's stomach trying to find the worms. As a result, my sister died.

zh.title: 医院
zh.condition: 我生病去了医院,不久妹妹死了。请问为什么?
zh.solution: 我是个先天低智商残疾人,小时候我在电视里看到啄木鸟通过敲击树干确定里面是否有虫。最近因肚子疼母亲送我去了医院,医生说是吃了不干净的东西。肚子里有寄生虫。后来有一天我和妹妹在家,突然她叫着肚子疼,我以为她肚子里也有虫,所以就学着啄木鸟的方法,找来工具对着妹妹的肚子凿击想找到虫子,结果妹妹死了。

key_facts: The narrator has intellectual disabilities.
The narrator recently went to the hospital due to parasites in their stomach.
The narrator imitated a certain animal behavior seen on TV.
The sister and the narrator experienced similar physical discomfort (stomachache).
The narrator inflicted physical harm on the sister.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Rabbit
condition: My sister especially loved rabbits, but one day, she cut open the belly of her favorite little rabbit. Mom was furious, and the next day, my sister disappeared.
solution: My sister really loved rabbits. One day, the rabbit didn't move, as if it were dead. So she suddenly cut open its belly with a knife. Seeing my sister's chilling behavior, Mom was furious. My sister hurriedly explained, "I wanted to change its batteries." Mom walked over to gently comfort her, but my sister continued, "Because when Dad didn't move, Mom did the same thing." I never saw my sister again after that day...

zh.title: 兔子
zh.condition: 我的妹妹特别喜欢兔子,但有一天,她却剖开了她最爱的小兔子的肚子,妈妈勃然大怒,第二天妹妹消失了。
zh.solution: 我的妹妹很喜欢兔子,有一天,兔子一动不动,像是死掉一样,于是她突然用刀剖开了它的肚子,看到妹妹令人毛骨悚然的行为,母亲勃然大怒,妹妹慌忙解释道:"我想给它换电池",妈妈走过去轻声安慰,可妹妹却接着说:"因为爸爸不动的时候,妈妈也是这样的。"从那天之后我再也没见过妹妹..

key_facts: Sister imitated mother's behavior by dissecting the rabbit
Sister's words revealed mother's secret
Mother had performed a similar action on the 'motionless' father
The intention behind cutting open the rabbit was to 'change its batteries'
Sister's disappearance implies mother silenced her

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Drug Baby
condition: A seemingly loving couple boarded a plane with a baby, committing a horrible crime detected by an observant flight attendant. What happened?
solution: The baby was dead - used to smuggle drugs. The attendant grew suspicious when it never cried.

zh.title: 藏毒婴儿
zh.condition: 看似恩爱的一对抱着个婴儿坐飞机,实则犯下了恶劣罪刑,被一个观察力敏锐的空姐发觉,请问发生了什么事?
zh.solution: 那对夫妻怀中的婴儿是死的,他们利用小孩的身体藏毒。空姐因为婴儿一直不哭所以产生怀疑揭开真相。

key_facts: The couple were drug smugglers
The baby's body contained drugs
The baby was already dead
Its silence aroused suspicion
The attendant uncovered the crime

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Milk
condition:
Sister drank the milk and died,
Dad threw away the milk and also died
I died, Mom smiled.
solution: Dad fell in love with someone else, but after several attempts to test the waters, he found out Mom wouldn't agree to a divorce, so he poisoned Mom's milk. Sister didn't know the milk was poisoned and died after drinking it. To destroy the evidence, Dad threw away the remaining milk. Mom noticed Dad's strange behavior and knew he originally intended to poison her, so she killed Dad while he was asleep. After Dad and Sister died, Mom focused all her energy on me, becoming extremely strict with me. If I didn't do well, she would abuse me and gaslight me. Gradually, I couldn't bear it anymore and chose to end my own life. Mom lost all her relatives, her brain suffered a shock, and she became insane, sitting on the balcony every day, smiling foolishly.

zh.title: 牛奶
zh.condition:
妹妹喝了牛奶,死了,
爸爸扔掉了牛奶,也死了
我死了,妈妈笑了。
zh.solution: 爸爸喜欢上了别人,但是几次试探之后发现妈妈不会同意离婚,于是就在妈妈的牛奶里面下毒。妹妹不知道牛奶里面有毒,喝了之后就死了。爸爸为了毁灭证据,于是把剩下的牛奶给扔了。妈妈发现了爸爸的异样,知道他要毒死的人原来是自己,所以趁着爸爸睡着把他给杀了。爸爸和妹妹死了之后,妈妈所有的精力都放到了我身上,对我管的特别严格,只要我做的不好,就会对我家暴,还会pua我,渐渐的,我承受不了这些,于是选择了结束自己的生命。妈妈失去了所有的亲人,大脑受到刺激,变成了疯子,每天就坐在阳台,傻傻的笑。

key_facts: Milk was the key item that caused death.
The sister was accidentally killed by the father.
The mother smiled because she had mental problems.
The mother killed the father.
The narrator's death is related to the mother's behavior after other family members died.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Solving the Case
condition: While discussing recent cases with a man who revealed nothing, I fainted in terror upon returning home.
solution: As a psychologist assigned to a massacre's sole survivor, my comment 'I understand your pain' made him smile strangely. Returning home, I found bloody words: 'Now you understand.'

zh.title: 破案
zh.condition: 我和一名男子正聊着最近发生的案子,但什么都没问出来,当我回到家后...我吓昏了过去。
zh.solution: 我是一名心理医生,那天局里安排我为一名在灭门惨案中幸存下来的男人做心理辅导,可是我无论说什么,他都始终保持沉默。直到我说出了: 你的遭遇我感同身受时,他却突然抬起头冲我笑了一下,我不明白他在笑什么,直到我回到家,打开门的那瞬间,看到墙上用血写着: 现在你才能感同身受。

key_facts: Narrator is a psychologist
Man was massacre's 'survivor'
'Understand your pain' was key
Man smiled strangely at comment
Bloody message at home
Message made narrator 'understand'
'Survivor' was actually the killer

title: Forever Together
condition: My mom loved me very much, but ever since a heavy rain, she locked me in a dark little room. When I saw her again, her appearance had changed drastically. I knew we would be together forever!
solution: I used to be a delicate Barbie doll. My mom always pampered me, taking me everywhere she went. Until one day after a heavy rain, I was locked in a damp, dark room, day after day, year after year. One day, I heard sad crying outside, and I was taken out, finding myself lying next to a woman I no longer recognized. Through others' explanations, I learned it was my mom, who once loved me deeply. Her body had grown cold, and as I lay beside her, I thought silently, finally, we can be together forever.

zh.title: 永远在一起
zh.condition: 我的妈妈非常爱我,可自从下过一场大雨后,她便把我关进了一个黑暗的小房间。当我再次见到她时,她的模样已发生了巨大的变化。我知道,我们将永远在一起!
zh.solution: 我曾是一个精致的芭比娃娃,妈妈总是百般宠爱我,无论去哪里,她都会带着我。直到有一天大雨过后,我被锁进了一个潮湿阴暗的房间,日复一日,年复一年。直到有一天,我听到外面传来悲伤的哭声,我被带了出来,发现我躺在了一个完全不再熟悉的女人身边。经过旁人的讲述,我才知道那是曾经深爱我的妈妈。她的身体已经变得冰冷,我趴在她身边,心里默默想着,终于,我们可以永远在一起了。

key_facts: I am a Barbie doll
Heavy rain is a turning point in the relationship
Confinement means the doll was put away
Mother's change refers to her death
Reunion happens after the owner's death
Forever together implies accompanying the deceased

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Cash Heist
condition: I rushed into the third-floor room. The window was rattling in the wind. There was a large hole in the floor with an umbrella next to it. When I went down to the second floor to check, my heart sank.
solution: I am a security guard for a vault. On patrol, I noticed the third-floor window was open. Upon entering the third floor, I saw signs of a break-in. When I went to the second floor, I found the gold bars were gone. The thief entered through the third-floor window and first drilled a small hole in the floor. To prevent the debris from making noise and alerting security, they inserted an umbrella through the small hole and opened it directly underneath. The debris from drilling the larger hole then fell into the umbrella. Once the hole was large enough, the thief could enter the second-floor vault, steal the gold, and escape back through the hole to the third floor.

zh.title: 现金盗窃案
zh.condition: 我慌忙跑进三楼房间,窗户被吹得劈啪作响,地上有个大洞,洞旁放着一把伞,当我来到二楼查看情况后,我的心情非常糟糕。
zh.solution: 我是金库安保人员,巡视时发现三楼窗户处于打开状态。来到三楼后发现有窃贼作案痕迹,来到二楼发现金条已经丢失。盗贼从三楼窗口进入,先在地板上向下凿出一个小洞。为了避免凿洞时产生的碎屑造成更大的动静引来保安,用一把伞伸入凿出的小洞在其正下方打开,从三楼凿洞掉落的碎屑会落入伞中。凿出大洞后,窃贼便能进入二楼金库,盗走金条,再原路从大洞返回三楼逃离。

key_facts: My' identity is a security guard.
The stolen items were on the second floor.
The thief entered from the third floor.
The umbrella had a very specific purpose.
The position of the hole is crucial.
The umbrella was used to catch debris.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Falling Object
condition: The joyful girl looked up and cried; the sorrowful old man looked up and smiled.
solution: The falling object was a child's drawing, covered in colorful crayon marks, depicting a family holding hands. A gust of wind had blown the paper from an open window upstairs, and it floated down gently. The old man was sitting on a park bench, enjoying the quiet afternoon sun. He was a bit lonely, as his children were not around. The brightly colored drawing landed right at his feet. He bent down to pick it up, saw the naive yet joyful strokes, and couldn't help but smile a warm, kind smile. A few minutes earlier, the little girl had been drawing by the window upstairs, cherishing her newly completed 'family portrait.' When a gust of wind snatched the paper away, she immediately burst into tears.

zh.title: 掉东西
zh.condition: 满心欢喜的女孩抬头看,哭了;一脸愁容的爷爷抬头看,笑了。
zh.solution: 掉下来的东西是一张画满了彩色蜡笔痕迹的儿童画纸,画上是一个一家人手拉手的场景。这张画被一阵风从楼上某个开着的窗户吹了出来,缓缓飘落。老爷爷,正坐在花园的长椅上,安静地享受着午后的阳光。他有些孤单,儿女不在身边。这时,这张色彩鲜艳的画纸恰好飘落在他脚边。他弯腰捡起,看到了画上那稚嫩却充满快乐的笔触,忍不住露出了慈祥、温暖的笑容。几分钟前,小女孩在楼上的窗边画画,非常珍爱这幅刚刚完成的“全家福”。一阵风吹来,画纸不小心被卷走飞出了窗外。小女孩立刻伤心地大哭起来。

key_facts: The falling object is very light.
The object is a piece of paper.
There is a drawing on the paper.
The girl is the owner of the drawing.
The old man and the girl do not know each other.
The old man smiled because of the drawing's content.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Mermaid Lie
condition: A painter received a phone call. He looked at a painting of a mermaid on his desk and suddenly burst into tears. Why?
solution: The painter was a single father. Because his son constantly asked for his mother, he told him that his mother was the mermaid in the painting. The young son believed it and, from a young age, said he wanted to go into the water to find his mother. Because of this, he was sent to a mental hospital. The painter received a call from the hospital, informing him that his son had committed suicide by drowning. Looking at the mermaid painting on the desk, the painter was filled with regret for not realizing his son's mental issues sooner or explaining the truth, which led to his son's suicide.

zh.title: 美人鱼谎
zh.condition: 画家接到了一个电话,他看着桌子上的一幅美人鱼画作,突然哭了起来?
zh.solution: 画家是单亲爸爸,因为儿子整天找妈妈,就和儿子说妈妈是画中的美人鱼。年幼的儿子当真了,从小就说要去水里找妈妈,因为这个事情,被送进了精神病院。画家接到精神病院的来电,告诉自己儿子自杀溺水身亡的事情,看到桌子上的美人鱼画作,画家悔不当初为什么没有早点发现儿子的精神问题或者解释清楚,导致儿子自杀。

key_facts: The painter has a son.
The painter's son does not have a mother.
The painter once told his son that his mother was a mermaid.
The son believed this lie.
The son developed mental health issues as a result.
The son was once sent to a mental hospital.
The phone call contained bad news about his son.
The son has passed away.
The son's cause of death was drowning.
The son drowned while trying to find his mermaid mother.
The painter is tormented by his son's death and his own lie.

title: Green Teeth
condition: One day, a man was scolded by his boss for a mistake at work. The next day, the man jumped off a building to commit suicide, and his teeth were green. Please deduce.
solution: He was a mortician who suffered from sleepwalking and pica. He was scolded for losing a corpse. To figure out how it was lost, he marked another corpse with green paint. The next day, he found green paint on his own teeth and realized he had eaten it.

zh.title: 绿牙齿
zh.condition: 某天,男子因工作上的失误,被上司骂了一顿,第二天男子跳楼自杀的时候牙齿是绿色的。请推理。
zh.solution: 他是一个殡葬师,有梦游症和异食癖,一次弄丢了尸体所以受到责骂,为了搞清楚是怎么丢的,他用绿色颜料在别的尸体上做了标记,第二天他发现自己牙上有绿色颜料,才意识到是自己吃了。

key_facts: The man's profession was a mortician.
The man suffered from sleepwalking.
The man also had pica.
He was scolded by his boss for losing a corpse.
The green color came from the paint he used to mark the corpse.
He used green paint to mark the corpse for tracking purposes.
He ate part of the marked corpse while sleepwalking.
He only realized he had eaten the corpse after discovering his green teeth.
The man committed suicide because he couldn't accept that he had eaten a corpse.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Magicians
condition: Magician A and Magician B dedicated their lives to mastering a teleportation illusion. After Magician A mastered the secret, his wife went mad. Magician B tried to uncover A's secret, even collaborating with a mad scientist, willing to pay the ultimate price.
solution: Both Magician A and B were dedicated to the art of teleportation, but both paid a heavy price. Magician B's secret was a collaboration with a strange scientist, using a duplicating machine. For each performance, he would place himself in the machine, creating a copy that appeared elsewhere, while his original body drowned in a water tank beneath the stage. Every success meant one death and one rebirth. Magician A's secret was simpler but equally cruel: he had an identical twin brother. They took turns playing the role of 'Magician A' for the teleportation illusion, sharing a single identity for their entire lives. Due to their different personalities, their behavior towards A's wife was sometimes gentle, sometimes cold. This hot-and-cold treatment eventually drove her to madness.

zh.title: 魔术师
zh.condition: 魔术师A和魔术师B毕生都致力于掌握一项瞬间移动的幻术。魔术师A掌握瞬间移动的秘密后,妻子却疯掉了。魔术师B试图揭开魔术师A的秘密,甚至与疯狂的科学家合作,不惜为此付出生命的代价。
zh.solution: 魔术师A和B都致力于瞬间移动的幻术,但都付出了惨重代价。魔术师B的秘诀是与一位古怪科学家合作,利用一台复制机器。每次表演,他都会将自己放入机器,创造一个复制品出现在远处,而他原本的身体则溺死在舞台下的水箱中。每一次成功,都意味着一次死亡和一次新生。魔术师A的秘密简单却同样残酷:他有一个同卵双胞胎兄弟。他们通过表演瞬移幻术来轮流扮演魔术师A,终生共享一个身份。由于两人性格差异,他们对妻子时而温柔时而冷漠,这种忽冷忽热的态度最终导致妻子精神崩溃。

key_facts: Both magicians' secrets involve another 'person'.
Magician A's secret is a twin.
Magician B's performance involves death.
Magician B clones himself for each performance.
A's wife went mad due to her husband's changing personality.

title: Tap Three Times
condition: She tapped me, I couldn't hear anything. Once, twice. Before I could wait for the third tap, someone called the police.
solution: My friend and I were playing hide-and-seek. The hider would cover their head once hidden, and the seeker had to tap the hider three times to indicate they were caught. I was hiding under a guardrail. He found me and tried to reach under to tap me, but his neck got stuck in the guardrail. He felt suffocated and flailed his arms, hitting me twice. But we had an agreement, so I didn't move, until a passerby noticed and quickly called the police.

zh.title: 拍三下
zh.condition: 她拍了拍我,我什么都听不到。一下、两下。我还没等到第三下,就有人报警了。
zh.solution: 我和小伙伴玩捉迷藏。躲的人躲好了就抱头,抓的人要拍躲的人三下,以示抓到了。我躲在护栏下,他发现了我想探头来拍我,但是脖子卡在护栏上,他感到窒息,胡乱挥手拍中我两下。但我们有约在先,所以我没有动,直到路人发现赶紧报警。

The tapping action was an important part of the game, needing to be completed a specific number of times (three times).
The tapper failed to complete the required number of taps because they themselves encountered an accident.
The police were called because the tapper was in a life-threatening situation.

title: Beloved Dog
condition: A girl was home alone, accompanied by her beloved dog. In the middle of the night, she heard a dripping sound. To calm her fears, she reached her hand down by the bed and let her dog lick it, then fell asleep peacefully. The next morning, she woke up and had a breakdown.
solution: The killer had murdered her beloved dog and hung its body from the ceiling. The dripping sound was the dog's blood, and the one licking her hand was actually the killer.

zh.title: 爱犬

title: The Phone Trick
condition: One day, Xiao Ming and Xiao Li were on a bus together. The bus was extremely crowded. Xiao Li complained to Xiao Ming that it was too crowded. Xiao Ming said, 'If you help me take out my phone, it won't be so crowded.' Xiao Li did as he was told, and indeed, the space around them immediately became much wider. Why?
solution: Xiao Ming asked Xiao Li to take the phone out of Xiao Ming's pocket. As soon as Xiao Li reached in to get it, Xiao Ming grabbed his hand and yelled, 'What are you doing?' The surrounding passengers thought Xiao Li was a pickpocket and quickly moved away from him.

zh.title: 手机诡计
zh.condition: 一天,小明和小李一起去乘公交车,车上无比的拥挤。小李向小明抱怨人太多了,小明说:你帮我把手机拿出来就不挤了。小李如此照做,他们周围果然就立刻宽敞了,这是为什么?
zh.solution: 小明让小李拿出小明口袋里的手机,小李刚伸手进去拿,小明一把抓住小李的手,大声质问到:“你在干什么?”周围的乘客以为小李是小偷,纷纷与他保持距离。

title: You Might Not Have Stolen, But You Were There
condition: My father said, 'You might not have stolen, but you were there.' These words have haunted me my whole life.
solution: When I was a child, a group of kids were caught stealing from a store. When my father found out, he was furious. I protested that I hadn't stolen anything, but my father said to me, 'You might not have stolen, but... you were there...' Later, I looked back on my life as a military officer, watching my country descend into a devastating war under the guidance of extremism. While I could argue I was just following orders and didn't personally participate in the massacres or other core crimes, as a part of this vast war machine, wearing the uniform, I stood by and witnessed countless atrocities and injustices. I could not escape the historical responsibility and moral guilt of being a bystander. This became a persistent reflection and repentance in my later years.

zh.title: 你或许没偷,但你也在场
zh.condition: 父亲说:“你或许没偷,但你毕竟在场。” 此话如影随形,令我一生难安。
zh.solution: 在我小时候,有一群孩子去商店偷东西被发现了,我爸爸知道后很生气,可我反抗地说我什么东西也没偷,父亲曾对我说:“你或许没偷,但......你也在场......”,后来我回顾自己的一生,作为一名军官,看着国家在极端主义的引导下走向战争,最终陷入毁灭性的灾难。虽然我可能辩称自己只是执行命令,没有亲自参与屠杀或其他最核心的罪行,但我作为这个庞大战争机器的一份子,穿着军装,站在了那个位置上,目睹了无数暴行和非正义的发生,我无法推卸自己作为在场者的历史责任和道德负罪感。这成为了我晚年挥之不去的反思和忏悔。

key_facts: The story involves two different stages of life.
The father's words are a metaphor.
My' profession is a key clue.
The later 'being there' is related to war.
The core of the story is historical responsibility.
My' identity is a soldier.

title: Obedient Little Sister
condition: My sister was very obedient, neither crying nor fussing, quietly asleep. I was very happy.
solution: Today was my sister's birthday. Before Mom and Dad left to buy her gifts, they said that if I could look after my sister and ensure she didn't cry or fuss, they would give me the same gift. So after they left, I held my sister down in a bathtub full of water. After a while, she indeed stopped crying and fussing, quietly "sleeping" in the water. When Mom and Dad come back, they'll surely reward me for how obedient she was.

zh.title: 乖巧的妹妹

zh.solution: 今天是妹妹的生日,爸妈出门给妹妹买礼物之前说,如果我能看好妹妹,保证她不哭不闹,那也会送我一份一样的礼物。于是他们出门后,我把妹妹按在了装满水的浴缸里,过了一会儿她果然不哭不闹,安静地"睡"在了水里。爸妈回来之后要是知道妹妹这么乖,一定会奖励我的。

key_facts: "Quietly asleep" actually means the sister is dead

title: Lonely Elderly Person
condition: A lonely elderly person, struggling financially, was found dead at home. It seemed they were eating before they died. The body was incomplete when found, and the scene inside the house was also strange. Please deduce.
solution: The old person had many stray cats. The neighbors found it smelly and noisy, so they poisoned some fish and told the old person that the fish was going bad and to give it to the cats. The old person thought the fish was still fresh, cooked it, ate it, and died at home from the poison. The cats, locked inside, ate their owner's poisoned body due to hunger and also died. Finally, the strong odor led to their discovery.

zh.title: 孤寡老人
zh.condition: 生活拮据的孤寡老人,被发现死在家中。生前好像正在吃饭,尸体被发现时已经残缺不全,屋内的景象也很诡异,请推理。
zh.solution: 老人养了很多流浪猫,邻居感觉很臭又扰民,在鱼里下了毒,告诉老人鱼快坏了,给猫吃。老人认为鱼还很新鲜,做了吃,却被毒死在家中。而猫被锁在家里,由于饥饿吃了主人有毒的尸体,也死了,最后臭味太大被人发现。

title: Chocolate
condition: Xiao Ming's younger brother had a pet hamster. One day, the hamster died. The younger brother was very sad, so his mother rewarded him with a piece of chocolate the size of the hamster. A short time later, Xiao Ming died. Why?
solution: Because his hamster died, his mother gave him a piece of chocolate the size of the hamster. The younger brother thought that whatever died, he would get a piece of chocolate of the same size. So, he killed Xiao Ming, thinking he would get a piece of chocolate the size of Xiao Ming.

zh.title: 巧克力
zh.condition: 小明的弟弟养了一只仓鼠,有一天,小明弟弟的仓鼠死了,小明的弟弟很伤心,妈妈奖励他一块跟仓鼠大小的巧克力,过了不久,小明死了,这是为什么?
zh.solution: 因为小明弟弟的仓鼠死了,妈妈奖励他一块跟仓鼠大小的巧克力,小明的弟弟以为死什么东西就会得到什么大小的巧克力,手是他把小明给杀了,以为能得到小明一样大小的巧克力。

key_facts: The younger brother misunderstood the reason for getting the chocolate.
The size of the chocolate was related to the size of the deceased.

title: Fate
condition: "I will kill all monsters." My younger self sobbed uncontrollably. The monster cried tears, realizing this was an inevitable outcome.
solution: Monsters exist in this world, spawned by overwhelming obsession. I once had a happy family, but due to a monster that appeared from nowhere, my parents were burned to ashes. In a sea of fire, I clung to the shoulder of a rescue worker from the Monster Clearing Bureau, sobbing uncontrollably: "I will kill all monsters." As an adult, I joined the Monster Clearing Bureau as I wished and began to hunt monsters. During one battle, I was severely wounded. Due to my deep obsession, I transformed into a monster. In a daze, I tore through time and space, traveling to the past to commit evil. Suddenly, a sharp cry awakened me. My consciousness abruptly cleared, and I saw my younger self, sobbing uncontrollably. I cried, realizing that years later, my monstrous self had destroyed my own family, planting the seed of obsession in my younger self. In the future, my younger self would also transform into a monster... This was an inevitable outcome.

zh.title: 宿命
zh.condition: "我要杀了所有怪物。"年幼的我嚎啕大哭。怪物流着眼泪,原来这是必然的结局。
zh.solution: 这个世界上存在着怪物,这些怪物由于过强的执念催生。我本拥有幸福的家庭,却因为不知道从哪里来的怪物把我的父母烧成了灰烬,一片火海中,我趴在怪物清扫局的救援人员的肩膀上嚎啕大哭:"我要杀了所有怪物。"成年后,我如愿加入了怪物清扫局,开始仇杀怪物。在某次战斗中,我深受重伤,由于执念过深,我变成了怪物,神志不清中我撕裂时空来到过去开始作恶。突然一道尖锐的哭喊把我唤醒,意识陡然清醒中我看到了年幼的嚎啕大哭的自己。我哭了,多年后怪物化的自己毁灭了自己的家庭,给年幼的自己埋下了执念的种子,在未来,年幼的自己也会怪物化......这是一个必然的结局。

key_facts: My family was destroyed by a monster, leading me to seek revenge
I transformed into a monster in the future due to excessive obsession
My monstrous self traveled through time to the past and destroyed my younger self's family
The monster cried because it realized it was the root cause of my tragedy and transformation into a monster
The inevitable outcome refers to an unbreakable cycle of fate, where hatred leads to one's own downfall and the repetition of tragedy

title: Parent-Teacher Conference
condition: Xiao Ming got into trouble at school again! The head teacher called to complain. Xiao Ming's mother, in tears, gave the middle schooler a harsh beating. But Xiao Ming was very happy. Do you know why?
solution: Her son got into trouble at school again, and the head teacher called to complain. In tears, she felt the full difficulty of being a single mother. She spanked the 12-year-old boy several times and yelled, 'What did you do this time? What's your excuse?' The son blinked and said with a smile, 'Mom, this is the tenth time I've gotten into trouble. The teacher has to make a home visit now. Our male teacher is single and very handsome!'

zh.title: 家访
zh.condition: 小明又在学校犯错误了!班主任打电话告状。小明的妈妈泪流满面,狠狠地在打了这个才上初中的小孩一顿。可是小明却十分高兴,你知道为什么?
zh.solution: 儿子在学校又犯错了,班主任再次打电话向家长告状。泪流满面的她彻底地感到了作为单身妈妈的难处。她狠狠地在这个 12 岁的小男孩屁股上拍了几巴掌,然后冲他吼道:“这一次到 底又犯什么错误了?什么借口?”儿子眨了眨眼,笑着说:“妈,这次犯错后就是第十次了,老师要家访,我们男老师单身很帅的哦!”

key_facts: Xiao Ming's mother is single.

title: A Pile of Wood Shavings
condition: There were two dwarfs in a circus. The blind dwarf was shorter than the other. The circus only needed one dwarf, and of course, the shorter the better. The two dwarfs decided to have a contest to see who was shorter; the taller one would commit suicide. However, the day before the scheduled contest, the blind dwarf, the shorter one, had already committed suicide at home. In his house, only wooden furniture and a pile of wood shavings were found.
solution: The other dwarf had shortened the blind dwarf's cane. As a result, the blind dwarf thought he had suddenly grown taller.

zh.title: 满地木屑
zh.condition: 马戏团里有两个侏儒,瞎子侏儒比另一个侏儒矮,马戏团只需要一个侏儒,马戏团里的侏儒当然是越矮越好了。两个侏儒决定比谁的个子矮,个子高的就去自杀。可是,在约定比个子的前一天,瞎子侏儒也就是那个矮的侏儒已经在家里自杀死了。在他的家里只发现木头做的家具和满地的木屑。
zh.solution: 瞎侏儒的家具被另外一个侏儒锯矮了,于是瞎侏儒以为突然长高了。

title: Puppet Companion
condition: I am a very lazy person, but my family has always wanted me to learn a craft to make a living. Now, I finally don't have to do anything.
solution: My family, hearing a strong recommendation from a friend, entrusted me to a famous puppet master with high expectations. Little did they know, behind the renowned reputation lay a horrifying secret — this puppet master was extremely perverted. His long-term solitary life had twisted his mind, especially with an almost pathological desire for vulnerable women. As the receding figures of my family disappeared from sight, I was left completely helpless and entirely under his control. Whenever I showed the slightest resistance, he would without hesitation wield his cold knife and brutally sever my limbs. The intense pain nearly made me faint, while he stood by with a twisted smile. Then, with his so-called exquisite skill, he pieced my mutilated limbs together into a puppet. From that moment on, I lost my freedom and my ability to resist, becoming a puppet at his mercy.

zh.title: 木偶伴侣
zh.condition: 我是一个很懒惰的人,但是家人为了让我能够谋生,一直想让我学门手艺。这下子,我终于可以什么都不做了。
zh.solution: 家人听闻朋友极力推荐,满心期待地将我托付给那位颇有名气的偃师。他们哪里知道,这所谓声名远扬的背后,隐藏着令人毛骨悚然的秘密 —— 这位偃师是个极端变态,长期的单身生活扭曲了他的心智,尤其对柔弱可欺的女生抱有近乎病态的欲望。当家人渐渐远去的背影消失在视线尽头,我彻底陷入了孤立无援的境地,完完全全落入了他的掌控之中。只要我稍有反抗的举动,他便会毫不犹豫地挥起冰冷的刀具,残忍地砍下我的四肢。剧痛让我几近昏厥,而他却在一旁露出扭曲的笑容,随后用他所谓精湛的技艺,将我残破的肢体拼接成一具木偶。从那以后,我失去了自由,失去了反抗的能力,成为了一具任他随意摆弄的木偶人。

key_facts: The family's expectations and misunderstandings
The puppet master's perverted psychology and desire for control
Loss of freedom and being controlled

title: Lele
condition: I suspect Lele in our class likes me. She is usually taciturn and doesn't like to communicate with classmates, gradually becoming an invisible person, and even the teacher forgets her existence. But such an invisible person has recently been staring at me and keeps opening her mouth to me...
solution: Lele can see ghosts and use her voice to dispel them, thus becoming taciturn. Lele saw a ghost on me and helped me dispel it. Staring at me every day is actually looking at the ghost beside me. (The sound Lele makes cannot be heard by normal people)

zh.title: 乐乐
zh.condition: 我怀疑我们班的乐乐喜欢我。她平时沉默寡言,也不爱和班里同学交流,慢慢地就成了一个小透明,连老师都忘了有这么一个人。可这样一个小透明最近总爱盯着我看,还对我不停地张着嘴...
zh.solution: 乐乐可以看到鬼魂,并可以使用自己的声音驱散鬼魂。因此变得沉默寡言。乐乐在“我”身上看到了鬼魂,于是帮“我”驱散鬼魂。每天盯着“我”,实际上是看“我”身边的鬼魂。(乐乐发出的声音正常人听不到)

key_facts: Lele has the ability to see ghosts
Her voice can dispel ghosts
Lele's taciturnity has a reason
She is staring at the ghost beside me
Opening her mouth is using the ghost-dispelling ability
Her ghost-dispelling voice cannot be heard by people

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: A Slap
condition: A person woke up in the middle of the night, slapped himself, and then, smelling a burning scent, went back to sleep peacefully. What happened?
solution: The person was woken up by a mosquito bite. He tried to slap it but missed, then lit a mosquito coil.

zh.title: 一巴掌
zh.condition: 一个人半夜醒来打了自己一巴掌,然后闻着一股燃烧的味道安心睡去了,请问发生了什么?
zh.solution: 这个人被蚊子叮醒,打了一下没打着,然后点起了蚊香。

key_facts: The person was woken up by a mosquito buzzing or biting.
His target when he slapped himself was a mosquito.
He missed the mosquito.
The burning smell came from a mosquito coil.
He lit a mosquito coil.
Lighting the coil was to repel or kill the mosquito.
He went back to sleep peacefully because the mosquito problem was solved.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Mermaid Base
condition: We are naturally active at night, and daytime is our rest time. But he said something, and not long after, he disappeared.
solution: We are a group of mermaids secretly raised in the deep sea. The person raising us told us our routine is to be active at night, which was just to study how our group can live underwater and avoid being discovered by daytime people. The one who revealed the truth was discovered and secretly killed to maintain the stability of the group order.

zh.title: 人鱼基地
zh.condition: 我们天生就活动于夜间,白天正是我们的休息时间。但是他说了一句话,没过多久他就不见了。
zh.solution: 我们是一群被秘密饲养在深海的人鱼,饲养我们的人说,我们的作息是夜伏昼出,但这只是他为了研究我们这个群体能在水里生活的秘密,又想要不被白天活动的人群发现,才这样告诉我们的。那位说出真相的同类被发现之后,为了保持这个群体内部的秩序稳定,他被秘密杀害了。

key_facts: The mermaid group lives at night and rests during the day
Secretly raised in a deep-sea base
Research on the mermaids' underwater survival secret
The truth-teller was secretly killed
Extreme measures to maintain group order

title: Funeral
condition: A woman frequently attends funerals. Guess her identity.
solution: The woman killed her husband and dismembered his body into pieces hidden in various graves to eliminate suspicion.

zh.title: 葬礼
zh.condition: 经常参加葬礼的女人,推测她的身份。
zh.solution: 女人杀死了她的丈夫,并把丈夫分尸到每个坟墓里来洗清嫌疑。

key_facts: The woman's husband is already dead
The husband's death was neither accidental nor natural
The woman needed to dispose of her husband's body
Attending funerals is related to body disposal
She used graves to hide evidence
