title: Doll
condition: I found honey water and chocolate cake on my nightstand, but the doll that was there had disappeared. I knew my boyfriend would never return.
solution: My abusive boyfriend regularly beat me. A quiet neighbor gave me a doll I knew was tampered with, but I also knew he loved me. I daily confessed my suffering to the doll - even honey water and cake were luxuries. One day after being beaten, I cried myself to sleep holding the doll. In my haze, a strange figure approached with dripping sounds but I slept peacefully. (The dripping was blood - the neighbor used my boyfriend's severed hand to unlock my fingerprint door, bringing the treats.)

zh.title: 娃娃
zh.condition: 我发现床头柜上放着一杯蜂蜜水和一块巧克力蛋糕,原本放在床头柜的娃娃却消失不见了。我知道男友再也回不来了。
zh.solution: 我的男朋友有暴力倾向,经常对我拳打脚踢,我想离开,却又无能为力。那天沉默寡言的邻居送了我一个娃娃。我知道他对娃娃动了手脚,但我也确认他爱上了我。因此我天天对着娃娃哭诉男友的暴行,连一杯蜂蜜水,一块巧克力蛋糕都是奢求。那天男友动手之后摔门而去。我不知道抱着娃娃哭诉了多久,睡了过去。恍惚中一个陌生的身影伴随着滴嗒声来到我的身边。但我睡得更安心了。(滴嗒声是血滴在地上的声音,邻居砍下了男友的手用来解开我家的指纹锁,他给我带来了一杯蜂蜜水和一块巧克力蛋糕。)

key_facts: The boyfriend regularly abused her
The neighbor's doll had hidden purposes
She confessed her pain to the doll
The food and drink came from the neighbor
The boyfriend's disappearance involved the neighbor

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Note
condition: A girl came home to find her mother dead and her father looking haggard. In a pool of blood nearby were several torn pieces of a note. The girl found the torn pieces, which read 'Daughter, run, Dad, is crazy'.
solution: The daughter has mental problems. She was the one who killed her mother. The note was written by the mother but was torn up, so the words were out of order. The correct reading is 'Dad, run, daughter is crazy'.

zh.title: 纸条
zh.condition: 一个女孩回到家,发现她的妈妈死了,爸爸很憔悴,旁边血泊中有几张撕碎的纸条,然后女孩发现撕碎的纸条,上面写"女儿,快走,爸爸,疯了"。
zh.solution: 女儿有精神问题,是她杀了妈妈,字条是妈妈写的但是撕碎了,所以字被打乱了顺序,真正的念法是"爸爸快走女儿疯了"

key_facts: The note was torn into pieces.
The order of the words on the note can be rearranged.
The daughter's mental state is the key.
The author of the note is not the daughter.
The intended recipient of the note's warning needs to be re-evaluated.
There is another reason for the father's haggard appearance.
The act of tearing the note has a meaning.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Hiccup Cure by Fright
condition: A doctor says to his patient, "You have a terminal illness."The patient smiles, thanks the doctor, and walks out of the hospital. Why?
solution: The patient's actual problem was a stubborn case of the hiccups. To cure him, the doctor deliberately used the lie of a "terminal illness" to give the patient a major shock. The hiccups stopped immediately. The patient understood the doctor's unconventional method and thanked him for the cure.

zh.title: 惊吓止嗝
zh.condition: 医生对病人说:“你得了绝症。”顾客听完后,笑着感谢医生,然后就出院了。为什么?
zh.solution: 这位病人看病的真正问题是顽固性打嗝。医生为了治好他,故意用“绝症”这个谎言给他一个巨大的惊吓,病人的打嗝立刻就停了。他明白了医生的用心,于是笑着道谢。

key_facts: The patient's "illness" was not serious.
The doctor was lying.
The doctor's words had a "healing" effect.
The patient was thankful because his problem was solved.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Blind Box
condition: He was arrested for his love of opening blind boxes.
solution: He loved blind boxes but didn't want to spend money on them. So, he repeatedly stole packages from various residential complexes near his home. Since he didn't know what was inside the packages, he could enjoy the 'fun of opening blind boxes.' Later, he was arrested by the police.

zh.title: 盲盒
zh.condition: 他因为喜欢开盲盒被捕
zh.solution: 他喜欢盲盒,又舍不得花钱买,就多次在家附近的各个小区偷快递,因为不知道包裹里都有什么,所以这样也能享受 “开盲盒”的乐趣,后来他就被警寨抓走了。

key_facts: He wasn't opening blind boxes bought from a store.
These 'blind boxes' were stolen by him.
He was stealing other people's delivery packages.
He didn't care about the specific items inside the packages.
He enjoyed the process of opening unknown packages.
He was arrested for theft.
He didn't want to spend money on real blind boxes.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Strange New Home
condition: I moved to a new home. In the new home, I placed the desk by the window, but whenever I sit at the desk and concentrate on work, there is always an inexplicable strange feeling.
solution: I moved to a new home and placed a desk by the window for work. But soon after moving in, whenever I worked seriously at the desk, I felt something gently brush my neck. At first, I thought I was just nervous and didn't care. But over time, this feeling persisted. As long as I sat at the desk, I felt something keep touching my neck, but when I left the desk, it disappeared. So I found a master, who said that some invisible things can be captured by old cameras and asked me to take a photo immediately when I felt the touch again. I went home, set up the camera, sat at the desk, and when I felt something touch my neck, I pressed the shutter. Then I took the photo to the photo studio to develop it. When I got the photo, I was so scared that my face turned white. Behind me, there were a pair of feet hanging in the air. It turned out that what I had been feeling was the feet of the previous resident who hanged himself by the window, swinging and touching my neck.

zh.title: 奇怪的新家
zh.condition: 我新搬了家。在新家,我把书桌摆放在窗边,可是,每当我坐在书桌前专心工作时,总有莫名的异样感。
zh.solution: 我新搬了家,为了工作需要,我在窗边放置了一张书桌。但搬进来不久后,每当我在书桌前认真工作时,便感觉有东西轻轻地抚过我的脖子,起初我以为我自己只是神经敏感,便没有在意。但久而久之,这种感觉一直存在,只要坐在书桌前,就感觉不停有东西轻触我的脖子,可是离开了书桌,却没有这种感觉了。于是我便找了大师,大师说,有一些肉眼看不到的东西能被古旧的相机捕捉到,让我下次再有这种感觉时立马拍张照,说不定能有收获。我回到家,架好相机,坐在书桌前,当感觉到有东西在轻触我的脖子上,按下快门拍了张照,然后拿去照相馆洗出来。当拿到照片那一刻,我吓得脸色发白。在我的身后,有一双悬在空中的脚。原来我一直感觉到的,便是上吊自杀的房子的前一任住户,因为在空中摆荡而不停触碰到我的颈的脚。

key_facts: Strange feelings beside the desk in the new home
Neck is always touched by something
The master suggests confirming with a photo
The photo shows hanging feet
The previous resident hanged himself by the window
It is the ghost's swinging feet that touch the neck

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Hidden
condition: I was well hidden. I was caught, brutally dismembered, fragmented. I was indeed well hidden.
solution: I am ginger hidden in stewed meat. As is well known, ginger is a master of disguise in the culinary world. I was picked up by a diner, mistaken for meat, and put into their mouth. Indeed, being chewed into fragments is proof of ginger's excellent disguise.

zh.title: 隐藏
zh.condition:
我隐藏得很好。
我被抓住,残忍地分尸,支离破碎。
我果然隐藏的很好。
zh.solution: 我是藏在炖肉里的姜。众所周知姜是食材界的伪装大师。我被吃饭的人当成肉夹起,放进嘴里。果然,被咬的支离破碎,正是姜伪装的好的证明。

key_facts: My true identity is a piece of ginger in stewed meat
"Hidden" refers to disguising my appearance as meat
"Caught and dismembered" refers to being mistakenly eaten and chewed by a diner
Being mistakenly eaten is proof of successful disguise
Successful disguise proves I was well hidden

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Heroism
condition: I raised my gun and killed the sinner. When I tried to fire a second shot, I found the gun had no more bullets. Amidst the crowd's cheers celebrating my heroism, tears streamed down my face.
solution: I'm a police officer, tracking a serial killer. Although his victims were all heinous criminals, he couldn't trample on the law like that. Ultimately, I discovered that the person I shared my bed with, my lover, was the killer in this case. I was heartbroken and terrified. I wanted to escape, but my conscience wouldn't allow it. My lover sensed my inner conflict, gently handed me a gun, and said it contained two bullets. In the end, weeping, I took the gun and killed my lover. Then, I wanted to turn the gun on myself to join him in the afterlife, only to find there was no second bullet at all. I no longer had the courage to attempt suicide a second time. Amidst the cheers of the crowd, tears streamed down my face.

zh.title: 英勇
zh.condition: 我举枪杀死了罪人,想开第二枪时却发现枪里没有子弹,在众人歌颂英勇的欢呼中我泪流满面。
zh.solution: 我是个警察,在追踪一个连环杀人犯,虽然杀的都是些穷凶恶极的坏蛋,但是他不能这么践踏法律。最终,我发现我身边的枕边人正是这个案件的凶手。我伤心且害怕,我想逃避但我的良知不允许。爱人发现了我的纠结,温柔的给了我一把枪,说枪里有两颗子弹。最终,我哭着拿起了手枪杀死了爱人,接着我想饮弹自杀与他在黄泉之下相遇,却发现枪里压根没有第二颗子弹。我再也没有勇气第二次自杀了,在众人的欢呼中我泪流满面。

key_facts: The sinner and I were in a relationship.
My role is a police officer, and my lover is a serial killer.
I wanted to fire the second shot to commit suicide and follow my lover.
The gun only had one bullet, a deliberate arrangement by my lover who wanted me to live.
My tears are from the despair and grief of killing my lover and being forced to live on alone.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Final Exam
condition: This month after transferring, all my classmates thought I was mentally unstable and ostracized me. Only the teacher didn't think so, but after the final exam results came out, I realized I really wasn't normal...
solution: I was born with yin-yang eyes (the ability to see ghosts), but I didn't know it myself. I had just transferred schools, and only my deskmate was particularly friendly to me. Other classmates thought I was mentally unstable and ostracized me. It wasn't until I called out my deskmate's name in class one day that the teacher realized with horror that I wasn't mentally ill. It turned out that the friendly deskmate was not human at all; he was a student who had died at this school many years ago. Other classmates couldn't see him. The teacher had heard about this when she first started teaching at the school, coupled with occasional paranormal events in the teaching building. Therefore, she knew the truth, but didn't dare to discuss it with me. It wasn't until the final exam results were released that I noticed my deskmate's name wasn't on the list. Combined with my classmates' previous attitudes towards me, I finally realized that I was indeed different from normal people...

zh.title: 期末考试
zh.condition: 转学后这一个月,所有同学都认为我精神不正常,大家都排挤我,只有老师不这么想,可期末考试成绩下来后,我明白我真的不正常了...
zh.solution: 我天生拥有阴阳眼,但我本人却并不知道。我刚刚转学,只有同桌对我特别友好。其他同学觉得我精神不正常,因此排挤我。直到我有一次在班级里叫出了同桌的名字,老师才惊恐的发现我并不是精神病,原来那个对我友好的同桌根本不是人,他是很多年前就死在这所学校的学生。其他同学看不到他。老师刚到这所学校任教的时候就听说过这件事,加上教学楼也偶尔会有一些灵异事件发生。因此她知道真相。但老师却没敢和我沟通这件事情。直到期末考试成绩发下来之后,我发现榜单上并没有同桌的名字,结合之前同学对我的态度,我终于明自我确实和正常人不一样了...

key_facts: The narrator has the ability to see non-human entities (yin-yang eyes)
Other classmates cannot see or perceive this deskmate
The teacher knows the deskmate's true identity (ghost) and background
The teacher knew about the school's paranormal legends but dared not tell me
The final exam results list only includes living students
The deskmate's name not appearing on the report card confirmed the abnormality of my perceptions

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Live
condition: I died on the first basement floor, but I live on the third floor.
solution: I was a teacher. During an earthquake, I protected three students and was buried on the first basement floor of the school. I died, but fortunately, the three students survived. My portrait has been hanging on the third floor of the school; I live on the third floor of the school, and in the hearts of the entire school and nation.

zh.title: 活
zh.condition: 我死在负一楼,但我活在三楼。
zh.solution: 我是一名老师,在地震来临之时护着三名学生被埋在了学校的负一楼。我死了,幸运的是三名学生活了下来。我的画像一直在学校三楼挂着,我活在学校三楼,活在全校、全国人民的心中。

key_facts: I am a teacher who sacrificed myself in an earthquake
The first basement floor is where I died saving students
The third floor refers to where my portrait is hung/memorialized
"Live" signifies spiritual immortality/being remembered
Physical death but spiritual eternal life

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Bride
condition: The bride, in her white gown, walked slowly down the red carpet. When it was finally time to exchange rings... she suddenly died.
solution: The bride's wedding dress was bought from a second-hand store. The person who sold the dress to the store was a mortician. He stole clothes from the deceased to sell, making a tidy profit. However, he didn't realize that this wedding dress was saturated with a high concentration of preservatives, which would cause the person wearing it to die as the chemicals seeped into their skin.

zh.title: 新娘
zh.condition: 新娘子穿着白纱,缓步走在红地毯上。终于到了交换戒指的时刻...她却突然死掉了。
zh.solution: 新娘穿的婚纱是从二手店买来的。将婚纱卖给二手店的人,是一个殡葬业者。他将死人的衣服偷走拿去卖,借此赚了一笔不小的外快。但是他没有想到,这件婚纱里渗透了高浓度的防腐剂,会使穿这件衣服的人,因为防腐剂渗入皮肤而死。

key_facts: The bride's wedding dress was second-hand.
The dress had previously been in contact with a corpse.
The dress had chemical residues on it.
This chemical was a preservative.
The bride died from dermal absorption.
The origin of the wedding dress is related to the funeral industry.
The person who sold the dress stole clothes from the dead.
The concentration of the preservative was high enough to be lethal.

title: Overtime
condition: Rest on Monday, Wednesday, Friday; salvage on Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday. One day, I forgot to go to work and had to work overtime the next day.
solution: Two countries were fighting over a strategic port, and they were evenly matched. Country A would lay mines in the port on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays to ambush Country B's warships. After discovering this pattern, Country B would clear the mines on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Saturdays, successfully neutralizing the threat. This back-and-forth became an unspoken routine. One day, Country B forgot to clear the mines. The next day, Country A's warship came to lay more mines but accidentally triggered one of its own, resulting in damage and casualties. Upholding humanitarian principles, Country B dispatched its forces to rescue the fallen soldiers from the water.

zh.title: 加班
zh.condition: 一三五休息,二四六打捞,某天忘了去上班,不得不在第二天加班。
zh.solution: 两国争夺一个战略港口,双方势均力敌。A国每周一、三、五在港口埋雷,试图伏击B国军舰。B国发现规律后,每周二、四、六排雷,成功化解危机,这样一来一往形成了约定俗成的习惯。某天,B国因故忘记排雷。次日,A国军舰前来埋雷,却不慎触发自家水雷,船毁人伤。B国秉持人道主义关怀,派军队将落水的官兵救起。

key_facts: 'Going to work' is not an ordinary job.
The work involves two opposing sides.
The workplace is on or near water.
The object of the 'salvage' is people.
'Overtime' is a rescue operation.
The story's background is related to military conflict.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Snow
condition: Xiao Ming, a northerner, was walking through a tall, unfinished building complex one day when he suddenly died. When the police found him, they discovered no murder weapon.
solution: Xiao Ming was walking in the winter. An icicle from above fell and pierced through his chest, killing him. Months later, when the police found him, the temperature had risen, and the ice had melted.

zh.title: 雪
zh.condition: 小明是个北方人,一天他在一片很高的烂尾楼中走着,突然他就死了,警察发现他的时候未发现凶器。
zh.solution: 小明在冬天走着,楼上一个冰柱,穿胸而死,几个月后警察发现他的时候,温度己经回升,冰化了。

key_facts: Xiao Ming's death occurred in winter.
The fatal object fell from a high place.
The 'murder weapon' was formed from ice (an icicle).
Xiao Ming was killed by being impaled by an icicle.
The body was discovered several months after death.
The weather had warmed up by the time the body was found.
The icicle that caused the death had already melted and disappeared.
Therefore, the police found no 'murder weapon'.

title: Woman
condition: Xiao Mei was a student, and every day after school, she noticed a woman on the third floor across the street watching her. A few months later, Xiao Mei never saw the woman again.
solution: The woman had hung herself three months ago. She was a single woman with few friends. The police broke in and found the broken rope.

zh.title: 女人
zh.condition: 小美是个学生,每天上学出门后,都发现对面三楼有个女人看着自己,几个月后,小美就没见过这个女人了。
zh.solution: 那个女子 3 个月前已经上吊了,而且她是一个单身女人,没什么朋友,警察破门而入发现了断裂的绳子。

key_facts: The woman across the street had been dead for a long time
Xiao Mei was not seeing a living person
The woman had hanged herself three months ago
The woman still watched Xiao Mei from the window after death

title: Going Out
condition: A and B went out together, and soon after, they were arrested. Why?
solution: A and B are prisoners. One day, they escaped from prison, but not long after, they were caught and brought back.

zh.title: 出门
zh.condition: A和B一起出门,过了不久,就被抓走了。
zh.solution: A和B是监狱的囚犯,某天A和B逃狱了,但是不久后却被警察抓了回去。

key_facts: A and B are actually prisoners
Their 'going out' was actually an escape from prison
They were caught as soon as they escaped
They were not truly free

title: Lucky Prisoner
condition: A man was arrested. He was imprisoned for longer than his sentenced term, even lacking food and drink. But after being released, the man was very glad he had been imprisoned.
solution: A local volcano erupted, completely destroying the city. About thirty thousand other people in the city died as a result. The man, located in a sturdy underground prison, was discovered and rescued during post-disaster reconstruction.

zh.title: 幸运的囚犯
zh.condition: 男人被捕,他被关了比所判刑期更长的时间,甚至缺吃少喝。但是被放出来以后,男子却非常庆幸自己被关。
zh.solution: 当地火山喷发,完全摧毁了该市,市内其他约三万人均因此丧生。位于地下牢固监狱的男人在灾后重建时被发现而救出。

title: Favorite Author
condition: I attended my favorite author's birthday party. After the party, I returned home satisfied. When the author also returned home, I went mad.
solution: I am a psychopathic voyeur who loves reading horror novels. My favorite horror author writes about murders, dismemberments, and similar plots. His writing is excellent and vivid, and I love reading it. Finally, it was the author's birthday party. I gave him a pen with a hidden camera as a birthday gift, and the author accepted it. After the birthday party, the author returned home. I had been waiting at home for a long time, wanting to secretly observe the author's life through the camera. Unexpectedly, I saw a terrifying scene: the author's house was filled with human heads and limbs, a living murder scene. It turned out that the horror novels he wrote were all based on his real experiences...

zh.title: 喜欢的作者
zh.condition: 我参加了我最喜欢的作者的生日会,生日会结束后,我心满意足的回到了家。当作者也回到了家时,我却疯了。
zh.solution: 我是个心理变态的偷窥狂,喜欢看恐怖小说。我最喜欢的恐怖小说作者写的都是关于凶杀、分尸之类的剧情,文笔很好写得栩栩如生,我很爱看。终于到了作家的生日会,我给他送上了一支藏着摄像头的笔作为生日礼物,作者收下了。生日会结束后,作者回到家里。而我已经在家里等待许久,想通过摄像头偷窥作者的生活,没想到,却看到了令我害怕的一幕:作者家里挂满了人头四肢,活生生的凶杀现场。原来他写的恐怖小说,全是自己的真实经历......

key_facts: The narrator gifted an item with a hidden camera
The narrator spied on the author through the camera
Real human remains were present in the author's home
The author's horror novels were based on real experiences
Witnessing the truth caused the narrator's mental breakdown

title: Brother
condition: Brother's face was injured, I was extremely angry! At night, an identical wound appeared on my face. Drip, drip. From then on, brother will never be injured again.
solution: My brother and I are twins, we look exactly alike, and our personalities and hobbies are also the same. But we both extremely disliked the existence of such a similar person in the world, so we jointly decided to let one 'completely disappear' and live under one identity from then on, so that in the eyes of others, we would be 'the only one.' We agreed to go out one day at a time. This day, my brother came back with an intentional injury on his face. I was very angry! If I wanted to go out tomorrow, I would have to make an identical wound on my face in the same place, otherwise I would have to stay at home until his wound healed. At night, after my brother fell asleep, I compared and made the same wound on my face. Blood dripped from the tip of the knife onto my brother, drip, drip. I aimed the tip of the knife at my brother's heart and plunged it in. From now on, I am the real 'only one,' and my brother will never need to intentionally injure himself again.

zh.title: 哥哥
zh.condition: 哥哥脸上受了伤,我生气极了!夜里,一模一样的伤口出现在我的脸上。滴答,滴答。从此,哥哥再也不会受伤了。
zh.solution: 我和哥哥是双胞胎,我们长得一模一样,性格和爱好也一致。但我们都极其讨厌世上有如此相似的存在,于是我们共同决定让一方“彻底消失”,从此共用一个身份生活,这样在别人眼里,我们就是“唯一"。我们约定好一人出去一天。这天哥哥回来,故意脸上受了伤,我很生气!如果明天我想出去就必须在脸上同样的位置划一道伤口,否则我就得一直在家里待到他的伤痊愈为止。夜里哥哥熟睡后,我比对着朝脸上划了一样的伤口。鲜血顺着刀尖滴在哥哥身上滴答,滴答,我将刀尖对准哥哥的心脏插了进去,以后我就是真正的“唯一”了,哥哥再也不需要故意受伤了”

key_facts: The narrator and his brother are identical twins.
They agreed to take turns playing the same person.
The injury on the brother's face was intentional.
The narrator replicated the wound on his own face.
The narrator killed his brother.

title: Piano Music
condition: At 22:05 in the evening, I passed by the piano room and heard slightly awkward piano music. The next morning, other scholars found him dead in the piano room. The time of death was 10 PM that night.
solution: The killer was a piano composer, but he didn't start learning piano from a young age. Due to talent considerations, the organization prioritized the deceased as the main candidate, while the killer composed specifically for the foreground. On this day, the killer discovered that all compositions were credited to the deceased. He went to the piano room to confront him, and in the dispute, accidentally killed the deceased. Later, hearing footsteps approaching, he hid the victim under the piano. The killer then impersonated the deceased, playing the piano. After the footsteps faded, the building was sealed and locked, so the killer stayed in the piano room all night. The next day, after people discovered the deceased and went to call the police, the killer seized the opportunity to leave the crime scene.

zh.title: 琴声
zh.condition: 晚上22:05我路过琴房,响起了略带生涩的琴声,次日早,其他学者发现他死在了琴房。死亡时间于当日晚10点。
zh.solution: 凶手是一位钢琴作曲家,但不是从小学习钢琴,出于资质考量,组织优先选择了死者作为主推人选,而凶手专门为幕前作曲。这一天,凶手发现所有的曲谱上作曲署名都是死者本人,前往琴房对峙,争论之下失手杀了死者。后听到脚步声越来越近,将被害人藏于钢琴下方,凶手则伪装成死者弹奏。待脚步声走远,楼栋已被封门上锁,于是凶手在琴房呆了整晚,第二天趁来人发现死者后,前去报警喊人的间隙,离开了作案现场。

key_facts: The awkward piano music was the killer's disguise
Murderous intent arose due to infringement of composition authorship
The killer was a composer, not a professional performer
The body was hidden and the piano played due to approaching footsteps
Escaped the scene during the commotion of calling the police

title: If
condition: My head bumped, Father chattered endlessly, I kept laughing, a stranger pushed me, if only I had just slept.
solution: After Father died, I dragged my tired body and brought wine to visit him at his grave. Glass after glass of wine went down my throat with tears. I rambled on for a long time. Exhausted, I leaned on the offering table in front of the grave, my head bumped down, and I fell asleep. In my dream, my head bumped against the steering wheel, Father was still by my side, chattering endlessly at me, I kept smiling foolishly. Great, so Father's death in a car accident was just a nightmare I had while I dozed off. In reality, Father was still by my side, great! Until dusk, when the cemetery was about to close, the groundskeeper pushed me while checking. Before my eyes was Father's tombstone. Overwhelming grief washed over me, 'If only Father's death was just a dream I had while sleeping.'

zh.title: 如果
zh.condition: 我的头磕了上去,父亲喋喋不休,我一直在笑,陌生人推了我一把,如果是睡了一觉就好了。
zh.solution: 父亲死后,我拖着疲惫的身子,带着酒去他的墓前看他,一杯一杯的酒就着泪水入喉,我絮絮叨叨地说了很多,说了很久,累极了的我趴在墓前的拜台上,头磕了下去,睡着了。在我梦中,我的头磕在方向盘上,父亲仍然在我身边对我喋喋不休,我一直在傻笑,太好了,原来父亲车祸去世,只是我刚刚走神睡着了,做的一场噩梦,实际上父亲还在我身边,太好了!直到天色渐晚,墓园要关闭,守园人检查的时候推了我一把,眼前赫然是父亲的墓碑。巨大的悲伤的情绪向我袭来,“如果真的,父亲去世只是我睡了一觉做的梦,该多好。”

key_facts: The story's setting is related to the deceased father (cemetery).
The narrator had already experienced the father's death before the story began.
The scene where the father chatters and the narrator laughs did not happen in reality.
The narrator fell asleep midway through the story and had a dream.
The stranger's action interrupted the narrator's dream, bringing them back to reality.

title: Hero
condition: He was the hero who saved the nation. My hero is no longer a hero. I betrayed my hero, but my hero is still a hero.
solution: When the nation was in crisis, he appeared, repelling the enemy with great power and excellent leadership, saving me and the country. He was my hero. Once the birds are gone, the good bow is put away; his power aroused the dissatisfaction of the powerful, and he was slandered as a traitor. To protect him, I accepted the higher-ups' order to hunt him down, ambushing him and severely wounding him, causing him to fall into an abyss full of monsters. But I knew he wouldn't die; the harsh environment would only make him stronger. I returned to that country, corrupted by the powerful, meticulously planned, and eventually assassinated the king to become monarch. I announced a policy of survival of the fittest, where only the strong could survive. During my reign, rivers of blood flowed, and I was called a tyrant. Finally, he returned, more powerful than ever! I fought him to my heart's content, happily watching him plunge his sword into my chest. He was even stronger than I imagined. I smiled, "The tyrant is dead; your name as hero will resound throughout the world."

zh.title: 英雄
zh.condition: 他是救国的英雄,我的英雄不再是英雄。我背叛了我的英雄,我的英雄仍然是英雄。
zh.solution: 在国家陷入危机的时候,他出现了,以强大的力量和卓越的指导才能击退了敌军,拯救了我,拯救了国家,他是我的英雄。飞鸟尽良弓藏,他的强大引起了权贵的不满,被污蔑为叛徒。为了保全他,我接受了上层的追杀令,趁其不备将其重伤击落到充满怪物的深渊,但我知道,他不会死,严峻的环境只会让他更强大。我回到那个被权贵腐蚀的国度,精心策划最终弑君成王,我宣布采用弱肉强食的政策,只有强者才能生存。执政期间血流成河,我因此被称为暴君。最终他回来了,他更强大了!我与他酣畅淋漓地打了一架,高兴地看着他把剑插入我的胸膛,他比我想得更加强大,我笑着,"暴君已死,你的英雄之名将响彻天地。"

key_facts: I 'betrayed' the hero to protect him
I pushed the hero into danger to make him stronger
I became a tyrant to purge corrupt power and pave the way for the hero's return
My 'betrayal' was a ruse, ultimately aimed at solidifying the 'hero's' reputation
My sacrifice was part of the plan, using my death to consolidate the hero's position

title: The Ghost
condition: I told the children there was a ghost in the forest to scare them, but I still couldn't prevent the tragedy.
solution: Many people, both adults and children, had died in the forest next to the village due to a pack of wolves. To protect the children, I lied and told them there was a ghost in the forest. I thought this would scare them away. But the next morning, news came that a child had secretly gone into the forest and never returned. I was confused, until a friend pointed it out to me: 'If I were a child and heard what you said, I would think the ghosts of my dead parents were there. Would I still be afraid? Or would I risk it for a chance to see them one more time...'

zh.title: 幽灵
zh.condition: 我吓小孩们说森林里有幽灵,却依然没能阻止悲剧发生。
zh.solution: 村子旁的那片森林因为有狼群出没死掉了很多人,不论是大人还是小孩。我为了保护小孩,骗他们说,森林那边有幽灵。本以为这能把他们吓倒,让他们主动远离森林,但第二天早上就传来消息说,有小孩偷偷去了森林没能回来。我感觉很奇怪,直到一位朋友点醒了我,“如果我是小孩听了你的话,一定会认为在那里存在着死去的父母的幽灵,你还会怕它吗?是不是还是会想冒着风险再见它们一面呢......”

key_facts: There is no real ghost in the forest.
There is a real danger in the forest.
The danger comes from wild animals.
The tragedy is that a child died in the forest.
The child went to the forest to see their relatives.
My' lie had the opposite effect.

title: Lubricant
condition: My roommate Xiao Jia died, and we were scared. So we consulted a Taoist priest, bought lubricant, and applied it to the railings before bed. That way, we'd be safe while sleeping. Our classmate Xiao Tong's bicycle broke down, so we lent her the lubricant. That night, we all died.
solution: Xiao Jia was bullied to death by us... We don't know how she managed to hit her temple just right! We were very scared, fearing Xiao Jia would become a vengeful ghost seeking revenge. So we consulted a Taoist priest. Because our beds were bunk beds (desk below, bed above), the Taoist priest said that ghosts have trouble with their legs and only needed to be prevented from climbing onto the bed. So we followed the Taoist priest's advice and bought lubricant. The vengeful ghost Xiao Jia couldn't climb onto the bed, and hearing the ghost's helpless roar at night, I knew we were safe! After Xiao Tong borrowed the lubricant, due to a misunderstanding (the packaging of glue and lubricant looked similar), she returned glue to us, but we were completely unaware. Therefore, without the lubricant to obstruct her, the vengeful ghost Xiao Jia successfully climbed onto our bed and killed us...

zh.title: 润滑油
zh.condition: 室友小佳死了,我们很害怕,于是询问了道士,于是买来润滑油,睡觉前涂在栏杆上,这样睡觉时就安全了。同学小童的自行车坏了,我们便把润滑油借给了她。晚上,我们都死了。
zh.solution: 小佳是被我们霸凌致死的......我们也不知道她怎么就能刚好磕到太阳穴!我们很害怕,怕小佳变成恶鬼来索命,于是便询问了道士。因为我们的床是下桌上床,道士说鬼腿脚不便只需要阻拦鬼爬上床即可,于是我们编听从道士建议买来润滑油,变成恶鬼的小佳无法爬上床来,听着晚上恶鬼无奈的怒吼,我知道我们安全了!小童借润滑油后,由于误认(胶水和润滑油的外壳一样),把胶水还给了我们,但我们毫不知情。因此,没有润滑油的阻拦,变成恶鬼的小佳成功爬上了我们的床杀死了我们......

key_facts: Xiao Jia's death was not an accident, but caused by our bullying
We sought help from the Taoist priest to prevent Xiao Jia's ghost from seeking revenge
The purpose of the lubricant was to prevent the ghost from climbing onto the bed, thus protecting us
The 'lubricant' Xiao Tong returned was actually glue, leading to the protection failing
Our deaths were due to the loss of lubricant's protection, allowing Xiao Jia's ghost to successfully exact revenge

title: Strange Markings
condition: Returning from abroad, I noticed an 'X' by my door. After erasing it, I found it reappeared. That night, loud cartoons from next door disturbed my work. When I complained, next day the 'X' became an 'O'. As I wondered, the neighbor opened his door - seeing him, I realized my danger...
solution: After a boy died from falling objects with the killer uncaught, his father marked buildings for revenge: 'X' for completed/unoccupied, 'O' for next targets. My absence abroad made him think my place empty until my complaint revealed my presence, changing my mark before he attacked.

zh.title: 诡异的记号
zh.condition: 留学回家的我一次出门时,发现家门旁写了个“X”,我没有在意索性就擦掉了,可当天回到家时,发现那个X又出现了,心想可能是哪家孩子搞的吧,晚上我在家工作,突然从邻居家传来很大的动画片声,我被吵的无心工作,于是便敲响邻居家的门进行理论,第二天出门上班,门上的X却变成了O,正当我疑惑时,邻居家的门突然开了,而当我看到邻居时我也知道危险来了...
zh.solution: 前段时间楼下一个小男孩被高空坠物砸死,他的父亲一直没找到凶手,伸冤无果的他便把整栋楼里的人都视为了凶手,他挨家挨户的进行了报复并留下记号,X代表已经报仇和无人居住,而O代表即将要下手的人家,因为之前我留学在外,邻居以为我家没人,而当我回国后,被邻居家的动画片声吵到并上面理论时,邻居发觉对面居然住的有人,随即变改了记号,第二天当我出门时,邻居也打开了房门把我抓了进去...

title: 'Don’t Save Him'
condition: When we arrived at the house where the food poisoning occurred, everyone was unable to stand and had no color in their faces. Just as we were about to take the oldest person to the ambulance, they all shouted in unison: 'Don’t save him!'

zh.title: ‘不用救他’
zh.condition: 当我们开着救护车赶到食物中毒的那户人家时,所有的人连站都站不起来,脸上全无血色。正当我们打算将危险性最高的老人先抬上救护车时,所有人却异口同声地大叫:‘不用救他!’
zh.solution: 老人已经生病去世了,家人是为了给他准备葬礼才聚集到一起,不幸集体食物中毒了。

title: Room
condition: Husband went to that room again. Why won't he let me go! 'Don't leave me.' He murmured in his dream. It turns out he really loves me very much.
solution: Due to an accident, I passed away. But because I missed my husband, my soul still returned home as usual. After returning home, I found that my husband's behavior had become very strange and he kept不让 (not letting) me enter the study. I didn't think carefully. But when sleeping at night, he actually shed tears and murmured, 'Don't leave me.'I suspected he had changed his heart and decided to find out everything. So I pushed open that room and found my own portrait inside.

zh.title: 房间
zh.condition: 丈夫又去那个房间了,为什么不让我去!“不要离开我。”他梦中呢喃。原来他真的很爱我。
zh.solution: 因为一场意外,我去世了。但因为挂念丈夫,我的灵魂还是--如往常的回到了家里。回家后,我发现丈夫的行为举止都变的很怪异,还一直不让我去书房,我没有细想。但晚上睡觉时,他居然流着泪呢喃,“不要离开我。”我怀疑他已经变了心,决定搞清楚一切。于是我推开了那间房间,原来里面摆放着我的遗照。

title: Meeting the Parents
condition: My boyfriend and I are alumni; he's three years older and about to graduate. I felt an instant connection with him, love at first sight. We agreed to get married as soon as I reached the legal age. With the National Day holiday approaching, my boyfriend suggested I stay instead of going home and come meet his parents. I happily agreed. However, when his parents saw my face, they were horrified and strongly opposed our relationship. Why?
solution: This was during the era of reform, opening-up, and the one-child policy. I was an 'excess' child. To keep their jobs, my parents sent me to be raised by distant relatives in the countryside after I was born, and my surname was changed. My parents always provided financial support to the relatives. They were happy to learn I got into a university here and were nearing retirement. They were considering contacting me to bring me back into the family, but who knew that we, biological siblings, had fallen in love? A human tragedy.

zh.title: 见家长
zh.condition: 我和男友是校友,他比我大三届,马上就要毕业了。我总感觉和他心有灵犀,一见钟情,于是我们约好了等我到了法定结婚年龄马上结婚,快要过国庆了,男友对我说,不如假期我不要回去了,来我家见见我父母吧。我欣然同意。然而,男友的父母一看到我的脸,大惊失色,坚决反对我们结婚交往。这是为什么呢?
zh.solution: 这是刚刚改革开放,计划生育的年代。我是超生的孩子,为了保住工作,生下我之后父母把我送到乡下给远方亲戚抚养,并且改了姓。父母一直对亲戚进行着经济援助,得知我考上了这里的大学父母也很开心,而且也快要退休了。正在考虑是不是要联系到我让我回到这个家庭,谁知道我们亲兄妹竟然相爱了,人间悲剧。

key_facts: The girl was not raised by her biological parents.
She was fostered or sent away.
This is related to the one-child policy of that time.
The boyfriend's parents know the girl.
The boyfriend's parents are the girl's biological parents.
The parents recognized her by her appearance.
The girl and her boyfriend are related by blood.
They are biological siblings.
The girl's current surname is not her original one.

title: Entering the Coffee Shop Again
condition: He walked into that coffee shop again, subconsciously wanting to escape, yet tears streamed down his face.
solution: He was an underground worker. This coffee shop was his contact point. He would appear there on time every morning, making contact through different actions. Even after the war was won and he retired, this habit remained. To pay tribute to this war hero, people secretly prepared a surprise for him. When he walked into the coffee shop again, people hidden in the shop rushed out with their gifts. Years of agent experience made him subconsciously want to escape, but when he saw the gifts in people's hands, he was moved to tears.

zh.title: 又进咖啡店
zh.condition: 他又走进那家咖啡店,下意识的想要逃走,又泪流满面。
zh.solution: 他是一名地下工作者。这家咖啡店是他的接头地点,他每天早上会准时出现在那里,通过不同的行为进行接头,即使在战争胜利,他退休后,这种习惯也保留了下来。为了向这位战争英雄致敬,人们秘密地为他准备了惊喜,当他再次走进那家咖啡店,藏在店里的人们带着各自的礼物一涌而出,多年的特工经验让他下意识的想逃走,但当他看到人们手中的礼物时,他被感动得泪流满面。

key_facts: His true identity is an underground worker/agent.
The coffee shop was his secret contact point in the past.
He wanted to escape out of professional instinct, thinking he was ambushed.
The people in the shop were there to throw him a surprise party.
He is a respected war hero.
He was moved to tears by the people's kindness and tribute.

title: Forged
condition: The phone screen lit up six times, each time with the same message: 'You've disappointed me so much, I'm never coming back.' The last message had a strange period at the end. Sigh, I knew I was in big trouble.
solution: 'My' partner has been kidnapped. The kidnapper is using my partner's phone to send messages, trying to fake a voluntary departure. However, the kidnapper is not familiar with my partner's typing habits, or made a mistake in a panic, causing the message to be sent six times (perhaps due to network issues or repeatedly pressing send), and accidentally added a period at the end of the last message (or some other punctuation/format my partner never uses). 'I' immediately realized this wasn't sent by my partner—the repetition and this small error exposed the message's abnormality. 'I' knew 'I was in big trouble' not because of the message content itself, but because 'I' saw through the deception, meaning my partner was in danger, and 'I' might be drawn into it or needed to deal with this dangerous situation immediately.

zh.title: 伪造
zh.condition: 手机屏幕亮了六次,每次都是同样一句话:“你太令我失望了,我永远也不会回来了。” 最后一次信息末尾还多了一个奇怪的句号。唉,我知道,我有大麻烦了。
zh.solution: “我”的伴侣被绑架了。绑匪用伴侣的手机给“我”发信息,试图伪造伴侣自愿离开的假象。但绑匪并不熟悉伴侣的输入习惯,或者在慌乱中操作失误,导致信息被重复发送了六次(可能是因为网络问题或者重复按发送键),并且在最后一条信息末尾意外地多打了一个句号(或者其他伴侣通常不会使用的标点/格式)。“我”立刻意识到这不是伴侣本人发送的——这种重复和细节上的错误暴露了信息的异常。 “我”之所以知道“有大麻烦了”,不是因为信息的内容本身,而是因为“我”识破了这是绑匪发的,这意味着伴侣身处险境,而“我”自己也可能被卷入其中,或者需要立刻想办法应对这个危险局面。

key_facts: 'I' received a text message.
The message came from my partner's phone.
The message content was sent repeatedly six times.
The error in the last message was unusual.
The message was not sent by my partner.
'I' realized my partner was in danger.
The sender was a kidnapper.

title: How Many Steps
condition: 'First step, second step, third step...' I went crazy after counting.
solution: There is a rumor that the teaching building of our school is haunted at night, but I didn't believe it. So after evening self-study, when everyone left, I secretly stayed alone. But I found nothing and thought there was really no ghost. When going downstairs, I casually counted the number of steps, 'One step, two steps, three steps...' After counting, I suddenly remembered that my classroom is on the first floor, and there should be no stairs at all...

zh.title: 几阶
zh.condition: “一阶,两阶,三阶...”数完后我疯掉了。
zh.solution: 我们学校教学楼夜里闹鬼,但我不信,于是我在晚自习结束后趁大家都走了,一个人偷偷留在了学校,但我什么也没发现,心想果然根本没鬼,下楼的时候我突然闲来无事数了下台阶的数量,“一节,两节,三节...”我一节节数着,数完后我突然想起,我的教室在一楼,根本就不会有楼梯...

key_facts: Counting stairs in the teaching building at night
The protagonist stays at school alone
The protagonist doesn't believe in school ghosts
The protagonist's classroom is on the first floor
There shouldn't be stairs on the first floor
Going insane after counting the steps

title: The Glare
condition: My heart leaped into my throat. My eyes frantically scanned ahead, and I was instantly frozen with fear. After a piercing crash, I felt a slight sense of relief, but I was still filled with endless regret.
solution: I was driving on a highway at night, not paying full attention. Two electric scooters were riding side-by-side towards me. Due to the poor visibility, I mistook their lights for a large truck and was terrified. But when the impact came, it was just a light thud, and I was unharmed. I felt relief, but then I looked in my rearview mirror and saw one of the scooters lying on the ground. I would now have to face the legal consequences.

zh.title: 瞄
zh.condition: 我心头猛地一紧,目光仓惶向前扫去,瞬间如坠冰窟。刺耳的一声响后,我感到些许庆幸,但依然后悔莫及。
zh.solution: 我夜晚的公路上开车注意力不集中,对面来了两辆并行的电动车,因为视野不佳,我误认为是大货车被吓到了,但是撞上来后却只是碰的一声,我安然无恙,我通过后视镜才发现两辆电动车中的一辆已经倒地了,我还得接受法律的制裁。

key_facts: 'I' was driving.
'I' mistook two small things for one big thing.
The lights of the scooters created an illusion.
The 'relief' was because I wasn't seriously hurt.
The 'regret' was because I caused an accident.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Different Eyes
condition: I grew up in an orphanage. The children were all afraid of me, but a woman wanted to raise me. I thought she loved me very much, until I saw what was in the room.
solution: I grew up in an orphanage. They were afraid of me because I said I could see ghosts. But a woman took a liking to me. She was very good to me, and I treated her like a mother, until one day I saw a room full of posthumous photos of another girl. It turned out she didn't really want to adopt me, but wanted to use my eyes to see her daughter, but I had deceived her.

zh.title: 异瞳
zh.condition: 我在孤儿院长大,孩子们都怕我,但一名妇女却想抚养我,我以为她很爱我,直到我看见了房间里的东西
zh.solution: 我在孤儿院长大。他们怕我,因为我说我能看到鬼。但一位妇人却看中了我,她对我很好,我也把她当成妈妈对待,直到有一天我看到了房间里挂满了另一个女孩的遗照。原来她并不是真的要领养我,而是要利用我的眼睛看到她女儿,可我却骗了她。

key_facts: The narrator claims to have special abilities (can see ghosts).
The woman who adopted the narrator has a deceased child.
The woman's motive for adopting the narrator is related to her deceased child.
The narrator saw things related to the deceased child in a room.
The narrator's claimed special ability is false.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Big Client
condition: Ah Qiang, whose business was struggling, received a big order: Xiao Shuai wanted a set of artistic photos. To meet Xiao Shuai's various eccentric demands, Ah Qiang sometimes had to go to the rooftop, sometimes dive underwater, working himself half to death every day, challenging various high difficulties. Xiao Shuai provided all the photography scenes, costumes, and props, and also dictated the shooting angles. One day, Xiao Shuai didn't show up for the appointment. A few days later, Xiao Shuai's family brought the sad news that Xiao Shuai had passed away, but they didn't take any of his photos. After everyone left, Ah Qiang destroyed all of Xiao Shuai's photos.
solution: The artistic photos Xiao Shuai was taking were actually posthumous portraits. He didn't know how he would die, so he simulated various death scenarios, some involving falling from a tall building, others drowning... In every photo, he posed with a smile, appearing in his best state. He wanted his posthumous photos to be presentable, announcing his death to friends and family at the funeral in a humorous way. However, Xiao Shuai died before the shoot was completed, and his death method was not depicted in any of the photos, so his family didn't take any of them, and Ah Qiang destroyed them.

zh.title: 大客户
zh.condition: 生意萧条的阿强接到一个大单子,小帅要拍一套艺术照。为了满足小帅的各种古怪需求,阿强有时要跑到楼顶,有时又要潜入水底,每天累个半死,挑战各种高难度。拍照场景和服装道具都由小帅提供,拍摄角度也是小帅说了算。这天,小帅爽约了。过了几天,小帅的家人带来小帅已经去世的噩耗,却没有带走他的照片。等人都走了之后,阿强把小帅的照片全都销毁了。
zh.solution: 小帅拍的这套艺术照其实是遗照。他不知道自己会怎么死,所以模拟了各种死亡场景,有的是高楼坠落,有的是在水中溺亡......在每张照片里,他都摆出一副笑容,以最帅状态出镜。他想把遗照拍得体面,在葬礼上以一种幽默的方式向亲朋好友宣告自己的死讯。可是还没拍完,小帅就死了,而且死亡方式没有出现在任何一张照片里,所以他的家人没有拿走任何一张照片,阿强也销毁了他的照片。

key_facts: The true purpose of the photos was posthumous portraits
The photoshoot content simulated various death scenarios
The client died unexpectedly before the photoshoot was complete
The client's actual cause of death did not match any photo scenario
The photos were destroyed because they were unrelated to the actual death

title: Ding
condition: The woman stood in the bedroom, looking at the cold food in her hands, and rubbed her temples. 'My sleep has been so poor lately,' she thought. Just then, a 'ding' sound came from outside the bedroom. The woman's face suddenly changed, and she screamed loudly.
solution: The woman was a single mother, sleep-deprived and mentally exhausted. She had confused her baby with the food and put the baby in the microwave. (The bedroom was the nursery, and when the woman screamed, she saw the crib was empty.)

zh.title: 叮
zh.condition: 女人站在卧室里,看着手上冰凉的食物,揉了揉太阳穴。"最近睡眠太差了。"她想,这时,卧室外传来了"叮"的一声,女人脸色突然变了,大声尖叫起来。
zh.solution: 女人一个人带着孩子,睡眠不足,精神恍惚,把婴儿和食物弄混了,把婴儿放进了微波炉。(卧室是婴儿房,女人尖叫时看到婴儿床是空的。)

key_facts: The woman was raising a child alone.
She was in a state of extreme fatigue and mental confusion.
The 'bedroom' was actually the nursery.
The 'ding' sound came from a microwave oven.
The woman mistook her child for food.
The child was put inside the microwave.
After hearing the sound, she saw the empty crib.

title: Streetlight Went Out
condition: I walked halfway, and the streetlight went out.
solution: I am the hour hand. Walking half a circle means it's six o'clock. It's morning, so the streetlights turn off.

zh.title: 路灯灭了
zh.condition: 我走到一半,路灯灭了。
zh.solution: 我是时针,走了一圈的一半也就是六点,天亮了,路灯也就灭了。

key_facts: I am the hour hand
"Walking" refers to regular movement
"Halfway" relates to a time cycle
Streetlight turning off is an automated result
The event occurs in the early morning

title: Proof of Guilt
condition: "I didn't kill anyone, I don't know how to use a shotgun!" "Unfortunately, that might just prove you are the killer."
solution: The victim's cause of death was brain contusion caused by being struck in the back of the head with a gunstock, not from being shot with a shotgun. Because this person didn't know how to use a gun, they could only use the hunting rifle like a club. A regular shotgun is generally made of steel and walnut, weighing at least three kilograms or more. However, it doesn't rule out the possibility that someone who *does* know how to use a gun might adopt this method to avoid gunshots if they didn't bring a silencer.

zh.title: 有罪证明
zh.condition:
"我没有杀人,我不会用散弹枪!"
"很遗憾,这反而更可能证明你是凶手了。"
zh.solution: 死者的死因是被枪托击中后脑引起的脑挫伤,并不是被霰弹打碎了后脑。因为这个人不会用枪,他只能拿猎枪当棍子用。普通的霰弹枪一般由钢管和胡桃木制成,重量至少在三公斤以上。但不排除会用枪的人没有带消音器采用这种方法避免传出枪声的可能。

key_facts: Cause of death was blunt force trauma, not gunshot
Shotgun stock was used as a club
Killer lacked experience in using firearms
Claiming inability to use a gun becomes a suspicious point

title: Scary Nursery Rhyme
condition:
One, two dolls. Three, four are playing. Want five, six,
Six are missing, where is the other one?
solution: My six little friends and I all liked dolls. So I asked the butler to make me some dolls. At first, the butler made two. I thought it was too few. The butler made two more. I said it still wasn't enough, so the butler made another two. I happily took them to play with my friends, only to find they were all gone. I searched for them for a long time, until I discovered that these dolls looked very much like them, and noticed the butler looking at me with a strange gaze.

zh.title: 恐怖童谣
zh.condition:
一个,两个布娃娃。三个,四个在玩。要五个,六个,
六个不见了,还有一个在哪里?
zh.solution: 我和我的六个小伙伴们都喜欢娃娃。于是我让管家给我做几个布娃娃,刚开始管家做了两个,我嫌少,管家又做了两个,我说还不够,管家又做了两个。我开心的拿着它们找我的小伙伴们玩,却发现他们都不见了,我找了他们好久,直到发现这几个娃娃和他们长得很像,以及用异样眼光看着我的管家。

key_facts: The number of dolls is related to the number of missing friends (both are six).
The dolls were made by the butler.
The friends are missing.
The appearance of the dolls is similar to the missing friends.
The butler's behavior and gaze are very suspicious (implying he is the murderer).

title: A Painting
condition: I fell asleep peacefully while looking at the painting on my bed. The next morning when I saw the painting again, my scalp tingled, and I couldn't utter a single word of praise.
solution: I checked into a rundown little inn at night. The lights in the room were broken, and it was very dark. Opposite the bed was a painting of a man with sharp features, so lifelike, like the Mona Lisa. I felt as if the person in the painting was constantly watching me. The next morning, when it was bright, I realized that it wasn't a painting but a window. A man had been standing outside the window watching me all night, and because of the darkness, I had mistaken him and the window frame for a painting.

zh.title: 一幅画
zh.condition: 我在床上看着画安然入睡。第二天醒来,我再见到那幅画时,只觉得头皮发麻,再也夸不出一个字来。
zh.solution: 我晚上佳进一个破旧的小旅馆,进来房间以后,灯也是坏的,屋子里光线很暗。床对面有幅画,画上是个男,棱角分明,栩栩如生,就像蒙娜丽莎一样,我总觉得画中的人一直在看自己。第二天一早,天大亮的时候,我才发现原来那个位置不是一幅,而是一扇窗户。昨晚一直有个男人站在窗户外看我,而我因为光线太暗,把他和窗框当成了一幅画。

key_facts: The painting has changed.
The room was very dark at night.
The 'painting' on the wall was not a real painting.
The man in the painting was a real person.
The room was well-lit when I woke up the next day.
The man in the painting was gone when I woke up.

title: Martial Arts School Meets Bandits
condition: Xiao Ming and Xiao Li are about to graduate, and they decided to go on a trip together. They joined a tour group and took a bus to their destination. However, when the bus reached the mountain road, a group of bandits suddenly appeared from the woods. Everyone on the bus was terrified, but Xiao Ming and Xiao Li were unusually excited. Why?
solution: Xiao Ming and Xiao Li are graduates of a martial arts school. They usually lack opportunities to showcase their skills, and now they saw the bandits as a chance to demonstrate their martial arts.

zh.title: 武校遇匪
zh.condition: 小明和小李即将毕业,他们决定一起去旅游。他们跟随一个旅行团乘车前往目的地,不料车开到盘山公路上的时候,从树林中窜出了一帮劫匪,全车的人都惊恐万分,唯独小明和小李异常兴奋,这是为什么?
zh.solution: 小明和小李是武术学校毕业的学生,平时苦于没有表现的机会,这次看到劫匪终于能展示一下自己的拳脚了。

key_facts: Xiao Ming and Xiao Li are martial arts school graduates
The group encountered highway robbers during the trip
Everyone on the bus was terrified
The two were excited to see the bandits
They were eager to display their martial arts skills

title: Game
condition: Let's play a game. You play the adult, I'll pretend to be the lover. Only good people will be left.
solution:
My dad was abusive. Mom died protecting me. I hate him. Next door lived a mother and daughter; the girl was much younger than me. Once, I followed Dad and found him secretly assaulting the girl, while the girl's mother watched coldly. So I found the girl and learned from her that her mother, after divorcing, had a chaotic private life and especially favored young men. So we conspired to avenge each other. She wore sexy clothes to seduce Dad, and I took the opportunity to kill Dad. I wore youthful clothes to seduce her mother, creating an opportunity for her to kill her mother.
Finally, all the bad people were killed by us. Only good people were left.

zh.title: 游戏
zh.condition: 玩个游戏吧,你扮演大人,我假装情人,只剩下好人。
zh.solution:
我的爸爸家暴,妈妈为了保护我而死,我恨他。我家的隔壁住着一家母女,女孩子比我小很多。有一次我跟踪爸爸,发现他悄悄侵犯了女孩,而女孩子的妈妈也冷眼旁观。于是我找到女孩,从她那儿得知,她的妈妈离婚后私生活混乱,尤其钟爱年轻的男人。于是我们商议为彼此报仇,她穿上性感的衣服勾引爸爸,我趁机杀了爸爸,而我穿上青春的衣服勾引她的妈妈,为她杀死妈妈创造机会。
终于,坏人都被我们杀了,只剩下好人。

key_facts: The narrator and another girl were both victims of domestic violence.
Their abusers were elders in their respective families.
'Playing the adult' and 'pretending to be the lover' were part of their revenge plan.
They cooperated to create opportunities for each other to commit murder.
The 'good people' left at the end refer to the narrator and the neighbor girl.

title: Dinner Date
condition: You and a friend arranged to have dinner together. Your friend said to find a hidden spot so you wouldn't be discovered. Halfway through the meal, your friend exploded.

zh.condition: 你和朋友约着一起去吃饭,朋友说找个隐蔽地方别被发现,吃到一半,朋友炸了。

They are insects.
Specifically, they are mosquitoes.

title: The Imaginary Brother
condition: When I opened the door, I found my brother was gone and my mother was dead.
solution: I have an imaginary friend disorder. My brother was a figment of my imagination. He was always in my world, I loved him, and he loved me. We grew up together. One day, my mother had a heart attack. I was very anxious and told my brother to get her medicine. Seeing him rush off, I went downstairs to call an ambulance. When I returned, I found my mother was already dead, and my brother was gone.

zh.title: 臆想症哥哥
zh.condition: 当我开门后发现哥哥不见了 妈妈死了。
zh.solution: 我有臆想症,哥哥是我幻想出来的,他一直在我的世界里,我很爱他,他也很爱我,他和我从小一起长大。一天妈妈心脏病发了,我很着急,我叫哥哥去给妈妈拿药,看着哥哥着急的去了,我便下楼叫救护车,回家发现妈妈己经死了,哥哥也不见了。

key_facts: 'I' suffer from an imaginary friend disorder.
The 'brother' is a figment of 'my' imagination.
The mother died of a heart attack.
'I' thought the 'brother' went to get medicine for the mother.
The 'brother' never really existed.
'My' mental state affected my perception of the events.
The mother's death was unrelated to whether the 'brother' got the medicine.
Only 'I' and the mother were real.

title: Phone Call
condition: A wealthy man made a phone call to his beloved wife, and then his wife died.
solution: Thieves broke into the wealthy man's house. His wife was hiding somewhere when he made the call. Because her phone was not on silent, the ringing exposed her location, and she was killed by the thieves.

zh.title: 电话
zh.condition: 一位富豪给她心爱的妻子打了一通电话,于是妻子就死了。
zh.solution: 富豪家里进了小偷,富豪打电话时妻子正躲在某处,由于手机没有静音,铃声响起暴露了妻子的位置,妻子就被小偷杀了。

key_facts: Intruder(s) in the house
Wife was in a quiet environment/hiding
Phone was not on silent
Location revealed by sound
Wife was killed by the intruder(s)

title: Employee
condition: I helped my employee complete the task, but he was not happy.
solution: I hate my father. Living with him now is only for his inheritance. I really couldn't wait any longer, so I hired a killer to send him on his way. However, during an argument, I accidentally killed him. Fortunately, our body types are similar, so I could wear his clothes and pretend to be him to mislead others. What I didn't know was that when I disguised myself as my father and went out, the killer I hired also took action, but no one could pay him his 'salary' anymore.

zh.title: 雇员
zh.condition: 我帮我的雇员完成了任务,他却并不高兴。
zh.solution: 我讨厌我的父亲,如今与他住在一起只是为了他的遗产,我实在是等不及了,于是雇佣了一个杀手准备送他上路。然而在一次争吵中,我失手杀死了他,好在我们的身形相似,我可以穿上他的衣服装成他误导别人。我不知道的是,我伪装成父亲出门的时候,我雇佣的杀手也行动了,只是他的“工资”没人能给他了。

key_facts: My 'employee' is a professional killer.
The 'task' is to kill my father.
I accidentally killed my father myself before the killer could act.
I disguised myself as my father to cover up the crime.
The killer saw me in disguise and mistook me for the target.
The killer was unhappy because he mistakenly killed his employer, which was me.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Secrets of the Mansion
condition: At night, the quiet corridor echoed with hurried footsteps. The next day, a boat slowly sank on the river. People on the shore used a chain to pull up the boat. On the second day, the boat sank again, but this time there was no one on the shore.
solution: In the mansion, the head of the household immediately rushed to the backyard after receiving news of the eldest madam's adultery. The next day, the lover was being drowned in the pond, but the eldest madam was untouchable. At the critical moment, the lover shouted, 'I can help the head of the household cure infertility!' Overjoyed, the head of the household pulled him up. That night, the eldest madam advised the lover to escape while he had the chance, but the lover was not content. He said, 'His wealth and status are all due to your family's power. We just need to find an opportunity to kill him, and we won't have to hide anymore.' Thus, he harbored murderous intentions. However, the eldest madam, who appeared to agree, was actually very sensible and knew that such a malicious person could never be kept. The next day, she told the head of the household about it. On the second day, the lover was drowned in the pond again.

zh.title: 深宅秘事
zh.condition: 夜里,静谧的长廊里响起一阵急促的脚步。次日,河流之上一艘小船缓缓下沉。岸边的人用铁链将小船捞起。第二日,小船再次下沉,但是这次岸边没有人了。
zh.solution: 深宅中,当家收到大奶奶通奸的消息后即刻赶往后院。第二天,奸夫正在被沉塘,但是大奶奶是万万动不得的。千钧一发之际,奸夫大喊“我可以帮助当家的治疗不孕!”。当家欣喜若狂将他捞起。夜里,大奶奶劝奸夫乘此机会赶紧逃跑,但是奸夫却不知足,说“他家大业大全是靠你家的势力,我们只需找个机会把他杀了,以后的日子就不用再躲躲藏藏了”,于是他起了杀人的歹心。却不知,大奶奶表面应承,却是个十分明事理的主,知道如此歹毒心肠的人是绝不能留的。第二天,大奶奶转头将此事告诉了当家。第二日奸夫再次被沉塘。

key_facts: The eldest madam committed adultery, and the lover was drowned
The lover promised to cure infertility
The lover plotted to kill
The eldest madam was very calculating
The lover was drowned again

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Sleepless Nights
condition: My brother couldn't sleep well, so I devised a solution that finally worked - but when he woke up, he went insane with fear.
solution: Being poor, we shared a small rental without curtains. Exhausted from work, my brother couldn't sleep due to outside lights. I killed a rough-skinned man, using his skin as a window covering. The next morning when my well-rested brother saw my 'curtain', he went mad.

zh.title: 睡不好
zh.condition: 我的哥哥总是睡不好,于是我想了个法子让他终于睡好了,结果他醒来,却吓疯了。
zh.solution: 我和哥哥都很穷,哥哥在城市打拼。我和哥哥睡在一间小出租屋内,买不起窗帘,哥哥本来 就很累了,却每夜都被窗外的灯晃得睡不着觉。于是那天,我找了看起来个皮糙肉厚的人,把他杀了,割下了他完整的皮,封在了窗户上。屋内终于没有了外面耀眼的灯光,哥哥睡得 很熟很好。第二天早上起来,我问哥哥说:哥哥睡得好吗?哥哥回答睡得很好,但当他看见那张我精心制作的“窗帘”,吓疯了。

key_facts: Brother couldn't sleep due to light
Too poor to afford curtains
Special material used for curtains
Curtains were made from human skin
Brother went mad seeing skin curtains

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Watermelon
condition: I got fat, Xiao Qiang came to visit me. Father fished a cold watermelon out of the well. Xiao Qiang refused to eat it, and the watermelon went back into the well. Xiao Mei also came. Father split open the 'watermelon', and Xiao Mei went mad.
solution: I caught my girlfriend Xiao Mei and Xiao Qiang in the act. During the scuffle among the three of us, I was pushed into the well by the 'dog couple' (a derogatory term for an adulterous couple) and drowned. My body bloated in the well water and emitted a rotten smell. Father retrieved my body but told the villagers I was seriously ill. He then threw many watermelons into the well. Xiao Qiang came running nervously to inquire. Father fished a cold watermelon out of the well. Xiao Qiang dared not eat the watermelon soaked in corpse water. The father, having found the murderer, was very angry and cut off Xiao Qiang's head and threw it into the well. Xiao Mei also came to inquire. In front of her, Father split open Xiao Qiang's head and invited Xiao Mei to eat the 'cold watermelon.' Bright red liquid splattered all over Xiao Mei's face, and she was scared mad!

zh.title: 西瓜
zh.condition: 我变胖了,小强来看望我。父亲从井里捞出冰凉的西瓜,小强不肯吃,西瓜又回到井里。小美也来了,父亲劈开“西瓜”,小美疯了。
zh.solution: 我撞破女友小美和小强的“好事”三人扭打之际,我被狗男女推到井里淹死,尸体被井水泡得肿胀,传出腐烂的气味。父亲把我的尸体打捞上来,却跟村里人说我得了重病,又把很多西瓜扔到井里,小强慌张地跑来打探,父亲从井里捞出冰凉的西瓜,小强不敢吃泡过尸水的西瓜,找到凶手的父亲很生气,把小强的头砍下来扔进井里。小美也来打探情况,父亲当着她的面,劈开了小强的头请小美吃“冰凉的西瓜”,鲜红的汁液溅了小美一脸,小美被吓疯了!

key_facts: 'I got fat' refers to 'my' (the narrator's) body bloating after drowning in the well water.
The well is a key location; it contains not only watermelons but also a corpse.
'Watermelon' in the story does not always refer to the actual fruit; sometimes it's a substitute (e.g., a head).
Xiao Qiang and Xiao Mei are the murderers of 'me' (the narrator).
The father found out the truth and used the well and 'watermelons' to take revenge on Xiao Qiang and Xiao Mei.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Task
condition: I called my father. When we met, I was already in prison.
solution: I am a con artist. That day, I called an old man, claiming to be his long-lost son. He was skeptical, but I was silver-tongued, mentioning various details of his past life, gradually making him lower his guard. We talked for a long time; he repeatedly reminded me of some trivial life matters. Finally, he sent the money as I wished. Unexpectedly, a message popped up right after: 'Child, I know you are not him. He passed away last month, but your voice sounds so much like his. Now, I don't want to live alone anymore. Leaving the money to you makes me feel a bit better.' I quickly called back, but no one answered. So I called the police. The police promptly sent the old man to the hospital and also arrested me.

zh.title: 任务
zh.condition: 我给父亲打了个电话,见面时,我已经身陷囹圄。
zh.solution: 我是一个骗子。那天,我拨通一位老人的电话,谎称自己是他失散多年的儿子。他半信半疑,我却巧舌如簧,提及他过往生活里的种种细节,让他逐渐放下戒备。我们聊了很久,他反复叮嘱着一些生活琐事。最后,他按照我的意愿把钱打来。谁料,消息却紧跟着弹出:“孩子,我知道你不是他。他上个月已离世,可你的声音真像他。现在,我也不想独活了,把钱留给你,也让我心里好受些。”我急忙把电话打回去,可是已经无人接听。于是我报了警,警察及时将老人送医,也逮捕了我。

key_facts: My true identity is a phone scammer.
'Father' is the target of my scam, not my biological father.
The old man had already seen through my scam but chose to cooperate.
After remitting the money, the old man planned to commit suicide to follow his deceased son.
I ultimately called the police to save the old man who was preparing to commit suicide.
I ended up in prison because I voluntarily called the police, thereby exposing my crime.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Sailor's Fear of Fish
condition: I used to be a sailor, but now the sight of fish makes me feel nauseous and tremble. I'm always terrified of seeing fish.
solution: I was once a sailor. On one voyage, for some reason, my fellow sailors died one by one. To survive, those of us who were left used the flesh of our dead comrades as bait to catch fish. Days passed, and we were finally rescued. Because seeing fish always reminds me of the scenes of using our dead comrades' flesh as bait, I feel nauseous and tremble whenever I see fish. I'm always terrified of seeing them.

zh.title: 水手怕鱼
zh.condition: 我曾经是一个水手,可我见到鱼却会感到恶心、发抖。每次都很害怕见到鱼。
zh.solution: 我曾经是一个水手,有一次出海,因为一些原因,我的水手伙伴们一个接着一个的死去,而我们这些活下来的人为了继续活下去,我们用死去的伙伴的肉当诱饵钓鱼,一天天过去了,我们终于获救了,因为见到鱼总会想起我们拿死去的伙伴的肉当诱饵的一幕幕,所以我见到鱼会感到恶心、发抖,每次都很害怕见到鱼。

key_facts: 'My' fear stems from a traumatic experience at sea.
Many crew members died during that experience.
To survive, 'I' and the other survivors ate fish.
The bait used for fishing was very unusual.
The bait was the corpses of their dead comrades.
Seeing fish makes him recall the experience of using his comrades' flesh to catch fish.
This experience led to psychological trauma.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Lit Room
condition: After seeing the lit room in that suburban villa, I was so terrified that I ran away immediately.
solution: During vacation, I took a part-time job cleaning for a blind man living in a remote villa. Though isolated with poor transportation, the high pay and free accommodation attracted me. After moving in, I constantly felt being watched. One night when I went to the bathroom, I noticed my employer's room was lit.

zh.title: 亮灯的房间
zh.condition: 我看到郊外别墅里那个亮着灯的房间后,吓得拔腿就跑。
zh.solution: 我在假期找了个兼职,给一个盲人家打扫卫生。这个盲人住在郊区的别墅里,那一片人烟稀少,交通也不方便,但是因为工资高,还包吃住,我就来了。我住进去之后,却总觉得有人躲在暗处偷窥我。那天晚上我起来上厕所,却发现雇主的房间灯是亮的。

key_facts: The house owner is blind
The protagonist's job is cleaning
The villa is in a remote location
The protagonist feels constantly watched
The lit room belongs to the blind employer

title: A Mother's Report
condition: After a city murder, a mother reported her daughter's death a week later.
solution: Worried by news reports, the mother visited her working daughter only to find her murdered. Remembering the first case, she dismembered her daughter's body over a day before reporting, hoping media attention would pressure police to solve the case quickly.

zh.title: 母亲的报案
zh.condition: —个大城市里发生了一起凶杀案,一周后,一个母亲来报案,她的女儿也死在了家里。
zh.solution: 女生是在外打工,母亲看到新闻很担心女儿所以过去陪她,结果进门发现女儿真的被杀了,悲痛万分的同时她想起了第一个案子,她怕在这种地方案子太多警察办案不力抓不到杀死女儿的凶手,所以她没有立刻报警,而是花了一天的时间在家将女儿分尸了,希望以碎尸杀人案这样的噱头引起媒体的关注和社会舆论增压来让警方快速破案。

key_facts: Delayed report concealed secret
Dismemberment sought attention
Mother handled daughter's remains
Feared police wouldn't prioritize case
Daughter was already murdered

title: Globe
condition: Ivan loved globes very much. He saved money for half a year to buy a beautiful globe and played with it every day. But one day, when he heard a certain piece of news, he roared and threw the globe out the window. What happened?
solution: The Soviet Union collapsed, and his proud motherland no longer existed, rendering the globe useless.

zh.title: 地球仪
zh.condition: 伊万非常喜欢地球仪,他攒了半年的钱买了一只精美的地球仪,每天把玩。可是有天当他听到某个消息后,怒吼一声将地球仪扔出窗外。请问发生了什么?
zh.solution: 苏联解体了,他引以为豪的祖国不复存在,地球仪也没有用了。

key_facts: The globe symbolizes Ivan's special affection for his homeland
Ivan was a Soviet citizen or had deep feelings for it
Ivan's anger stemmed from the reality of his country's dissolution
The news Ivan heard was about a major national change
The country depicted on the globe no longer exists

title: Umbrella
condition: A stranger gave me an umbrella, then I smiled, and he cried.
solution: I had just killed someone and was burying the body beside a small path under the cover of heavy rain. Just then, a stranger, lost in the downpour, walked by. He happened to have two umbrellas and wanted to ask me for directions while offering me one. But after he handed me the umbrella, he accidentally saw blood dripping from my clothes. To avoid exposing myself, I gave him a wicked smile and then, amidst his crying and begging for mercy, I drew the dagger from my waist and stabbed him...

zh.title: 伞
zh.condition: 一个陌生人给了我一把伞,然后我笑了,他哭了。
zh.solution: 我刚刚杀了人,正在一条小路旁借着大雨掩埋尸体。这时一个被雨幕迷了路的陌生人走过,正巧他手里有两把伞,便想借送伞之机向我问路,可当他向我递过伞后,却不小心看见了顺着我衣服滴下的血水。为了不暴露自己,我冲他露出了一个邪恶的微笑,然后在他的哭泣求饶声中抽出腰间匕首刺向了他...

key_facts: "I" had just committed a serious crime (murder).
The environment at the time was rainy.
The stranger saw something he shouldn't have (bloodstains/evidence).
"I's" smile was malicious or threatening.
The stranger's crying was due to fear.

title: Silent Farewell
condition: She 'killed' her best friend with a pen, and there was not a trace of struggle in the room.
solution: Her best friend was suffering from a terminal illness and had been in great pain. She had already written a will and repeatedly begged her to help her end her life. However, the law did not allow euthanasia, and she was not the legal guardian, so she could not make the decision to withdraw life support. After struggling with her conscience, she wrote down the witness’s name next to her friend’s will, then helped the hospital remove the life support, and her best friend passed away peacefully.

zh.title: 无声的告别
zh.condition: 她用一支笔,“杀”了她的挚友,房间里没有一丝挣扎的痕迹。
zh.solution: 她的挚友身患绝症,被病痛折磨得痛苦不堪,早就写下遗书并多次哀求她帮忙结束生命。但法律不允许安乐死,她也不是合法监护人无法替挚友做医疗放弃的决定。经过内心痛苦的挣扎,她用一支笔,在挚友的遗书旁写下见证人的名字,随后协助医院撤掉了维持生命的仪器,挚友平静地离去。

key_facts: Best friend desires euthanasia
The law prevents direct help
The pen becomes the instrument of death
After struggling, she assists in ending her friend's life
A silent farewell ends the suffering

title: Black, White, Red
condition: Black, white, yellow. Yes, that's the order. After teaching me these, my mother passed away.
solution: My family lived by stealing precious artifacts. Before she passed, my mother taught me the family's 'skills'. Black was for special night clothes that allowed us to infiltrate museums; white was for wrapping artifacts to protect them from damage; yellow was for gold that we obtained by exchanging stolen artifacts. My mother hoped that I could have a better life through these skills.

zh.title: 黑白红
zh.condition: 黑的,白的,黄的。没错,就是这个顺序。教完我这些,我的母亲就去世了。
zh.solution: 我的家族以盗窃珍贵文物为生。母亲临终前向我传授家族“技艺”。黑色是特制的夜行衣,便于在夜晚潜入博物馆;白色是用来包裹文物的软布,防止文物磕碰留下痕迹;黄色是文物兑换成的黄金。母亲希望我能通过这项技能过个好点的日子。

key_facts: A family of thieves passes down mysterious skills
Black clothes are used for infiltrating museums
White cloth protects the artifacts
Yellow gold comes from exchanging artifacts
Mother hoped for a better life for me

title: The Heavy Swing
condition: I swung down hard, and she fell to the ground; he swung down hard, and I fell to the ground too.
solution: I was playing badminton. As I prepared for a smash, I hit the shuttlecock into my opponent's eye, causing injury or even blindness. She collapsed on the ground in pain. He was a judge. After announcing the guilty verdict against the defendant, he struck his gavel, making the judgment final. As the defendant, I couldn't bear the final verdict. My legs gave way, and I collapsed in front of the defendant's stand, my face filled with despair and anguish.

zh.title: 重重挥下
zh.condition: 我重重挥下,她趴在地上;他重重挥下,我也趴在了地上。
zh.solution: 我在打羽毛球,准备杀球时,把球杀到了对面眼睛上导致其受伤甚至失明,对面趴在地上露出痛苦的表情。他是一名法官。在宣布对被告的有罪判决后,敲下了法槌,判决生效,我作为被告无法承受这最终的裁决,双腿发软瘫倒在被告席前的地上,脸上充满了绝望和痛苦。

key_facts: The two 'swings' are different in nature.
The first 'swing' is related to a sport.
The second 'swing' occurs in a formal setting.
His' identity is a law enforcer.
The reasons for 'falling to the ground' are different.
The story involves a legal trial.

title: Appearance
condition: I looked at the messy house, then angrily stared at that man. I anxiously waited for his appearance. I appeared, and I was terrified.
solution: I returned home and found the house messy; a burglar had entered. So I rushed to check the security camera installed in the house. In the footage, I found the burglar's figure and watched him angrily. But the surveillance showed that after stealing things, he went into an inner room and didn't come out. So, I anxiously waited while watching the monitor to see when he would come out. But then, the monitor played the footage of me returning home. I suddenly realized the burglar was still in the house. At the same time, I heard the sound of a doorknob turning behind my back...

zh.title: 出现
zh.condition: 我看着乱糟糟的家里,然后愤怒的注视着那个男人,我焦急地等待着他的出现,我出现了,我惊恐万分
zh.solution: 我回到家里,发现家里乱糟糟的进了小偷。于是我急忙去查看家里安装的摄像头,在摄像里发现了小偷的身影,愤怒的看着他。但是监控显示他偷完东西后进了里面的房间没再出来,于是我在监控中焦急的等待着看他什么时候出门,但随后监控播放了我回家的画面,我猛然意识到小偷还在家里,与此同时,我的后背传来了门把手的声音......

key_facts: A burglar entered the house (messy).
"I" was checking the surveillance footage.
The burglar in the surveillance footage entered a room and did not come out.
The surveillance footage caught up to the time "I" returned home.
The burglar is still in the house at this moment and is nearby "I".

title: Ransom

They brought the ransom, prepared for the worst.
But when they arrived there, they became even more desperate.
solution: When the couple arrived at the transaction point and put down the money, they didn't see their kidnapped son, but instead saw a note on the table that read: 'You shouldn't have left your daughter home alone.'

他们带上了赎金,做好了最坏的打算。

title: Shipwreck
condition: A man suddenly picked up an axe and chopped off everyone's hands on board. Why?
solution: The ship was wrecked. To avoid falling into the sea, everyone was holding onto the boat. The man chopped off all hands grasping the boat to ensure his own survival.

zh.title: 遇难船
zh.condition: 一男子在船上突然挥起斧头把所有人手都砍了,为什么。
zh.solution: 船上遇难了,为了不掉入海里,所有人都抓着船只,男子为了自己活着,砍掉了所有抓着船只的手。

key_facts: The ship was in danger

title: Making Dumplings
condition: Mom kept making dumplings. We couldn't eat anymore, but Mom kept making dumplings, so we could only keep eating.
solution: Mom was a caregiver in an orphanage; we all called her Mom. But Mom was very strict. If we didn't obey, we would be severely beaten. Often, children with severe injuries died. Mom told us this was the consequence of not listening to her. We were terrified. To prevent others from finding out, Mom would make the dead children into meat fillings for dumplings and feed them to us. If we didn't obey, we would die like those children. We could only obediently listen and eat these dumplings.

zh.title: 包饺子
zh.condition: 妈妈不停的包饺子,我们已经吃不下了,可是妈妈还是不停的在包饺子,我们只能不停的吃。
zh.solution: 妈妈是孤儿院里的护工,我们都叫她妈妈。可是妈妈很严厉,只要我们不听话,就会遭到毒打,经常有伤势过重的孩子死去,妈妈告诉我们,这就是因为不听她话的后果,我们十分害怕。妈妈为了不让别人发现就把那些死去的孩子包成肉馅 饺子给我们吃,如果不听话,就会像那些孩子一样死去,只能乖乖的听话,把这些饺子吃下去。

key_facts: 'Mom' is not the biological mother but a caregiver in a specific institution (orphanage caregiver).
'We' refers to a group of children (orphans).
The dumpling filling is problematic (human flesh).
'Mom' engages in abuse and even murder of children.
The children eat the dumplings not voluntarily, but out of fear and coercion.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Cause and Effect
condition: Before dying, one can enter multiple instances. These instances are full of ghosts and dangers, and only one person dies per day in an instance. Solving the instance's puzzle allows one to survive in reality. The more people killed, the more one survives in reality, yet the more people killed, the more one dies.
solution: In the instance, only one person dies per day; once someone dies, everyone else is safe. Participants can use this rule to cause others to die before them, thereby gaining more time to solve puzzles and increasing their chances of clearing the instance and surviving in reality. However, those who die in the instance will turn into ghosts within the instance. Therefore, while killing others in this instance makes it easier to clear, in subsequent instances, the ghosts of those killed will return for revenge. The instance is already full of dangerous ghosts, and with the addition of those who were killed, this person will have virtually no chance of survival. Thus, "the more people killed, the more one can safely return to the human world, yet the more people killed, the more one dies."

zh.title: 副本因果
zh.condition: 有人在死之前能够进入多个副本,副本中蕴含着鬼怪危险重重,副本中一天只会死一个人,只要解开副本谜题就能在现实中活下来。杀的人越多,越能在现实中存活,杀的人越多,越会死亡。
zh.solution: 在副本中,一天只会死一个人,只要死了一个人,其他人就安全了。参与者可以利用这条规则让其他人先于自己死亡,这样就会给自己更多的时间来解迷题,从而有更大的可能通关副本,在现实中存活。但在副本中死亡的人会变成副本中的鬼怪。因此虽然在这个副本中杀死他人的人能更容易通关,但在接下来的副本中,被他杀死的人变成鬼怪前来复仇,副本本就蕴含着鬼怪危机重重,加上那些被杀害的人化成的鬼怪,这个人基本没有生还可能,所以"杀的人越多,越能安全回到人间,杀的人越多,越会死亡"。

key_facts: Only one person is allowed to die per day in the instance, allowing others temporary safety
Killing other participants in the instance buys oneself more time to solve puzzles
Those who die in the instance transform into ghosts within the instance
Individuals who clear the instance by killing others will face the ghosts of those victims in subsequent instances
Killing more people, while beneficial for short-term survival, ultimately increases the risk of death in the long run

title: Deadly Jade
condition: The wealthy man went to the temple to worship every day, and the abbot gave him a Guanyin statue as a token of gratitude. Soon after, both the wealthy man and the monk met their end.
solution: The wealthy man, who appeared to be a prominent philanthropist, had an unclean source of wealth. In an attempt to launder his ill-gotten gains, he decided to donate a large sum of money to the temple for renovation. The monk, originally a devout practitioner, gradually fell into the abyss of greed as the wealthy man's 'donations' became more frequent. He then demanded a high 'hush money' payment from the wealthy man. However, the wealthy man did not comply with the monk's demands and instead became increasingly furious. In order to protect his reputation and wealth, the wealthy man decided to go to any lengths to silence the monk. During a face-to-face meeting, the wealthy man, in a fit of anger, decided to take extreme measures. On one hand, he pretended to agree to pay more bribes, while on the other hand, he secretly arranged for his men to deal with the monk. The wealthy man thought he could kill two birds with one stone: continue to cover up his crimes and eliminate the monk's threat. However, what the wealthy man did not know was that the monk also wanted to kill two birds with one stone. Knowing that if left unchecked, the wealthy man would eventually kill him as well, the monk had already secretly handed over evidence of the wealthy man's money laundering to the public security department. On the night the wealthy man sent his men to kill the monk, the police had already locked onto the wealthy man and his criminal network. The monk did not escape assassination. The wealthy man's assets were all frozen, his reputation was ruined, and he ultimately ended up in prison.

zh.title: 致命玉石
zh.condition: 富豪每天都到庙堂祭拜,住持送观音以示感谢。不久,富豪与和尚双双陨落。
zh.solution: 富豪表面上是名声显赫的慈善家,然而他的财富来源并不清白。为了洗净那些不法所得,他决定捐巨款给庙堂进行装修,借此洗钱。而和尚本是一个虔诚的修行者,但随着富豪越来越频繁的“捐赠”,他开始陷入了贪婪的深渊。于是他要求富豪支付高额“封口费”。然而,富豪并没有按照和尚的要求妥协,反而愈加愤怒。为了保住自己的名声和财富,富豪决定不惜一切代价让和尚闭嘴。在一次面对面的会谈中,富豪恼羞成怒,决定采取极端手段。他一方面假装答应支付更多的贿赂,另一方面悄悄安排手下去处理和尚。富豪以为他可以一箭双雕,既能继续掩盖自己的罪行,又能消除和尚的威胁。然而,富豪不知道的是,和尚也想一箭双雕,因为他知道如果放任不管,富豪迟早会把自己也杀了,所以他早已暗中将富豪洗钱的证据交给了公安部门。就在富豪派人去杀死和尚的那一晚,警察也已经锁定了富豪和他背后的犯罪网络。和尚没能逃过暗杀。富豪所有的资产也被冻结,名誉扫地,最终身陷囹圄。

key_facts: The wealthy man laundered money through donations
The monk demanded hush money
The wealthy man sent men to kill the monk
The monk provided evidence to the public security department
The wealthy man was imprisoned, and his assets were frozen

title: Karma
condition: Today is the wedding day, and everyone is comforting me. When I see her, the bag of gold has found its place.
solution: On the wedding day, it was raining. Two wedding processions met on the way and had to take shelter in a pavilion. While waiting, the two brides started talking. Bride A couldn't help but cry, complaining that she was marrying a poor husband and that the wedding day was so unlucky (it was raining), which made her cry. Bride B, seeing this, felt very sympathetic and gave her a bag of gold, hoping she could use the money to improve her life. Others, seeing Bride A's situation, could only offer sympathy, but when they saw Bride A receive help, they also congratulated her on meeting a kind-hearted person. However, not long after, Bride B's home was robbed by bandits, and her family fell into poverty. To make a living, Bride B had to work as a wet nurse for a wealthy family. One day, while taking care of the young master, Bride B accidentally found a sachet in the young master's room, which was the same one she had given to Bride A to hold the gold. Only then did Bride B realize that the person she had helped had become her mistress. When Bride A found out, she was very moved and decided to take good care of Bride B in return for her kindness.

zh.title: 福报
zh.condition: 今天是结婚的日子,所有人都在安慰我。见到她后,那袋金子有了归处。
zh.solution: 大婚的日子,天下正下着雨。两支迎亲队伍在途中相遇,只好在亭子里避雨。躲雨时,两方的新娘开始交谈。新娘A忍不住哭诉,她嫁给了同为贫民的丈夫,以后的日子肯定艰难,连结婚当天都如此不如意(下雨),委屈让她泪流不止。新娘B见状,内心十分同情,便送给她一袋金子,希望她能用这笔钱改善生活。旁人见到新娘A的处境,虽然同情,但也只能安慰她;而看到新娘A得到了帮助,大家也都恭喜她遇到了贵人。 然而,不久之后,新娘B的家遭遇了土匪的抢劫,家道中落。为了生计,新娘B只能在大户人家做奶妈。而新娘A凭借新娘B送的金子,经过多年的努力,终于发家致富,成为了大户人家的女主人。有一天,新娘B在照顾小少爷时,偶然发现小少爷的房间里供着一个荷包,正是当年她送给新娘A的那个装金子的荷包。新娘B这才意识到,自己当年帮助的人,如今已经成为了她的主人。新娘A得知后,感慨万分,决定好好照顾新娘B,报答当年的恩情。

key_facts: Bride A used the gold to improve her situation
Bride B gave the gold out of sympathy
Bride B's home was robbed by bandits
Bride A became wealthy with the gold
Bride B found the sachet in the young master's room

title: Police
condition: A sweet-looking girl, shy and flustered, asked a passerby: 'Hello, do you know if there are any police nearby?'
solution: Passerby: 'Uh, I don't think so.' Girl: 'So, it's not possible to find a police officer quickly?' Passerby: 'Mmm, probably not.' Girl: 'Okay, then. Hands up, this is a robbery!'

zh.title: 警察
zh.condition: 一位长相甜美的女孩子羞涩又慌张的问一位路人:“你好,请问你知道这附近有警察吗?请问发生了什么?
zh.solution: 路人:“哎,好像没有阿。”女孩子:“那在短时间内能找到警察吗? 路人:“唔,好像也不能吧” 女孩子:“恩,那好吧。手给我举起来,打劫!!”

key_facts: The girl wasn't asking about the police for help.
She needed to confirm that no police were nearby.
The girl was assessing the risk of carrying out a plan.
Her appearance and demeanor were deceptive.
The girl's real purpose was to rob someone.
She only revealed her intention after confirming the police were not around.
The passerby was misled by the girl's appearance.
