title: Cry for Help
condition: There were cries in the abandoned hospital. I saw someone asking for help. After urinating, I calmly went home. The next day, I died, my expression ferocious.
solution:
I am a paranormal investigator streamer. I heard that in the nearby abandoned hospital, on every full moon night, miserable cries can be heard from the second floor. To entertain my fans, I decided to investigate tonight, on the full moon night.
When I followed the cries into that hospital room, I saw a mirror. But what was reflected in the mirror was not me, but a person in a hospital gown, pale-faced, asking me for help. He was the rumored person trapped here, who underwent erroneous psychiatric treatment and eventually chose to commit suicide! So it was all true! I was so scared I peed on the spot, dropped the live streaming equipment on the floor, and ran out frantically. But that ghost chased closely after me, not letting go; he ran extremely fast. I shouted loudly in the dead of night: Help! Help! But no one heard my voice at all. That thing quickly caught up to me, controlled my body, and eerily yet calmly manipulated me to walk home. Back to my room, using the way he had died, it manipulated my body to commit suicide by slitting my wrists.

zh.title: 求救
zh.condition: 废弃医院有哭声,我看到有人求救我撒了泡尿后平静的回家。第二天我死了,表情狰狞。
zh.solution:
我是一个探灵主播,听闻附近的废弃医院每逢月圆之夜,二楼都会传出凄惨的哭声,为了给粉丝整活,我决定今晚月圆之夜去一探究竟。
当我顺着哭声走进那间病房后,看到一面镜子,镜子里映出的却不是我,而是一个穿着病号服脸色煞白的人在向我求救,他是传闻那个被困在这里,错误进行精神治疗的人,最后选择了自杀!原来这都是真的!我吓得当场尿了,把直播的机器丢在地上,疯狂跑了出去。可是那个鬼魂却紧追着我不放,他跑的极快,我在深夜里大声喊:救命!救命!但是根本没人听到我的声音,那个东西很快追上了我,控制了我的身体诡异又平静的操控我走回家,回到我的房间,用他曾经死去的方式,操控我的身体割腕自杀。

key_facts: The incident took place in an abandoned hospital rumored to be haunted.
The protagonist saw someone asking for help in the mirror, whose image was not their own.
The protagonist fled the hospital due to extreme fear.
The ghost from the mirror chased and controlled the protagonist.
The protagonist's final manner of death is related to the ghost's past experiences.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Deformed AI
condition: Xiao Man is my new lover. He does everything to make me happy, and of course, I am touched. I love him, so I do everything to keep this machine running. When calm turns into waves, he must be happy.
solution: I met an online friend who often invited me to meet privately. He had his reasons, saying that in real life, he was invisible, and only pain made him feel his existence. So, he often asked me to hurt him in various ways. Of course, I was happy to oblige, since this was the reason we became friends. This time, he said he wanted to give me a unique gift. That night, we went to the secret base, and I used a knife to cut his flesh, took out his heart, and bit into it. 'I really like the gift you gave me.' From then on, though I lost him, he will forever accompany me. I kept his brain and used electronic devices to continue supporting it, placing the brain in the secret base operating table. Through cameras, it sent images to the brain, allowing it to see what I did to other online friends. Every time I saw a sharp fluctuation in the device, I knew that he must have liked my gift.

zh.title: 畸形AI
zh.condition: 小曼是我的新恋人,他总是不惜一切代价来让我开心。我当然很感动,我也爱他,所以,我不惜一切代价维持着这副仪器的运行。当平静中掀起波涛时,他一定是开心的。
zh.solution: 我在网上认识了一位网友,他经常会约我私下见面,当然他也有他的目的,他说他是在生活中就是一个小透明,一点存在感都没有,只有痛感能然他感受到自己的存在,所以他经常会要求我以各种方式伤害他。我当然也乐此不疲,毕竟,这才是我们成为朋友的原因啊。这次,他说他想送给我一份独特的礼物,晚上,我们再次来到秘密基地,我用小刀割开他的肉,从里面取出他的心脏,自己咬了一口,“你送给我的礼物我很喜欢”。自此虽然我失去了他,但是我会让他永远陪伴着我的。所以我把他的大脑留了下来。利用电子仪器继续供养着这份大脑,将它放在我们秘密基地的手术台前,用摄像头传输信息到仪器内的大脑里,让他看到我对其他网友做的事情,每次看到仪器的频率有大幅变动,我就知道他一定也很喜欢我回馈给他的礼物。

key_facts: The twisted sense of pain and existence
A deformed love
Harm and control over others
The merging of machinery and human emotions
Tragedy of companionship after death

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Thump, Thump, Thump
condition: One night, a man had just sneaked into a house when he suddenly heard a 'thump, thump, thump' sound from the stairs outside the door. He hurriedly hid under the bed. The moment the door opened, his guts felt ripped apart. Please deduce.
solution: The man was a thief. That night, he sneaked into a murderer's house. The murderer was dragging a corpse up the stairs at the time, and the 'thump, thump, thump' sound was the corpse's head hitting each step as it was dragged. When the murderer entered, they were carrying the corpse upside down. The thief, hiding under the bed, made eye contact with the inverted head of the corpse, and was scared out of his wits.

zh.title: 咚咚咚
zh.condition: 某夜男子刚潜进一屋,就忽然听门外楼梯有咚、咚、咚的声音,便匆忙地躲到床底,门开的一瞬间,肝胆俱裂,请推理。
zh.solution: 男子的身份是小偷,那天潜进了一个杀人犯的屋子,杀人犯当时拖着一具尸体往楼梯上走,咚咚咚的声音是尸体头被倒拖着撞到每层台阶的声音,进门时杀人犯倒提着尸体进来,躲在床底的小偷的目光与尸体倒立的头四目相对,于是吓得魂飞魄散。

key_facts: The man is a thief
The man entered the wrong place (a murderer's house)
The 'thump, thump, thump' sound came from a moving corpse
The corpse was being dragged upstairs
The man was hiding under the bed, with a unique perspective
The man's eye contact with the corpse caused panic

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Celebrity
condition: A female celebrity raised a daughter. Since childhood she occasionally put a hat on her daughter. One day she took her daughter to hospital where the daughter learned the truth and committed suicide.
solution: The celebrity was disfigured. She raised the daughter to harvest her face for transplantation. The hat was her own - she periodically measured the daughter's head size with it. Once it fit perfectly, she took the daughter to hospital for face transplant surgery.

zh.title: 女明星
zh.condition: 女明星养了一个女儿,从小她都会时不时给她的女儿戴一顶帽子,有一天她带她女儿去医院,女儿在医院知道真相后就自杀了。
zh.solution: 女明星毁过容,养女儿是为了得到移植脸皮到她自己的脸上,那顶帽子是她自己的,时不时给女儿戴上帽子是为了测量女儿头部大小,一旦刚好合适,就可以带去医院做脸部移植手术。

key_facts: The celebrity needed new facial skin
The daughter was raised for skin harvest
The hat actually belonged to the celebrity
Wearing it measured head size
Learning the truth made the daughter commit suicide

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Spitting out Medicine
condition: My wife always makes me take my medicine on time. Although I love my wife very much, I secretly spit out the medicine.
solution: My wife is already dead, the cause of death was a car accident. I developed a mental illness due to excessive grief. I secretly spit out the medicine so that I can fantasize that my wife is by my side. If I take the psychiatric medication, the fantasized wife disappears. (To prevent my wife from disappearing, I always secretly spit out the medicine; this way, the fantasized wife stays with me).

zh.title: 吐药
zh.condition: 妻子总是让我按时吃药,虽然我很爱妻子,可我却偷偷把药吐掉。
zh.solution: 妻子已经死了,死因是车祸。我因为过于悲痛得了精神病。我把药偷偷吐掉,这样我能幻想出妻子在我身边。帮我吃下精神药,幻想的妻子就消失了。(为了不让妻子消失,我每次都会把药偷偷吐掉;这样幻想出来的妻子就会陪伴着我)

key_facts: The wife's true state is inconsistent with what is apparent in the story.
The narrator suffers from a mental illness.
The medicine's effect is to influence the narrator's mental state.
The narrator's interaction with the 'wife' does not occur in reality.
Spitting out the medicine is to maintain a certain status quo.

title: Pregnancy Reveal
condition: Basketball star Mr. A's girlfriend is pregnant, and he lost his NCAA eligibility. Why?
solution: His girlfriend is a doping inspector. Since she couldn't work while pregnant, Mr. A was caught taking performance-enhancing drugs and was disqualified.

zh.title: 孕期露馅
zh.condition: 篮球明星A先生。因为他的女友怀孕了,而使得他被NCAA取消了选手资格。这到底是为什么?
zh.solution: 他的女友是兴奋剂检验人员。女友因为怀孕不能工作,于是他被检查出服用兴奋剂而被取消参赛资格。

key_facts: The star was disqualified due to his girlfriend's pregnancy
His girlfriend’s real identity was a doping inspector
She could no longer cover for him because of her pregnancy
He was caught taking drugs and was disqualified
The pregnancy revealed the doping issue

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Survival
condition: He said there was light ahead. I dragged my broken body towards it, into a cacophony of human voices, unable to tell if they meant kindness or threat.
solution: I am a badly injured black cat, wounded in a fight with other animals over territory. My injuries are life-threatening. Guided by a wise old man, I came to a village. There might be kind people willing to adopt and treat me, but some villagers believe that an outsider cat, especially an injured or unluckily colored one, brings bad luck, disease, or disaster. They are extremely unfriendly to black cats, at best driving them away, at worst, harming them.

zh.title: 保命
zh.condition: 他说,前面有光。我拖着残躯爬去,人声杂沓,分不清是善意还是威胁。
zh.solution: “我”是一只受了重伤的黑猫,与其他争夺地盘的动物打斗所致,伤势严重,危及生命,在洞悉世事的老者的指引下来到一处村庄。可能会有好心人愿意收养治疗,但也有一部分村民认为外来的、尤其是受伤或毛色不吉利的猫会带来晦气、疾病甚至灾祸。他们对黑猫极其不友好,轻则驱赶,重则可能予以伤害。

key_facts: 'I' am not human.
'I' am seriously injured.
'He' is a human, but not the protagonist.
The 'light' refers to the lights of a human village.
The 'human voices' represent both opportunity and danger.
My' fur is black.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Stuffed Doll
condition: After an 'accident', my wife locked herself in a room until one day her wails led me to a horrifying sight.
solution: When I discovered my wife's infidelity and that our child wasn't mine, I staged an accident. She survived but went mad, sewing our dead baby into a rotting doll crawling with maggots that she cradled, cooing: 'Don't be scared, baby.'

zh.title: 布偶
zh.condition: 一场意外后,妻子便开始把自己关在房间里,不肯出来。那天我突然听到她在嚎啕大哭,我急忙冲进房间里,却被眼前的一幕吓傻了。
zh.solution: 我很爱我的妻子,有一天我发现妻子怀孕后,就开始精心准备迎接孩子的到来。结果我发现妻子竟然出轨了。为了孩子,我暂时隐忍,但是孩子出生后我发现孩子还不是我的。愤怒之下我精心策划了一场车祸,想让她们通通丧命。谁知妻子竟然活了下来。不过她疯了,她整日把自己关在二楼的婴儿房内,我也不管她,自己只是晚上回来睡个觉,不过经常在房子里闻到一些异味。这一天,我听到了婴儿房里传出嚎啕大哭,我急忙冲进房间。一阵恶臭袭来,我发现妻子怀里抱着的洋娃娃爬满蛆虫,她竟然把死去的孩子缝进了洋娃娃里!她一边抓去娃娃上的蛆虫,一边哭喊着:宝宝别怕,宝宝别怕。

key_facts: Wife went mad after 'accident'
Child wasn't biologically his
'Accident' was premeditated
Room smelled of decomposition
Dead baby sewn into doll
Doll was rotting with maggots
Wife spoke to decomposing doll

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: In Vain
condition: On Mother's Day, I wanted to make a unique gift for my mother. I made a flower wreath and prepared her favorite fruits. But when the gift was ready, my mother cried in sorrow.
solution: On Mother's Day, I hadn't seen my mother for a long time, so I decided to walk to town to surprise her. However, I didn't have enough money for a taxi, but I remembered the way. I just needed to follow the main road. Along the way, I was filled with joy, admiring the scenery. Seeing beautiful flowers, I thought they must be what my mother liked, so I picked them to weave into a flower wreath. When I saw the fruits my mother had mentioned before, I picked them, thinking she would be delighted to taste them. But due to my carelessness, I fell while picking the fruit and hit my head on a stone. In the wilderness, no one discovered my bleeding. I fell into a hallucination, seeing my mother welcoming me with a surprised and happy face, wearing the flower wreath I made and eating the fruits I picked, filling my heart with happiness. That night, my grandfather informed my mother of my disappearance. With the help of the police, my mother saw my body.

zh.title: 一场空
zh.condition: 母亲节,我想为母亲制作一份独特的礼物。我做好了花环,亲手备好她爱吃的水果。但是礼物做好了,母亲却伤心哭了。
zh.solution: 母亲节。我已经很久没有见到母亲了,于是决定徒步走到镇里,给她一个惊喜。然而,我身上没有足够的钱打车,但我记得这条路,只需要沿着大路走就好。在路上,我怀着喜悦的心情,欣赏着沿途的风景。看到美丽的花朵,我想这一定是母亲喜欢的,于是采下来编成花环;见到母亲曾经提过的果实,我上前摘下,心想着母亲尝到一定会很高兴。但是,因为我的粗心大意,在采摘果实时不慎跌倒,头部磕到地上的石头。在这片荒山野岭中,没人发现我不断流淌的鲜血。我陷入了幻觉,看到母亲满脸惊喜地迎接我,戴着我亲手编的花环,吃着我摘的果实,心里充满了幸福。当晚,外公向母亲告知我的失踪的情况,在警察的帮助下母亲见到了我的尸体。

key_facts: Made a flower wreath and prepared fruits for mother
Walked to town to surprise mother
Fell and hit head while picking fruit
Bled to death in the wilderness without being noticed
Mother saw my body in the end

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Dad (Different Story)
condition: The little girl didn't call him Dad, and the man was angry. The little girl called him Dad, and the man was scared.
solution: The man couldn't have children but always fantasized about being a father. On Father's Day, overwhelmed by the urge to be a dad, the man called a lone little girl into an alley and forced her to call him Dad. The little girl refused, making him angry. However, the man soon discovered that the little girl was actually mute, and he had a plan: he would simply kidnap her and make her his daughter. Yet, on his way home while holding the little girl captive, she shouted "Dad" to her biological father who was looking for her. Only then did the man realize the girl had been faking her muteness to deceive him, and his kidnapping and attempt to force her to be his daughter were exposed. Legal repercussions awaited him.

zh.title: 爸爸
zh.condition: 小女孩不叫爸爸,男人很生气。小女孩叫了爸爸,男人很害怕。
zh.solution: 男人不能生育,却一直幻想做父亲。父亲节这天,男人爹瘾大发,把一个落单的小女孩叫到了小巷子,强迫她叫自己爸爸,结果小女孩不肯,他很生气。不过,很快男人发现小女孩居然是个哑巴,他心生一计,干脆直接绑了做女儿。然而,就在他挟持小女孩回家的路上,女孩朝寻找他的生父喊了一声"爸爸",男人才明白女孩刚才是装聋作哑骗自己,而他绑架,强迫做人爸爸的事,也就此暴露,等待他的将是法律的严惩。

key_facts: The kidnapper desired fatherhood due to infertility
The girl's initial silence was not muteness
The girl's refusal to say "Dad" was a rejection of the kidnapper
The girl's shout was directed at her biological father
The man's fear stemmed from the exposure of his kidnapping

title: Handgun
condition: He returned home and saw a woman holding a handgun, saying she was going to kill him.
solution: He is a drama critic who once reviewed a male actor playing a murderer as having poor acting skills. This actor then disguised himself as a woman wanting to kill him and hid in his house. If he didn't realize the actor didn't actually want to kill him, it would prove the actor's acting skills.

zh.title: 手枪
zh.condition: 他回到家里,看到一个女人拿着手枪,说要杀了他
zh.solution: 他是一名戏剧评论家,曾点评一名扮演凶手的男演员演技拙劣,这名演员于是扮演成想杀他的女人躲在他家,如果他没看出来演员不想杀自己,就证明了演员的演技。

key_facts: The gun wielder's threat was to achieve another purpose, not genuinely to kill.
The gun wielder's female appearance was a disguise.
The man's past professional actions were the direct cause of this incident.
This scene was a carefully arranged performance, not a real attack.
The gun wielder's purpose was to prove a certain professional skill to the man.

title: Almonds
condition: He feared almonds since childhood, but when grown up he held almonds again without fear.
solution: His father was murdered using cyanide which smells like almonds. As a child he thought his father died from eating almonds. After learning about cyanide and the truth as an adult, he found and killed the murderer the same way.

zh.title: 杏仁
zh.condition: 他从小害怕杏仁,但当他长大后再次拿起杏仁,他便不再害怕。
zh.solution: 凶手用氰化物杀了死者,因其散发的杏仁味,死者的孩子以为父亲是吃杏仁而死。长大后死者的儿子了解了氛化物,并且了解了当年的真相,于是找到凶手并以同样的方法杀了他。

key_facts: His childhood fear wasn't of almonds themselves
The almond smell was associated with his father's death
His father was actually murdered
Cyanide poison smells like almonds
He killed the murderer using the same method

title: Lost Child
condition: 'Thank you for finding my lost child. I'm taking him home now.' This was the last sentence I heard.
solution: Having recently lost my child, I was walking down the road in a daze when I was suddenly drawn by the sound of crying. I found a small child whose clothes and the nursery rhyme he was singing were strikingly similar to my deceased son's. This made me lower my guard, and I resolved to help him. The child led me to a riverside, where I saw a pale-faced woman with empty eyes appear. The woman thanked me, saying, 'Thank you for finding my lost child. I'm taking him home now,' but then, when I wasn't looking, she pushed me into the river and drowned me. In my pain, I learned that the child was indeed the woman's son, who had drowned while playing in the river. His body and soul were held by an evil spirit in the river. To get her child's body back, the woman agreed to lure another victim for the evil spirit. Now, the woman was taking her child home.

zh.title: 迷途之子
zh.condition: “谢谢你找到我迷路的孩子,我现在要带他回家了”这是我听到的最后一句话。
zh.solution: 新近丧子的我精神恍惚地走在路上,忽然被一阵哭声吸引。我发现一名小童,其衣着、所唱的歌谣,都与我逝去的儿子惊人地相似,这让我卸下了心防,决心帮助他。小童带我走到一条河边,我看到一位面容苍白、眼神空洞的妇人出现。妇人感谢我说:“谢谢你找到我迷路的孩子,我现在要带他回家了”,却又趁我不备将我推到河中,淹死了我。我在痛苦中得知,小童确实是妇人的孩子,在河里玩耍时失足淹死,他的尸身和灵魂都被河中的恶鬼扣下,妇人为了要回自己孩子的尸体,答应帮恶鬼引来另外的牺牲者。现在,妇人要带着她的孩子回家了。

key_facts: I was dazed and easily deceived due to the recent loss of my child.
The 'lost child' was actually the woman's deceased son (his ghost).
I was ultimately pushed into the river and drowned by the woman.
The woman had made a deal with an evil spirit in the river.
The deal was to exchange my life for her child's soul/body.
The woman's child had also previously drowned in this same river.

title: Jumping from the Train
condition: A person took a train to a neighboring town for medical treatment. After the treatment, he was completely cured. On the way back, as the train passed through a tunnel, the person jumped off the train and committed suicide.
solution: His illness was an eye condition; he was completely blind. After the treatment, his sight was restored. When the train went through the tunnel, the sudden darkness made him think he had gone blind again, so he had a mental breakdown and committed suicide.

zh.title: 跳火车
zh.condition: 一个人坐火车去邻镇看病,看完之后病全好了。回来的路上火车经过一个隧道,这个人就跳车自杀了。
zh.solution: 他的病是眼疾,完全瞎了,看完病眼睛复明,过隧道时突如其来的黑暗让他以为自己又瞎了,于是内心崩溃自杀了。

key_facts: The person's illness was an eye condition.
The treatment was successful, and he regained his sight.
The train entered a dark tunnel.
The darkness in the tunnel caused him to misunderstand.
He thought he had gone blind again.
He was in despair, believing his old illness had returned.
He committed suicide because he couldn't bear the thought of being blind again.

title: The Strange Cries in the Village
condition: In a certain village, every household must turn off their lights after midnight. At the same time, strange cries can be heard in the dead of night. Although it wakes up the entire village, no one goes out to check.
solution: There is a notorious, elusive serial killer in the village who has night blindness, so everyone in the village must turn off their lights at night. Because the killer can't find people in the dark, he uses strange cries to lure villagers into turning on their lights, and then kills them.

zh.title: 村子里的怪叫声
zh.condition: 某个村子每家每户过了0点必须关灯,与此同时半夜三更都会传来怪叫声,虽然把全村人都吵醒,但是都没有人出去看。
zh.solution: 村中有个人人皆知的变态杀人狂,行迹神秘且有夜盲症,所以全村人都必须要在晚上关灯。由于杀人狂在没有灯的地方找不到人,于是就用怪叫声来吸引村民夜晚开灯并将其杀了。

key_facts: The villagers are afraid to go out or turn on their lights at night.
There is a serial killer in the village.
This killer has night blindness.
The strange cries are made by the killer.
The killer makes strange cries to lure villagers into turning on their lights.
Villagers who turn on their lights are found and killed by the killer.

title: The Strange House
condition: After living in her newly rented house for some time, the woman asked the landlord one question and went insane.
solution: The woman discovered a hole in the wall of her new rental. Peering through, she only saw red. After many days of curiosity, she asked the landlord about the neighbor. The landlord replied: 'There's a red-eyed patient living next door.'

zh.title: 奇怪的房子
zh.condition: 女人在新租的房子里住了一段时间后,问了房东一句话,就疯了。
zh.solution: 女人在新租的房子里发现墙上有个洞,她往洞的那边看时,发现只有一片红,什么都看不见。就这样过了很多天,她一直不知道隔壁是干什么的。某一天她问房东隔壁住着什么人,房东说,隔壁有个红眼病人。

key_facts: There's a hole in the rental's wall

title: The Neighbor's Dinner
condition: I had just moved in. One day, the neighboring couple invited me over for dinner. After the meal, I went home, thought about it, and immediately called the police.
solution: I was invited to my neighbor's house and found only the wife there. She told me her husband was on a business trip. We chatted and laughed at the dinner table, and I enjoyed the meal. The only odd thing was that there were only vegetarian dishes. The wife explained that they were both vegetarians. After dinner, we continued chatting. She said she would make some dessert for me. I followed her to the kitchen and watched her take ingredients from the fridge. After eating, I went home. Recalling what the wife had said and the fridge full of meat, I was horrified and immediately called the police.

zh.title: 邻居的饭局
zh.condition: 我刚搬家没多久,这天,邻居夫妇邀请我去她家做客一起吃饭,吃完饭后,我回到家,想了想,立刻报警了。
zh.solution: 我受邻居的邀请,来到他们家里,发现只有妻子一个人,妻子对我说她的丈夫出差了。在餐桌上我们有说有笑,我吃得很开心,唯一不好的是餐桌上只有素菜,妻子解释道他们都是素食主义者。饭后,我们继续在聊天,途中她说她要给我做一些饭后小甜品,我跟着她去到厨房,看着她从冰箱里取出材料制作。吃完后我回到家,想起妻子说的话以及冰箱里堆满的肉,细思恐极,立刻报了警。

key_facts: Only the hostess was at home.
I noticed something unusual on the dinner table.
There were only vegetarian dishes on the table.
I realized the hostess was a vegetarian.
I discovered something when I followed the hostess.
I saw the hostess taking ingredients from the fridge.
There was a large amount of meat in the fridge.
The hostess's words contradicted the contents of the fridge.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Rude Colleague
condition: Last night, I drank too much and took a taxi home. Today, I went to work as usual. Strange? Is the time clock broken? My colleagues are so rude; they don't even respond when I greet them.
solution: I am a 23-year-old girl. Last night, at our company team-building event, I drank too much. I originally wanted to take a taxi home, but one of my male colleagues offered to drive me. Dazedly, I agreed and got into his car. He drove to an increasingly dark and deserted suburban area and sexually assaulted me. I tried my best to resist, but I wasn't strong enough... Finally, I said, 'I'll remember you, and I'm going to the police tomorrow!' This sentence enraged him. He killed me directly and dumped my body in the wilderness. But when I died, I was so drunk that I couldn't remember what happened, not even that I was dead. My soul thought I wasn't dead and went to work as usual, but found I couldn't touch the time clock, and when I greeted my colleagues, they couldn't see me.

zh.title: 没礼貌的同事
zh.condition: 昨晚我喝多了打车回家,今天我和往常一样去上班。奇怪?打卡机坏了吗?同事们真没礼貌,打招呼也不回。
zh.solution: 我是一个23岁的女孩,昨晚我们公司团建我喝多了,本来想要打车回家,其中一个男同事提出要送我回家。我迷糊中答应了,并上了他的车。他把车开到了越来越昏暗的荒郊野外,并对我实施了性侵,我竭力反抗,但奈何力气太小..最后我说了一句:“我记住你了,我明天就去报警!”结果这句话激怒了他,他直接把我杀掉了,并抛尸在荒野。但是我死掉的时候因为喝得太多了,以至于记不住发生了什么,甚至不记得自己已经死了。我的魂魄以为自己没有死,还正常来上班,但发现自己触碰不到打卡机,和同事们打招呼别人也看不见自己。

key_facts: The person who drove the narrator home was not a taxi driver, but her male colleague.
The narrator cannot interact with any physical objects at the company.
The narrator's experience last night involved a serious violent incident.
The narrator has lost her memory of the fatal event that occurred last night.
The narrator's current state is not being alive.

title: The Sofa
condition: One day, a woman was sitting on her new sofa watching TV. Halfway through, she suddenly let out a blood-curdling scream. Please deduce.
solution: The news reported that an obsessive fan, in order to get closer to a star, had skinned himself and made a human-skin sofa as a gift for the star. The woman suddenly realized that she was that star, and she was currently sitting on that very sofa.

zh.title: 沙发
zh.condition: 某天一女子坐在家里的新沙发上看电视,看到一半突然发出撕心裂肺的尖叫,请推理。
zh.solution: 新闻播报一个狂热粉丝为追星,把自己的皮剥下来,做成人皮沙发送给了明星,女子突然意识到那个明星正是她本人,而她本人正坐在那个沙发上。

key_facts: The TV news terrified me.
The TV was reporting a news story.
The news was about a fan-related incident.
The material of the sofa is not normal.
The sofa was a gift from someone.
The person who was skinned did it voluntarily.
I am the star in the news.
The skinned person is the fan in the news.

title: Small Shop
condition: New Year is approaching. Mom has been acting strangely lately, but Dad is all smiles. I swapped their positions. Business came, the customer screamed, Dad went mad, and Mom cherished me especially.
solution:
Our family runs a small shop selling noodles. New Year is approaching, and everywhere is festive. Mom just gave birth to my younger brother, and Dad is especially happy. But Mom, suffering from postpartum depression, has been behaving strangely, almost erratically.
I was afraid the newborn baby would take away Mom and Dad's affection, so I swapped my baby brother in the cradle with the meat on the chopping block. Soon, a customer came. He wanted to buy dumpling wrappers for the New Year and asked Mom to grind the dumpling meat filling. Mom, not in her right mind, directly stuffed my brother from the chopping block into the meat grinder. Flesh and blood splattered everywhere; the customer screamed in terror.
Dad, upon discovering this, went mad. From then on, they only had me as their child, and Mom cherished me especially.

zh.title: 小店
zh.condition: 新年快到了,妈妈最近很奇怪,爸爸倒是笑容满面,我交换了他们的位置,生意来了,客人尖声大叫,爸爸疯了,妈妈格外珍惜我。
zh.solution:
我们家开了一家卖面食的小店,新年快到了,到处喜气洋洋,妈妈新生下了弟弟,爸爸格外开心。可妈妈因为患上产后抑郁,行为举止有些怪异、癫狂。
我害怕新出生的小宝宝分走爸爸妈妈的宠爱,将摇篮里的弟弟和案板上的肉交换了位置。很快,客人来了,他要买过年的饺子皮,顺便让妈妈绞饺子肉馅,神志不清的妈妈直接将案板上的弟弟塞进了绞肉机,血肉飞溅,客人吓得尖声大叫。
发现了这件事的爸爸疯了,从此以后他们只有我一个孩子,妈妈格外的珍惜我。

key_facts: This family's business is related to food processing.
The mother has just given birth and is mentally unstable.
The narrator feels insecure because of the newborn younger brother.
The narrator swapped the baby with ingredients ready for processing.
The baby's manner of death is related to the food processing procedure.

title: High Heels
condition: A woman went to a shoe store and bought a pair of red high heels. These heels predicted her death that night.
solution: The woman was an acrobat. That day, she bought a pair of red high heels. She wore them for a performance that evening. Because the heels were a few centimeters higher than usual, during the performance, her male partner accidentally threw a knife, which struck her in the head.

zh.title: 高跟鞋
zh.condition: 一位女士去鞋店里买了一双红色高跟鞋,这双高跟鞋预示了她今晚的死亡。
zh.solution: 女士是杂技团的一名演员,那天她去买了一双红色的高跟鞋。晚上她穿着这双高跟鞋去表演,结果因为她的高跟鞋比平时穿的高出了几公分,配合表演的男演员失手将刀插到了她的脑袋上。

key_facts: The woman was an acrobat
She bought a new pair of high heels
The new heels were a few centimeters higher than usual

title: Statue
condition: One, two, three, statue. You lost, I died.
solution: A deranged killer secretly sneaked into my house and pretended to be a statue. At this time, I was playing 'One, Two, Three, Statue' with the children. I was the chaser, and when I turned my head, I saw the statue move and shouted, 'You lost!' Since the killer had been exposed, he killed all of us.

zh.title: 木头人
zh.condition: 一二三,木头人。你输了,我死了。
zh.solution: 一个变态杀人狂偷偷溜进我的家中假装成雕塑,这时我正在和小朋友们玩一二三木头人的游戏,我是追捕者,在我转头的时候我看到雕塑动了,大喊你输了。由于杀人狂已经暴露,于是把我们都杀了。

title: Bottle by the Sea
condition: I was walking home. The sea breeze gently blew, and I watched the bottle sink into the seabed, feeling as if I had forgotten something. The sky also seemed noticeably darker than before... Oh well, I should just hurry home.
solution: I am a materialist. One day, on my way home, I picked up a bottle washed ashore by the waves. From the bottle flew out a mysterious creature that called itself a genie and claimed it could grant wishes. Such a huge creature coming from such a small bottle, able to speak, and claiming to grant wishes—this contradicted my understanding of the world. So, I wished to forget everything about the bottle and for the bottle to return to the sea. The wish was granted, and I forgot everything about the bottle.

zh.title: 海边的瓶子
zh.condition:
我走在回家的路上。
海风轻轻地吹过,我看着那个瓶子沉入海底,感觉好像忘记了什么,天色也明显比刚才暗了些......算了,还是赶紧回家吧。
zh.solution: 我是一个唯物主义者,有一天,我回家的路上捡的了一个被海浪冲到岸上的瓶子,从瓶子里飞出这个自称能实现愿望的精灵的神秘生物。如此巨大的生物竟从这么小一个瓶子里出来,还能说话,还说能实现愿望,这与我对世界的认知相违背。于是,我许愿忘记有关瓶子的一切并让瓶子回到大海里去。愿望实现了,我也忘记了有关瓶子的一切。

key_facts: I am a materialist
Materialist encounters a genie
Encountering the genie caused a cognitive conflict
Cognitive conflict led to making a wish
The wish resulted in forgetting

title: Lover
condition: A couple was deeply in love. One day, the girl told the boy she had a dream where she was in a dark place and couldn't find him. The boy comforted her. Soon after, the boy suddenly broke up with her, and the girl was very sad. Deduce the reason for the breakup.
solution: The boy had a terminal illness and knew he didn't have much time left. He didn't want the girl to suffer more later, so he deliberately broke up with her, hoping she would hate him. This way, she could move on from the relationship faster and start a new life. The girl's dream made the boy feel it was a premonition, further solidifying his decision to break up.

title: The Wingless Bird's Leap
condition: It completed a long engineering project on a cliff. However, on the day the project was finished, it took a leap and fell to its death at the bottom of the valley.
solution: This is about a wingless bird, born unable to fly. It envied its own kind in the sky, its heart filled with a longing to fly. To experience this one dream, it spent its entire life placing many trees on the steep cliff face, building a 'runway' that could simulate the feeling of flight during the fall. When the project was complete, it stood atop the cliff and leaped without hesitation. In the end, it traded its life for that brief but ultimate freedom, and came to rest contentedly at the bottom of the valley.

zh.title: 无翼鸟的飞跃
zh.condition: 它在悬崖上完成了一项漫长的工程作业。然而在工程结束那天,它却纵身一跃,摔死在了谷底。
zh.solution: 这是一只天生无法飞翔的无翼鸟。它羡慕着天空中的同类,心中充满了对飞行的渴望。为了体验这唯一的梦想,它耗尽一生,在悬崖峭壁上安置了许多树木,搭建出一条能在坠落时模拟飞翔感觉的“跑道”。当工程完成,它站上悬崖之巅,毫不犹豫地纵身一跃。最终,它用生命换取了那短暂却极致的自由,心满意足地在谷底安息。

key_facts: It was born unable to fly.

Its death was voluntary.

title: Yin-Yang
condition: The child cried, the parents comforted. The car stopped, returned to its original spot, and the parents both laughed and cried.
solution: The child possessed yin-yang eyes, able to see unclean things. From the moment they passed a certain spot, the child kept crying. The parents frantically tried to comfort them, but to no avail, so they had to ask the driver to stop the car. The child led the parents to a safe place. Finally, when the three returned to the original spot, they found that everyone in the car was dead. It turned out the child had seen a vengeful spirit that killed everyone else in the car, and the parents, thanks to the child's yin-yang eyes, escaped death. They laughed at their survival and cried for everyone else in the car who had died.

key_facts: The child possesses yin-yang eyes

title: Her
condition: New bruises appeared. 'I love you but we can't be together,' she said, leading me to secluded cliffs. 'No one would know if someone fell here.' When bruises reappeared, I was terrified.
solution: A beautiful manipulator, she faked abuse (creating bruises) to lure me into killing her husband. After enjoying our time together, new bruises signaled I would be her next victim to eliminate.

zh.title: 她
zh.condition: 她身上又出现淤青了。她说喜欢我,可惜不能和我在一起。她把我带到那片海,说她想自杀。这里可真偏僻啊,就算掉下去也不会有人知道吧。她身上又出现淤青了。我好害怕。
zh.solution: 美貌是我的利器。从我懂事起,就有无数男人为我神魂颠倒。我享受着他们爱慕的眼神,更沉迷于那种众星捧月的感觉。在这之中,有一个男人格外的帅气幽默。于是我选择了和他结婚。刚开始,我确实很快乐。可是,快乐是短暂的。没多久,我就腻了这种生活,看中了下一个猎物。我诱捕了这个男人(“我”)。毕竟对我来说,这很简单,只要勾勾手指就能做到。可是,我和他之间还有一个阻碍,那就是我的丈夫。我开始伪装成被家暴的样子(制造淤青),并且把男人(“我”)带到了偏僻的海边,暗示他可以神不知鬼不觉的杀了我的丈夫。果然,我实现了愿望。在这之后,我和男人(“我”)度过了一段快乐的时光。可是,我又开始厌倦了,我知道,我该开始寻找下一个猎物了。(所以她身上再次出现淤青,是为下一个猎物做准备,暗示“我”家暴她,而“我”害怕是因为意识到自己可能就是下一个被除掉的“丈夫”。)

Bruises were fake evidence
She manipulated killing her husband
New bruises signaled next victim

title: The Cat
condition: She got a new boyfriend who had a cat. To her annoyance, the cat, which was always docile and quiet with her boyfriend, would always hiss and bare its teeth at her, and had even bitten her several times. She couldn't take it anymore and secretly abandoned the cat. Her boyfriend smiled.
solution: The cat would always let out piercing screams at her, and would even climb onto her bed at night, its green eyes staring at her without blinking. There it was again, that indescribable feeling. She knew it must be the cat watching her. Later, after the cat was gone, she discovered that the one watching her was her boyfriend. A few months passed. She crouched by the new mistress's bed, quietly watching her.

zh.title: 猫

zh.solution: 那只猫,总是对她发出凄厉的惨叫,甚至半夜还会爬上她的床头,一双绿莹莹的猫眼,一眨不眨的盯着她。又来了,那种说不清道不明的感觉,她知道,一定是那只猫在看着她。后来,猫丢了,她才发现原来那样看着她的,是男友啊。时间过去了几个月。她趴在新的女主人床前,静静的看着她。

title: Midnight Train
condition: Five minutes to midnight, a man boarded a train, but his expression was strange. He looked at the few people on the train and began to ask their ages. 'Ma'am, are you 28 this year?' 'How did you know?' 'Sir, are you 55?' 'Yes.' The man correctly guessed everyone's age one by one. 'Grandma, are you 69 this year?' 'Not yet, but in 5 minutes I will be 69.' After hearing this, the man's face turned pale.
solution: The man can see people's date of death! The old woman will die when she turns 69! This means that in 5 minutes, the train will crash, and everyone on board will die.

zh.title: 午夜列车
zh.condition: 离午夜还有五分钟,一个男子上了列车,但他的神情很奇怪。他看了看车上的几个人,然后开始问起乘客的年龄"女士 您今年28岁吗?""你怎么知道?""先生 您今年55吗?""嗯。"然后男人一个个地猜对了乘客的年龄"婆婆 您今年69岁吗?""不是的 但再过5分钟我就69岁了。"男子听完,脸色惨白。
zh.solution: 男子可以看见别人的死亡日期!这位婆婆69岁时就会去世!这代表过5分钟,车会出车祸,在车上的人都会去世。

The 'age' he sees is actually the age of death.

title: Filial Piety
condition: Her leg was broken. One piece, two pieces, three pieces... One bowl, two bowls, three bowls... She died.
solution: She was an elderly mother who broke her leg in an accident. Her son, already unable to support her, sent her to a 'jar grave' because she had completely lost her ability to work. The jar grave was made just large enough to hold the mother. The opening of the grave was not sealed. Each time the son brought a bowl of rice for his mother, he would add a brick to the grave opening. When there were enough bricks, the grave was completely sealed, and the mother starved to death.

zh.title: 孝
zh.condition: 她的腿断了,一块两块三块...一碗两碗三碗...她死了。
zh.solution: 她是年迈的母亲,因为一次意外,摔断了腿。本就无力赡养她的儿子,因为她彻底丧失劳动力,将她送进了瓦罐坟。瓦罐坟做成只能容纳母亲一个人的大小,坟口没有封死。儿子每次送来一碗饭给母亲,就会往坟口累上一块砖。砖的数量足够了,坟也彻底封死了,母亲活活饿死。

key_facts: After her leg was broken, she was abandoned by her family.
The number of bricks and rice bowls records a gradual process towards death.

The person who carried out this process and ultimately caused her death was her son.
Her direct cause of death was being sealed in that space and deprived of food.

title: Ideal State
condition: There's a country with a closed-door policy; no one can enter or leave, yet annually its happiness index ranks among the highest, and its leader participates in global meetings on time. Recently, satellite imagery showed no signs of life in this country, and upon arrival, investigators found it had long been deserted.
solution: "Our nation's history began with the beauty technology revolution. Tech companies initially launched wearable beauty glasses, enabling others to perceive users' perfect images, then extended 'sensory optimization' technology to smell, touch, and other fields. But as time went on, users weren't satisfied with virtual image changes and sought 'abilities' consistent with their images, such as fairies having magic, people with wings being able to fly, etc. To satisfy users' desire for real power, companies developed a nutrient capsule system: replicating consciousness into a fully simulated virtual world, while using biological capsules to maintain physical survival. Due to the large gap between reality and virtuality, experimental subjects' consciousness gradually resisted returning to reality, eventually leading to the ethical decision of humanitarian physical clearance. After consensus was reached between government and enterprises, our nation initiated the consciousness migration plan. From volunteers to all social strata, citizens successively completed consciousness uploads." This is the history of the country as explained by the AI responsible for maintenance to the investigators. The AI emphasized to the investigators: "Data shows our happiness index is ranked first globally, and our leader still participates in international affairs through virtual images." Robot guardians protect the empty land, continuously synchronizing real-world data with the virtual world to maintain system operation.

zh.title: 理想国
zh.condition: 有一个国家实行闭国政策,没有人能进去也没有人从这个国家出来,但每年这个国家的幸福指数位居前列,国家领导人也准时参加全球会晤。最近卫星显示这个国家已经没有生命迹象,考察人员抵达后才发现这里早已空无人烟。
zh.solution: "我国历史始于美颜技术革命。科技公司最初推出可穿戴美颜眼镜,使他人感知到使用者完美形象,随后将"感官优化"技术扩展至嗅觉、触觉等领域。但随时间变化,用户不满足虚拟的形象改变,寻求与形象相符合的"能力",如仙女拥有魔法、拥有翅膀的人会飞等等。为满足用户对真实力量的渴望,企业研发出营养仓系统:通过复制意识至完全模拟现实的虚拟世界,同时用生物仓维持肉体存活。由于现实和虚拟差距过大,出现实验者意识体逐渐抗拒返回现实的情况,最终引发人道清除肉体的伦理决策。在政企达成共识后,我国启动意识移民计划。从志愿者到社会各阶层,全民陆续完成意识上传。"这是负责维护的AI向考察者阐述的本国历史。AI向考察者强调:"数据显示我们幸福指数全球第一,领导人仍通过虚拟影像参与国际事务。"机器人守卫着空荡的国土,持续向虚拟世界同步现实数据以维持系统运行。

key_facts: The 'closed-door policy' is because all citizens' consciousness has been uploaded to a virtual world
The country's 'happiness index ranking among the highest' refers to citizens' excellent experience in the virtual world
The 'leader participating in global meetings on time' is done through virtual images
'No signs of life' and 'deserted' are because physical bodies have been cleared, leaving only AI and robots to maintain the system
This country achieved mass consciousness uploading, living in a virtual 'ideal state'

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Same Outfit
condition: Returning home, Xiao Wang saw a beer-drinking man in identical clothes hurry away. Opening his fridge for beer, he screamed in horror. Why?
solution: His home was burglarized - his girlfriend dismembered in the fridge.

zh.title: 同衣男子
zh.condition: 小王下班回家,在小区门口看见一个喝着啤酒,和自己穿着同样衣服的男子匆匆离开。然后小王回到家中,想喝一瓶啤酒,打开冰箱后却情绪崩溃,惨叫出声。请问发生了什么?小王为什么会崩溃发出惨叫?
zh.solution: 小王家被入室盗窃了,女朋友被分尸放冰箱里。

key_facts: Both men wore identical outfits
The man was drinking beer while leaving
Xiao Wang opened his fridge
The fridge contained his girlfriend's remains
He screamed in horror

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Car Accident
condition: Mom and Dad went on a trip. Dad came back alone. He said Mom couldn't come back. I looked down at the message. I knew this was the last time I'd see him.
solution: Mom and Dad went on a trip. That day, Dad returned early. He sadly told me there had been a car accident on the way, and Mom had passed away. I couldn't accept it, but the next second, I received a message from Mom. They had a car accident in another city, and Dad died from his injuries despite rescue efforts. In an instant, I understood: it was Dad who had died, because the scene was crowded and his soul hadn't witnessed his own death. Due to excessive grief, he also didn't realize how a normal person could return to me in an instant from another city; this was the last time I would see him.

zh.title: 车祸
zh.condition:
爸妈出去旅游,爸爸独自回来了,他说妈妈回不来了。
我低头看着消息,我知道这是最后一次见面了。
zh.solution: 爸妈出去旅游了,这天爸爸却提前回来了,他悲伤地告诉我,路上出了车祸,妈妈去世了。我难以接受,却在下一秒收到了妈妈发来的信息,他们在另一个城市出了车祸,爸爸抢救无效去世了。一瞬间我明白,死亡的是爸爸,因为现场围的水泄不通,他的灵魂没有目睹他的死亡,因为过度悲伤,他也没意识到常人如何能够从另一个城市,转瞬就回到我身边;这是我最后一次见到他了。

key_facts: Conflicting information about parents' deaths
Father's instant return home is illogical
Mother's message reveals the truth
Father's soul did not realize he was dead
Last meeting implies father is not alive

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Doll
condition: There was an extra doll downstairs. After a breakup, I died upstairs.
solution: Valentine's Day was approaching, and suddenly a large, human-shaped doll appeared downstairs. I thought it was a holiday decoration and didn't pay much attention, living my life normally and gradually getting used to its presence. Until one day, my boyfriend and I broke up. One night when I was coming home alone, out of habit, I didn't notice anything unusual about the doll. It turned out there was a pervert hidden inside it. He followed me upstairs and killed me in my home.

zh.title: 玩偶
zh.condition: 楼下多了一个玩偶,分手后,我死在了楼上。
zh.solution: 情人节快来了,楼下突然出现了一个很大的人形玩偶,我以为是节日的装点,没太在意,每天正常生活,逐渐习惯了它的存在。直到有一天,我和男友分手了,某个独自回家的晚上,因为习惯,我没发现那个人偶的异样,原来它的里面藏着一个变态,他跟着我到了楼上,将我杀死在家里。

key_facts: The doll's size was unusual, close to life-size.
The deceased had recently experienced a breakup.
The deceased had become accustomed to the doll's presence.
The internal structure of the doll is related to the case.
The murderer used the doll as a cover and a means of approach.
Negligence after the breakup was one of the key factors leading to the tragedy.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
condition: 'Rock, paper, scissors. The loser dies.' He played scissors, she played paper. She cried in despair. He smiled in despair.
solution: He and she were a couple. During a trip, they were captured by a sadistic serial killer. To torture them, he made them play rock-paper-scissors. The loser would be slowly tortured to death, while a tie would mean both die together. Strangely, before the game, the killer gave them time to talk. So, the girl and boy agreed to both play rock and die together. The time came. One, two, three... the result was out. The killer showed a twisted, satisfied smile. It turned out the boy played scissors, and the girl played paper. Amidst the girl's desperate cries and screams, the killer slowly took out his dagger with a smile.

zh.title: 剪刀石头布
zh.condition: "剪刀石头布,输了就去死吧。"他出了剪刀,她出了布。她绝望的哭了。他绝望的笑了。
zh.solution: 他和她是一对情侣,旅游期间,他们被变态杀人魔抓住。为了折磨他们,他让他们进行猜拳,输了的人就会被凌迟而死,平局则两个人一起死掉,奇怪的是,猜拳之前,杀人魔给了他们商量的时间,于是,女孩和男孩约定好一起出石头,双双赴死。时间到了,一,二,三,猜拳结果出来了,杀人魔露出了变态而满足的笑意。原来,男孩出了剪刀,女孩却出了布。在女孩绝望的哭泣和尖叫声中,杀人魔带着微笑缓缓的掏出了匕首。

key_facts: They were forced to play this game.
The game was enforced by a serial killer.
The rules of the game involved life and death.
The loser would be slowly tortured to death.
A tie meant both would die together.
They had agreed on a strategy before the game.
They agreed to both play rock (a tie).
In the end, both of them broke the agreement.
The boy's scissors beat the girl's paper.
The boy's 'victory' led to a worse fate for the girl.
The killer was satisfied with this outcome.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Surprise for My Girlfriend
condition: 'Be my girlfriend?' 'No, you're not romantic.' 'Tonight's surprise will change your mind.' Seeing the opposite building, she gasped: 'So romantic! Yes!'
solution: As the building's security guard, he killed residents to control lights forming a heart shape visible from her window.

zh.title: 给女朋友的惊喜
zh.condition: 做我女朋友吧?我才不要,你一点都不浪漫。今晚我会给你个惊喜的。好吧,等我看看是什么惊喜再做决定:哇,太浪漫了吧,我答应你。她看着对面的大楼发出惊叹。
zh.solution: 男子是对面大楼的保安,为了给女子惊喜,他把大楼的居民都杀掉了,并且打开和关掉对应的灯,这些亮着的灯组成了一个爱心的形状。

key_facts: Surprise was building light display
Lights formed heart shape
Man controlled building as guard
Killed residents for light pattern
Girl unaware lights represented deaths

title: Finger
condition: Dad discovered his son had a bad habit: he often pointed his finger at people. Today was as usual. When Dad turned on the TV, he found his son constantly pointing at the TV. After turning it on, a famous public figure appeared. Could this guy also...? No, that's not right...
solution: Dad discovered his son had a bad habit: he often pointed his finger at people, even at figures in photos or videos. Dad had only recently discovered that anyone his son pointed at would inevitably die within 3 days. Today was as usual. When Dad turned on the TV, he found his son constantly pointing at the TV. After turning it on, a famous public figure appeared. This guy will die too... No... that's not right. The son was pointing at the person reflected on the screen before the TV was turned on... Isn't that himself?

zh.title: 手指
zh.condition: 爸爸发现儿子有个不好的习惯,那就是时常会用手指去指着人。今天也一如往常,当爸爸开电视时,发现儿子一直指着电视,打开后出现的是一位知名的大人物。难道这家伙也会?不对...
zh.solution: 爸爸发现儿子有个不好的习惯,那就是时常会用手指去指着人,即使是照片或是影像中的人物,他也会用手去指。而爸爸最近才发现,被儿子指过的人在3天内必定会死去。今天也一如往常,当爸爸开电视时,发现儿子一直指着电视,打开后出现的是一位知名的大人物。这家伙也会死啊...不...不对,儿子指着的是电视还没打开前屏幕所倒映出的人.....那不是自己吗?

key_facts: People the son points his finger at will die within a short time.
When the son pointed at the TV this time, the TV screen was off.
A turned-off TV screen can reflect people's images like a mirror.
Dad initially misunderstood what his son was pointing at.
What the son's finger was truly pointing at was Dad himself, reflected on the screen.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Raising a Little Ghost
condition: Day one, 'I'm sorry I couldn't protect you.' Day two, 'We will meet again.' Day three, 'Thank you for guarding me.'
solution: On the first day, the woman gave birth in the operating room, but it was a stillbirth. The doctor performed a cesarean section to remove the child. On the second day, the woman carefully placed the child's hair on the ground and took out a small bottle from her bosom. Using a spell, she turned the child into a little ghost that could be nurtured. In this way, she could see her child again. On the third day, the woman's child became a guardian spirit that stayed by her side and protected her at all times.

zh.title: 养小鬼
zh.condition: 第一天,“很抱歉我没能保护好你” 第二天,“我们会再见的” 第三天,“谢谢你守护我”
zh.solution: 第一天,女人在手术室内生产,但发现是个死胎,医生通过刨妇产将孩子取出。第二天,女人将孩子的发丝小心翼翼地放在地上,从怀中掏出一个小瓶子,使用咒术将孩子变成了可以供养的小鬼。这样,她就可以与孩子再见面了。第三天,女人的孩子成为了时刻陪伴在母亲身边保护母亲的守护神。

key_facts: The stillborn child became a little ghost
A twisted form of maternal love
Spell and soul manipulation
Supernatural connection between mother and child
Guardianship after death

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Face-to-Face
condition: The clock's hands swung back and forth, water droplets continued to fall. The ice-like touch was coming toward me again, and I threw the ice pick once more.
solution: At 3 a.m., I bumped into a man carrying a toolbox downstairs. I thought he was a thief, so I immediately tried to stop him. We wrestled, and my disorganized struggle slowly made me lose the upper hand. Seeing the toolbox on the table, I grabbed the chisel from it and struck him hard. The chisel cut his throat. I thought I had just survived a crisis and breathed a sigh of relief, but then a leak from the bathroom forced me to fix the pipes. When I returned, I saw someone who looked exactly like me walking toward me in the moonlight. Before I could react, the other 'me' raised a tool, and a sharp pain hit me. Everything went back to the moment I woke up sweating. Over and over again, I tried different ways to communicate, but it always ended in tragedy. Until one time, I let down my guard and tremblingly said, 'I’m here to fix the pipes.' This time, the 'me' hesitated slightly.

zh.title: 照面
zh.condition: 时针来回摆动,水滴不停滴落。似冰的触感向我坠来,我又一次扔出那块冰凿。
zh.solution: 凌晨三点,我摸黑下楼撞见拎着工具箱的男人。以为是小偷,我第一时间想制止住他,于是我们扭打在了一起,毫无章法的乱抓使得我渐渐落入下风。于是见到桌上放着的工具箱后,我乘机摸起了工具箱里的凿子使劲挥向他,凿子恰好划破了他的喉咙。我以为刚刚度过了一次危机,松了一口气,卫生间传来漏水声,我只好拿着工具去修水管。修好返回时,月光下竟走来个和我一模一样的人。还没反应过来,对方已举起工具,剧痛袭来的瞬间。一切又回到被热醒的那一刻,一次又一次,我试着用不同方式沟通,却总是以悲剧收场。直到某次,我放下防备,颤抖着说:“我是来修水管的。” 这次,对面的 “我” 眼神出现了一丝迟疑。

key_facts: Midnight conflict triggered by the sound of dripping water
The man mistaken for a thief strikes back
The chisel from the toolbox delivers a fatal blow
A repeating cycle of struggle and conflict
Finally obtaining the other's hesitation through sincerity

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Brother
condition: I love my brother. It’s so nice to have my brother with me. Why did my brother bite me? It hurts so much. It's great, we can be together forever.
solution: My brother and I were still in our mother's womb. My brother was stronger and absorbed more nutrients, making me small and weak. Eventually, we became conjoined twins, sharing one body.

zh.title: 哥哥
zh.condition: 我喜欢哥哥,有哥哥陪着我真好。哥哥为什么咬我,好痛啊。真好,可以永远和哥哥在一起了。
zh.solution: 我和哥哥都还在妈妈肚子里,哥哥强壮点,吸收了我的营养,导致我变得瘦小,最后我和哥哥变为了一体,我们共用这一个身体,世人称我和哥哥为畸形儿。

key_facts: My brother and I were once twins in the womb
My brother absorbed more nutrients in the womb
I became weak due to lack of nutrients
We became conjoined twins
We are forever together, sharing one body

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Taking out the Trash
condition: Mom is going to the hospital tomorrow, and I'm very scared. So I rush to take out the trash every day.
solution: I once asked Mom where I came from. Mom told me I was picked up from a trash can, and I believed it. That day, Mom told me I would soon have a younger sibling. I was very worried that Mom would ignore me once the new sibling arrived. To prevent Mom from picking up a new sibling from the trash can, I rushed to take out the trash every day.

zh.title: 丢垃圾
zh.condition: 妈妈明天就要住进医院了,我很害怕。于是我天天抢着丢垃圾。
zh.solution: 我曾经问妈妈我是哪里来的,妈妈告诉我是从垃圾箱里捡来的,我便信以为真,那天妈妈告诉我很快就要有弟弟妹妹了,我很担心有了弟弟妹妹妈妈就会不理我,为了不让妈妈去垃圾桶里捡弟弟妹妹,我便天天抢着丢垃圾。

key_facts: The narrator's fear does not stem from concern about the hospital itself.
The act of taking out the trash is an attempt to prevent something from happening.
The narrator has a very literal and incorrect understanding of human origins.
Mom going to the hospital is related to the arrival of a new life, but this is misunderstood by the narrator.
The narrator's behavior stems from insecurity about losing maternal attention and naive logic.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Husband Not Home
condition: 'Is your husband not home?' Red was everywhere. My husband came back, he was finished.
solution:
The repairman came to my house to fix the electricity meter. When he was checking the meter box, his eyes looked a bit strange.
'Is your husband not home?' After getting a negative answer, he said he wanted to show me something good.
The meter box was completely opened, and many red banknotes fell out, covering my face. At this moment, my husband came back. How should I punish him?

zh.title: 老公不在家
zh.condition: “你老公不在家吗?”红色铺天盖地,老公回来了,他完了。
zh.solution:
维修工来我家修理电表,他在检查电表盒子的时候眼神有些不对劲。
“你老公不在家吗?”得到否定的回答后,他说要给我看个好东西。
电表盒子被完全打开,许多红色的钞票掉出来,铺天盖地地落了我一脸。这时候,老公回来了,我该怎么惩罚他呢?

key_facts: The overwhelming 'red' is not a symbol of danger or blood, but refers to some hidden item.
Asking 'Is your husband not home?' was not out of malice, but to create an opportunity to reveal a secret.
The hiding place of the 'red' items (the meter box) suggests an attempt by its owner to deliberately conceal them.
The husband's return coincided with the critical moment his secret was accidentally discovered.
The core of the event concerns the discovery of something (most likely money) that the husband had hidden privately.

title: Favoritism
condition: Mom made me a big table of delicious food and even set out bowls and chopsticks for me, but Mom died. Mom died, and my sister died too.
solution: My younger sister developed a heart problem the day after tomorrow. Because Mom favored my sister, she wanted to use my heart to save my sister's life, so she poisoned my bowl. I guessed Mom's intention, and when she wasn't looking, I swapped the poisoned bowl. Mom accidentally ate it, and so Mom died. My sister also died because her heart wasn't replaced.

zh.title: 偏爱
zh.condition: 妈妈给我做了一大桌好吃的,还给我摆了碗筷,可是妈妈却死了。妈妈死了,妹妹也死了。
zh.solution: 妹妹后天心脏出了问题,妈妈因为偏爱妹妹就想用我的心脏去换妹妹的命,于是在我的碗里下了毒,我猜到了妈妈的意图,就在她不注意的时候,我调换了有毒的碗,妈妈不小心误食了,就这样妈妈死了,妹妹因为没有换成心脏也死了

key_facts: The younger sister suffered from a life-threatening illness.
The food prepared by the mother contained something lethal.
The mother intended to kill the narrator to save the younger sister.
The narrator took a crucial action before the meal.
The mother and sister died in different ways.

title: Brownish-Grey 'Old' Umbrella
condition: On a rainy day, Xiao A walked past a house and saw an old umbrella. She borrowed it. Later, the house owner was arrested, and the police questioned Xiao A why she didn’t report it, but Xiao A didn’t notice anything unusual.
solution: Xiao A has red-green color blindness (which makes red and green appear as dull brownish-grey). The umbrella was stained with blood and appeared red, but Xiao A, due to her color blindness, didn’t notice it. She asked, 'Can you lend me this brownish-grey umbrella?' The owner knew she hadn’t noticed the blood, so they let her go. Otherwise, she could have been in danger.

zh.title: 棕灰色的‘旧’伞
zh.condition: 下雨天,小 A 路过一户人家,看到了把旧伞,于是向对方借了过来;后来,那户人家被捕了,警察质问小 A 为什么没有报警,可小 A 却没有发现异常。
zh.solution: 小 A 患有红绿色盲(红绿色盲会把红色、绿色看成黯淡的棕灰色),那把伞沾了血,呈红色,但她由于色盲没有发现,问对方:“请问您能把这把棕灰色的伞借给我吗?”对方知道她没发现自己杀了人,所以放过了她,否则她可能有生命危险。

key_facts: Xiao A has a special visual impairment
The umbrella was not brownish-grey
The umbrella was stained with red liquid
The owner had just committed a crime
She didn’t notice the danger due to her color blindness

title: Washing Machine
condition: At night, a poor scavenger took home a washing machine. He woke to its operating sounds.
solution: A murderer used the machine to transport dismembered body parts. When the scavenger took it, the killer was burying remains nearby. Tracking the scavenger home, the killer sneaked in to run the machine - washing away blood evidence.

zh.title: 洗衣机
zh.condition: 夜晚,贫穷的拾荒者捡了一台洗衣机回家。半夜他从睡梦中惊醒,好像听到了洗衣机启动的声音。
zh.solution: 凶手杀人分尸,将尸体装入洗衣机内,再用洗衣机运尸块到郊外。拾荒者开着小三轮捡到洗衣机时凶手刚刚取出全部尸块,正在不远处奋力挖土填坑,凶手反应过来时,拾荒者已经开着小三轮带着洗衣机跑了。于是凶手跟踪拾荒者到家,潜入家里启动洗衣机,为了清洗掉里面的血迹。

key_facts: The washing machine contained body parts
The killer dismembered the victim
The machine transported remains
The killer followed the scavenger
The killer washed away evidence
The machine ran by itself at night

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Potion
condition: Grandma gave me a bottle of potion, and I lost my beloved boy.
solution: I begged Grandma for a magical potion. As long as the person I love drinks it, that person will always love me. The boy I loved drank it, but the next day he was found dead in a cemetery. It turned out that the potion needed the hair of the person as a引子 (ingredient), and I was wearing a wig at that time. The owner of the wig was a woman who had just died. No wonder I didn't feel anything when Grandma plucked my hair.

zh.title: 药水
zh.condition: 婆婆给了我一瓶药水,我失去了最爱的男生。
zh.solution: 我向婆婆求了一瓶神奇的药水,只要我爱的人喝了它,那个人就会永远钟爱于我,我爱的男孩喝了,可是第二天却死在了一片墓地中,原来药水需要当事人的头发做药引,而我当时戴的是假发,而假发的主人却是个刚刚去世不久的女人,怪不得婆婆摘我头发的时候,我竟然没有感觉。

key_facts: The potion requires the person's own hair
I was wearing a wig at that time
The wig belonged to a dead woman
The boy fell in love with the original owner of the wig
The boy finally died in the cemetery

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Wife
condition: "Your wife is so young and beautiful." They smiled. "Your wife is so young and beautiful." He smiled.
solution: The man's wife was young and beautiful, and he always received compliments when he took her out. Both husband and wife were very happy. Later, his wife gradually aged, developing wrinkles and loose skin. The man heard fewer and fewer compliments and envious remarks. So, he pulled his wife's facial skin tight and stitched it up behind her head, making her appear perpetually young and beautiful. "Your wife is so young and beautiful." He finally heard compliments again and smiled happily. But his wife, enduring the pain and tightness of her facial skin, could no longer smile.

zh.title: 妻子
zh.condition:
"您的妻子真年轻漂亮。"他们笑着。
"您的妻子真年轻漂亮。"他笑着。
zh.solution: 男人的妻子年轻漂亮,男人带着她出去总是收到夸奖,夫妻两都很开心。后来,妻子逐渐衰老,开始长皱纹、皮肤松弛,男人越来越少听到别人的夸奖和艳羡,于是他扯紧妻子的面皮后在背后缝合起来,这样她看起来一直年轻漂亮。"您的妻子真年轻漂亮。"他终于又听到了别人的夸奖,开心地笑着。可是承受疼痛和面皮的紧绷的妻子,再也笑不出来。

key_facts: The wife's youthfulness is an artificially maintained illusion
The husband achieved "youth" by stitching his wife's facial skin
The husband's motive was to gain others' praise
"They" refers to the couple, "he" refers to the husband
The wife could not smile due to her facial skin being pulled tight

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Terrifying Picture Book
condition: Above the colorful sea of flowers, a girl in a white dress dances among a swarm of butterflies. She has fair skin and raven-black hair, captivating everyone who sees her. In the same sea of flowers, a girl with a light yellow dress and dark-brown skin mechanically imitates the other girl.
solution: The man was a biologist who enjoyed collecting various animal specimens for observation. To facilitate his specimen collection, he owned an entire mountain of private flower gardens. During one specimen collection, he met a girl who had mistakenly wandered into his garden. From the first glance, he fell deeply in love with her. However, after a series of intense pursuits, the girl remained indifferent. So the man, in order to keep the girl, knocked her unconscious, immersed her in formaldehyde, and turned her into a human specimen. The girl's dress and skin changed color under the liquid. The man then obsessively posed her in the initial posture and placed her in the flower garden.

zh.title: 恐怖的彩绘本
zh.condition: 缤纷的花海之上,身着白色裙子的女孩在成群结队的蝴蝶中跳舞,她冰肌玉骨,青丝如瀑,令人一眼万年。同一片花海,淡黄的裙摆下,肤色深褐的女孩在机械地模仿着那位女孩。
zh.solution: 男子是一位生物学家,平时喜欢收集各种小动物的标本来进行观察。为了便于取材,他拥有一整座山的私人花圃。在一次收集标本的过程中,他遇见了误闯入他的花园的女孩,在见到的第一眼他就不可自拔地爱上了女孩,但是一番猛烈的追求之后,女孩仍然无动于衷。于是男子为了留住女孩,便将女孩弄晕,泡入福尔马林液体中制成人体标本。女孩的裙子和肌肤在液体的浸泡下变了颜色。男子则痴狂地为女孩摆出最初的姿势放在花圃中。

key_facts: The man was a biologist collecting specimens
The man fell in love with the girl who wandered in
The girl rejected the man's advances
The man immersed the girl in formaldehyde
The girl became a human specimen displayed in the garden

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Mermaid
condition: The little mermaid lived in her palace. One day, a human prince fell into the water and was bitten to death by a pink water snake. After a long time, there was no other food in the palace, so she had to eat both the water snake and the prince. Maybe she ate too much. Her belly grew larger and larger. Finally, she was bloated to death on the surface of the water. Red water splashes floated on the surface.
solution: The man, upon learning his wife was cheating and pregnant with her lover's child, became enraged. He sewed his wife's legs together and threw her into a very deep reservoir; she looked like a mermaid who couldn't cheat. Afterward, the man brutally murdered the lover and threw him in too. His exposed intestines looked like a water snake. Because there was no food in the water, the wife ate the lover's corpse. Being unable to give birth, she eventually died of difficult labor.

zh.title: 美人鱼
zh.condition: 小美人鱼生活在自己的宫殿里,有一天,人类的王子落入了水中,被一条粉色的水蛇咬死了。过了好久,宫殿里没有其他食物,她只好把水蛇和王子都吃掉了。可能是吃撑了。她的肚子越来越大。最后被撑死在了水面上。水面上飘起了红色的水花。
zh.solution: 男人得知妻子劈腿并怀上了情夫的孩子,怒上心头,他将妻子的双腿缝在了一起,并将其丢进了一个很深的蓄水池,那样子看上去像一条不会劈腿的人鱼。之后男人把情夫残忍的杀害,将他也扔了进去。裸露在外的肠子看上去就像一条水蛇。由干水里没有食物,妻子便将情夫的尸体吃掉了。由于无法生育她最终难产而死。

key_facts: The mermaid was actually the wife with her legs sewn together
The pink water snake refers to the lover's intestines
The prince refers to the murdered lover
The enlarged belly was due to pregnancy, not eating
The final cause of death was difficult labor

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Who Killed Me
condition: Dad starved me, Mom pricked me with needles, only my sister loved me. So who killed me?
solution: I suffered from congenital diabetes. Dad didn't let me eat high-calorie foods, and Mom gave me insulin injections every day. To treat my illness, our family was already deeply in debt, and our meager life meant my sister couldn't afford anything she wanted. She hated me, this burden, so my sister often secretly bought me snacks, which led to my death from diabetic complications.

zh.title: 谁杀了我
zh.condition: 爸爸饿着我,妈妈用针扎我,只有姐姐疼爱我,那谁杀了我?
zh.solution: 我患有先天性糖尿病,爸爸不让我吃高热量食物,妈妈每天给我打胰岛素,为了给我治病,家里早已负债累累拮据的生活让姐姐买不起任何她想要的东西,她恨死了我这个拖油瓶,因此姐姐经常偷偷给我买零食,导致我糖尿病并发症而死。

key_facts: I suffered from severe diabetes
Parents' actions were necessary medical measures
Sister's "love" was actually harmful behavior
Forbidden snacks led to worsening condition and death
Sister is the ultimate perpetrator

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Repaying Kindness with Enmity
condition: I failed to do what I promised, so I had to repay kindness with enmity in front of everyone.
solution: My five co-workers and I were trapped deep in the desert, with food and water almost depleted. So they made a difficult decision: to give me the remaining hope – most of the water – and let me go out to seek help. Carrying their trust and the desire to live, I stumbled forward for two days and two nights, finally making contact with the outside world. However, the boss pretended to reassure me that he would take action quickly, but in reality, he refused to search and rescue to evade responsibility. He even publicly claimed that I escaped on my own and widely publicized it as a result of the company's 'advanced management.' I naively believed the boss's words and only learned the truth a week later, by which time my friends had no chance of survival. At the press conference, the boss, surrounded by reporters, spoke eloquently, glibly whitewashing the situation. All the anger, despair, and guilt erupted in an instant. I rushed forward, grabbed the fruit knife from the table, and stabbed that detestable face. Blood stained the entire press conference scene.

zh.title: 恩将仇报
zh.condition: 我没有做到我应允的事,我只好在众人面前恩将仇报。
zh.solution: 我与五名工友深陷沙漠,食物和水源几乎耗尽,于是他们却做出一个艰难的决定:将仅存的希望——大部分水,交给我,让我出去求救。我带着他们的信任与生的渴望,踉跄前行两天两夜,终于与外界取得联系。然而,老板假意安抚我会很快采取行动,实则为了规避责任拒绝搜救,甚至对外宣称我独自脱困,并大肆宣传这是公司“先进管理”的成果。我轻信了老板的话,直到一周后才得知真相,而我的朋友们已经没有生还的可能了。新闻发布会上,老板在记者的簇拥下侃侃而谈,口若悬河地粉饰太平。所有的愤怒、绝望和愧疚瞬间爆发,我冲上前,拿起桌上的水果刀,刺向那张令人憎恶的脸。鲜血,染红了整个发布会现场。

key_facts: I carried the hopes of several co-workers for rescue.
The co-workers ultimately were not rescued and died.
The boss was the key person who obstructed the rescue and distorted the facts.
The boss made the public believe he had done me a favor.
The 'repaying kindness with enmity' happened at the press conference.
My 'revenge' target was the boss who deceived me.
My actions stemmed from anger towards the boss and guilt towards the co-workers.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Home
condition: After the cactus at home withered, I took my younger brother to see a waterfall. Later, Mom's flower also died.
solution: Mom favored my younger brother, indulged him exceptionally, and cherished him like a flower in the palm of her hand. Even when my younger brother deliberately poured boiling water on my most beloved cactus and killed it, Mom just said: 'Forget it, forget it, he's still just a child.' I was very angry and jealous, so I poured a basin of scalding boiling water over my younger brother's head. The scalding water steamed, like a cascading waterfall. It's great, now Mom's flower is dead too.

zh.title: 家
zh.condition: 家里的仙人掌枯萎后,我带着弟弟去看瀑布,后来妈妈的花儿也死了。
zh.solution: 妈妈偏爱弟弟,格外地纵容他,把他当成掌心的花一样娇护着。甚至当弟弟故意拿开水浇死了我最心爱的仙人掌的时候,妈妈也只是说着:“算了,算了,他还只是个孩子。我很生气嫉妒,于是将一盆滚烫的开水从弟弟头顶浇下,滚烫的水冒着白气,像倾泻而下的瀑布,真好啊,现在妈妈的花儿也死了。

key_facts: The cactus was deliberately killed by the younger brother.
The way the younger brother was killed is related to the way the younger brother killed the cactus.
Mom favored the younger brother very much, which caused the narrator's dissatisfaction.
'Waterfall' does not refer to a natural landscape.
'Mom's flower' is a metaphor for the younger brother.

title: Porcelain
condition: One by one, the porcelain pieces shattered, and I discovered my brother's secret.
solution: My brother really liked me. The patterns on the porcelain pieces resembled people I disliked. One time, I was curious and picked up a porcelain piece to look at its pattern, accidentally breaking it. Then I learned that the person it resembled had been killed. I realized that for every porcelain piece I broke, my brother killed the corresponding person. Later, I intentionally broke those porcelain pieces.

zh.title: 瓷器
zh.condition: 瓷器一个接一个地碎掉,我发现了弟弟的秘密。
zh.solution: 弟弟特别喜欢我,瓷器上面的样式很像我讨厌的人,有次我很好奇的拿瓷器看上面的样式,无意中打碎了那个瓷器,然后我就得知了那个人被杀的消息,我明白了打碎一个瓷器,弟弟就杀对应的一个人,后来我就故意打碎那些瓷器。

key_facts: Each porcelain piece represented a specific person
Breaking a porcelain piece was a signal for my brother to kill someone
The victims were people I disliked
My brother was the killer carrying out the murders
I later intentionally broke the porcelain pieces, using him to kill others

title: Wish
condition: 'It hurts, it hurts so much, am I going to die? Has your wish come true? Come back quickly, woo woo...'
solution: Grandma was critically ill. Mom and Dad took me back to the countryside to see Grandma, whom I hadn't seen in a long time. Seeing her emaciated body lying on the bed, hooked up to many tubes, I was a bit scared. Grandma told me she had an unfulfilled wish and asked me to swap bodies with her, promising she would come back. Grandma said a childhood friend she liked was about to pass away, and her wish was to see her childhood friend again. I thought of my own good friends and reluctantly agreed. I lay on the bed and exchanged a glance with the departing little girl; her eyes looked very complicated. It's been a long time, it hurts so much, I've been waiting for her to come back. Finally, at the very last moment before dying, the little girl came back. She looked down at me and said, 'Sorry, Grandma has many wishes to fulfill.'

zh.title: 愿望
zh.condition: “疼,好疼,我要死了嘛?你的属望实现了嘛?你快回来,呜呜......”
zh.solution: 奶奶病危了,爸妈带我回乡下去见好久没有见面的奶奶。看着她枯槁的身子的躺着床上,插着很多管子,我有点害怕。奶奶和我说她有愿望没有完成,让我和她互换一下身体,并保证会回来。奶奶说她以前喜欢的小伙伴要去世了,愿望是想再看看她小时候的伙伴,我想到了我要好的朋友,就勉强答应了。我躺在床上,和离去的小女孩对视了一眼,她的眼神显得很复杂。好久了,好疼,我一直在等她回来。终于在弥留的最后一刻,小女孩回来了,她低头对我说了一句:“抱歉,奶奶有好多愿望要实现。”

key_facts: The narrator and her grandmother swapped bodies.
This body swap was proposed by the grandmother with a false promise (claiming she would swap back).
The narrator is enduring the intense pain from the grandmother's dying body.
The grandmother had no intention of swapping bodies back.
The grandmother's true wish was to use her grandchild's healthy body to continue living.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Brunch
condition: Xiao Ming's mother often cooked exquisite breakfast and lunch for Xiao Ming to take to school. One day, his mother slapped Xiao Ming and shouted, "You are not my son!" then called the police.
solution: There was another character named Xiao Hua. Xiao Hua was Xiao Ming's deskmate, and Xiao Ming often brought delicious brunch to school, making Xiao Hua very envious. Xiao Ming also frequently showed off to Xiao Hua, making Xiao Hua want such delicious brunch too. So one night after self-study class, Xiao Hua killed Xiao Ming. He then glued Xiao Ming's face to his own. When Xiao Ming's mother saw Xiao Hua with Xiao Ming's face, she slapped Xiao Hua and called the police.

zh.title: 早午餐
zh.condition: 小明的妈妈经常煮好精美的早餐和午餐给小明带去学校吃。有一天,妈妈打了小明一巴掌,大声说到你不是我的儿子并报了警。
zh.solution: 有另一个人物叫小华。小华是小明的同桌,小明经常带好吃的早午餐带回学校吃惹得小华很羡慕。小明也经常向小华炫耀,令小华也想有那么好吃的早午餐。于是某天晚上自习放学后,把小明给杀了。将脸皮粘在自己脸上,小明妈妈看到了带上小明脸皮的小华。就打了小华一巴掌,并报了警。

key_facts: Delicious brunch sparked envy and jealousy from a classmate
The classmate also wanted to eat such delicious brunch
Impersonated the classmate by peeling off their face
The mother saw through the disguise
The slap was the mother confirming it wasn't her son

title: Expensive Price
condition: "Can it be cheaper?" "You get what you pay for." "My husband was bitten by a snake in the car; I wish it were cheaper." The woman cried to the doctor.
solution: As the New Year approached, the wife was at the mall choosing a Year of the Snake gift for her husband. At the sales assistant's recommendation, she eventually bought an expensive green scarf. The husband was very happy when he received it and wore the new scarf while riding his electric bike to buy New Year's goods. On the way, the road became slippery due to ice, and he unfortunately tipped over. It was originally just a simple fall, but the scarf the husband was wearing accidentally got caught in the still rapidly rotating wheel. Because the scarf was expensive and of excellent quality, it didn't break, and the husband was strangled to death. The wife collapsed upon learning everything and went insane from intense self-blame, believing her husband was killed by a green snake. But her subconscious still blamed herself, so she kept repeating: "I wish it were cheaper."

zh.title: 昂贵代价
zh.condition:
"可以便宜点儿吗?"
"一分钱一分货。"
"我的丈夫在车上被蛇咬了,要是便宜点儿就好了。"
女人对医生哭。
zh.solution: 年关将至,妻子在商场为丈夫挑选蛇年礼物,在导购的推荐下,最终购买了一条品贵的绿色围巾。丈夫收到后很高兴,戴着新围巾骑电动车去购置年货,路上因道路结冰变得湿滑,不幸侧翻本来只是简单的翻车事故,可是丈夫佩戴的围巾意外卷入还在高速旋转的车轮中。因为围巾造价昂贵,质地精良,没有断裂,丈夫就这样被活活绞死。妻子得知一切后崩溃了,在强烈的自责中精神失常,认为丈夫是被一条绿色的蛇杀死的,但她的潜意识依旧在责怪自己,所以她嘴里总重复着:"要是便宜点儿就好了。"

key_facts: An expensive green scarf
The scarf got caught in the wheel and didn't break due to its high price and quality
The husband died in an electric bike accident
The wife suffered a mental breakdown
The wife believed the scarf was a snake

title: Tally Mark
condition: White, white, white, white, red.
solution: "This is the fifth house; the previous few had no one." After saying that, the man pressed the doorbell and waited a few seconds, then raised the electric drill in his hand and inserted it into the peephole. This time he succeeded; the tip of the drill turned bright red. Afterward, he used the blood from the drill tip to complete the last stroke of the '正' (tally) character on the ground.

zh.title: 正
zh.condition: 白色,白色,白色,白色,红色。
zh.solution: "这是第五家,刚几家都没人。"说完,男人按下门铃等了几秒钟后,举起手中电钻伸进猫眼里,这次他得手了,电钻的尖端变成了鲜红色,随后,他用电钻尖端的血在地上补上了正字最后一笔。

key_facts: The different colors is used to record the number of attacks
The killer carried out attacks through the peephole on the door
The attack tool was an electric drill
White represents failed attacks or no one home
Red represents successfully hitting the target (eye) and drawing blood

title: Half a Matchstick
condition: A person was found dead in the desert, head down. Scattered nearby were several suitcases, and the person tightly clutched half a matchstick. Deduce how this person died?
solution: This person and a friend were flying in a hot air balloon. The hot air balloon malfunctioned, and even after throwing out all the luggage, it was still a bit overweight. So they drew lots, and the one who drew the half matchstick was thrown out.

zh.title: 半根火柴
zh.condition: 有一个人在沙漠中,头朝下死了,不远处散落着几个行李箱子,而这个人手里紧紧地抓着半个火柴,推理这个人是怎么死的?
zh.solution: 这个人和朋友乘热气球飞在空中,热气球故障,丢光行李仍超重一些,于是抓阄,抽到半个火柴的被扔了下去。

key_facts: Hot air balloon journey
Encountered an overweight crisis during the journey
Still overweight after throwing out luggage
Used matchsticks to draw lots for life or death
Died from falling from a great height

title: Neighbor
condition: I built a wall, and the next day I had a scar on my face.
solution: My neighbor was very fond of taking small advantages. There had been a long-term dispute between our two families over land ownership. To reduce contact with my neighbors, I blocked the public passage left in my home. However, my neighbors felt that what I did affected their passage and thought I was targeting them. So they designed to tie kite strings at my doorstep. When I came home and didn't notice the kite string, I normally drove my motorcycle into the courtyard. Unexpectedly, the kite string cut half of my face.

zh.title: 邻居
zh.condition: 我建了一堵墙,第二天脸上却多了一道伤疤。
zh.solution: 邻居家很喜欢贪小便宜,我们两家因为土地归属问题长期存在矛盾,为了减少与邻居家的接触,我将自家留出的公用通道封锁了起来,但是邻居家觉得我做的这件事影响到他们通行了,认为我在针对他们,于是就设计将风筝线绑在我家门口,等我回家之后没有注意到风筝线,正常将摩托车驶入院中,没想到竟然被他们的风筝线割花了半张脸。

key_facts: I blocked the public passage
The neighbor thought I was targeting them
The neighbor retaliated with kite strings
I didn't notice the kite string when I came home
The kite string cut my face

title: Profession
condition: Ever since my sister took up this profession, I've been devastated.
solution: Ever since my sister became a teacher, the birthday gifts she gives me every year have become last year's set of final exam papers.

zh.title: 职业
zh.condition: 自从姐姐任职这门职业以后,我崩溃了。
zh.solution: 自从姐姐任职教师这门职业以后,她每次送我的生日礼物变成了去年的一套期末考试真题。

key_facts: The narrator's devastation is directly related to their sister's career choice.
The trigger for the devastation is the specific items related to her profession that the sister gives.

title: Four Seasons
condition: I died in winter, I came alive in spring. I slept in summer, I flew in autumn.
solution: I was killed in winter and buried in the earth. After spring, the ice melted, and maggots grew on my body. In summer, the maggots pupated, and in autumn, they turned into flies and flew away.

zh.title: 四季
zh.condition: 我冬天死了,我春天活了。我夏天睡了,我秋天飞了。
zh.solution: 我冬天被人杀死埋在土里春天后冰化了,身上长出了蛆虫。夏天蛆虫化蛹,秋天又变成苍蝇飞走了。

key_facts: The 'I' in the narrative does not refer to the continuous existence of the same living being or consciousness.
'Came alive,' 'slept,' and 'flew' describe subsequent natural phenomena occurring on the deceased's remains.
This process is closely related to the life cycle of insects.
The initial event involved an unnatural death and burial.
The changes of the four seasons correspond to different stages of decomposition and transformation.

title: Switched Babies
condition: A maternity hospital patient claimed the baby given to her wasn't hers. Why?
solution: She had killed her own baby. Finding it dead, a nurse secretly substituted an orphaned newborn to cover up what she thought was accidental death.

zh.title: 换婴
zh.condition: 某妇产科医院的女子生下了一个宝宝,但第二天她刚抱到婴儿时却说这不是她的宝宝,请推理。
zh.solution: 这位女子亲手杀了自己的孩子,而当天半夜护士去婴儿房巡视情况时,以为该婴儿是意外死亡。才特地隐瞒此事,用了一个也才刚出生没几天的孤儿婴儿取代那名死婴,所以女子才说这不是她的宝宝。

key_facts: The mother killed her own child
Her baby was already dead
A nurse switched the babies
The nurse mistook it for accidental death
The given baby was actually an orphan

title: Yin-Yang Eyes
condition: I am a person with yin-yang eyes and can see ghosts around me. One day, my yin-yang eyes suddenly disappeared. It wasn't until I met him again that I understood what happened.
solution: He is someone who knows I have yin-yang eyes. One day, he killed me and took my eyes. And I became a ghost留在 (staying) in the world. But I didn't remember what happened during that time. I just thought I was still alive. Because as before, I could see ghosts around me. Until one day I met him again and saw his eyes. Suddenly, I remembered everything.

zh.title: 阴阳眼
zh.condition: 我是一个拥有阴阳眼的人,能看到身边的鬼魂。有天,我的阴阳眼突然没了。直到重新遇上他,我才明白发生的事情。
zh.solution: “他”是一个知道我拥有阴阳眼的人。有天,他杀了我并夺去了我的眼睛。而我则变成了鬼魂留在世间。可我并不记得那段时间发生的事情,我就直以为我还活着。因为和以前一样,我能看到身边的鬼魂。知道有天我重新遇到了他,看到了他的眼睛。突然全部都记了起来。

key_facts: The ability of yin-yang eyes suddenly disappeared
The protagonist has actually been killed by him
The yin-yang eyes were taken by the murderer
The protagonist becomes a ghost without realizing it

title: Harvest
condition: The goat's carrots had a good harvest. Little White Rabbit died, and Little Black Rabbit was full.
solution: The goat's carrots had a good harvest, and he wanted to share some with Little White Rabbit and Little Black Rabbit. Little Black Rabbit took the carrots and left, while Little White Rabbit said she didn't want carrots, only some seeds. The next year, Little White Rabbit starved to death before the carrots grew. Little Black Rabbit finished his own carrots, just in time for Little White Rabbit's field to have a good harvest, and he casually took it, making himself plump and black.

zh.title: 丰收
zh.condition: 山羊的胡萝卜丰收了,小白兔死了,小黑免饱了。
zh.solution: 山羊的胡萝卜丰收了,他想分一些给小白兔和小黑兔。小黑免拿到胡萝卜就走了,小白兔则说自己不要胡萝卜,只要一些种子。第二年,小白兔没等到胡萝卜长出来就饿死了,小黑兔吃完自己的胡萝卜,正好赶上小白免的田地丰收,就顺手收了,把自己养得黑黑胖胖。

key_facts: Little White Rabbit rejected immediate carrots for seeds
Little White Rabbit starved waiting for harvest
Little Black Rabbit chose immediate carrots
Carrots planted by Little White Rabbit were eventually eaten by Little Black Rabbit
Little Black Rabbit being full implies eating both his own carrots and Little White Rabbit's carrots

title: Flickering Light Bulb
condition: The hallway was pitch black, only I knew the light was flickering, on and off. In the dimness, I saw a charred fragment of an old newspaper.
solution: Every time I came home at night and passed through a long, dark hallway, that broken light would faintly flicker, but my neighbors all said they had never seen the light on, not even a flicker. Many years ago, a fire broke out in this apartment building, and the ignition point was near the light in this hallway. A resident died because the hallway light was broken, and they couldn't escape in time in the dark. The light flickers only when I pass by because the victim was the previous tenant of the apartment I rent. The flickering light is the victim's 'spirit' trying to communicate with me, warning me to report it. The charred newspaper fragment is a news report from that fire.

zh.title: 不亮的灯泡
zh.condition: 走廊一片漆黑,只有我知道灯闪烁着,忽明忽暗中我看到了一张烧焦的旧报纸碎片。
zh.solution: 我每次晚上回家经过很长一段黑暗的走廊的时候,那盏坏掉的灯会微弱地闪一下,但邻居们都说他们从未见过灯亮,哪怕是闪一下。很多年前,这栋公寓楼发生过一场火灾,起火点就在这个楼道的灯附近。有一个住户因为楼道灯坏了,摸黑逃生时没能及时跑出去而丧生。那盏灯之所以只在我经过时闪烁,是因为遇难者正是我租的那间公寓的上一任租户。灯的闪烁是遇难者的“灵”在试图与我沟通,警示我要去反馈。那张烧焦的报纸碎片,正是当年报道这场火灾的新闻。

key_facts: The hallway light only flickers for me, not for others
This apartment building had a fire years ago, and someone died because of it
The victim died because the light was out, preventing a timely escape in the dark
The apartment I rent was the victim's old residence
The charred newspaper fragment is a report from the fire, revealing the truth behind the flickering light

title: Walk
condition: Xiao Ming and Xiao Huang walked in the park when suddenly Xiao Huang cried out. Next day, two bodies were found there.
solution: Xiao Huang was Xiao Ming's dog. One night while walking, they witnessed a murder. Xiao Huang's barking alerted the killer, who murdered both to eliminate witnesses.

zh.title: 散步

zh.solution: 小黄是小明的狗,有天夜晚,小明带着小黄去散步。突然发现了凶手正在行凶杀人。突然小黄狂吠了起来。被凶手发现了。凶手为了不被发现就把小明和小黄都给杀了。

They witnessed a murder during the walk

The killer silenced them both
The bodies were human and dog

title: Daughter
condition: 'Have another boy!' she smiled, holding her daughter with a rounded belly. Happy for her, I smiled too.
solution: As her obstetrician, I knew her husband had wanted a son. After abusing her, she killed him, preserving his head in a doll body she carried under her clothes, whispering: 'You're my son now.'

zh.title: 女儿
zh.condition: 她牵着女儿,小腹隆起。看样子是又要当妈妈了。“据说还是个男孩子哦”,她笑的很开心,我也替她高兴。
zh.solution: 我曾经是她的妇产科医生,她在我们这生了一个女婴。孩子出生后,她的丈夫非常失望。天天打骂她,并让她赶紧再生一个。她为了保护女儿不被丈夫卖掉便杀了他。她把丈夫的头切掉,封进了一个洋娃娃的身体里。每天出门都把娃娃寨进自己的衣服里,假装自己怀孕了。“真是天意呢,你变成了我的儿子,妈妈会好好照顾你的。”她抚摸着肚子温柔的说道。现在她终于摆脱了那个垃圾男人,我也替她高兴。

key_facts: Narrator knows her history
Her 'pregnancy' is fake
Her 'son' isn't alive
Her husband is dead
Her happiness has dark reasons
