title: Fake Medicine
condition: A man suffered from a severe illness that could only be alleviated by a special drug, which required long-term use to be effective. He specifically asked his family to buy the drug from abroad. When he saw the drug, he knew he was doomed.
solution: The man was a manufacturer of counterfeit drugs. He specifically counterfeited expensive special drugs, producing ineffective but much cheaper fake medicines, which earned him a lot of money. However, he didn't expect bad money to drive out good; the market was gradually dominated by fake drugs. So, even when he bought this special drug from abroad, it was still the fake medicine he himself had produced. Thus, he knew he was beyond saving.

zh.title: 假药
zh.condition: 男人得了一个重症,这个重症只有一种特效药可以缓解,且需要长期吃才能见效。他特意让家人从国外买入特效药,看到特效药时,他知道完蛋了。
zh.solution: 男人是假药制造商,他特地仿制昂贵的特效药制造了没有药效但价格便宜得多的假药,他因此赚了大钱。却不想劣币驱逐良币,市场逐渐被假药占据,所以哪怕他从国外买入这个特效药,依旧是他自己生产的假药,所以他知道自己没救了。

key_facts: The man was in the pharmaceutical industry
The man manufactured counterfeit versions of a special drug
The counterfeit drug produced by the man was ineffective
The market was flooded with counterfeit drugs
The 'special drug' the man bought was the fake medicine he himself produced

title: Handling Procedures
condition: Xiao Ming went to the counter to handle some procedures, and Xiao Mei waited beside him. Xiao Mei suddenly left his side and walked to the other end of the hallway. Later, when Xiao Ming finished his procedure, he saw Xiao Mei at the other end of the hallway and ran away.
solution: Xiao Ming and Xiao Mei met at a bar and chatted happily. They decided to go to a hotel. Xiao Mei suddenly needed to go to the bathroom, so she left to go to the restroom at the other end of the hallway. When Xiao Ming finished the procedure and went to find her, he saw her coming out of the men's restroom and ran away in panic.

title: Cow Eating Grass
condition: A man lived alone, and his neighbors were a couple. There was a lawn between their houses. One night, the couple next door arguing woke the sleeping man. Then he heard crashing sounds, chopping wood sounds, and the sound of a cow eating grass. After a while, the man heard someone hitting his front door, but he ignored it and fell back asleep. The next day, he found the female neighbor brutally murdered at his doorstep.
solution: Last night, the neighboring couple argued, and in the dispute, the husband used an axe to chop off his wife's limbs and tongue. The sound of a cow eating grass was actually the sound of the wife gnawing at the grass, inching her way towards the man's house. The banging on the door was the wife, in an attempt to call for help, hitting his door with her remaining upper body.

zh.title: 牛吃草
zh.condition: 一名男子独居,邻居是一对夫妇。两家人的房子中间隔了一片草坪。某夜,隔壁夫妻吵架声吵醒了睡着的男子,接着他听到了摔东西声,斧木头声,牛吃草的声音。过了会,男子又听到了有人撞他家门的声音,他都没有理会又睡了过去。第二天,他发现隔壁女主人惨死在他家门口。
zh.solution: 昨夜邻居夫妇吵架,争执中男主人用斧头砍断了女主人的四肢和舌头。牛吃草的声音,其实 是女主人用嘴啃着草皮一点一点向隔壁男子家移动的声音,而撞门声则是女主人为了求救,用她还存在的上半身撞击他家门发出的。

key_facts: Neighborly dispute
The wife's limbs and tongue were chopped off with an axe
The sound of a cow eating grass originated from the woman's movement
The wife moved by gnawing on the grass
The wife tried to call for help by banging on the door
The man ignored her

title: The Porridge He Cooked
condition: Ding-ling-ling... (phone alarm) People on the street looked at me in horror. I saw blood on my hands. I thought I would never be able to drink the porridge he cooked again.
solution: He is my boyfriend, we are very much in love, and recently decided to move in together. He is very good to me, usually makes me delicious food, his cooking skills are really good, and I love the fish congee he makes for me the most. But I have a secret I never told him, which is that I have somnambulism (sleepwalking). This night, I forgot to take the medicine for sleepwalking. In my sleep, I dreamed that he was working overtime at the company, and I also wanted to make a bowl of delicious fish congee to send to him as a late-night snack. I followed his method to prepare the fish, chopped off the fish head, gutted the fish, removed the internal organs, sliced the fish, and then put it in the congee to simmer... After it was done, I tasted it, and the flavor was truly unprecedentedly delicious, he would definitely praise my cooking skills! I immediately packed the congee and happily went out to deliver it to him. I was walking on the street thinking about how he would praise me, and then the alarm clock rang. Suddenly the scene changed from night to early morning, the lunch box in my hand disappeared, and only the shocking bloodstains on my hands appeared vaguely... Everyone on the street stared wide-eyed, looking at me covered in blood as if they had seen a ghost. I think, yesterday I probably used him, to cook the congee. I think, I will never be able to drink the porridge he cooked again...

zh.title: 他煮的粥
zh.condition: 叮铃铃...(手机闹钟)街上的人都惊恐的看向我,我看到自己手上的血,我想我再也喝不到他煮的粥了。
zh.solution: 他是我的男朋友,我们很相爱,最近决定搬到一起住。他对我很好,平时都会给我做好吃的,他的手艺真的很不错,我最爱喝他给我做的鱼片粥。但是我有个秘密从来没有告诉过他,那就是我有梦游症。这天晚上,我忘记了吃治疗梦游症的药。睡梦中,我梦到他在公司加班,我也想要做一碗好吃的鱼片粥给他送过去当夜宵。我学着他的做法处理鱼,将鱼头砍掉、把鱼开膛破肚、去除内脏、切成鱼片,再放到粥里一起炖煮...做好后我尝了一下,味道真的从未有过的鲜美,他一定会夸我厨艺好棒!我马上把粥装好,高高兴兴出门去给他送粥。我走在街上想着他会怎么夸我,这时候闹钟响了。 突然画面从黑天变成清晨,手中的饭盒消失不见,模糊中出现的只有手上触目惊心的血迹... 街上的人全都瞪大了眼睛,仿佛见了鬼一样的看着浑身是血的我。我想,我昨天应该是用他,煮的粥。我想,我再也喝不到他煮的粥了...

key_facts: The narrator suffers from somnambulism (sleepwalking) and did not take medication that night.
The narrator killed her boyfriend.
The narrator imitated the process of making congee while sleepwalking.
The next morning, the narrator woke up on the street, covered in blood.
The boyfriend's death is related to the 'congee-making' behavior during sleepwalking.

title: The Rose Flag
condition: The flag of the free rose finally sank to the bottom of the sea. Years later, he received a gift engraved with the words: 'It is an honor to return a fragment of the dream to the dreamer.'
solution: An engineer, dreaming of establishing an independent and free nation, built an artificial platform in international waters. He declared it a sovereign state named 'Rose Island' and raised a rose flag. This act angered the government, which saw it as tax evasion and illegal construction. Despite the engineer's efforts to resist, the government eventually sent the navy to destroy Rose Island, sinking it to the seabed. Later, divers recovered a brick from the wreckage and sent it to him, engraved with: 'It is an honor to return a fragment of the dream to the dreamer.' Although Rose Island was gone, its ideal of freedom and romance was celebrated by many.

zh.title: 玫瑰旗
zh.condition: 自由的玫瑰旗终沉于海底,多年后他收到了一份礼物,上面刻着:“很荣幸将梦的碎片还给了造梦的人”
zh.solution: 一位工程师怀揣着建立独立自由国度的梦想,在公海建造了一个人工平台,并宣称其为主权独立的国家,命名为玫瑰岛并挂上了玫瑰旗。这种行为触怒了政府,被视为逃税和非法建设。尽管工程师努力抗争,政府最终派遣海军炸毁了玫瑰岛,将其沉入海底。后来潜水员们从海底捞上来一块砖头,送还给他,上面刻着:“很荣幸将梦的碎片还给了造梦的人”,虽然玫瑰岛已沉,但其追求自由和浪漫的理念为人们所歌颂。

key_facts: The 'Rose Flag' represents a 'nation'.
The legitimacy of this 'nation' is questionable.
His' identity is an engineer.
The 'fragment of the dream' is part of a building.
The story is based on a real event.
The 'nation's' demise was man-made.

title: Sea Turtle Soup
condition: A person went to a restaurant, ordered a bowl of sea turtle soup, and left the restaurant in a hurry without paying.
solution: This person is a secret agent. His contact's cover identity is the owner and chef of a restaurant. The code to meet is to order sea turtle soup (which is actually chicken soup). On this day, the soup he drank tasted completely different from before, indicating it wasn't made by the same person. Yet, they could serve a bowl of 'sea turtle soup,' meaning his contact had been exposed, and the place was now controlled by enemies. He had no choice but to escape when no one was looking.

zh.title: 海龟汤
zh.condition: 一个人去餐厅点了一份海龟汤,没付钱就匆匆离开了餐馆。
zh.solution: 这个人是特工,他的上线表面身份是某家餐馆的老板兼厨师,接头暗号是点海龟汤(实际上就是鸡汤)。这一天,他喝的汤和以前味道完全不一样,说明不是同一个人做的,却能端出一晚“海龟汤”,那就是上线已经暴露,这里已经被敌人控制,他只好趁人不备逃走。

key_facts: The dish name 'Sea Turtle Soup' has a special meaning and does not refer to actual sea turtle soup.
The taste or preparation method of this soup was not as expected, and this point is very important.
This person's identity or profession is special, giving his actions (ordering a specific dish, leaving without paying) a specific purpose.
The reason he left was not because he forgot to pay or had no money, but because he sensed danger.
The restaurant's environment or serving staff might have changed, and this soup was a signal of that change.

title: Injury
condition: He lay on the grass, holding a jacket soaked in blood.
solution: A thief stole from his neighbor. To create the appearance of not being a familiar person, he used the jacket to break a window but cut his arm on the broken glass, leaving a large wound. When his neighbor found him following the blood trail on the grass, he had already bled to death. The neighbor thought the blood was left by the person who harmed him, but in reality, he had died from blood loss, and the blood trail was his own.

zh.title: 受伤
zh.condition: 他躺在草坪上,夹克被拿在手里,浸满了血。
zh.solution: 一个小偷偷了他的邻居,为了造成不是熟人的假象,他用夹克包着胳膊打碎窗户,但是被碎玻璃划破了夹克,还是在胳膊上割出了一大道伤口。当邻居顺着血迹在草坪上找到他时,他已经失血过多而死了。邻居在发现血迹后,以为是伤害他的人留下的线索,实际上他自己就是因失血过多而死,而血迹是他在打碎窗户时留下的。

key_facts: The man broke a window to steal from his neighbor
The jacket was used to break the window but cut his arm
He bled to death from the wound
The neighbor followed the blood trail to find him
The blood trail was left by the man himself

title: Dreaming
condition: An employee said to his boss: 'You absolutely must not take a plane today. Last night, I dreamed that if you took a plane, it would crash, and you would die.' Upon hearing this, the boss fired him.
solution: Because this employee worked the night shift at the factory, when he told his boss he dreamed last night that the boss would die if he took a plane, the boss knew immediately that the employee was not serious about his work and was sleeping during his shift, so he fired him.

zh.title: 做梦
zh.condition: 一个职员对老板说:“今天你千万别坐飞机,昨晚我梦到如果你坐飞机会坠落,你会死的。”老板一听,就把这个人开除了。
zh.solution: 因为这个职员是工厂值夜班的,他和老板说昨晚梦见如果老板坐飞机会死,老板一听就知道该职员工作不认真,值班期间在睡觉,于是开除了他。

key_facts: The reason for dismissal is directly related to the employee's work performance, not the dream itself.
The employee's working hours or job responsibilities are key to solving the puzzle.
The employee's act of recounting the dream inadvertently exposed his dereliction of duty.
The boss's decision to fire him was based on logical judgment, not superstition.
The timing of the dream (in conjunction with his work responsibilities) is the core evidence leading to the dismissal.

title: Midnight Visitor
condition: One in the morning, that damn doorbell rang again. She's here, to kill me. I knew it, she wouldn't let me go. The police arrested me, saying I have schizophrenia. I remember now, it was me, I almost killed my wife. But why is the doorbell ringing again?
solution: The man's wife died, and the police suspected him of murder. But the man had schizophrenia, so to make him remember, they pretended to be the woman who committed the murder. Under the police's constant stimulation, the man remembered: he did have schizophrenia and had indeed almost killed his wife. He was taken to a mental hospital. That night, however, the doorbell rang again, and a woman was really standing outside.

zh.title: 半夜访客
zh.condition: 凌晨一点,那该死的门铃声又响起来了。她来了,来杀我了,我就知道,她不会放过我的。警察逮捕了我,说我有精神分裂。我想起来了,是我,差点杀了妻子。可是为什么门铃声又响起来了。
zh.solution: 男人的妻子死了,警察怀疑是男人杀的,但是男人有精神分裂,于是为了让男人想起来,他们假扮了那个杀人的女人。在警察的不断刺激下,男人想起来了,他的确有精神分裂,也确实差点杀了妻子,于是他被抓到了精神病院。结果当晚,门铃声还是响起来了,门外真的站着一个女人。

key_facts: The protagonist suffers from schizophrenia.
The previous doorbell rings were arranged by the police.
The police's goal was to make him recall the incident.
The protagonist did indeed harm his wife.
The protagonist was later sent to a mental hospital.
The last doorbell ring was real.
There was really a woman outside the door at the end.
A real threat exists, independent of the protagonist's mental issues.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Birthday
condition: I invited my good friends to my house for my birthday party. After blowing out the candles, I killed them all. Please deduce.
solution: I was born blind. Once, on an adventure with my friends, to survive, they suggested that each of us cut off one hand for food. So I lost a hand. It wasn't until my birthday, after I blew out the candles and heard my friends clapping, that I realized they had deceived me.

zh.title: 生日
zh.condition: 我生日邀请我的好朋友到我家聚会,吹完蜡烛后,我把他们都杀了,请推理。
zh.solution: 我天生双目失明,一次和好朋友冒险时,为了生存,朋友提议每人砍去一只手作为食物,所以我失去了一只手。直到我生日吹完蜡烛后,听见了朋友们的鼓掌声,我才意识到他们骗了我。

key_facts: I have no hands.
I am blind.
My friends and I had a special agreement.
My friends and I were once in a perilous situation.
My friends' applause made me realize something.
I was betrayed.

title: Indistinguishable Sisters
condition: On a rainy day, a man left home pulling a large suitcase. At the door he met his wife, spoke excitedly, then suddenly looked horrified. He checked her profile, his watch, the heavy rain outside, then fled with the suitcase never to return.
solution: The wife had an identical twin sister. The husband was secretly having an affair with the sister, who distinguished herself by drawing a noticeable mole on her cheek. Having grown tired of his wife, he planned to kill her. That rainy day when his wife left for work, he invited the sister over. Seeing no mole, he panicked thinking his wife returned unexpectedly. Fearing exposure, he killed the woman (actually his lover), dismembered her, packed the suitcase, and left to dispose of it. Outside he met another woman (his actual wife) without a mole. Checking his watch - his wife's usual return time - and the heavy rain that washed off the mole, he realized his mistake and fled in shock.

zh.title: 姐妹难分
zh.condition: 一个雨天,男人拉着一个大行李箱出门。他在门口碰见了自己的妻子,和妻子兴奋地说了几句话后,他神色忽然古怪至极。他仔细看了看妻子的侧脸,看了看手表,又转头看了看门外的大雨。而后他慌慌张张拉着行李箱走了,从此销声匿迹。
zh.solution: 女人有个长相一模一样的双胞胎姐姐。女人老公偷偷出轨双胞胎姐姐。双胞胎姐姐与女人老公偷情时,为了把自己和女人区别开来,会在侧脸画一颗显眼的痣。最近,女人的老公已经完全厌倦女人,一直在找机会杀了女人。一个雨天,女人照常出门工作。趁此机会,老公又邀请了姐姐来家里偷情。老公发现坐在沙发上的这个女人脸上没有痣,他十分慌乱,以为妻子突然回家。担心偷情败露,他打算今天就杀死妻子。于是他悄悄走过去杀死女人,解肢,把尸体装进行李箱,出门抛尸。出门后,他在门外遇见一个女人,起初他以为是姐姐——自己的情人,于是兴奋地说了几句话。说话后,他发现不对。仔细一看,这个女的脸上也没有痣。他看手表,发现是妻子往常下班回家的时间。今天一直在下大雨。他突然明白,刚才家里的那个女人就是姐姐。不过因为是雨天,她脸上的痣被雨水洗掉了。他杀错了人。震惊后怕之余,他逃走了。

key_facts: There were two identical women
They were distinguished by a mark
The mark could be washed off by rain
He intended to kill his wife
His horror came from killing the wrong woman

title: Monopoly
condition: She walked in front of a house, knowing that she was doomed.
solution: She was playing Monopoly, passing her opponent's property. In the game, players move pieces by rolling dice, and if they land on an opponent's property, they must pay rent. If they can't pay, they may go bankrupt. She was about to lose the game because she couldn’t afford the rent.

zh.title: 大富翁
zh.condition: 她走到一栋房子前,知道自己已经无力回天。
zh.solution: 她在玩大富翁,经过了对手的房产。在大富翁游戏中,玩家需要掷骰子移动棋子,如果落在对手的房产上,就需要支付租金。如果支付不起租金,可能会导致破产,因此她即将因规则而输掉游戏

key_facts: This is a tabletop game scene
The house is not a real property
The house belongs to an opponent in the game
She doesn't have enough money to pay
She is about to lose the game due to the rules

title: Play-acting Turns Real
condition: I discovered a problem with our crew's props master, but I was about to commit suicide, so I didn't have time to report it. Amidst laughter, I fell to the ground.
solution: I am an actor. I discovered that the props master in the crew was using substandard materials and planned to report him after this scene was over. In this scene, my character was supposed to hang himself. But when I put the noose around my neck, the support under my feet suddenly collapsed. I was actually hanging in the air. The audience below thought it was part of the play and burst into laughter. However, because the props master used substandard materials, the rope he bought was also of poor quality. The rope broke, and I fell to the ground, escaping death.

zh.title: 假戏真做
zh.condition: 我发现我们剧组的道具师有问题,可我正要去自杀,没时间告发此事,在哄笑中,我落到了地上。
zh.solution: 我是一名演员,我发现剧组中的道具员以次充好,准备在这场戏演完后去告发他,这场戏中有我扮演的角色上吊自杀的桥段,可当我将绳子套上脖颈,脚下的支撑物却突然坍塌了,我真的被吊在了空中,台下的观众以为这是戏的一部分,纷纷大笑起来。然而,由于道具员以次充好,他买的绳子也是劣质品,绳子断裂,我摔到地上,免于一死。

key_facts: My profession is an actor.
'Suicide' is a stage performance, not a real intention.
The props master using substandard materials is the 'problem' mentioned in the surface story.
The support under my feet unexpectedly collapsed during the performance, leading to real danger.
The poor-quality rope broke at the critical moment, ironically saving my life.
The laughter came from the audience below who thought it was a realistic performance.

title: Dictation
condition: The first six were correct, but why was the seventh wrong?
solution: In Chinese class, the teacher asked everyone to dictate the Chinese characters for numbers one to seven. A foreign student couldn't dictate them, so he looked at the calendar next to him and copied 'Monday,' 'Tuesday,' and so on. However, he didn't realize that the seventh day isn't called '星期七' (xing qi qi - 'week seven'), but '星期日' (xing qi ri - 'Sunday')!

zh.title: 默写
zh.condition: 前六个都对了,怎么第七个错了呢?
zh.solution: 汉语课上,老师要求大家默写"数字一到七的中文"”,外国同学默不出来,看到旁边的日历,对着"星期一""星期二"......抄,然而,他没想到,第七天不叫星期"七",而是星期"日"!

key_facts: The dictation content was Chinese numbers one to seven
The person who made the mistake was a foreign student
The student referred to a calendar for copying
The copied content was the Chinese expressions for days of the week
The error stemmed from the special name for the seventh day (Sunday)

title: Laughter
condition: I hid my hand behind my back, he smiled at me, but I couldn't hear, 'I'm sorry...'
solution:
War raged. To move the still-living baby to a safe zone, one of my hands was blown off, a bloody mess. I didn't want to scare him, so I hid my hand behind my back. Seeing me like this, he seemed to think I would suddenly pull out candy or a toy for him, just like his parents would, and he actually grinned amidst the ruins.
I could imagine his laughter; it must be more beautiful than singing, definitely crisp, clean, and refreshing. Unfortunately, I couldn't hear it. Explosions were still going off in the distance; my ears had long gone deaf from the gunfire.
'I'm sorry... little baby, Auntie might not be able to pull out a little gift for you...'
I died.

zh.title: 笑声
zh.condition: 我把手藏到背后,他对着我笑,我却听不见,“对不起啊....”
zh.solution:
战火连天,为了将那个还活着的小宝宝转移到安全地带,我的一只手被炸断了,血肉模糊,我不想吓到他,就将手藏在背后,他看见我这样,似乎是以为我会像他的爸爸妈妈一样,给他突然掏出来糖果或者玩具,竟然在这片废墟中咧开嘴笑了。
我能想象到他的笑声,肯定比歌声还要动听肯定是清脆的,干净的,焕然一新的。可惜啊,我却听不见,远处还在爆炸,我的耳朵早就在这炮火中失聪了。
“对不起啊..小宝贝,姨姨可能没办法给你掏出来小礼物了...”
我死了

key_facts: The narrator's hidden hand suffered severe physical trauma.
The story is set against a backdrop of violence and danger (e.g., war).
'He' who smiled at the narrator is a young child or baby.
The narrator's hearing loss was caused by external environmental factors.
The narrator's apology is related to being unable to fulfill a child's expectation (e.g., producing a gift).

title: The Talisman
condition: His talisman wasn't valuable, but at this moment, it was priceless.
solution: This old silver coin was not genuine, but it was the cherished token of love between his grandparents. His grandmother passed it to him, hoping it would bless his marriage with peace and happiness. When he gave it to his girlfriend as a token of his love, he was filled with the same hope. However, his girlfriend posted a photo of the coin online, asking about its authenticity and value. Upon learning it was a worthless fake, she became furious, believing he didn't love her, and insisted on breaking up. In that moment, he understood that the talisman had fulfilled its purpose—it had revealed the different ways they understood 'value' and 'love.' The once-worthless coin was, at this moment, priceless.

zh.title: 护身符
zh.condition: 他的护身符并不值钱,却在此刻价值千金
zh.solution: 这枚古老的银币并非真品,却承载着他奶奶和爷爷的定情信物的深情厚谊。奶奶将它传给他,希望它能保佑他的婚姻平安顺遂。当他把它作为定情信物送给女友时,他满心憧憬着同样的祝福。然而,女友却将这枚银币的照片发到网上,四处询问其真假和价格。得知银币是明显的假货且一文不值后,女友勃然大怒,认为阿明不爱自己,并坚决提出分手。那一刻,他才明白,这枚护身符已经完成了它的使命——它揭示了两人之间对于“价值”和“爱”的不同理解。曾经并不值钱的银币,在这一刻却价值千金。

key_facts: The talisman is a silver coin.
The coin is a fake.
The core of the story is a conflict of values.
'Priceless' does not refer to monetary value.
The talisman helped him see someone's true colors.
The story ends in a breakup.

title: Snow White
condition: I was Snow White, living happily with the prince. One day, news of the seven dwarves' deaths came from the forest, and I was very sad, but the prince looked pleased. The prince gave me a glass of milk before bed, hoping I would rest well, and I never woke up again.
solution: The prince had necrophilia; he liked me when I was 'asleep.' However, due to the presence of the seven dwarves, he was afraid of retaliation if he killed me, so he hesitated. The prince sent his subordinates to assassinate the seven dwarves, and the assassins in the forest finally completed their mission. I was very sad upon hearing the news of the dwarves' deaths (I was unaware of the cause), but the prince looked pleased because his opportunity had arrived. So he gave me a glass of poisoned milk, killing me.

zh.title: 白雪公主
zh.condition: 我是白雪公主,本来和王子幸福的生活着。某一天,森林里传来七个小矮人的死讯,我很伤心,王子却面有喜色,王子在睡前给我一杯牛奶希望我好好休息,我再也没能醒来。
zh.solution: 王子有恋尸癖,他喜欢沉睡的我。可是赖于七个小矮人的存在,他害怕杀害了我会被他们报复,因此迟迟不敢动手。王子派自己的手下去暗杀七个小矮人,在森林里的杀手终于完成了杀死七个小矮人的任务。听到小矮人死讯的我很伤心(我并不清楚小矮人们的死因),但王子因为机会的到来而面露喜色。所以他给了我一杯下了毒的牛奶,杀死了我。

key_facts: The prince has a particular fetish, liking 'sleeping' people
The existence of the seven dwarves hindered the prince's actions
The seven dwarves were killed by people sent by the prince
The prince had a motive to kill Snow White after the dwarves' deaths
The milk the prince gave Snow White was poisoned, leading to Snow White never waking up again

title: Hide-and-Seek
condition: I was playing hide-and-seek with my mom. When my mom saw me, I didn't dare to move a muscle.
solution: I was playing hide-and-seek with my mom at home. I hid under the bed. Hearing the thumping footsteps, I knew my mom was coming into the room. But when the door opened, I saw my mom's eyes. She was on the floor, her body being dragged by someone, and she seemed to have stopped breathing. I covered my mouth and nose and didn't dare to move a muscle!

zh.title: 捉迷藏
zh.condition: 我跟妈妈玩捉迷藏,当妈妈看到我时,我却一动也不敢动。
zh.solution: 我跟妈妈在家玩捉迷藏,我藏到了床底下,随着咚咚咚的脚步声,我知道妈妈要进房间了,可当门被打开后,我看到了妈妈的眼睛,她倒在地上,身体被人拖着,似乎已经没有了呼吸,而我捂着口鼻一动也不敢动!

key_facts: 'I' am playing hide-and-seek with my mom.
'I' am hiding under the bed.
Mom entered the room where 'I' was hiding.
Mom's condition was not normal at that time.
Mom was lying on the floor.
Mom's body was being dragged by someone else.
Mom appeared to have stopped breathing.
'I' was too scared to move.
The person dragging mom was not 'me'.
There was someone else in the house besides 'me' and mom.

title: Alive
condition: In a chaotic world, our small town became a 'Peach Blossom Spring' due to its excellent defense mechanism. On the last day of the new year, a wish-granting meteor streaked across the sky, and I made a deal with the devil. Amidst everyone's wishes, I smiled, because tomorrow this meteor would still appear.
solution: That night's meteor didn't bring good luck or grant wishes; it was a catastrophic meteorite that destroyed our defense mechanism, allowing enemies to invade. Amidst cries of sorrow and a sea of fire, I, an orphan raised by the neighborhood, could not accept this reality. So I sacrificed myself and made a deal with the devil, hoping to keep everything 'alive.' Everyone lived, but they were forever trapped on the day the 'meteor' streaked across the sky, day after day. My smile was because the 'meteor' tomorrow represented the continuation of the time loop.

zh.title: 活着
zh.condition: 乱世之中,我们这座小镇因优秀的防御机制而成为了"桃花源"。新年的最后一天,实现愿望的流星划过,我与魔鬼达成了交易,在众人的许愿中,我笑着,因为明天依旧有这颗流星。
zh.solution: 那晚的流星并不能带来好运实现愿望,而是带来灾祸的陨石,它砸坏了我们的防御机制,外敌得以入侵。在哀声和火海中,作为孤儿被街坊邻居带大的我不能接受这一现实,于是献祭自己和魔鬼达成交易希望能让所有一切都活着。所有人都活了,但永远被困在了"流星"划过的这一天,日复一日。

key_facts: The 'meteor' was actually a catastrophic meteorite
The meteorite destroyed the town's defense mechanism, leading to invasion
I made a deal with the devil to keep everyone 'alive'
The cost of the deal was trapping everyone in a time loop on the day of the disaster
My smile was because tomorrow's 'meteor' signified the continuation of the time loop

title: Discounted Snacks
condition: He bought a batch of discounted snacks from a small shop and felt pleased with himself for getting a good deal. The next day, while watching the news, he was scared stiff.
solution: He had bought snacks from this shop once before at a higher price and felt the owner's wife had overcharged him. The next time he went, a man was tending the shop. He mentioned that the owner's wife might have miscalculated last time. The man offered him a discount to make up for it, and he was happy to get a bargain. The next day, he saw on the news that the couple who owned the shop had been murdered, and the killer had posed as the owner to collect money.

zh.title: 打折的零食
zh.condition: 他在小卖部买了一批打折零食,感觉自己赚到了,暗暗自喜。第二天看新闻时,他被吓傻了。
zh.solution: 他之前在这家店买过一次零食,价格比较高,觉得是老板娘多收他钱了。下次去时,是一个男子在看店,他提出上次可能老板娘算错了钱,多收了一些,男子就说这次给他打个折弥补一下,他觉得自己捡到了便宜很开心。第二天他看新闻时,得知那家小卖部的店主夫妻俩被人杀害,凶手曾冒充店主代为收钱。

key_facts: The person who gave him the discount was not the owner.
The shop owners had already been murdered when he visited the second time.
The man who gave him the discount was the killer.
The news reported the murder of the shop owners.
He was scared because he realized he had interacted with a murderer.
He previously thought the owner's wife had overcharged him.
The discount was not a real offer.
The discount was part of the killer's disguise.

title: Unemployment
condition: My brother's body remains unclaimed to this day, and I've also lost my job.
solution: My brother and I are identical twins. We were bought by a gang when we were young. To protect me, my brother volunteered to be trained as a killer, and I was his assistant. Outsiders all thought we were one person, so when my brother went to kill someone, I could appear elsewhere to provide him with an alibi. But my brother died while he was out. To prevent things from being exposed, no one was willing to claim the body, and my career also ended.

zh.title: 失业
zh.condition: 哥哥的尸体至今无人认领,我也失业了。
zh.solution: 我和哥哥是长相一样的双胞胎,在小时候就被黑帮买下,哥哥为了保护我,自愿被作为杀手培养,我则是他的助手。外人都认为我们是一个人,所以当哥哥去杀人时,我可以出现在别处为他提供不在场证明。但哥哥在外死亡,为了让事情不败露,没人愿意认领尸体,我的职业生涯也结束了。

key_facts: My brother and I are identical twins.
Our profession is a killer duo working for a criminal organization.
Outsiders always thought we were the same person.
My 'job' was to use our twin identity to create alibis for my brother.
Claiming the body would expose the secret that we are two people.
My brother's death made my job of providing alibis meaningless.

title: Mortal World
condition: We are lost souls in hell, surviving solely on energy. Everyone hopes to return to the mortal world. Hell has layers, and the higher one goes, the better the living environment and the less energy is consumed. Each ascent is extremely difficult. We believed the tightly locked gate above, inscribed with 'Sukhavati' (Land of Ultimate Bliss), was the mortal world we desperately sought. One day, the closed door opened. I pushed with all my might and finally squeezed inside, only to realize I was terribly wrong...
solution: Hell as a whole is shaped like a vertical jellyfish, with different strata (simulating the eighteen layers of hell). The closer one gets to the 'jellyfish's' head, the better the living environment. We all hoped to enter the 'jellyfish's' head, believing it was the gate to the human world. There are two ways to ascend a stratum: one is for people in the same stratum to see the number on the back of each other's necks (one cannot see their own through any means); in this case, both parties consume very little energy, but everyone can enter the next stratum. The other way is to kill someone in the same stratum; the killer can then ascend and gain the energy of the deceased, while the deceased can only descend. Killing here doesn't cause true death; the deceased loses the energy they need to survive and will find it harder to survive in the harsh environment. In hell, it's difficult to turn your back to someone to let them see the number on your neck, as you don't know if they will kill you the next second. So I kept killing, finally earning the right to enter the 'jellyfish's' head. We all forgot one thing: the 'jellyfish's' head is still a 'jellyfish,' so even if the environment at the top of hell is good, it is still hell. Moving upwards only leads to eternal damnation in the Avīci Hell, while moving downwards is the only way to return to the human world.

zh.title: 人间
zh.condition: 我们是地狱的亡魂,存活全靠能量。大家希望能够回到人间,地狱层层向上,越往上生存环境越好,能量消耗的就少,每上一层都极为困难,我们认为头顶那一直紧锁的写着"极乐世界"的大门便是我们所苦苦追求的人间。有一天,紧闭的门开了,我拼尽全力终于挤进门内,却发现我错得离谱......
zh.solution: 地狱整体是垂直的水母形状,拥有不同的阶层(模拟地狱十八层),越靠近"水母"头部的生存环境就更好,我们都希望能进入"水母"的头部,认为那就是通往人间的大门。升阶层的方式有两种:一种是和同一阶层的人互相看到对方脖子后面的数字(自己无法通过任何手段看到),这个时候双方都会消耗极少的能量,但大家都能进入下一层;另一种就是把同一阶层的人杀掉,杀人者便可以晋升且获得死去者的能量,死去者只能下降,这里的杀人并不会造成真正的死亡,死去者会失去赖以生存的能量,在恶劣的环境中会更难生存。在地狱内背对别人让别人看自己脖子上的数字很难,毕竟你也不清楚对方下一秒会不会就把自己杀了,所以我不停的杀人,终于得到了进入水母头部的资格。我们都遗忘了一件事,"水母"的头部仍然是"水母",所以地狱的顶端哪怕环境再好也仍然是地狱,向上而行只能永坠无间地狱,而向下才能回到烟火人间。

key_facts: The structure of hell is jellyfish-shaped; moving upwards means entering deeper, harsher environments
There are two ways to gain promotion, one of which is killing
Killing does not cause true death, but it leads to the killed losing energy and falling downwards
I chose to kill to gain promotion
The 'Sukhavati' gate does not lead to the human world, but to a deeper cycle of hell

title: Moonlight
condition: 'The moonlight is beautiful tonight,' he said. 'Is this your first time seeing it from this angle?' He asked the person beside him, who never responded.
solution: Every autumn he camped with his girlfriend to admire the moon. This year she unexpectedly broke up with him. During the argument he accidentally killed her. While burying her body under moonlight illuminating her open, terrified eyes, he made those remarks.

zh.title: 月色
zh.condition: “今晚的月色真美。”他说,“你还是第一次从这个角度看月亮吧。”他问身边的人,却始终没有人回应他。
zh.solution: 他每年秋天都会跟女友去山上露营赏月,今年也没有例外,但唯--例外的是,女友居然向他提出了分手,他无法接受,争执中失手把女友杀了。为了掩盖罪行,他挖了个土坑把女友埋了进去,埋尸过程中,月光洒在女友因为惊恐还没来得及闭上的眼睛上,看着眼前的场景,他发出了那样的感慨。

key_facts: The person beside him was already dead
He had killed his lover
The 'angle' referred to the dead's perspective
No response because she was dead
He was disposing of her body

title: My Gratitude
condition: I slowly closed my eyes. This is how I will repay you...
solution: I am a little pig on a farm. Half a year ago, the farm caught fire, and firefighters arrived just in time to rescue me and my brothers. Now, as summer comes, the farm is planning to slaughter us to make sausages as a thank-you gift for the firefighters. I am repaying them with my life.

zh.title: 我的报恩
zh.condition: 缓缓闭上眼睛。就用这种方式报答你们吧......
zh.solution: 我是农场里的一只小猪,半年前农场着火了消防员及时赶到,把我和兄弟们救了出来。现在夏天到了,农场主要把我们宰了做成香肠,然后寄给消防员表示感谢,我也算用这种方式报答他们了。

key_facts: The narrator is actually a little pig
The firefighters saved the pigs half a year ago
The farm owner plans to slaughter the pigs for sausages
The little pig repays the rescuers with its life
The little pig’s life ends as it repays its saviors

title: Passport
condition: At the airport, I anxiously told my parents who came to see me off that I had forgotten my passport at home. My parents hurried home to get it. On the way, they received another call from me. Since then, my life has taken a completely different path.
solution: I originally had excellent grades and got the opportunity to study abroad. But I unexpectedly fell into the abyss of gambling and lost all the money my parents gave me for studying abroad. To prevent the matter from being exposed, I pretended at the airport that I hadn't brought my passport. After they went back, I called them again, saying I had found my passport and had already boarded the plane. In reality, I moved to another city and lived in a rented apartment, using the living expenses my mother sent me to fantasize about turning things around at the gambling table.

zh.title: 护照
zh.condition: 在机场,我焦急地告诉来送我的父母,我的护照忘在家里了。父母赶紧回家去拿,在路上,他们又接到了我的电话,自此,我的人生走上了完全不同的道路。
zh.solution: 我本来成绩优异,得到了出国留学的机会,可我却意外陷入了赌博的深渊,输光了父母给我用来留学的钱,为了让事情不败露,我在机场假装护照没拿,等他们回去后又给他们打电话,说我找到了护照,已经上飞机了,实际上,我换了个城市住在出租屋里,用母亲打来的生活费在赌桌上幻想着翻盘。

key_facts: 'Forgetting the passport' was a carefully planned lie.
I developed a bad habit of gambling.
I lost all the study abroad funds my parents gave me.
The content of the phone call was a lie: 'passport found and boarded the plane'.
I actually didn't go abroad but went to another city.
'Different life path' refers to a life of deceiving parents and continuing to gamble.

title: Me
condition: Mom died, I cried. Dad died, I smiled. Grandma died, I went crazy.
solution: Dad often abused Mom and me, and Mom often abused me. Only Grandma loved me in this family. I couldn't stand their abuse anymore and decided to fight back. One day, Dad was on a business trip, and I seized the opportunity to kill Mom. At the mourning hall, I pretended to cry sadly, but my heart was blooming with joy. Grandma knew Mom was dead and, remembering Dad's frequent abuse of Mom, thought Dad had killed Mom. In a fit of emotion at the mourning hall, she killed Dad. I smiled. The police were also present, and seeing Grandma kill Dad, they assumed Grandma had also killed Mom and executed her. I lost the only person in the world who loved me, and I went crazy.

zh.title: 我
zh.condition: 妈妈死了,我哭了。爸爸死了,我笑了。外婆死了,我疯了。
zh.solution: 爸爸经常家暴妈妈和我,而妈妈经常家暴我,这个家只有外婆是爱我的。我实在受不了他们的家暴了,准备奋起反抗。一天爸爸出差,我抓住了机会杀了妈妈。灵堂上我假装哭的很伤心,心里却乐开了花。外婆知道妈妈死了,想到爸爸经常家暴妈妈,以为是爸爸杀的妈妈,在灵堂上一时情绪失控,杀了爸爸,我笑了。正好警察也在场,看见外婆杀了爸爸以为妈妈也是外婆杀的,便给外婆执行了死刑。我失去了世上唯一爱我的人,疯了。

key_facts: I killed my mother due to domestic abuse
Grandma misunderstood and killed father to avenge mother
My emotional reactions to death are based on affection and hatred
Grandma was mistakenly judged a serial killer and executed
Losing the only caregiver led to the narrator's mental breakdown

title: Dinner
condition: After dinner, a husband whispered in his wife's ear, 'I love you,' and finally, the woman died.
solution: The wife was blind, and her real husband was mute. She couldn't see what her current husband looked like, but she knew her husband was mute. When she heard the man say 'I love you,' she knew this person was not her husband. The man also realized she had discovered the truth, so he killed her.

zh.title: 晚饭
zh.condition: 一对夫妻晚饭后,男人在女人耳边说了一句,我爱你,最后女人死了。
zh.solution: 妻子是盲人,她真正的丈夫是哑巴,她看不到现在丈夫的模样,但她只知道自己的丈夫是哑巴,当她听到那个男人说到我爱你的时候,她就知道此人不是她丈夫了,男子也察觉到她发现了真相,于是杀了她。

key_facts: The wife had a sensory impairment (blind).
The real husband had a communication impairment (mute).
The 'husband's' act of speaking exposed his identity.
The woman's death was related to the truth she perceived.
The man who spoke was not the real husband (an impostor/danger existed).

title: Silence
condition: By the lake, A said something to another person and turned to leave, brushing past B who had rushed over with a warm greeting. The other person didn't turn back either. Years later, at a hearing, A remained silent in the face of accusations.
solution: By the tranquil lake, A whispered to the person beside him that he had joined and was leading the nation's dangerous weapons research program. The person fell silent, not wanting the world to be threatened by such weapons. Just then, B rushed over with a warm greeting but was brushed past by A. A didn't stop, and even his companion didn't look back. They were preoccupied with something far more important than B's greeting—the survival of humanity. B's enthusiasm was met with cold indifference, and he felt slighted, planting the seeds of their future feud. Years later, at a hearing, facing sharp accusations led by B, A chose to remain silent. He believed he had plunged the world into a crisis of destruction and hoped for humanity to punish him as a form of atonement.

zh.title: 沉默
zh.condition: 湖边,A对另一个人说了什么便转身离开,与匆匆赶来热情问候的B擦肩而过,另一个人也未曾回头。多年后的听证会上,A面对指责只是保持着沉默。
zh.solution: 宁静的湖边,A向身旁之人低语,自己已经参与并主导了国家危险武器研究计划,身旁之人陷入了沉默,他不希望世界处于危险武器的威胁下。彼时,B带着热切的问候匆匆赶来,却与A擦肩而过。A丝毫没有停留,甚至连与他同行的那个人也未曾回头,因为他们心里在思考着比回应B更重要的事——人类的存亡,根本无暇顾及B的热情。B的热情如同撞上冰冷的空气,他感受到了轻视,这为两人日后的宿怨埋下了伏笔。多年后的听证会上,面对以B为首尖锐的指责,A却选择了沉默,他认为自己让世界陷入了毁灭的危机,希望人类对自己进行惩罚来赎罪。

key_facts: The protagonist is a famous scientist.
There is a personal feud between A and B.
A was preoccupied with a critical issue at the time.
The hearing is related to nuclear weapons.
A's silence is a form of penance.

condition: One night, a group of boys from the male dormitory appeared in an abandoned building, but they all collapsed in shock. Please reason why.
solution: The boys went to the abandoned building that night to count the number of stairs, testing the internet rumor that you miss one step when counting stairs at night. However, when they got to the abandoned building, they discovered there were no stairs at all.

The rumor involved counting stairs at night
The purpose of their trip was related to stairs

title: Fish Tank Tragedy

title: The Past
condition: I broke free from the iron coffin. He gave me light, and I saw the past.
solution: My tank was disabled. I saw an enemy throw a grenade in from the top hatch. I scrambled to open the escape hatch at the bottom and got out, trembling on the cold ground. Soon, a beam of light shone on me. I looked up to see a young enemy soldier crouching in front of the tank, pointing a flashlight at me. He looked at me, then glanced back at his own troops behind him, and chose to turn and leave, sparing my life. Looking at the boy, I felt as if I was seeing myself when I first enlisted, my conscience not yet erased by war.

zh.title: 过往
zh.condition: 我挣脱了铁棺,他给予了光,我望见了过往。
zh.solution: 我的坦克被瘫痪了。我看见一颗手榴弹被敌人从坦克顶部扔了进来,慌忙打开坦克底部的逃生舱门钻了出去,趴在冰冷的地上不住地颤抖。不久后,一束光照在了我身上,我抬头看到一个年轻的敌方士兵在坦克前方蹲着用手电筒照着自己。他看了看我,又回头望了望自己身后的大部队,选择了转身离开,留了一条活路。我看着男孩,好像看到了自己当初入伍时还未被战争抹杀良知的模样。

key_facts: The 'iron coffin' is not a real coffin.
He' is on the opposing side.
The 'light' also refers to the light of humanity.
The 'past' is a reflection of myself.
The story takes place in a war setting.
My survival was not due to my own strength.

title: Wallet
condition: On a scorching summer day, I was resting on a park bench while walking my dog. Soon after sitting down, I immediately got up and left. Not long after, I saw a black wallet on the ground. Cold sweat immediately broke out; I knew I couldn't escape death.
solution: While walking my dog, I witnessed a murder. I wanted to cooperate with my dog to pretend I was blind, but I instinctively looked down at the wallet on the ground. The killer had been following me all along and, realizing I saw the wallet, knew I wasn't blind, so I was doomed to die.

zh.title: 钱包
zh.condition: 一个炎炎夏日,遛狗中的我坐在公园的长椅上休息。刚坐下不久,我便立刻起身走了。没过多久,我看到地上有个黑色的钱包。我冷汗立刻出来了,心知难逃一死。
zh.solution: 我在遛狗时目睹了一场凶案,我想和我的狗配合伪装我是个瞎子,但是我下意识的低头看了地上的钱包,凶手其实一直跟着我,发现了我看了钱包,明白我不是瞎子,所以我必死。

key_facts: I witnessed a murder
I hoped to use my dog to pretend to be blind for safety
The unconscious act of looking down at the wallet revealed the truth
I was recognized by the killer
I was silenced/killed to cover up the crime

title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
condition: Rock, paper, scissors. Yes, that's the order. After teaching me these, my father passed away.
solution: My family are all murderers. Before my father died, he taught me how to kill and dispose of a body: knock them out with a stone, dismember them with scissors, and wrap them in cloth to dispose of the body. My father also wished that I would be the one to do this to him, to complete it all, as a final lesson, to inherit the family's bloodline.

zh.title: 猜拳
zh.condition: 石头,剪刀,布。没错,就是这个顺序,教完我这些,我的父亲就去世了。
zh.solution: 我的家族都是杀人犯,父亲临终前教我,如何杀人抛尸,用石头敲晕、剪刀分尸、裹布抛尸。父亲也希望他最后是由我来对他,完成这一切,当成最后一课,继承家族的血脉。

key_facts: 'Rock, paper, scissors' is not a game, but represents a specific process.
This process was taught to 'me' (the narrator) by the father.
The family has a special, illegal 'profession' or tradition (killers).
The teaching content was how to dispose of a body (stone = knock out, scissors = dismember, cloth = dispose of body).
The father's death is related to this teaching process (he wanted 'me' to practice on him).

title: Exam
condition: That voice appeared again... I desperately held my head, waiting for that moment to arrive.
solution: During the exam, a recently popular brainwashing song kept replaying in my mind, causing me to be unable to do any questions. The exam was about to end, and I held my head in utter despair.

zh.title: 考试
zh.condition: 那个声音又出现了...我绝望地抱住头,等着那个时刻的到来。
zh.solution: 考试时,我的脑海中不断回响着最近流行的洗脑歌曲,导致我什么题都做不下去。考试快结束了,我十分绝望地抱住了自己的头。

title: Death Anniversary Tragedy
condition: On my son's death anniversary, I killed three mourners.
solution: Before dying, my son donated three organs. At his memorial, I saw recipients abusing their gifts - tattoos covering donated skin, a chain-smoker with his lungs, and a drinker with his liver. Enraged, I killed them all.

zh.title: 祭日悲剧
zh.condition: 在儿子去世一周年的祭日上,我杀死了三个来悼念他的人。
zh.solution: 儿子生病去世,他在临终前告诉我,把他的器官捐献给有需要的人,这样他就能以另一种方式继续活在世界上。我同意了。最后儿子身上有三个器官分别捐献给了三个不同的人。在儿子的祭日上,我认出了他们,接受皮肤捐赠的男人,居然满身都是纹身;接受肺部捐赠的小 伙,不停地在那哪吸烟;而接受肝捐赠的居然打电话约朋友晚上出去喝酒。我儿子把生的机会留给他们,但他们竟然这样继续糟践自己。我深深为儿子感到不甘,愤怒不已的我杀了他们三个。

key_facts: Son died and donated organs
Victims were organ recipients
Crime occurred on death anniversary
Recipients' lifestyles angered father

title: Karma
condition: At the age of 9, I was playing basketball with Xiao Zhuo when suddenly hail began to fall. He was upset. That night, Xiao Zhuo played with his dog but was still upset. At the age of 16, my parents were very sad. I shouldn’t have treated my son this way. I comforted them. At the age of 23, I sent my parents many flowers so they wouldn’t feel too lonely. At 25, hail fell again, just like it did in my memories.
solution: At the age of 9, I broke someone’s window, and the shards of glass scattered everywhere like hail. The owner came to demand compensation, and since my family was poor, I asked Xiao Zhuo to take the blame for me, and his father helped pay the money. However, Xiao Zhuo’s family was very strict, and they immediately kicked him out of the house, saying they couldn’t tolerate a son like him. After being kicked out, Xiao Zhuo wanted to come sleep at my house. But on his way, the road was dark and isolated, and he was attacked by hungry wild dogs, which led to his tragic death. At 16, I couldn’t bear the inner turmoil, so I went to visit his parents and explained everything to them. I found that for years, they had been living with guilt and regret. To ease their guilt, I began regularly visiting them on behalf of Xiao Zhuo. At 23, I started working, and Xiao Zhuo’s parents said, 'You’ve been busy with work lately. You don’t need to visit us so often.' I understood what they meant, so I decided to send them flowers often to help alleviate their sadness. At 25, as I was buying flowers for them, I suddenly heard the sound of a car crashing, followed by the shattering of car windows. The cars on the road had crashed, and one of them hit me. The person at fault avoided responsibility, delaying the police investigation. Due to lack of funds for medical treatment, I could not get surgery in time, leaving me permanently disabled.

zh.title: 因果
zh.condition: 9岁那年,我和小卓玩打篮球,突然天上下冰雹了,他很不开心;晚上,小卓和小狗一起玩,他也不开心。16岁那年,爸妈很伤心,我不该这样对儿子的。我安慰他们。23岁,我送给父母很多鲜花,这样子他们就不会太孤单了。25岁,又下冰雹了,和记忆里的一样。
zh.solution: 9岁那年,我打破了别人家的玻璃,玻璃碎片就像冰雹似地到处飞溅。主人家来问责,我家经济条件不好,于是我请求小卓帮我承担了罪责,他的爸爸帮他赔了钱。但是他家家教很严,父母更是眼里容不下半点沙子,所以很严厉地将他赶出了家门,说我家没有你这样不乖的儿子。被赶出家门后他原来想来找我一起睡一晚。但是我家附近的路没有路灯,加上比较偏僻,他在来我家的路上遇到了饥饿的野狗不幸死了。16岁,我受不了内心的煎熬,去看望他的父母,并且将事情的原委坦白给了他的父母。发现多年来,他的父母多年来也一直都活在内疚与悔恨当中。为了缓解对小卓的愧疚,我经常代替小卓去看望他们。23岁,我开始工作了,小卓父母说“你最近工作忙多了,就不用经常来看望我们了”。我想他们说的有道理,以后很少能有时间可以去看望他们了,所以经常会购买很多鲜花送到小卓家里,希望这些植物能帮他们疏解情绪。25岁,我又一次赶往小卓家,正在花店买花的空隙,突然耳边传来车辆的剧烈的撞击声,车窗玻璃碎裂。路上的车因快速行驶发生车祸,不慎撞到了路边的我。肇事方推搡责任归属,一直拖延警察工作的进展,我又因缺乏足够的医药费没能得到及时手术治疗使得双腿落下了终生残疾。

key_facts: The cycle of karma and guilt
Inability to change fate
The psychology of self-blame and atonement
The pain and irremediable regret
Coincidences and tragedies in life

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Performance
condition: A boy greatly admired his father. One day, he killed his mother and said something to his father. After hearing it, the father committed suicide.
solution: The boy's father was a magician who often performed a trick where he would cut a person's body and then magically put it back together. The boy believed it was real. One day, when his father was not home, he tried this trick on his mother. Of course, the boy didn't know magic and actually cut his mother into pieces. When his father returned, the boy asked him to put his mother back together. Unable to face the gruesome scene and his son's innocent demeanor, the father, in despair and collapse, committed suicide.

zh.title: 表演
zh.condition: 男孩十分崇拜他的父亲,有一天他将妈妈杀了并对爸爸说了一句话,爸爸听后便自杀了。
zh.solution: 男孩的爸爸是个魔术师,经常表演用刀切开人体后又如没事般接回来的魔术,男孩信以为真。一天爸爸不在家他便尝试用妈妈来尝试这项魔术,男孩不会表演魔术当然就真的将妈妈的身体切成块了,等到爸爸回来男孩就叫爸爸把妈妈再变回来。爸爸看不了眼前的场景和儿子若无其事的样子,终于在绝望和崩溃中自杀了。

key_facts: The boy's father is a magician.
The father performed a magic trick involving cutting a person.
The boy mistakenly believed his father's magic was real.
The boy tried to imitate his father's magic trick.
The boy used the 'magic trick' on his mother.
The boy asked his father to restore his mother.
The father committed suicide due to the horrific reality and his son's ignorance.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Seamstress
condition: The queen looked at the maid who was pleading for herself with majesty. In the end, she softened and gave her the most inconspicuous dress in the palace. But the next day, the queen died.
solution: The one pleading was the queen's personal maid. The dress was one the queen had ordered a long time ago, and it was a cursed dress. The queen, while punishing the maid, did not want to break her white lotus image, so she gave the maid that cursed dress. However, the maid knew the queen had not let her off because that cursed dress was one she had personally made. In order to earn extra income, the maid secretly opened a tailor shop outside the palace where people came to obtain the power of the curse. The maid, deeply disappointed by the queen's heartlessness, used her own magic to make the queen fall ill and die.

zh.title: 裁缝
zh.condition: 皇后威严地望着正在为自己求情的女仆,她终究是心软了,将宫殿中最不起眼的裙子赐给她。但是第二天皇后却死了。
zh.solution: 正在求情的是皇后的贴身女仆,那件裙子是皇后很久以前就定做的了,那是一件带有诅咒的裙子。皇后在惩罚女仆的过程中不想打破自己表面的白莲花的印象,就将那件带有诅咒的裙子送给了女仆。但是女仆很清楚皇后并没有放过自己,因为那件带有诅咒的裙子正是自己亲手制作的。女仆为了赚取额外的收入在皇宫外秘密开设了一间裁缝店,想要获得诅咒力量的人都会到那里去。女仆对皇后的狠心感到十分失望,于是便通过自己的咒术令皇后患病死了。

key_facts: The queen gave the maid the cursed dress
The maid opened a cursed tailor shop
The maid used magic to make the queen die
The queen did not want to break her white lotus image
The cursed dress ended the queen

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Mother
condition: She raised me single-handedly, yet I caused her death, even though I wasn't there at the time.
solution: Mother lost a hand in a work accident, and Father also abandoned us. When I grew up and earned money, I got Mother a prosthetic limb. With a glove on, Mother looked no different from a normal person. I took Mother mountain climbing. I was afraid she would get tired, so I let her take the cable car. I went up another path myself. The cable car malfunctioned, and Mother lost her balance and fell. Originally, the person with her could have saved her, but he grabbed her prosthetic limb, so the prosthesis quickly detached from her body, and Mother fell. If I hadn't given Mother the prosthetic limb, the person with her would have grabbed her other hand. So I feel like I caused Mother's death.

zh.title: 母亲
zh.condition: 她一手将我带大,我却害死了她,尽管当时我并不在场。
zh.solution: 母亲在一次工作中失去了一只手,父亲也抛下我们跑了。我长大挣了钱,就给母亲配了一截义肢,再加上戴了手套,所以母亲看上去跟正常人没有区别。我带母亲去爬山,我怕她累,所以让她坐缆车。我自己是从另一条路走上去的。缆车发生了故障,母亲重心不稳掉下去了。本来,她身边同行的人可以救她,但他抓到的是她的义肢,所以义肢很快脱离本体,母亲才会掉下去。如果不给母亲佩戴义肢,她同行的人就会去抓她另一只手了。所以我觉得是我害死了母亲。

key_facts: The phrase 'raised me single-handedly' has a literal meaning in addition to its figurative one.
The mother had a physical disability (lost a hand).
The narrator once provided the mother with an item to compensate for her physical defect (a prosthetic limb).
The mother died in an accidental fall.
The item provided by the narrator, at the time of the accident, actually hindered effective rescue.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Bedside Whisper
condition: 'Your delivery is here.' 'Okay.' After the door closed, the man closed his eyes in terror. A moment later, he fainted from fear. Please deduce.
solution: The man lived alone. One night, feeling hungry, he ordered takeout but fell asleep while waiting. In the middle of the night, he was awakened by the delivery person knocking. As he was about to get out of bed, he heard someone at his door and then the sound of the door closing. The man instantly realized someone else was in his house and closed his eyes, pretending to be asleep. But a moment later, he heard someone whisper in his ear: 'I know you're not asleep.'

zh.title: 床边耳语
zh.condition: "你的外卖到了" "好的" 门关上后,男子惊恐地闭上了眼睛。不久后他却害怕的吓晕了过去,请推理。
zh.solution: 男子独自生活,某天深夜因为饿,点了外卖,但是等着就睡着了。半夜,男子被外卖敲门声吵醒,准备下床时,听见了有人在门口的声音,并且关上了门。男子瞬间意识到家里有别人在,于是害怕地闭上了眼睛装睡。但是不久后他却听见有人在耳边对他说:"我知道你没睡。"

key_facts: The man lives alone.
The man ordered takeout and fell asleep.
He was awakened by a knock on the door.
He heard the sound of a door closing.
The closing door sound came from inside the house.
The man realized a stranger had entered his home.
He closed his eyes and pretended to be asleep out of fear.
Someone whispered in his ear.
The person speaking knew he was awake.
The person speaking was right beside his bed.
The man eventually fainted from fear.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Extra Breakfast Setting
condition: This morning, as usual, I set the table, but there was an extra place setting. The empty chair was also pulled back slightly.
solution: My partner died of a sudden heart attack not long ago while having breakfast with me. The immense grief and long-formed habit unconsciously led me to set two place settings as I used to. When I snapped out of this unconscious action, I was startled by what I had done, as if someone had just been there. The pulled-back chair was unconsciously pulled back by me, preparing for my partner to sit down.

zh.title: 多出的早餐位
zh.condition: 今早,我像往常一样摆好了餐具,餐桌上却多了一副餐具,那张空着的椅子,还被稍稍往后拉开了一些。
zh.solution: 我的伴侣不久前在和我吃早饭时突发心脏病去世了。巨大的悲痛和长久形成的习惯,让我不自觉地像过去一样摆放了两个人的餐具。当我从这个无意识的动作回过神来时,才惊觉自己做了什么,仿佛是有人刚刚在这里存在过一样。拉开的椅子,是我自己无意识拉开准备让伴侣入座。

key_facts: My partner has passed away
The extra place setting on the table is my unconscious habitual behavior
The empty chair being pulled back is my subconscious action of preparing for my deceased partner to sit
I only realized my partner was gone after setting the table
The story uses daily behavior to show my grief and habitual longing after losing a loved one

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Cure
condition: He decided to pay for his financially struggling mother's medical treatment, but she adamantly refused.
solution: His mother, who had gone bankrupt, suffered from kidney failure and needed a kidney transplant. He decided to donate one of his own kidneys to her. When his mother found out, she adamantly refused the offer because, unbeknownst to him, one of his kidneys had been sold by his mother when he was a child to cover her business debts.

zh.title: 治病
zh.condition: 他决定给经济拮据的母亲治病,却被母亲强硬地拒绝了。
zh.solution: 生意破产的母亲患了肾衰竭,需要有人捐献肾脏。他决定给母亲移植自己的肾。母亲知道后,强硬地拒绝了这个提议,因为他不知道的是,自己的一个肾,早在小的时候,就被因为做生意而缺钱的母亲卖掉了。

key_facts: The mother suffers from kidney failure.
The treatment requires a kidney transplant.
The son offered to donate his own kidney.
The mother refused because of the son's special physical condition.
The son actually only has one kidney.
The son lost a kidney when he was a child.
The mother had sold her son's kidney in the past.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Note
condition: A girl returned home to find her mother dead, her father haggard. In a pool of blood nearby were several torn pieces of paper. The girl then discovered the torn note, which read: "Daughter, quick, leave, Dad, crazy!!"
solution: The daughter had mental problems; she killed her mother. The note was written by the mother, but it was torn, so the words were jumbled. The real reading was "Dad, quick, leave, daughter is crazy."

zh.title: 纸条
zh.condition: 一个女孩回到家,发现她的妈妈死了,爸爸很憔悴,旁边血泊中有几张撕碎的纸条,然后女孩发现撕碎的纸条,上面写着"女儿,快走,爸爸,疯了!!"
zh.solution: 女儿有精神问题,是她杀了妈妈。字条是妈妈写的,但是被撕碎了,所以字被打乱了顺序。真正的念法是"爸爸快走,女儿疯了"。

key_facts: The daughter is the murderer of the mother
The note fragments were disordered, leading to misinterpretation
The note was a warning from the mother to the father
The daughter suffers from a mental illness
The father is haggard from witnessing the tragedy

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: He Pushed Open the Door
condition: He touched the rough edge of the wall, gently pushed open the door. Voices of reluctance and pleading came from behind, but he did not look back.
solution: The world he lived in was a giant, domed television studio. Everything he had ever experienced was part of a meticulously crafted script. The show's production team had arranged countless actors and props to construct his entire life. However, he eventually saw through the massive deception and reached the edge of his 'world.' Behind that door lay freedom and the unknown—a truly vibrant life. The show's creator desperately tried to keep him, his voice filled with a hint of despair, attempting to bind him with the old 'stability.' But his longing for the real world had already crushed this false warmth. He knew that compared to a manipulated life, the world behind that door, however challenging, was far more worth striving for.

zh.title: 推开了门
zh.condition: 他摸着粗糙的墙壁边缘,轻轻推开了门,身后传来不舍和挽留的声音,但他没有回头。
zh.solution: 他所处的世界其是一个巨大的圆顶摄影棚,他所经历的一切不过是精心编排的剧本。节目制作团队为了维持这份虚假的“真实”,安排了无数演员和道具,构建起他生活的全部。然而,他最终识破了这巨大的谎言,抵达了“世界”的边缘,那扇门后是自由与未知,是真正鲜活的人生。节目主持人竭力挽留,他们的声音带着一丝绝望,试图用旧有的“安稳”束缚他,但他内心对真实世界的渴望,早已将这虚假的温情碾碎。他知道,比起被操控的人生,那道门后的世界,哪怕充满挑战,也远比这里值得他奔赴。

key_facts: The world he lives in is fake.
The 'door' is the boundary of his world.
His life is a reality TV show.
The people behind him are all actors.
He is escaping this fake world.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Funeral
condition: When I was six, my dad took me back to the countryside for my great-grandfather's funeral. During the cremation, I said something that caused everyone to collapse.
solution: When I was six, my great-grandfather passed away. We returned home, and everyone was grieving. I also saw my little brother, and we played hide and seek. As the funeral started, before I could find my brother, my dad pulled me to the grave, and everyone was crying. I suddenly saw my brother dancing in the fire and shouted, 'My brother is dancing in the fire!' Everyone collapsed in horror.

zh.title: 葬礼
zh.condition: 6岁那年,爸爸带我回乡下参加太爷爷的葬礼,火葬时我说了一句话,大家崩溃了。
zh.solution: 6岁那年,太爷爷去世了,我们回到老家,大家都很伤心。不过,我也见到我的小伙伴,我们在玩捉迷藏。葬礼开始,我还没来得及找我弟弟,就被爸爸拉到坟前,大家哭成一片。我突然看见弟弟在火里跳舞,就喊了一下弟弟在火里跳舞,大家崩溃了。

key_facts: The funeral was a cremation ceremony
The child’s words caused a breakdown
The child's words were about her brother
Her brother appeared in the fire during the cremation
The brother's situation was abnormal

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Vortex of Righteousness
condition: Today I saw a painting that exuded danger and conflict. I couldn't help but add a few strokes. Sure enough, the conflict disappeared, and what remained was danger lurking in the tranquility. The painting was perfect.
solution: As I was about to go home, I walked under the bridge and saw a drunkard taking out his frustration on my friend A, who was also a scavenger. The conflict reached its peak, with anger overcoming reason. I pulled out a small knife and slashed the drunkard's neck. Blood sprayed, and in an instant, there was only the sound of liquid flowing. To me, the safety of my best friend was the most important thing.

zh.title: 仗义漩涡
zh.condition: 我今天见到了一幅画,画面中透露着危险与冲突。我不禁上前点缀了几笔。果然,冲突不见了,有的是静谧中暗藏的危险。这幅画堪称完美。
zh.solution: 正打算回家的我走到桥下,见到不如意的醉汉正拿我同为拾荒者的朋友A出气,冲突达到顶峰,怒火战胜了理智,我抽出小刀在醉汉脖子上抹了一刀,鲜血喷洒,霎时间,又只剩下了液体流动的声音。对我来说,只有最好的朋友安全才是最好的画面。

key_facts: The drunkard threatened friend A
The conflict escalated to violence
I took action for my friend
Blood sprayed, and the scene became quiet
Protecting my friend was the most important

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Knock at Midnight
condition: A person lived in a small cabin on a mountaintop. In the middle of the night, he heard a knock on the door, but when he opened it, no one was there, so he went back to sleep. The next day, a dead body was found at the foot of the mountain, and the police came and took the person from the mountaintop away.
solution: The cabin on the mountaintop was right at the edge of a cliff. The person below had just managed to climb up and was knocking on the door for help. When the door was opened, he was pushed off the cliff again.

zh.title: 夜半敲门
zh.condition: 一个人住在山顶的小屋里,半夜听见有敲窗户的声音,但是他打开窗却没有人,于是去睡了。第二天,有人在山脚下发现死尸一具,警察来把山顶的那人带走了。
zh.solution: 山顶的小屋的窗外是悬崖,悬崖下的人好不容易才爬上来,想要敲窗求救。一开窗,就又被推了下去。

key_facts: The cabin is built on the edge of a cliff.
The area just outside the cabin door is a cliff.
The person knocking had climbed up from the bottom of the cliff.
The knocker was seeking help.
The person who opened the door saw no one.
The act of opening the door caused the knocker to fall.
The body at the foot of the mountain was the person who had knocked.
This was an accidental death caused by opening the door.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Fingerprint
condition:
Beep! Fingerprint verification failed.
Beep! Fingerprint verification failed.
After 9 tries
Click! Fingerprint verification successful. So I am not far from death.
solution:
It was already midnight and my husband hadn't returned. At 1 AM, a sound from outside the door woke me up.
'Beep! Fingerprint verification failed.' I realized someone was outside trying to open the fingerprint lock.
Click! Fingerprint verification successful. I guessed my husband had already been killed, his fingers all cut off, and they were trying to open the lock finger by finger. The door opened, and I was doomed.

zh.title: 指纹
zh.condition:
滴!指纹验证失败
滴!指纹验证失败
9次之后
嗒!指纹验证成功。所以我离死不远了
zh.solution:
都已经半夜了老公还是没有回来,凌晨1点门外的声音吵醒了我
"滴!指纹验证失败"我意识到有人在门外尝试打开指纹锁。
嗒!指纹验证成功,我猜到老公已经被人杀了,手指被全部割下,正在一根一根地尝试开锁,门开了我在劫难逃了。

key_facts: The husband had not returned late at night and had already been murdered.
The object of the fingerprint verification was 'my' (the narrator's) house door.
The person outside the door was the husband's murderer.
After trying many fingers, the door was finally opened.
The person opening the lock used the husband's fingers.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Last Stab
condition: One stab, two stabs, three stabs... I plunged the last stab into his body, and his life ended.
solution: Once there was a warm family. I was the servant of that family, silently guarding everything they had. That day, tragedy struck. The employer's only son was kidnapped and brutally murdered. The employer couple, upon hearing the devastating news, were heartbroken and eventually passed away one after another. However, the murderer remained at large, and no one could find his trace. For many years, I could not find peace in my heart. I, along with those who had received kindness from my employer, coincidentally embarked on the path of revenge. We finally found that cold-blooded killer. We gave him no chance to explain, nor did we choose to forgive him. To give everyone a chance to take revenge personally, and also to protect ourselves from murder charges, we decided that each person would stab him once to end his life. With years of anger and determination, I plunged the last stab into his body. I don't know if I was the one who ended his life, but this endless pursuit was over.

zh.title: 最后一刀
zh.condition: 一刀、两刀、三刀......我将最后一刀刺入他的身体,他的生命结束了。
zh.solution: 曾经有一个温暖的家庭,我是那个家庭的仆人,默默守护着他们的一切。那一天,悲剧降临,雇主的独生子被绑架并残忍杀害,雇主夫妻在得知噩耗后伤心欲绝,最终也相继离世。然而,凶手却依然逍遥法外,没有人能找到他的踪迹。多年来,我心中一直未能释怀。我与那些曾受到雇主恩惠的人们,不约而同地踏上了复仇的道路。我们终于找到了那个冷血的杀手。我们没有给他任何机会来辩解,也没有选择宽恕他。为了给每个人亲手复仇的机会,也为了让我们免受谋杀的指控,我们决定每人一刀结束他的生命。我带着多年的愤怒与决绝将最后一刀刺入了他的身体,我不知道是不是我结束了他的生命,但这场无尽的追寻结束了。

key_facts: This was a collective revenge action involving multiple people.
The deceased was the murderer who killed my former employer's son many years ago.
My former employer's entire family indirectly died because of this murderer.
The method of attack was for each avenger to stab only once.
'My' (the narrator's) identity is the former employer's family servant.
Part of the purpose of this act was to distribute blame, so the forensic examiner could not determine who inflicted the fatal wound.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Aviation Enthusiast
condition: He was just an aviation enthusiast, but one of his flights led to the downfall of many high-ranking officials.
solution: In an era of intense conflict between nations, an aviation enthusiast from Country B, hoping to prove that friendship could exist between countries and ease tensions, flew a light sports aircraft and landed it in the main square of Country A's capital, in full public view. In reality, Country A's multi-layered air defense network had long noticed the small plane, but each level assumed another would shoot it down, unwilling to take responsibility. In the aftermath, numerous high-ranking military and political officials in Country A were dismissed, triggering a profound crisis of confidence within the leadership.

zh.title: 飞行爱好者
zh.condition: 他只是一名飞行爱好者,但他的一次飞行却导致很多高层下台。
zh.solution: 在那个国家之间矛盾激烈的年代,一位来自国家B的飞行爱好者,为了证明国家之间存在友谊、缓和国家之间的紧张局势,驾驶着一架轻型运动飞机在万众瞩目中降落在国家A首都广场上。其实国家A的几层防空网早已注意到了这架奇怪的小飞机,但谁都觉得别人会将其击落,自己不愿意承担责任。事发后,国家A多名军政高层因此被解职,高层内部产生了一场深刻的信任危机。

key_facts: His flight was unauthorized.
He landed in an unexpected place.
His actions had political consequences.
The story takes place during the Cold War.
His motive for flying was peace.
The officials were dismissed for dereliction of duty.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Bride's Sister
condition: At the wedding, the mother-in-law said something to the groom, and he immediately broke down and called off the wedding. What did she say?
solution: The bride had claimed to have a twin sister. In reality, the bride has multiple personality disorder. The main personality is irritable, while the other is gentle. The groom was in love with the gentle personality. The mother-in-law said to the groom, 'I only have one precious daughter, you must treat her well.' The groom then realized the bride had dissociative identity disorder.

zh.title: 新娘的姐姐
zh.condition: 结婚时丈母娘告诉女婿一句话后,女婿立马崩溃说不结了。请问说了什么?
zh.solution: 新娘说自己有个双胞胎姐姐,其实新娘有双重人格,主人格是暴躁,另一个则是乖巧,但是新郎一直喜欢的是乖巧人格。丈母娘对女婿说的是"我就一个宝贝女儿,你一定要好好对她。" 新郎才意识到新娘是人格分裂。

key_facts: The bride does not have a twin sister.
The bride has two personalities.
The mother-in-law only mentioned one daughter.
The mother-in-law's words are the key piece of information.
The groom loves the other side of the bride.
The bride's mental state is unusual.
The number of daughters does not match the groom's understanding.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Restroom
condition: A woman went to the restroom. Inside, she saw 'Don't look left' written on the stall door. She looked left and saw 'Don't look down' written on the wall. She looked down and saw 'Don't look behind you, there's a ghost' written on the floor. She looked behind her and saw nothing. After using the toilet, she went to wash her hands and suddenly felt a chill down her spine. Please deduce.
solution: The woman suddenly realized that 'Don't look behind you, there's a ghost' written on the floor didn't refer to what was behind her, but what was above her head.

zh.title: 厕所
zh.condition: 女子上厕所,进去以后看见厕所门上写了句"不要往左看",她就往左看了,看见左边墙上写"不要往下看",她又往下看,地上写着"不要往后看,后面有鬼",她又往后看,发现什么都没有。她上完厕所就去洗手,洗着洗着突然毛骨悚然,请推理。
zh.solution: 女子突然意识到地板上所写的"不要往后看,后面有鬼"对应的不是女子的背后,而是头顶上面。

key_facts: The writing in the restroom was intentionally misleading about direction.
The position of the phrase 'there's a ghost behind you' is crucial.
This phrase was written on the floor of the stall.
'Behind' did not refer to her back.
The real danger was above her head.
The woman only figured out the location of the danger while washing her hands.
There was indeed a 'ghost' in the restroom stall.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Wedding
condition: On the eldest's wedding day, the second eldest was taken away by the police. The wedding was also canceled. Why?
solution: Three siblings depended on each other. The eldest and the second eldest were twins, and the third was the younger sister. The second eldest liked the eldest's girlfriend, so he poisoned the eldest, took over his identity, dated her, and told the younger sister that the second eldest had died accidentally. However, the eldest was left-handed and the second eldest was right-handed. The younger sister discovered this and realized that the current 'eldest' was actually the second eldest, so she called the police at the wedding and had him arrested.

zh.title: 婚礼
zh.condition: 老大结婚当天老二却被警察抓走了。婚礼也跟着取消了。为什么?
zh.solution: 兄妹三人相依为命。老大和老二是双胞胎,老三是小妹,老二喜欢老大的女朋友便把老大毒死了,顶替了老大的身份与其交往告诉小妹老二意外身亡。但是老大是左撇子老二是右撇子,被小妹发现明白此时的老大其实是老二,于是在婚礼上报警抓走。

key_facts: The eldest and the second eldest are twins.
The second eldest murdered the eldest and impersonated him.
The second eldest's motive for impersonating the eldest was related to the eldest's girlfriend.
There was a key distinguishing feature between the eldest and the second eldest.
Someone discovered the truth and called the police on the wedding day.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Funeral
condition: Two sisters attended their mother's funeral where the younger met a handsome man. After he disappeared, she killed her sister a month later.
solution: Believing funerals were the only place to see him again, she created another funeral by killing her sister.

zh.title: 葬礼
zh.condition: 有母女三人,母亲死了,姐妹俩去参加葬礼,妹妹在葬礼上遇见了一个很帅的男子,并对他一见倾心。但是葬礼后那个男子就不见了,妹妹怎么找也找不到他。后来过了一个月,妹妹把姐姐杀了。
zh.solution: 妹妹认为,只有在葬礼上才能见到那个男子,所以她杀了姐姐,期待在姐姐的葬礼上能再次见到他。

key_facts: The man only appeared at funerals
Younger sister wanted to see him again
Funerals were their meeting place
Sister's death aimed to recreate meeting
She created a funeral to see him

title: Blind Disaster
condition: That day, a disaster struck, and I, along with everyone on Earth, became blind. Two years later, I suddenly regained my sight. Just as I was about to tell everyone, I saw that phrase. I clamped my mouth shut.
solution: This disaster changed everything. In this world of blindness, the blind became the so-called 'normal people.' They formed a new government and secret organizations, secretly hunting down those who could see and using them for experiments. Over the next two years, some regained their sight, but under the new government’s rule, anyone who claimed to see was immediately captured.

zh.title: 盲灾
zh.condition: 那一天,灾难发生了,我和地球上所有人一起变成了盲人。两年后,我突然恢复了视力。正当我打算把这个消息告诉大家时,我看到了那句话。我死死的捂住了嘴巴。
zh.solution: 这场灾难改变了一切,在这个看不见的世界里,盲人成为了所谓的‘正常人’。他们组建了新的政府和秘密组织,暗中将能看见的人视为异端,用来解刨研究。两年来,陆续有人恢复视力,但在新政府的统治下,只要有人说自己看得见,便立刻会被秘密抓捕。

key_facts: A global disaster caused humanity to become blind
The protagonist regained their sight after two years
The blind formed a new world order
Those who regained sight were secretly captured
Being able to see became a form of abnormality
The slogan on the wall revealed the horrifying truth

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Thief
condition: A father and daughter came to a convenience store to buy something. The daughter stole something, and the clerk called the police.
solution: The man was a human trafficker, pretending to be the child's father. The child stole from the store to send a signal for help. The clerk noticed the unusual behavior and called the police.

zh.title: 小偷
zh.condition: 一位父亲带着女儿来便利店买东西,女儿偷了东西,店员报了警。
zh.solution: 人贩子拐卖儿童,谎称自己是孩子的父亲,孩子为了自救拿了便利店的东西,店员发现端倪于是报了警。

key_facts: The man with the child was actually a trafficker
The little girl stole intentionally
The theft was a cry for help
The clerk noticed the anomaly and called the police
The police saved the kidnapped child

title: Raising Cats
condition: The new little girl next door often played with me. Recently her family got cats and she stopped coming. I secretly killed all the cats, and sure enough, today she invited me for dinner.
solution: The girl's parents often fought. Unable to bear it, neighbors made them move next to me. With parents busy working, the girl could only play with me. One day during an argument, the father accidentally killed the mother. He started keeping cats to feed and dispose of the body. With cats to play with, the girl stopped coming. After I killed the cats, the father couldn't dispose of remaining remains, so he had the girl invite me to dinner to finish disposing of the evidence.

zh.title: 养猫
zh.condition: 邻居家新来的小女孩经常找我一起玩。最近小女孩家里开始养猫,她就不再找我玩了。于是我悄悄杀死了所有猫咪,果不其然,小女孩今天来找我去她家吃饭。
zh.solution: 小女孩父母经常吵架,邻居受不了他们,父母就带着小女孩搬到了我的隔壁。因为父母忙于工作,小女孩只能找我玩。一天父母闹矛盾,父亲失手杀死了母亲。父亲就开始养猫喂尸抛尸,小女孩有了玩物,就不找我玩。我把猫杀了之后,尸体不能达到处理,所以她爸爸便让小女孩邀请我去她家吃饭,借此处理完剩下的尸体。

key_facts: The mother was already killed by the father
The cats were raised to dispose of the body
The cats were eating the mother's remains
Killing cats disrupted disposal plans
The dinner invitation was to eliminate evidence

title: Silent
condition: The person I like silently saved a life.
solution: The person I like is a singer. He designed a silent part in his new song. I was playing the new song while passing through a rarely traveled road. Because of this silent part, I heard someone on the roadside calling for help in a low voice, and I saved his life.

zh.title: 无声
zh.condition: 我喜欢的人无声的挽救了一个人的生命。
zh.solution: 我喜欢的人是一名歌手,他在新歌里设计了一段无声的部分,我放着新歌经过一段人迹罕至的路,因为这段无声的部分,我听到了路边有人小声的呼救,拯救了他的生命。

key_facts: The act of 'saving a life' was not intentional on the part of 'the person I like'.
'Silent' does not refer to the person not making a sound, but rather to a silent passage in their work.
The profession or creative output of 'the person I like' is key to understanding the event.
The life was saved thanks to the temporary disappearance of some interference (sound).
It was the narrator who actually heard the cry for help and completed the rescue, not 'the person I like'.

title: Looking Back
condition: The driver's phone rang, he argued with the driver, and I died.
solution: I was sitting in a taxi. The person on the other end of the driver's call said that on the road ahead, a driver and a passenger had an argument and drove into a lake. The driver wanted to go to the accident scene, but I just wanted to go home, so I argued with the driver. During the argument, the driver's steering wheel spun, and we plunged into the lake. Afterwards, my ghost stood on the road watching. It turned out that the people who died at the accident scene were us; we had actually fallen into the lake and died long ago...

zh.title: 回望
zh.condition: 司机的电话响了,他和司机争执起来,我死了。
zh.solution: 我坐在出租车上。司机的电话那头说前面公路有一个司机与乘客发生争执冲进了湖里,司机要去事故现场,但我只想回家于是我与司机发生了争吵,争吵下司机的方向盘打转,我们冲向了湖里事后我的鬼魂站在公路上看着,原来事故现场死的人就是我们,其实我们早就掉入湖里死了...

key_facts: The content of the call the driver received was related to a traffic accident.
The accident described in the call was very similar to the narrator's and the driver's situation.
The narrator and the driver argued over the destination.
There is a temporal or reality perception displacement in the story.
The narrator is already dead while telling this story.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Ceiling Fan
condition: A girl and her roommate often pranked timid Xiao Hong. One dawn, screams woke the girl - upon opening her eyes, she was speechless, then saw words on the ceiling. What were they?
solution: After constant torment, Xiao Hong hanged herself from the ceiling fan. When the girl awoke, Xiao Hong's rotating corpse stared back as the fan turned. The ceiling read: 'Did I scare you this time?'

zh.title: 风扇
zh.condition: 女子有一个舍友小红,胆子很小,女子经常和他舍友一起对小红作恶作剧。某天清晨,女子被室友的尖叫声惊醒,睁开眼后,她却说不出话来,过后又看到天花板上写着一句话,是什么?
zh.solution: 小红经常被室友的恶作剧吓得不轻,小红为了报复,用绳子绑在宿舍顶上的风扇上,再上吊自杀。清晨,女子被舍友惊醒,一睁眼就和小红四目相对,只见尸体随着扇叶转动看着她们,天花板上写着“这次,吓到你们了吧”

key_facts: Pranks led to tragedy
Timid victim sought revenge
Fan became instrument of revenge
Horrifying sight upon waking
Ceiling bore victim's message

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Salvation
condition: I see her every day. If he hadn't stopped me, maybe I wouldn't be going to find her now.
solution: Late at night, I lost control while drunk driving and crashed into a mother and daughter by the roadside. The mother died on the spot, and the daughter was seriously injured and unconscious. I saw the girl's pale little face in the hospital, filled with guilt. Finally, I decided to turn myself in to the police. But just as I was about to leave, my father pulled me back from behind, telling me to go home and rest first. The next day, my father used all his connections and money to cover up all the evidence. He even privately gave the victim's family a large sum of money to stop them from pursuing the matter. I thought I was free, but the self-condemnation grew stronger. Every night, I dreamed of the car accident, saw the mother's desperate eyes, and heard the girl's painful moans. In the end, I couldn't bear this pain and chose to end my own life.

zh.title: 拯救
zh.condition: 我每天都能看到她,如果他没有阻止我,也许我现在也不会去找她。
zh.solution: 深夜,我酒后驾车失控,撞向了路边的母女。母亲当场死亡,女儿重伤昏迷。我在医院看到那女孩苍白的小脸,满心愧疚。终于,我决定去警局自首。可就在我刚要出门时,父亲从后面拉住了我,让我先回家休息一下。第二天,父亲用他所有的人脉和钱财,封锁了所有证据。他甚至私下给了受害者家属一笔巨款,让他们不再追究。我本以为这样就解脱了,但内心的谴责却愈发强烈。我每晚都梦到那场车祸,看到母亲绝望的眼神,听到女孩痛苦的呻吟。最后,我无法承受这痛苦,选择了结束自己的生命。

key_facts: I am a hit-and-run driver who caused someone's death due to drunk driving.
'He' is my father, 'she' is the female victim of the car accident.
My father once stopped me from turning myself in to the police.
My father used his connections and money to cover up my crime.
'Seeing her every day' refers to hallucinations or dreams caused by guilt.
The true meaning of 'going to find her' is to seek spiritual relief through suicide.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Hand
condition: Every day when I wake up, there is a hand touching me. That hand is incredibly warm, until one day, a water droplet slid down my face, and that hand slowly turned cold.
solution: I was born both blind and deaf, with touch being my only sense. My mother would touch my face every morning when I woke up. One day, a water droplet slid down my face, and that hand turned cold. Later, I learned that my mother had cancer and had not gone for treatment, taking care of me instead. That day, she could no longer hold on and passed away, leaving a tear on my face. She smiled at me and said, 'Live well.' After that, she gently touched me until her heart stopped.

zh.title: 手
zh.condition: 每天醒来,都有一双手在抚摸我,那手无比的温暖,直到那一天,有水滴从我脸上划过,那手慢慢变得冰冷。
zh.solution: 我从出生就看到不也听不见,只有感觉。我的母亲每天早上都会抚摸着我的脸,等我醒来,直到那一天,有水滴从我脸上划过,那手慢慢变得冰冷。之后我才知道,母亲因为劳累,患上了癌症,为了照顾我,拖着身体没有去看病,直到那一天,母亲终于撑不住了,泪水划过我的脸颊,笑着对我说:你要好好的生活下去。随后母亲便慢慢的抚摸我,直到失去心跳。

key_facts: The narrator was born both blind and deaf
Touch was their only way of perceiving the world
The hand belonged to their mother
The mother had a terminal illness
The water drop was the mother's tear
The cold hand signified the mother's passing

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Fog, Deceased Wife, Stranger
condition: The man was driving his pregnant wife on a road at night when the car broke down and a heavy fog rolled in. The man left his wife in the car and went to find help. When he returned, he found his wife dead in the car, and there was also a person in the car he didn't recognize.
solution: His wife was pregnant and about to give birth. The man was driving her to the hospital. After the man got out of the car, his wife died in the car from a severe hemorrhage during difficult labor. The extra person was their newborn baby.

zh.title: 雾,亡妻,陌生人
zh.condition: 男人开车带着妻子行驶在夜晚的马路上中途汽车故障并且起了大雾,男人把妻子留在车里自己出去寻找救援回来时发现妻子死在了车里,车里还有一位自己不认识的人。
zh.solution: 妻子怀孕,快要生产了,男人开车去医院,男人下车后妻子车上难产大出血死亡,多出来的人是自己孩子。

key_facts: Wife in active labor needing urgent medical attention
Car breakdown/heavy fog caused delay
Husband left to seek help
Wife died in the car during childbirth
The stranger is the newborn baby
