title: Little Stars
condition: The sun slowly sets in the west, crows return in flocks, twinkling, twinkling little stars, filling the whole sky.
solution: It was dusk again. The sun was setting, and deep in the dark woods was a house. Crows were calling to their companions, signaling the smell of decaying flesh. The 'caw-caw' of the crows drowned out the 'wah-wah' cries of a child. This house was home to a serial child killer who loved to appear at dusk, quietly abducting lone children, making their flesh into food, and digging out their eyes to hang as specimens on the beams.

zh.title: 小星星
zh.condition: 太阳慢慢向西沉,乌鸦回家一群群,一闪一闪亮晶晶,满天都是小星星。
zh.solution: 又到了一天的黄昏,太阳西沉,黑暗的小树林深处有一间屋子,乌鸦在跟自己的同伴呼叫着这里有腐尸的香味。"哇--哇--"的乌鸦叫声将孩子的"哇哇--"哭声掩盖。这间屋子里住着一个连环孩子杀人犯,他最喜欢在黄昏的时候出没,悄悄将落单的小孩拐走,肉做成食物吃下,眼睛挖出来挂在房梁上当成标本。

key_facts: Little stars refer to the victims' eyes
Crows were attracted to decaying flesh, and their calls masked cries
The killer murdered children and collected eyeballs as specimens
The killer engaged in cannibalism
The murder occurred at dusk

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Obey
condition: Mom held my body, crying out to me: 'How many times have I told you, you must look left and right when crossing the road, but why don't you ever listen?' I wish I could tell Mom: I did look, I really did.
solution: I was born colorblind. Mom often told me: 'You must look left and right when crossing the road, and follow others.' One day, while waiting at a traffic light, I saw a man striding forward. I thought it was a green light and I could cross, so I followed the man. Unexpectedly, a truck came speeding towards us and knocked us both flying. Beside the man, a suicide note lay scattered.

zh.title: 听话
zh.condition: 妈妈抱着我的尸体,对我哭喊着:'跟你说了多少遍,过马路一定要左右看,可你怎么就是不听话呢。'我多想告诉妈妈:我看了,我真的看了。
zh.solution: 我天生是个色盲,妈妈经常对我说:过马路一定要左右看,跟着别人走。这一天,我在等红绿灯的时候,看到一个男人大步的往前走。我以为是绿灯可以通行了,便跟着男人一起走。可没想到,一辆货车疾驰而来,把我们都给撞飞了,而那个男人的身旁,则散落着一封遗书。

key_facts: The narrator has a visual impairment and cannot accurately judge traffic signals.
The narrator's act of crossing the road was imitating another person.
The person being imitated was not crossing the road according to traffic rules at that time.
That person intentionally walked into dangerous traffic.
There was an item at the scene that could prove that person's intent (a suicide note).

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Buying the Casket, Returning the Pearl
condition: When Grandma was alive, she always said she would leave all her property to me. After Grandma died, I found a letter on her desk ready to be mailed. Inside was a will, which distributed all of Grandma's property I knew about, but there was nothing for me. I couldn't help but shed tears.
solution: When I was a child, I loved stamp collecting. Grandma also often helped me find all sorts of stamps. I recognized the stamp on the envelope as a rare one, the only one of its kind in the world, priceless. It was the property Grandma left for me. Thinking about the time spent with Grandma, I couldn't help but shed tears.

zh.title: 买椟还珠
zh.condition: 奶奶还在时总说会把所有的财产留给我,奶奶死后,我在奶奶的桌子上找到了一封准备寄出的信,里面是一份遗嘱,遗嘱里分配了我知道的奶奶的所有财产,却没有一份给我,我忍不住落下泪来。
zh.solution: 我小时候酷爱集邮,奶奶也经常帮我找来各种各样的邮票,我认出了信封上的邮票是世界上仅有一枚的稀有款,价值连城,它就是奶奶给我留下的财产,又想到和奶奶共同度过的时光,忍不住落下泪来。

key_facts: The real inheritance is not in the letter, but on the envelope.
'I' (the narrator) have a hobby of stamp collecting.
The stamp on the envelope is unique in the world and priceless.
Grandma left the inheritance in a special way that 'I' (the narrator) could understand.
The reason for the tears is remembrance and being moved by Grandma.

title: Immortal
condition: There she was, so beautiful, so... immortal. If I hadn't seen the expression on her face, I think I would have said the same.
solution: In the tent of a horror circus, I saw a live 'wax figure' of a woman whose four limbs had been amputated, her face contorted in terror and pain.

zh.title: 不朽
zh.condition: 她是这样存在着,如此美丽,如此......不朽。如果没有看到她脸上的表情,我想我也会这么说吧。
zh.solution: 恐怖马戏团的帐篷中,我参观到了一个被砍掉四肢的女性真人蜡像,脸上惊恐而痛苦。

key_facts: The story takes place at a circus.
This circus has a horror theme.
'She' is a person on display.
'She' is described as being like a wax figure.
'She' is actually alive.
'Her' limbs have been amputated.
'Her' expression shows pain.
The narrator initially thought she was a beautiful exhibit.
After seeing her expression, the narrator changed their mind.

title: The Blind Man's Meal
condition: A man came home, took a bite of the meal his wife had left for him, and suddenly called the police.
solution: The man was blind. That day, he came home and, as usual, sat down to eat the meal his wife had prepared. Because both he and his wife were vegetarians, the man knew something was wrong as soon as he tasted it. In fact, the man was eating a dish made from his wife's flesh by a killer, who was watching him eat from the side.

zh.title: 盲人之餐
zh.condition: 男子回到家不久后,吃了一口妻子留给他的饭后,突然报警了。
zh.solution: 男子是个盲人,那天回家,像往常一样坐在桌上吃妻子留好的饭。因为他们夫妻都是素食主义,男子尝了便知道家里出事了。其实男子吃的是凶手用妻子的肉做的菜,并且此时凶手正在一旁看着吃饭的男子。

key_facts: The man is blind.
The man and his wife are vegetarians.
The wife usually prepares meals for the man.
The meal the man ate tasted of meat.
The taste of the meal was inconsistent with their usual diet.
The man realized something was wrong through the taste.
The meal was not prepared by his wife.
The meal was made of human flesh.
The meal was made from his wife's flesh.
The killer was in the man's house at that moment.
The killer was watching the man eat.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Nanny
condition: A woman was working as a nanny in another city. One day, her husband came to visit her and looked around the nanny's room where she lived. The next day, the husband came to pick up his wallet, which he had left in her room, without notifying her. The woman blamed her husband, and he slapped her and divorced her.
solution: The man's wife went to the city to work as a nanny. The man heard rumors that his wife was having an affair with her employer. Unwilling to believe it, he went to visit her. The wife said she lived in a separate nanny's room and chided him for coming unannounced. The man felt he had been overthinking and, too proud to apologize, left 520 yuan (a number symbolizing 'I love you' in Chinese) on her pillow. He thought she would like the popular romantic gesture. That night, he eagerly waited for her to find the surprise, but heard nothing. Unconvinced, he called and asked if she was sleeping in her room. After getting an affirmative answer, he hung up, went back to the room, found the money untouched, and confirmed she had not slept in her own room.

zh.title: 保姆
zh.condition: 女人在外地当保姆一天,丈夫来看她,在女人住的保姆房里瞧了瞧。第二天,丈夫没通知女人,便来拿落在女人房间里的钱包。女人责怪丈夫,丈夫打了女人一巴掌,和她离婚了。
zh.solution: 男人的妻子进城打工,在一户人家里当保姆。男人听说妻子和雇主有染。他不愿相信,于是进城探望妻子。妻子说自己住在单独的保姆间,还责怪男人一声不吭的就过来了。男人觉得自己多心了,又拉不下脸和妻子道歉,于是在钱包里留了五百二十块钱,放在妻子的枕头上。他想,最近不是流行这个嘛,妻子肯定喜欢。晚上,他美滋滋的等着妻子发现这个惊喜。可却什么也没等到。他不死心,便打电话问妻子是不是已经在自己的房间睡了,得到肯定的答复后他挂断了电话,回到房间发现钱没动确认妻子没在自己房间睡

key_facts: The husband suspected his wife was having an affair with her employer.
The husband left money on the pillow during his first visit.
The amount of money left was 520 yuan.
The husband left the money to test his wife.
The wife never touched the money on the pillow.
The untouched money proved the wife did not sleep in the nanny's room that night.
The wife lied to her husband about where she slept.
The husband thus confirmed his wife was lying or cheating.
The divorce was because the husband discovered his wife's lie.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Senior Year
condition: In my senior year, I did something wrong, and I was happy it went unnoticed. Years later, I shed tears because of it.
solution: In my senior year, my family was financially struggling, and I didn’t have enough money for tuition. I used fake money to pay the fees, and the teacher didn’t seem to notice. I felt lucky to continue my studies. Years later, at a reunion, I learned from my classmates that the teacher had actually noticed but, to help me, he used his own salary to replace the fake money and pay for my tuition. When I met the teacher again, I confessed and apologized. The teacher said, 'After all these years, you can still apologize for this. Letting you continue your education was the best decision I ever made as a teacher.'

zh.title: 高三
zh.condition: 高三那年,我做了一件错事没被发现而很开心。多年以后,我却为这落下了眼泪。
zh.solution: 高三那年,我家经济条件不好,钱不够交学费。我只能把假钱放进去交学费,老师好像并没有发现。能够继续读书,这让我感到了小确幸和开心。毕业后从其他同学那里听闻当年是老师发现了,但为了能让我完成学业,不被学校开除,就用自己的工资替换了假钱帮我交了学费。多年后的同学聚会,我重新见到了老师。我鼓起勇气向老师说出了这件事情并因为这件事向他道歉。可老师却说:“这么多年过去了,你都能为这事向我道歉。那能让你继续学业是我教师生涯做过最正确的事情。

key_facts: The wrong thing was related to tuition
The mistake was due to financial difficulties
I thought the teacher hadn't noticed the mistake
The teacher helped me by replacing the money
Years later, I understood the teacher's intention

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Fear and Despair
condition: A man lit a match in the darkness and died of fear and despair.
solution: The man was a prisoner. To escape, he bribed a guard. They agreed that the next time a prisoner died, he would hide in the coffin with the body to get past inspection and be transported out of the prison. The guard would then secretly dig him up after the burial. Finally, the day came when someone died. He didn't care who it was and quickly hid in the coffin. After the coffin was buried, the prisoner lit a match. He then saw that the corpse next to him was the very guard he had bribed! Of course, no one would be coming to dig him out.

zh.title: 恐惧与绝望
zh.condition: 在黑暗当中点亮火柴的男人,因为恐惧与绝望,就这样死了。
zh.solution: 男人是监狱里面的囚犯。他为了越狱,花钱买通一个狱卒。他们约好下一次监狱里有人死掉,囚犯就偷偷躲进棺材里避过盘查,和尸体一起运出监狱,在墓地下葬。他请狱卒在棺木下葬之后,再偷偷把他挖出来。终于被他等到有人死了。他才不管是谁,便以迅雷不及掩耳的速度,躲进棺木里。棺木下葬之后,囚犯点亮了火柴。这时他发现身边的尸体,就是他买通的那个狱卒!当然,没有人会来把他挖出去了。

key_facts: The man was a prisoner.
He was attempting to escape from prison at the time.
His escape plan involved hiding in a coffin.
He had made a deal with a prison guard.
The guard was supposed to dig him out afterward.
He lit the match to see inside the coffin.
There was another body in the coffin.
He recognized the identity of the corpse.
The corpse was the guard he had bribed.
He realized he would be buried alive.
His death was caused by the despair of being trapped and his plan failing.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Reunion After Ten Years
condition: Ten years later, I received news of him again. I saw him once more, my heart filled with mixed emotions.
solution: Ever since that murderer escaped from me ten years ago, I never gave up chasing him. This time, I finally got a definite clue. When I finally found him, living under a new name in a remote small town, what I saw was a cold corpse. Just a day before, he had drowned in a swift current while trying to save a girl who had fallen into the water. The murderer I had pursued for ten years ended his life before me as a hero. Looking at the crying girl, listening to the bystanders praising his heroic deed, my heart was filled with mixed emotions, unsure how to place this long-overdue 'justice.'

zh.title: 十年后的再见
zh.condition: 十年之后,我又得到了他的消息,我又一次见到了他,心中五味杂陈。
zh.solution: 自从十年前那个杀人犯从我眼前逃走,我就没有放弃对他的追捕,这一次,我终于得到了确切的线索,当我终于在一个偏远小镇找到改名换姓的他时,看到的却是一具冰冷的尸体。就在一天前,他为救一个失足落水的女孩,自己却被急流吞噬。追捕十年的凶犯,竟以英雄的姿态在我面前谢幕。看着痛哭的女孩,听着旁人对他义举的称赞,我心中五味杂陈,不知这迟来的“正义”该如何安放。

key_facts: 'He' is a murderer who has been on the run for ten years.
'I' (the narrator) am the person who has been pursuing him for ten years.
When I 'saw him' again, he was already a corpse.
He died saving a drowning girl, passing away as a hero.
He had been living under an assumed name during his time on the run.
The mixed emotions stem from the fact that the pursued murderer ultimately died in a heroic manner.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Bell Rings
condition: The bell rings, and someone listens; the bell rings, and no one listens.
solution: An elderly woman who lived alone had a beloved little cat. To always know where the cat was and to prevent it from wandering off, she tied a small bell to its neck. Whenever the cat walked, played, or rubbed against her legs, the bell would jingle. The old woman was a bit hard of hearing, but the sound of this bell was special to her and always caught her attention. She loved hearing it; it made her feel safe and accompanied. However, one quiet night, the old woman passed away peacefully in her sleep. The next day, the cat moved about the house as usual. The bell on its neck still jingled with its every move. But this time, 'the bell rings, and no one listens'—the person who had always listened, who had cared about that sound, could no longer hear it.

zh.title: 铃铛响
zh.condition: 铃铛响了,有人听;铃铛响了,没人听。
zh.solution: 一位独居的老奶奶养了一只她非常疼爱的小猫。为了能随时知道小猫的位置,也为了防止它溜出门外走失,老奶奶给小猫的脖子上系了一个小铃铛。平日里,只要小猫在屋里走动、玩耍或者撒娇蹭着老奶奶的腿,铃铛就会发出清脆的响声。老奶奶耳朵有些背,但这个铃铛的声音对她来说很特别,总能引起她的注意。她喜欢听到这个声音,这让她感到安心和陪伴。然而,在一个寂静的夜晚,老奶奶在睡梦中安详地去世了。第二天,小猫像往常一样在屋子里活动。它脖子上的铃铛,依然随着它的动作叮当作响。但是这一次,“铃铛响了,没人听”—— 那个一直听着、在乎着这个铃铛声的人,已经永远听不到了。

key_facts: The bell is on an animal.
The person listening is the owner.
The animal is a cat.
The owner is an old woman.
'No one listens' because the owner has passed away.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Choice
condition: I've been to many places. I gave him a multiple-choice question, and no matter which one he chose, the answer was correct.
solution: I kidnapped and murdered a girl, then lured her father back to his house. I gave her father a multiple-choice question: "Guess which room you'll find your child in." He probably thought that if he answered correctly, he would see his daughter alive. But any of his answers were correct, because I dismembered his daughter and placed her in every room of his house. He could find her in any room.

zh.title: 选择
zh.condition: 我去了很多地方。我给他出了一道选择题,不管他选哪个,答案都是正确。
zh.solution: 我绑架并杀害了一个女孩,并引她父亲回到自己的房子,然后给了她父亲一道选择题:“你猜猜在哪个房间能见到你的孩子”。他可能以为回答正确了就能见到活的女儿吧。但他的任何回答都是正确的,因为我把他的女儿分尸并摆放在他每个房间,他在哪一个房间都可以见到她。

key_facts: I am the killer who kidnapped and murdered the girl
The father's daughter is the victim
The "multiple-choice question" was asking the father to guess which room his daughter was in
Since the body parts were scattered in all rooms, any choice was "correct"
The daughter was already dead when the choice question was posed

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Necklace
condition: I wore my sister's necklace and survived because of it.
solution: Because my sister and I are twins, we look very much alike. So Mom, to distinguish us, gave us different necklaces. But I gradually discovered that Mom was actually using it to better favor my sister. So I found an excuse to exchange necklaces with my sister, then pushed her into the water, and jumped in myself, crying for help. I knew Mom would definitely save 'sister'.

zh.title: 项链
zh.condition: 我戴上了妹妹的项链,却因此活了下来。
zh.solution: 因为我和妹妹是双胞胎,我们长得很像。所以妈妈为了区分,给我和妹妹戴上不同的项链。可我慢慢发现,其实是妈妈为了更好偏袒妹妹。于是我找借口和妹妹交换项链,然后把妹妹推下水,自己也跳下水呼救。我知道妈妈一定会救“妹妹”。

key_facts: The narrator and her sister are identical twins.
The necklace is the key item to distinguish their identities.
The mother treated the two children differently.
Before the incident, the narrator and her sister had exchanged necklaces.
Survival was directly related to which necklace was worn.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Dark
condition: It was too dark, I turned on the light, but it got even darker.
solution: I came home, it was too dark. I went to turn on the light. Because of a gas leak in the house, an explosion occurred the moment I turned on the light. I entered eternal darkness.

zh.title: 黑
zh.condition: 太黑了,我开了灯,却更黑了。
zh.solution: 我回到家,家里太黑了,我去开灯,因为家里煤气泄漏,在我开灯的一瞬间发生了爆炸,我进入了永远的黑夜里。

key_facts: The act of turning on the light directly triggered a catastrophic consequence.
Before the light was turned on, there was an invisible dangerous substance in the house (gas leak).
'Got even darker' does not refer to the room's light dimming but describes the narrator's final state.
The event caused permanent severe injury to the narrator.
The electric spark produced by turning on the light was the key factor triggering the disaster.

title: Notebook
condition: I am a detective, recently investigating a case. Today, there was a major breakthrough in the case; I found a notebook. Suddenly, my expression changed dramatically.
solution: I have dissociative identity disorder, but I personally don't know it. After my whole family was murdered, I resolved to become a detective to avenge them. Recently, I was investigating a case; the victim looked a lot like my sister, and I swore to find the killer. Finally, I found a notebook. After opening it, I found the handwriting familiar. After reading it, I was about to record important clues when I suddenly realized it was my handwriting. Recalling the contents of the notebook, I gave a bitter laugh. It turned out I had dissociative identity disorder and had wiped out my own family. And all of this was 'my' (the other personality's) plan; he wanted to become the dominant personality. Utterly dejected, I sought my own death.

zh.title: 笔记
zh.condition: 我是一名侦探,最近在调查一起案件,今天案情有了重大突破,我找了一个笔记本。突然,我神情大变。
zh.solution: 我有人格分裂症,但我个人不知道,我全家被害后,我便立志成为一名侦探,为家人报仇雪恨。最近我在调查一起案件,被害人和妹妹很像,我发誓要找出凶手。终于,我发现了一个笔记,打开之后,我发现字迹比较眼熟,看完之后我正准备记录重要线索,突然发现是我的字迹。再回想笔记的内容我,惨笑一声,原来我人格分裂,自灭家门。而这一切,都是“我”的计划,他想成为主人格。万念俱灰下,我自寻短见。

key_facts: The case the narrator is investigating is the murder of his own family.
The key piece of evidence is a notebook.
The handwriting in the notebook is identical to the narrator's own handwriting.
The narrator suffers from a severe mental illness, but is unaware of it.
The notebook reveals that the narrator himself is the murderer of his family.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Elevator
condition: I entered the elevator heading to school. As it rose, I knew I'd never make it.
solution: On Monday morning, half-awake, I entered the elevator without pressing any button. It kept rising until stopping at a floor where I saw a dead girl and a man cleaning up. Noticing me, he stared at my hand. Frantically pressing the close button, I almost escaped when bloody hands grabbed me. (The elevator rose because the victim had pressed buttons while seeking help.)

zh.title: 电梯
zh.condition: 我走进电梯准备去上学,随着电梯的上升,我知道,我再也无法去学校了。
zh.solution: 星期一早上,在妈妈的催促之下我心不在焉的走进电梯准备去学校,电梯门合上后,由于我刚起床头脑还不太清醒,忘了按一楼的楼层键,于是电梯便持续上升,我意识到自己没按楼层,正准备按下一楼楼层时,电梯突然停了,电梯门缓缓打开,我看到一个死去的女孩倒在血泊中,而一个男人正在清理现场...男人听到动静,突然转过头来看向我,那双眼睛死死的盯着我的手,我吓了一跳,赶紧狂按电梯关门键,就在电梯即将关上的那一刹那,一双带着血的手伸了进来,我再也无法去学校了,我被凶手拖出电梯杀害了。(电梯之所以上升是因为女孩被杀害前为了求救按了电梯按钮)

key_facts: The elevator's abnormal ascent wasn't accidental
The protagonist forgot to press any button
It stopped at a murder scene
The victim had tried calling for help
The killer discovered the protagonist

title: Rollo Tomasi
condition: 'Rollo Tomasi...' he said the name slowly, a smile on his lips. ... 'We're looking for a friend of the criminal.' 'What's his name?' 'Rollo Tomasi.' The person on the other end was silent for a moment. 'No, never heard of him.' 'Alright, it's probably nothing, but could you keep an eye out?'
solution: Police Officer A's father was killed in the line of duty, and the killer was never caught. So, he invented a name—Rollo Tomasi—as a stand-in for all criminals who got away with it, to motivate himself. He never told anyone this secret until discussing a case with Officer B. Sensing his unusual obsession, B pressed him, and A mentioned the name for the first time. From then on, only A and B knew about 'Rollo Tomasi.' Soon after, B was murdered by his superior. As he was dying, he told his killer the name: 'Rollo Tomasi.' When the superior later casually mentioned the name to A, A instantly knew: the killer was standing right in front of him.

zh.title: 罗罗·汤马西
zh.condition: “罗罗·汤马西......”,他缓缓说出了那个名字,嘴角却带着微笑。......“我们想追查罪犯的一位朋友。”“叫什么?”“罗罗·汤马西”对面听后沉默了一会,“没有,没有听过”“好吧,这可能没什么,不过你还是注意一下好吗?”
zh.solution: 警察A的父亲因公殉职,凶手逍遥法外,于是他虚构了一个名字——罗罗·汤马西,作为所有未归案罪犯的代称,以此激励自己。他从未泄露这个秘密,直到与警察B讨论案情时,警察B感受到他不同寻常的执着,在追问之下才首次提及。此后,只有警察A和警察B知道“罗罗·汤马西”的存在。不久,警察B被其上司杀害,临终前对上司留下暗语:“罗罗·汤马西”。当上司事后故作镇定地向警察A提起这个名字时,警察A瞬间明了:凶手正是眼前这位上司。

key_facts: 'Rollo Tomasi' is not a real name.
The name is a code word.
Very few people know this name.
A police officer is murdered in the story.
The killer is also a police officer.
The killer exposes himself by saying the name.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Coke
condition: Yueyue gave Xiao Ming a Coke. Xiao Ming didn't drink it. Yueyue died.
solution: Yueyue and Xiao Ming were neighbors. One day while playing, Yueyue took a Coke from the kitchen and gave it to Xiao Ming. Xiao Ming didn't want it because he wasn't thirsty. As a result, Yueyue drank the whole bottle of Coke. Unexpectedly, the bottle of Coke was filled with Dichlorvos pesticide by her grandmother. Yueyue died before she could even reach the hospital.

zh.title: 可乐
zh.condition: 悦悦把可乐给了小明,小明没喝,悦悦死了。
zh.solution: 悦悦和小明是邻居,有一天在玩时,悦悦从厨房拿了可乐给小明,小明因为不口渴所以没要,结果悦悦喝完了那瓶可乐,没想到那瓶可乐是奶奶装的敌敌畏农药,还没赶到医院,悦悦已经失去了生命。

key_facts: Coke bottle contained pesticide
Grandmother's mistake
Xiao Ming didn't drink the Coke because he wasn't thirsty
Yueyue drank the Coke and died as a result

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Misunderstanding
condition: "Don't worry about my affairs" "I'm going out, don't wait for me tonight." My husband brought the fish soup he had just made to the table. How could I be so cruel? It’s no wonder this happened.
solution: Lately, my husband has been acting secretive, avoiding conversations with me and often going out for long periods. Today, I saw a red mark on his neck (it looked like a mosquito bite), and considering his recent behavior, I assumed it was a love bite. I was hurt and thought that if he got seriously ill, he would see how caring I was and would return to me. So I prepared a soup with fugu poison, thinking that if he drank it, he would at least fall ill. Later, I could worry about him and he would be moved. However, tonight, he unexpectedly made fish soup for me and confessed that he had received a message from my ex-boyfriend a few days ago. He thought the message was too intimate and assumed it was from my lover. So he angrily confronted my ex, only to find out that my ex's family was in trouble and needed my help. He wanted to stop the interaction, so he secretly helped him solve the problem. When I heard this, I felt relieved. We opened up to each other and chatted for a long time. Just as I was about to tell him about the poison in the soup, he revealed that the fish soup was made with the soup I had prepared. By then, we had both drunk most of it and both died on the floor.

zh.title: 误会
zh.condition: “我的事你不要管”“我要出门一趟,晚上不用等我”丈夫将刚刚熬好的鱼汤抬上桌。我怎么这么狠毒。这样也真是活该。
zh.solution: 丈夫最近总是鬼鬼祟祟的,经常躲着我聊天,还经常出门很长时间。今天看到他脖子上的红色(蚊子叮的),鉴于前面的种种表现,我已经无心分辨这个看似吻痕的痕迹的由来,我很伤心。我心想,也许只要他大病一场,见到我无微不至的关心,就会回心转意。所以我准备了含有河豚汁的汤水,要是晚上他喝到了这碗汤,就至少会大病一场,我到时候再着急地为他寻医求道,他一定会很感动。但是今天晚上他突然殷勤地给我做了鱼汤,和我坦白了他前两天收到我前男友信息的事情。他说,前两天见到我的旧手机号收到的陌生男人的信息,由于对方语言显得比较亲昵,他就以为这是我的暧昧对象,所以他愤怒地按照对方发来的信息去见他。但是见到对方的时候才发现他是我的前男友,由于他家里出现了困难,想要找我帮帮忙,我的丈夫觉得如果是我的话会愿意帮他的,但是为了让他不再和我纠缠,所以就独自帮他准备解决事情的办法。听到他的坦白,我很开心,之后我们互相敞开心扉聊了很久,但是正当我准备告诉他冰箱里汤汁的事情时,他说鱼汤是他用我准备的汤汁熬的,此时我们都已经喝了一大半了,最后两个人双双躺在地上不治身亡。

key_facts: Husband’s misunderstanding and concealment
The deadly nature of fugu poison
The tangled emotions
A tragic ending due to misunderstanding
Confessions and the final fate

title: Box
condition: While tidying up my belongings, I found a box containing a tattered photo, and tears streamed down my face.
solution: When I was little, I was mischievous and accidentally set fire to my room with a match. I was so scared that I ran away without telling my parents, who were at home, taking only a family photo that they had kept on me in case I got lost. My family died in that fire, and I was forced to leave my hometown. For many years, I have lived in regret. Years later, I saw this photo again. The house in the photo was my former home, with my parents standing on either side, smiling and holding my hands. This stirred up years of unresolved guilt and remorse deep within me, causing tears to stream down my face.

zh.title: 箱子
zh.condition: 在整理家中物品的时候我翻到了一个箱子,箱子里有一张破旧的照片,我泪流满面。
zh.solution: 小时候我贪玩,一不小心用火柴点燃了房间。我太害怕了,没有告知在家的父母便逃走了,只带走一张全家人的合照,是父母害怕我走丢放在我身上的。我的亲人在那场大火中死亡,我被迫离开了家乡,这么多年来,我一直生活在悔恨之中。多年后,我看到了这张照片,照片上的房子是我曾经的家,父母站在我的两边笑着拉着我的手。这激起了我多年来内心深处一直未能释怀的罪责和愧疚,因此泪流满面。

key_facts: I once caused a fire
The fire led to the death of my family
I fled the fire scene out of fear
The only item I took was a family photo
The photo evoked memories of past guilt and remorse

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Mother's Hand
condition: Xiao Ming slept in a small bed next to his mother's big bed. Every night, his mother would reach out from under the covers to hold his hand. One day, someone discovered that Xiao Ming's entire family was dead. His father was hacked to pieces, his mother was dead, and Xiao Ming was dead too. Xiao Ming's arm was missing. Why?
solution: Xiao Ming had a habit of holding his mother's hand. That night, an intruder entered the bedroom. Xiao Ming thought he was holding his mother's hand, but it was actually the intruder's hand. To escape, the intruder cut off Xiao Ming's arm and threw it aside.

zh.title: 妈妈的手
zh.condition: 小明睡在妈妈睡的大床旁边的小床上,每天夜里妈妈都会从被窝里伸出手拉住小明的手。有天有人发现小明全家都死了。小明的爸爸被砍成了肉泥,妈妈也死了,小明也死了。小明胳膊不见了,请问为什么?
zh.solution: 小明有抱妈妈手的习惯,当天晚上卧室进来了歹徒,小明以为抱的是妈妈的手,但其实是歹徒的手,歹徒为了逃走,砍了小明的手丢在一旁。

key_facts: Xiao Ming's hand was cut off.
Xiao Ming had a habit of holding his mother's hand before sleep.
An intruder entered the bedroom.
Xiao Ming held onto the arm tightly and wouldn't let go.
The intruder was hindered while trying to leave.

title: Old Man
condition: The old man ferried the man across the river. The man crossed the river, but the old man died in the river.
solution: The man was a chivalrous thief who was wanted for killing a tyrannical king. The old man recognized him when he fled to the riverbank and took him across the river. He repeatedly urged the old man not to reveal his whereabouts. The old man then committed suicide to prove to him that he would never leak the secret.

zh.title: 老人
zh.condition: 老人载着男子过河,男子过了河,老人却死在河里。
zh.solution: 男子是一名侠盗,杀了残暴的国王而被通缉,老人认出了逃到河边的他,带他过江,他再三嘱咐老人不要将他的行踪说出去,老人于是自杀来向他证明自己绝不会泄密。

key_facts: The man's identity was special; he was evading pursuit.
The old man knew the man's identity.
Before and after crossing the river, the man emphasized the importance of secrecy to the old man.
The old man's death was not an accident but his own choice.
The old man chose death to protect the man's secret.

title: Hiccups
condition: A man walked into a bar and asked for a glass of water. The bartender pulled out a gun and pointed it at him. However, the man thanked the bartender and left. Why?
solution: The man had persistent hiccups and wanted a glass of water. The bartender scared him with the gun, and his hiccups stopped.

zh.title: 打嗝
zh.condition: 一个人走进一家酒吧要了一杯水,酒吧老板拿出一把枪指着他,然而他向老板致谢并离开了,这是为什么?
zh.solution: 那个人打嗝不止,想要喝杯水,老板用枪吓唬他,他就不打嗝了。

key_facts: The man was hiccuping at the time.
He wanted water to stop the hiccups.
The bartender pulled out the gun to scare him.
The bartender's goal was to help him stop hiccuping.
The scare successfully cured his hiccups.
He thanked the bartender because his hiccups had stopped.
The bartender did not actually intend to harm him.

title: Building Elevator
condition: "Things have been so unlucky lately; I have to do all the work, and I even caught a cold." I thought, as I pressed the elevator button. The elevator doors slowly opened, and the sight inside scared me so much I turned and ran.
solution:
People have been disappearing in the building where I work recently, causing widespread panic, but I'm forced to continue working overtime to make a living, even going to work with a cold. Thinking about all this, I felt unlucky. Today, I was wearing a mask, ready to take the elevator down after work, but when the elevator doors opened, before me was a grotesque wall of flesh, wriggling internal organs, and sharp teeth. I was so terrified I turned and ran.
This was a monster disguised as an elevator, which spread a pollen-like substance to induce hallucinations, making people believe the elevator was normal. Because I had a cold and wore a mask, I was not affected by the illusion.

zh.title: 大楼电梯
zh.condition: "最近真是晦气,活都要我干,我还感冒了。"我一边想着,一边按下电梯按钮。电梯门缓缓打开,我被里面的景象吓得转身就跑。
zh.solution:
我工作的大楼最近一直有人失踪,闹得人心惶惶,而我却为生计所迫仍在持续加班,甚至得了感冒还在上班。一想到这些,我就感到晦气。这天我带着口罩准备坐电梯下班,可是电梯门打开,我眼前竟然是诡异的肉壁,蠕动的内脏和锋利的牙齿,我吓得转身就跑。
这是一个伪装成电梯的怪物,通过散播类似花粉的物质让人产生幻觉,认为电梯一切正常,而我因为感冒带了口罩所以没有被迷惑。

key_facts: I wore a mask due to a cold, blocking hallucinations (I was unaffected by the illusion)
People were missing in the building, but I continued to work due to livelihood
The elevator was a living organism
The elevator spread illusions through pollen, making it appear normal
Witnessing the elevator's internal biological structure scared me away

title: Cake
condition: Mom asked Xiao Ming if he had secretly eaten the cake. Xiao Ming lied and said no. Mom said Auntie saw him, and Xiao Ming instantly felt a chill down his spine.
solution: Mom and Auntie had a bad relationship, so Mom killed Auntie and hid her head in the refrigerator, covering it with a cake. Xiao Ming was too hungry at night, so he got up in the middle of the night to secretly eat the cake. Xiao Ming saw the head behind the cake and thought it was a coconut, so he didn't pay attention. The next day, Mom discovered the cake was gone. Suspecting Xiao Ming already knew Auntie had been killed, she deliberately said Xiao Ming had secretly eaten the cake and Auntie saw him. Only then did Xiao Ming realize that what he saw last night was not a coconut...

zh.title: 蛋糕
zh.condition: 妈妈问小明是不是偷吃了蛋糕,小明谎称没有,妈妈说阿姨看到了,小明瞬间毛骨悚然。
zh.solution: 妈妈和阿姨关系不好,于是把阿姨杀了,把头藏在冰箱里,用蛋糕遮住,小明因为晚上太饿了,半夜起来偷吃蛋糕。小明看见蛋糕后面的头,以为是椰子没有在意。第二天妈妈发现蛋糕没了。怀疑小明已经知道阿姨被杀,于是故意说小明偷吃蛋糕,被阿姨看见,小明才反应过来昨晚看见的并不是椰子...

key_facts: Auntie has been killed by the mother
Auntie's head was hidden behind the cake in the refrigerator
Xiao Ming mistook the head for food (or a coconut)
Mother used 'Auntie saw' to test Xiao Ming
The chill down his spine came from the sudden realization of what he saw last night

title: Green Light
condition: Xiao Mei was home alone late at night when the power suddenly went out. She found two columns of cursed text glowing green on her bookshelf. She screamed and rushed out of the house. That night, she stayed at her friend Xiao Hui's place. She remembered that another friend, Xiao Wen, had given her a gift that was originally in that spot on the bookshelf, and Xiao Wen had died unexpectedly shortly after giving the gift. Thinking of this, Xiao Mei became even more scared, but thankfully Xiao Hui was with her.
solution: Xiao Wen was a prop maker. While making props, she found a very beautiful one, except that it had two columns of glowing cursed text on both sides, which could be used for horror films. So, she made an identical one, but changed the two columns of text to blessings. After finishing, she gave the blessed ornament to Xiao Mei. She didn't tell Xiao Mei about the glowing text, wanting to give her a surprise. A few days later, Xiao Wen died unexpectedly, but she never knew that she had given the wrong ornament.

zh.title: 绿光
zh.condition: 小美深夜独自在家,突然停电了她发现书架上出现了两列诅咒文字,还发着绿光,她尖叫一声慌忙跑出家门,这晚,她住在了朋友小慧家。她想到,书架的那个位置原本放着另一个朋友小雯送的礼物,而小雯在送出礼物后不久就意外去世了,想到这里,小美更害怕了,还好有小慧陪她。
zh.solution: 小雯是制作道具的,她在制作的过程中,发现有个道具很漂亮,只是两边有两列带有荧光的诅咒文字,可以用于拍恐怖片用。于是,她又制作了一个一样的,只是把两列文字改成了祝福语。制作完成后,她将有祝福语的摆件送给了小美,她没告诉小美上面有荧光字,想给她一个惊喜,没过几天,小雯意外去世了,但是她一直不知道,自己送错了一个摆件。

key_facts: Xiao Wen gave a glowing gift
Xiao Mei saw the words on the gift because of the power outage
Friend Xiao Wen was a prop maker
Xiao Wen gave the wrong gift
Friend Xiao Wen died unexpectedly

title: Can't Come Back
condition: A person came out of a house, hailed a taxi, and was never able to return to that house again. Why?
solution: The person was a thief, and the taxi driver was the owner of the house. The driver took him directly to the police station.

zh.title: 不能回来
zh.condition: 一个人从一间屋子里出来,伸手招了辆出租车,然后他再也没能回来这间屋子,请问这是为什么?
zh.solution: 这个人是小偷,出租车司机是这间屋子的主人,于是直接带着他开去了警察局。

key_facts: The person coming out of the house was a thief.
He had just committed a theft.
The taxi driver was the owner of that house.
The driver recognized the thief or the situation.
The thief did not go where he intended to go.
The taxi went directly to the police station.
The thief was arrested.
He couldn't come back because he was caught.

title: Wife
condition: I knocked on the door of my wife's parents' home with a gift, breaking out in a cold sweat.
solution: I suspected my wife was cheating. After a big fight with her, I went out drinking. When I returned home, I saw a couple on the bed. Overcome with rage, I killed them. Then, thinking I might as well go all the way, I decided to wipe out my wife's family. However, I had actually gone to the wrong floor due to being drunk, and this household happened to have their door unlocked. When I knocked on my wife's parents' door, holding the bloody knife, I saw my wife who had returned to her parents' home. Only then did I realize I had killed the wrong people, and I broke out in a cold sweat.

zh.title: 妻子
zh.condition: 我带着礼物敲响了妻子父母的家门,出了一身冷汗。
zh.solution: 我怀疑妻子出轨,与妻子大吵一架后出门喝酒,等回到家,看到床上有一对男女,我怒不可遏,杀了他们,又想一不做二不休,将妻子家灭门。然而,其实我因为酒醉走错了楼层,这户人家又恰好没有关好门。等我手提带血的刀敲开妻子父母家的门,却看到了回娘家的妻子,我才意识到自己杀错了人,惊出一身冷汗。

key_facts: I had just committed murder.
I went to the wrong floor due to drunkenness and killed the wrong people.
'Gift' refers to the knife I used for the murder.
The deceased were strangers completely unrelated to me.
I thought I had killed my cheating wife.
My real purpose in coming to my in-laws' house was to continue the violence.
At the door, I saw my wife who should have been 'dead'.

title: No Good Gift
condition: A minister presented a gift to the emperor, but the emperor suffered mental trauma.
solution: The minister gave the emperor a deer, but all the other ministers claimed it was a horse. The emperor realized his power had been usurped, causing him mental trauma.

zh.title: 礼无好礼
zh.condition: 大臣向皇帝进献礼物,皇帝却精神受创了。
zh.solution: 大臣给皇帝送鹿,但其他大臣都说是马,皇帝意识到自己被架空,所以精神受创。

key_facts: The gift was a test of 'pointing to a deer as a horse' (a metaphor for deliberate misrepresentation)
All officials conspired to distort the truth
The emperor realized his power was undermined
Loss of power led to mental trauma
The presentation of the gift was a political power play

title: The Killer
condition: The lights dimmed, fog rolled in. The lights came on, someone was dead, but we, wearing collars that couldn't be removed, never found the killer.
solution: Many people were confined in a building. Each time the lights dimmed, one person would remain awake, and the sprayed mist would cause others to fall unconscious. Simultaneously, each time the lights dimmed, the awake person had to kill someone, otherwise they would die from poison (the collar contained poison, which would be injected into the wearer's neck if the collar was forcibly removed or remotely controlled). Each time the lights dimmed, an image would be played—this image was the awake person's most desperate and secret memory, something they least wanted others to know. Simultaneously, the image would induce suicide in the viewer. Ultimately, all those who watched the image committed suicide, so the living never found a 'killer' or someone who died from poison.

zh.title: 凶手
zh.condition: 灯暗了,雾来了。灯亮了,有人死了,但带着无法脱下的项圈的我们始终没有找到凶手。
zh.solution: 很多人被关在大楼里,每次暗灯都会有一人醒着,喷洒的迷雾会使其余人而昏迷,同时,每次暗灯这个醒着的人都必须杀掉一个人,否则自己就会中毒而死(项圈中有毒药,如果项圈被强制摘下或者或者远程遥控,毒液就会注入佩戴者的脖颈使其死亡)。每次暗灯都会播放影像,而这个播放的影像是这个醒着的人心中最绝望、最不想被别人知道的秘密,同时,影像中会对观影者经行自杀诱导,最终,观看影像的人都自杀了,所以活着的人没有找到凶手也没有找到中毒而死的人。

key_facts: We are trapped in a confined environment, unable to move or leave freely
The collars around our necks are fatal and cannot be removed or remotely deactivated
Each time the lights dim, one person is awake while others are unconscious; the awake person is forced to kill
Each time the lights dim, an image of the awake person's most desperate secret is played, inducing suicide in viewers
The victims were not directly murdered, but rather induced to commit suicide by the images, making it impossible to find a 'killer'

title: Teru Teru Bozu
condition: She said, 'Winter is too cold.' I filled her room with heaters, and she got very angry. She said, 'I hate rain.' So I hung teru teru bozus all over her room. But why isn't she talking anymore?
solution: I was her admirer, constantly monitoring her. She said winter was cold, so I sneaked into her house and filled her room with heaters, which made her think it was a prank and she became very angry. She said she hated rain, and I didn't know what to do, so I killed many people, turned them into teru teru bozus, and hung them in her room. But when she saw them, she was scared to death.

zh.title: 晴天娃娃
zh.condition: 她说,冬天太冷了,我在她的房间里放满了取暖器,她很生气。她说,好讨厌下雨啊,于是我在她房间里挂满了晴天娃娃。可是,她怎么不说话了呢?
zh.solution: 我是她的追求者,时时关注她的动态:她说冬天冷,我就潜入她的房子放满取暖器,导致她以为有人恶作剧,非常生气。她说讨厌下雨,我不知道怎么办了,只好杀死很多人,把他们做成晴天娃娃,挂在她的房间里,可她看见却吓死了。

key_facts: I am her admirer
Heaters exposed illegal entry
Teru teru bozus were made from human bodies
The admirer's pursuit was pathological
The truth of her silence is that she was scared to death

title: Obsession
condition: Time is almost up... Because of my obsession, she lost her mother forever.
solution: My wife was one of the victims of a serial murder case, but the police were never able to track down the killer. With the statute of limitations almost expiring, nineteen years after the last crime, I had no choice but to imitate the killer's modus operandi, kill a woman, and dispose of her body to reset the statute of limitations so the police would continue their investigation. But when I saw that crying girl clutching her mother's corpse, an intense wave of guilt and remorse washed over me. Because of my obsession, I had shattered yet another family. What difference was there between me and that heinous murderer?

zh.title: 执念
zh.condition: 时间就要到了...因为我的执念,她永远失去了母亲。
zh.solution: 我的妻子是一起连环杀人案的受害者之一,可警方一直追查不到凶手,眼看着距最后一次案发已经过去十九年,法律追诉期马上就要失效了,为了让警方继续追查,我只能模仿凶手的作案手法杀了一个女人并抛尸,让法律追诉期刷新。而当我看到那个哭喊着抱着妈妈的尸体的女孩时,强烈的罪恶和愧疚感席卷了我,就因为我的执念,我又害得另一个家庭支离破碎,这样的我,与那个穷凶恶极的杀人犯又有什么区别呢?

key_facts: The statute of limitations was about to expire
My wife and I were victims of the original serial case
I imitated the crime to extend the statute of limitations
Losing her mother refers to the daughter of the new victim
Imitating the murder caused intense guilt

title: Download
condition: One minute, one day, one week, one month, one year... He completely broke down.
solution: He was downloading a very large game. But when the game was almost finished downloading, his internet suddenly became slow. He watched helplessly as the estimated download completion time gradually increased from one minute to one year, and he broke down.

zh.title: 下载
zh.condition: 一分钟,一天,一星期,一个月,一年......他彻底崩溃了
zh.solution: 他在下一个很大的游戏。但是游戏快下好时他的网突然就变卡了,眼睁睁看着预计下载完成时间从一分钟逐渐涨到一年,他崩溃了。

key_facts: The increasing time is not actual elapsed time, but the estimated completion time of a process.
The cause of the breakdown is related to network connection or data transmission issues.
This process encountered a sudden problem when it was about to complete (expected in one minute).
His emotional breakdown stemmed from the failure of a technical activity.
The object he was waiting for was some form of digital content (e.g., a file, a game).

title: The Lying on the Tracks Mistake
condition: A person was found lying on the ground on a piece of ladder, and after being woken up, he cried sadly. Why?
solution: This person had drunk a lot of alcohol and wanted to lie on the railroad tracks to commit suicide. However, in his drunken state, he mistook a ladder for the tracks.

zh.title: 卧轨乌龙
zh.condition: 一个人被发现躺在野外倒在地上的一截梯上,被叫醒之后他伤心的哭了。为什么?
zh.solution: 这个人喝了很多酒,想卧轨自杀,但醉酒中错把一截爬梯当成了铁轨。

key_facts: This person originally wanted to commit suicide
He planned to lie on the railroad tracks to die
He had drunk a lot of alcohol
He mistook a ladder for the tracks
He cried because his suicide attempt failed

title: Briefcase
condition: Her husband went on a business trip out of town, but his briefcase was left at home. After receiving her husband's call for help, the wife sat down and turned on the TV.
solution: The wife turned on 'The Ring'. After Sadako crawled out, she discussed with Sadako, 'Since you crawl in and out of the TV, could you help me deliver a bag?' Sadako: 'Are you sure? Okay, I'll help you deliver it just this once.'

zh.title: 公文包

title: Choice
condition: Under the cobalt blue sky, I shouted, 'He is dead.'
solution: We are mountaineering enthusiasts, and I arranged to meet a fellow climber at the summit. However, there were two paths leading to the top. One had an attractive view at the end, and the other had a hanging cliff. I saw my companion walking toward the scenic path without noticing the cliff, so I shouted at him to pay attention. But he was so engrossed in the view that he did not notice the danger and fell to his death.

zh.title: 选择
zh.condition: 钴蓝的天幕下,我大喊着。他死了。
zh.solution: 我们是登山爱好者,和网友约了到同一座山头上见面,但是去往山顶的路有两条,一边的尽头是引人入胜的景色,一边的尽头能看到垂悬的断崖。我见到对面完全没有察觉到断崖存在的同伴,想呼喊他让他注意,但是他已然被景色完全吸引,正不断走向断崖边,然后他坠落悬崖死了。

key_facts: Two paths on the mountain, each with a different outcome
The temptation of the view leads to a fatal choice
The cliff remains unnoticed by the companion
The companion steps into danger and falls to his death
Unable to warn in time, fate is irreversible

title: The Gunshot
condition: I drove to this room. I took out my phone and made a call. Suddenly, there was a gunshot from outside. Everyone in the room died, except for me. What happened?
solution: The people in this room were all criminals. I modified a car, placing an automatic, continuously firing machine gun on it, which I could control with my phone. After I made the call, I dropped to the ground.

zh.title: 枪声
zh.condition: 我开车来到了这个房间,我打开手机打了一个电话,突然外面传来了枪声,房间里的人都死了,除了我。请问发生了什么。
zh.solution: 这个房间里的人都是罪犯,我改装了一辆车,上面放着自动循环射击的机枪,我可用手机进行控制,我打出电话后我就趴在了地下。

key_facts: The people who died in the room were all criminals.
The car 'I' drove was specially modified.
The car was equipped with an automatic machine gun.
'I' remotely controlled the weapon on the car with my phone.
The act of making a phone call was the signal to trigger the weapon.
Before the gunshots, 'I' had already ducked for cover.
The source of the gunshots was related to the car 'I' drove.
The entire event was planned and executed by 'me'.

title: Rich
condition: Everyone says they're rich, but no one pays. I'll pay. They really are rich.
solution: I attended a middle school reunion. After not seeing each other for over ten years, many people said how well they were doing and how much money they had earned. But when it was time to pay, they claimed they couldn't find their wallets and didn't make a move. Well, I'll pay then. After all, we're classmates, and I'm happy today! I opened their wallets from my bag—they weren't exaggerating, they really were rich.

zh.title: 有钱
zh.condition: 都说有钱,都不付钱,我来付钱,真是有钱。
zh.solution: 我参与了中学同学聚会。十几年没见,不少人都说自己过的多好,赚的钱有多少,可是付款的时候说找不到钱包,迟迟不行动。没办法,我来付吧,毕竟同学一场,我今天高兴!我打开我的袋子里他们的钱包——他们没说大话,还真是有钱。

key_facts: This is a gathering among acquaintances.
Those claiming to be wealthy behaved abnormally during payment.
Their abnormal behavior is related to my specific actions.
The narrator's way of confirming others' wealth is unconventional.
Other people's wallets were not on them.
The money the narrator used to pay was stolen from these classmates.

title: Cutting in Line
condition: One day, Xiao Ming went to the hospital. When picking up his medicine, he was at the end of a very long line. After half an hour, there were still many people in front of him. Just then, a stranger named Xiao Li cut in and stood right in front of Xiao Ming. Xiao Ming was very angry, but soon after, he felt very happy. Why?
solution: Xiao Ming was very angry when he saw Xiao Li cut in line. Suddenly, he glanced at the prescription in Xiao Li's hand and saw it was for Chinese medicine, while this was the window for Western medicine. Xiao Ming then gloated.

zh.title: 插队
zh.condition: 一天,小明去医院看病,取药时排在了长龙一般队伍的最后。半个小时后小明的前面依然有很多人,这时,一个名叫小李的陌生人过来插队,强行排在了小明的面前。小明非常生气,不过没过多久小明心里又非常高兴,这是为什么?
zh.solution: 小明看到小李来插队非常生气,忽然他瞥见小李手上拿着的是中药方子,而这个是西药队伍的窗口,小明遂幸灾乐祸。

key_facts: Xiao Li cut in line right in front of Xiao Ming.
Xiao Ming noticed the prescription in Xiao Li's hand.
Xiao Li had a prescription for Chinese medicine.
They were in line at the Western medicine pickup window.
Xiao Li was in the wrong line.
Even by cutting in, Xiao Li couldn't get his medicine at this window.
Xiao Ming's happiness came from realizing Xiao Li's efforts were in vain.

title: Radio
condition: Grandma Wang moved the old radio from the living room to the window, turned it on, smiling and sighing.
solution: Grandma Wang's son passed away for some reason a few weeks ago. When he was alive, he was an avid radio enthusiast. They had a special agreement: every night at a fixed time, on a specific radio frequency, they would make simple contact via radio waves, sharing the day's events. After her loved one passed away, Grandma Wang was grief-stricken and unable to accept reality. A deep conviction formed in her heart that at their agreed-upon fixed time, on that specific frequency, a part of her son's 'existence' still existed in a way she could perceive, even if the radio only emitted hissing static.

zh.title: 收音机
zh.condition: 王奶奶把客厅里老旧的收音机搬到窗边,打开,笑着,叹着气。
zh.solution: 王奶奶的儿子几周前前因故去世了。他在世时,是一个狂热的无线电爱好者。他们之间有一个特殊的约定:每天晚上在一个固定的时间,在某个特定的无线电频率上,他们会通过电波进行简单的联系,分享当天的事情。亲人去世后,王奶奶悲痛欲绝,无法接受现实。她心中产生了一种深深的信念,认为在他们约定的那个固定的时间,在那个特定的频率上,儿子的一部分“存在”仍然以某种她能感知的方式存在,即使收音机里只传来嘶嘶啦啦的静电声。

key_facts: Grandma Wang has a son who has already passed away.
The radio was a communication tool she and her son had agreed upon in the past.
Her son was a radio enthusiast when he was alive.
Turning on the radio is a ritual to remember her son.
In reality, only static noise can be heard from the radio.
The smile comes from remembrance, the sigh from the sadness of reality.

title: Her Lie
condition: Hearing my daughter's voice, I was terrified. Then I quietly thought about how to punish her for lying.
solution: When I recognized my daughter's voice on the other end of the suicide prevention hotline, I was terrified. I quietly listened to her shouting, crying, and accusing her abusive mother, and began to think about how to punish the bad child who lied, as she had clearly promised not to tell anyone.

zh.title: 说谎的她
zh.condition: 听到女儿的声音我吓坏了,然后我静静思考该如何惩罚说谎的她。
zh.solution: 当我在自杀干预热线的另一头听出是女儿的声音时,我吓坏了。我静静地听着她的咆哮、哭泣和对施暴者妈妈的控诉,开始思考如何惩罚说谎的坏孩子,她明明承诺过不会告诉任何人的。

key_facts: I am a suicide prevention hotline operator
The daughter called the hotline to accuse her mother of abuse
I am the abusive mother being accused
"Lying" refers to the daughter breaking her promise to expose domestic violence
The narrator's fear stems from the secret being revealed

title: The Sharp Object
condition: Classmates were celebrating Xiao Ming's birthday. In full view of everyone, Xiao Ming was fatally stabbed by a sharp object. Please deduce.
solution: Some cakes require internal supports like bamboo skewers or similar sharp objects for their shape. The classmate who ordered the cake got one with a unique design to surprise Xiao Ming, which contained such supports. However, some other classmates didn't know this. After singing the birthday song, they pushed Xiao Ming's head into the cake, and the sharp object pierced his skull.

zh.title: 利器
zh.condition: 同学们给小明过生日,众目睽睽之下小明却被利器刺伤死亡,请推理。
zh.solution: 有的蛋糕需要造型,里面会用竹签或者类似的利器固定。订蛋糕的同学为了给小明惊喜就定了一个造型奇特的蛋糕,里面有利器。然而有的同学并不知道,在给小明唱完生日歌后,将小明的头摁进了蛋糕里,利器刺穿了他的头颅。

key_facts: The fatal 'sharp object' was part of the birthday cake.
The cake had a special shape and contained internal supports.

Not all classmates knew about the sharp objects inside the cake.
Xiao Ming's death was related to a birthday celebration prank.
The classmates pushed Xiao Ming's head into the cake.
The sharp object inside the cake pierced Xiao Ming's head.
This was an accidental death caused by a birthday prank.

title: Destiny
condition: Every night, the deity would come into my dreams, asking me to wear that crown. Many wanted to wear that crown, but I didn't. Giant waves rose on the calm sea, and amidst lightning and thunder, I put on the blood-soaked crown. The cowardly me shed tears.
solution: Our kingdom was protected by a deity, and each king was chosen by the deity. Children across the country became king candidates and participated in training. Everyone hoped to wear that crown, symbolizing power, and become the deity's chosen one, except for me. However, if this crown was worn by someone not chosen by the deity, the wearer would die. The deity appeared in my dreams, enticing and coercing me to wear that crown. I knew I was chosen, but I didn't want to be king, to endure boundless loneliness and responsibility. My evasion angered the deity, causing strong winds and thunderstorms in our kingdom. Others frantically put on the crown hoping to appease the deity's wrath, only to die one by one. The cowardly me finally recognized reality and accepted my destiny to wear the crown when my dear friend died in front of me.

zh.title: 命运
zh.condition: 每晚神明都会来到我的梦中,让我带上那顶皇冠。想要带上那顶皇冠的人很多,但是我不想。平静的海面掀起巨浪,电闪雷鸣中我带上了满是鲜血的皇冠,懦弱的我留下了泪。
zh.solution: 我们的国度是被神明庇护的,每一任国王都是由神明选出。全国的小孩都成为国王的备选人,参加培训。大家都希望能带上那顶象征权力的皇冠,成为神的幸运儿,除了我。可是这顶皇冠如果不是被神选中的王带上,佩戴者便会死亡。神明在我的梦中出现,引诱我、胁迫我带上那顶皇冠,我知道我被选中了,但我不想成为为王,忍受无际的孤独寂寞和责任。我的逃避引来了神的不满,于是我们的国度狂风大作、雷雨交加。其他人疯了似的戴上皇冠希望平息神的怒火,却一一死去,懦弱的我终于在我的好友死在面前时认清了现实、接受了戴上皇冠的命运。

key_facts: The crown is a symbol of kingship, and the king is chosen by a deity
I am the one chosen by the deity, but I do not want to be king
The crown can only be worn by the chosen one, otherwise it leads to death
My refusal caused the deity to unleash disaster
I finally accepted my destiny to become king in the face of my friend's death

title: Kitten
condition: While on a business trip, I saw someone sharing some cat pictures on my phone; they looked a lot like my kitten. After returning home, I was terrified and heartbroken.
solution: I had a very cute kitten. Before a business trip, I hired a housekeeper to take care of it. During the trip, I saw pictures posted by an animal abuser on my phone. Many cat lovers were very angry, and I also felt very uncomfortable, especially since that cat looked a lot like my kitten. I finally returned home. However, when I opened the door, what greeted me wasn't a gentle meow, but a scene of destruction. It turned out the housekeeper I hired was the person who abused cats, took pictures, and uploaded them.

zh.title: 猫咪
zh.condition: 出差时,我看到手机上有人在传一些猫咪图片,和我的小猫长得好像。回家后,我惊恐又心痛。
zh.solution: 我养了一只非常可爱的小猫。出差前,我请了一个家政照顾它。出差时,我在手机上看到一个虐猫人发的图片,很多爱猫人士非常愤怒,我也感到很不适,特别是那只猫和我的小猫长得很像。我终于回家了。然而打开家门,迎接我的不是温柔的喵喵叫,而是满地的破碎。原来我找的家政就是那个虐猫然后拍照上传的人。

key_facts: The protagonist was on a business trip and entrusted the cat to someone else's care.
The protagonist hired housekeeping services.
The protagonist saw images related to cat abuse online.
The cat in the online pictures had similar features to the protagonist's cat.
The housekeeper is connected to the cat abuse incident.

condition: A young child at the kindergarten always counts '1, 2, 3, 7,' always skipping '4, 5, 6.' When I corrected her, she said her mom taught her that way. I was confused, so I suggested visiting her home. After the visit, I too started saying '1, 2, 3, 7.'
solution: I am a preschool teacher, and when teaching the children, I noticed one child always counted wrong. Others counted '1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7,' but she counted '1, 2, 3, 7.' When I taught her the correct way, she said that her mother taught her '1, 2, 3, 7.' I was curious, so I suggested visiting her home. She took me to a hospital. It turned out her mother had heart disease and didn’t have long to live. Her daughter’s birthday was in July, and in March, her mother had told her this story so they could enjoy one last birthday together. I was deeply moved and, like her mother, told her '3, 7.'

zh.condition: 幼儿园的一个小朋友数数总是说"1,2,3,7",总是漏掉中间的"4,5,6"。可是当我纠正她时,她却说这是她妈妈教她的,我很疑惑,便提出去她家家访,家访结束后我也对她说是"1,2,3,7"。
zh.solution: 我是一名幼师,在给小朋友们上课时,我发现有个小朋友数数总是数不对,别人数数都是 1234567,可她却说是 1237,我教她正确的数数时,她却说我教她的和她妈妈教的不一样,她说她妈妈教她是 1237,我很疑惑,便提出去她家家访,可她却带我来到了一家医院,原来她妈妈患有心脏病,并且已经活不长久了,而现在是三月份,而她的女儿生日在七月份,为了能陪伴她的女儿过最后一个生日,才对她的女儿编制了这样一个善意的谎言。得知此事后的我非常感动,便像她妈妈一样对她说 3 后面确实是 7。

key_facts: The child's counting was not actually wrong
The mother’s teaching was not random
The child’s mother suffered from a serious illness
The number 7 represents an important month
This was a mother’s kind lie

title: The Letter
condition: He gave me a letter and told me to open it only when I saw his name.
solution: In our country, it has been a long time since anyone dared to speak loudly. The dictator's shadow was everywhere, informers lurked on every street corner, and the air itself seemed to reek of fear. We lived like the walking dead, merely seeking to survive. Until that day, my neighbor quietly knocked on my door. He handed me a letter and said, 'Keep this safe, and open it only when you see my name anywhere.' I watched him leave, filled with doubt, but didn't ask further. Two days later, the whole country was in an uproar. News spread like wildfire: the dictator had been assassinated during a public appearance. The identity of the assassin was exposed, and his name blazed before my eyes – it was my neighbor. Trembling, I opened the letter. There was only one line, written in a firm and powerful hand: 'Please believe, even the darkest night will welcome the dawn.'

zh.title: 信
zh.condition: 他给我一封信,跟我说,看到他名字的时候再打开。
zh.solution: 在我们这个国家,已经很久没有人敢大声说话了。独裁者的影子无处不在,街头巷尾到处是告密者,空气中仿佛都弥漫着恐惧的味道。我们过着行尸走肉般的生活,只求苟且活着。直到那天,我的邻居悄悄敲开了我的门。他递给我一封信,说:“把这个收好,等你在任何地方看到我的名字时,再打开它。”我看着他离开,心中充满疑惑,但没有追问。两天后,全国沸腾了。新闻铺天盖地:独裁者在一次公开露面中被刺杀。凶手的身份曝光,名字赫然映入我眼帘——正是我的邻居。我颤抖着打开那封信。信中只有一行字,字迹刚劲有力:“请相信,哪怕是最黑的夜,也会迎来黎明。”

key_facts: The story is set in a repressive dictatorial country.
'He' is my neighbor, and also a revolutionary.
He planned and carried out the assassination of the dictator.
The occasion to 'see his name' was when he was exposed as the assassin in the news.
He had long been prepared for self-sacrifice.
The content of the letter is a last message conveying hope.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: New House
condition: Someone has lived in this house; I know. On the day I moved in, I didn’t see him. That night, my father came to me, saying he wanted to demolish and renovate the house. At first, I insisted on not demolishing it, but later, when I fell in love, I agreed to demolish it.
solution: I had heard that the land was unlucky and could attract ghosts, but I never encountered anything like that, so I didn’t believe it and insisted on building the house. When the house was completed and I moved in, I didn’t encounter any of the ghosts they spoke of. One night, I dreamed of my father sternly telling me, 'This house has bad feng shui. It attracts ghosts, and if you don’t demolish and renovate it, disaster will strike!' At first, I didn’t take it seriously, but after several nights of dreaming about different female ghosts sleeping with me, their cold touch woke me in a cold sweat. Fear haunted me, and I could no longer sleep peacefully. Finally, I decided to demolish the house and change the layout. During the demolition, we indeed unearthed several broken coffins, and at that moment, my spine went cold. I was relieved to have escaped a great disaster.

zh.title: 新房子
zh.condition: 这间房有人住了,我知道。入住的那天我没有见到他。晚上,父亲来找我,说想把房子拆了重修。起初我坚持不拆,后来,我恋爱了,却也将房子拆了。
zh.solution: 听别人说这块地风水不好,容易招鬼。虽然平时对这些事情有点耳闻,但是我并没有遇见过,所以一直不相信,执意要在这块地上盖房子。房子建成,我搬进自建的新房子时,也并没有遇见他们说的鬼(“他”)。直到有一天晚上,我梦到父亲严肃地对我说:“这房子风水布局不好,住着阴间散客,如果不拆不改,将会大祸临头!”。起初,我并未在意。然而,随后的几晚,我接连梦到不同的女鬼与我同眠(‘与女生恋爱’),冰冷的触感让我惊醒,满身冷汗。恐惧如影随形,我再也无法安心入睡。最终,我下定决心,咬牙拆掉了房子,修改了布局和装修。拆房过程中,果真挖出了几具残破的棺材,那一刻,我脊背发凉,庆幸自己逃过一劫。

key_facts: Rumors of feng shui and ghosts
Father’s warning and the dream
Restlessness and dreams of female ghosts
The terrifying discovery after demolishing the house
The relationship between fate and the house layout

title: Black Cat's Gratitude
condition: I killed someone. As the police took me away, I saw the black cat at the door. It was staring at me. In that moment, I knew I was wrong.
solution: I often saw that black cat downstairs, but due to business trips, I could only feed it. That day, returning from a business trip, I found many dead mice on my balcony. I instinctively thought of my frequently feuding neighbor, then rushed into his house. Amidst screams and police sirens, I saw the black cat. It was also looking at me, with a mouse still in its mouth.

zh.title: 黑猫报恩
zh.condition: 我杀了人,当警察带走我的时候,我看到了门口的黑猫,它一直在盯着我,这一刻我知道我错了。
zh.solution: 我经常能在楼下看到那只黑猫,但由于工作出差的原因,所以我只能投喂它。那天出差回来,我发现阳台上有很多死老鼠,我下意识想到经常闹矛盾的邻居,随后便冲进了他家。伴随着惊呼声和警笛声,我看到了那只黑猫,它也在看着我,嘴里还叼着一只老鼠。

key_facts: The black cat's actions were actually an act of gratitude
The dead mice were the black cat's gift
I misunderstood the source of the mice
The misunderstanding led to a fatal attack on the neighbor
Realized the truth when I saw the black cat during the arrest

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Seeing
condition: Because they discovered I could see, I had to leave forever.
solution: I was once a core member of a 'cult.' The founder was worshipped as a god. The cult demanded that any flaws in the founder be ignored, rationalized, and sanctified to maintain cohesion and authority. I was also one of the blind followers, deeply convinced. However, a chance opportunity led me to discover the founder's privately hoarded luxury goods and 'faith funds' donated by believers in his residence. I tried to communicate with my companions but was rejected and even accused. They believed my discovery was blasphemy and betrayal against the cult. To maintain the purity of the cult and the founder's image, I was collectively ostracized. At a gathering, the founder publicly denounced me, saying I was bewitched by demons and had strayed from the principles. Under the cold gaze of numerous believers, I was expelled from the cult. My former faith became a shadow. I saw clearly that the so-called faith was a scam, a farce where a cult exploited spiritual dependence. The cracks in the idol could no longer be mended.

zh.title: 看见
zh.condition: 因为他们发现我能看见,我不得不永远离开。
zh.solution: 我曾是“教派”的核心成员,创始人被奉若神明。教派要求对创始人的任何瑕疵视而不见,合理化、神圣化解读,以维系凝聚力和权威。我也是盲视者之一,深信不疑。然而,一次偶然的机会让我在创始人居所发现了其私藏奢侈品和信徒捐献的“信仰基金”。我试图与同伴交流,却遭拒绝甚至指责,他们认为我的发现是对教派的亵渎和背叛。为了维护教派纯洁性和创始人形象,我被集体排斥。一次集会上,创始人公开斥责我,说我被恶魔迷惑,背离宗旨。众多信徒冷漠注视下,我被赶出教派。曾经的信仰成了阴影,我看清所谓信仰是骗局,是邪教利用精神寄托的闹剧,神像裂痕已无法弥合。

key_facts: 'They' are members of a cult organization.
'Seeing' does not refer to eyesight, but to seeing through a scam.
The core of this organization is a deified founder.
I discovered evidence of the founder's hypocrisy and embezzlement.
Other members chose to ignore the truth and considered me a traitor.
'Leaving forever' means I was expelled from the organization for exposing the truth.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Fire
condition: A serious fire broke out downstairs from my home. The firefighters couldn't rescue me. I'm already in big trouble.
solution: I had a criminal plan, and a crucial part of it was to create the illusion that I was at home at the time of the crime to provide a false alibi. However, while I was committing the crime, a fire broke out downstairs. Firefighters entered my home to rescue me but found I wasn't there. My plan failed.

zh.title: 火灾
zh.condition: 我家楼下发生了严重的火灾,消防员没能救出我,我已然大祸临头。
zh.solution: 我有一份犯罪计划,其中重要的一环是做出案发时我在家的假象以提供虚假的不在场证明,可我实施犯罪时楼下发生了火灾,消防员进入我家救我,却发现我并不在家,我的计划失败了。

key_facts: I am in the process of committing a crime.
When the fire broke out, I was not at home.
I needed a false alibi of 'being at home at the time'.
The firefighters' rescue operation unexpectedly ruined my alibi.
The truth of 'couldn't rescue me' is that the firefighters couldn't find me in my home.
'Big trouble' refers to my crime being about to be exposed.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Saving All Beings
condition: One sword, two swords, three swords... my vision was blurred, but I knew I wouldn't die. Perhaps... this was also a way to save all beings.
solution: As an immortal undergoing trials in the mortal realm, I needed to govern the nation as a mortal to inherit my sect's ultimate teachings. Under my rule, the people lived in peace and prosperity, until a sudden epidemic of 'human-faced boils' struck, causing excruciating death to those infected, leading to widespread suffering. I secretly investigated and discovered that the military camps were unaffected, realizing that the method to cure the plague was to kill living people. I knew that publicly revealing this method would cause an inferno in the human world, so I delayed with palliative measures. Unexpectedly, another immortal from my sect secretly descended to the mortal realm. He envied my talent and my master's favor towards me, hoping to use this to destroy my foundation. He bound me, who had no immortal power, and publicly disclosed the method, telling the people that I would not die. The desperate crowd, tormented by the plague, surrounded me. Faced with their questions, I could only lower my head in silence. Breaking the silence was a desperate mother holding her baby, already infected with human-faced boils. She trembled and said, "You won't die anyway, I'm sorry... I have no choice." She grasped her baby's hand and plunged a long sword through my heart. In that instant, the human-faced boils on the baby's body slowly receded, and the expressions of the onlookers changed. Then came the second sword, the third sword... pierced by ten thousand swords, yet I could not die. The intense pain blurred my vision, but perhaps this was also a way to save all beings.

zh.title: 拯救苍生
zh.condition: 一把剑、两把剑三把剑......我的眼前一片模糊,但我知道自己不会死去,也许......这也是拯救苍生的一种方式。
zh.solution: 身为下凡历劫的仙人,我需以凡人之躯治理国家方能继承师门绝学。在我的治下百姓安居乐业,直至突发人面疮瘟疫,染病者痛苦致死,一时之间民不聊生。我暗中调查发现军营因无人染病,知晓解决瘟疫的方法是杀活人。我深知公开此法将引发人间炼狱,故以缓解之策拖延。没想到,门派中的另一位仙人悄悄下凡,他嫉妒我的天赋,亦嫉妒师尊对我的器重,希望能借此毁我道基,他将没有仙力的我绑起来,在大众之下将这个办法披露,并告诉百姓我并不会死亡。被瘟疫折磨到绝望的群众把我围起来,面对大家的诘问我只能低头不语。打破沉默的是一位抱着已经染上人面疮婴儿的绝望母亲,她颤抖的说:"反正你也不会死,对不起......我也是没有办法。"她攥着婴儿的手将长剑刺穿我的心脏,那一瞬间,婴儿身上的人面疮缓缓消去,围观百姓的群众眼神都不对了,于是是第二把剑、第三把剑......万剑穿心,但我无法死亡,剧痛让我的眼前一片模糊,也许这也是拯救苍生的一种方式。

key_facts: I am an immortal undergoing trials in the mortal realm and cannot truly die
A plague of 'human-faced boils' broke out in the country, requiring living sacrifices to be cured
Another immortal, out of envy, revealed the cure for the plague and the fact that I wouldn't die to the public
The common people, desperate to cure the plague, began to attack me
I endured the pain of being pierced by countless swords, 'saving all beings' with my immortal body

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Bowling
condition: Mom took me bowling, and I was very happy, but I only played once, and mom never took me again.
solution: I am a blind child. Since I was little, my dad often beat and scolded my mom. Dad had promised to take me bowling, but that promise remained unfulfilled for a long time. Finally, one day, Mom couldn't stand Dad anymore. During an argument, she killed Dad and dismembered him. Mom took me to a very secluded place, held Dad's head, and asked me: "Baby, do you want to play bowling with Mommy?" I was very happy, so I threw Dad's head, which was handed to me, like a bowling ball. While I was "playing," Mom secretly threw Dad's body parts in various places in the mountains. The next day, Mom was found and arrested by the police. She never took me bowling again.

zh.title: 保龄球
zh.condition: 妈妈带我去玩保龄球,我很开心,但我只玩了一次,之后妈妈就再没带我去玩过。
zh.solution: 我是一个盲眼小孩,从我小时候起,爸爸就经常打骂妈妈。本来爸爸答应了要带我去玩保龄球的,但这个承诺一直拖欠了很久也没有实现。终于有一天,妈妈受不了爸爸,在争吵之中把爸爸杀了并分尸。妈妈带着我跑到很偏僻的地方,拿着爸爸的头问我:"宝宝,要跟妈妈一起玩保龄球吗?"我很开心,于是把递过来的爸爸的头当成了保龄球扔了出去,我"打球"的时候,妈妈偷偷把爸爸的尸块扔到了山里的各个地方。第二天,妈妈被警察找上来抓了,她再也没有带我去玩保龄球了。

key_facts: Blind child / visually impaired
Father abused mother
Father died and was dismembered
Special bowling ball (head)
Mother was arrested, so she couldn't take me to play

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Birthday
condition: Today is my 15th birthday. Tomorrow is my 13th birthday. The day after tomorrow is my 10th birthday. How can I have a birthday every day?
solution: I am a staff member at a nursing home. We have many elderly residents suffering from Alzheimer's disease. Their children rarely visit them due to busy work schedules. Due to their longing and illness, they often mistake me for their daughter and pull me into celebrating their birthdays. This has led to me, almost forty years old, celebrating teenage birthdays for three consecutive days.

zh.title: 生日
zh.condition: 今天是我15岁生日。明天是我13岁生日。后天是我10岁生日。怎么每天过生日呢?
zh.solution: 我是养老院的一名工作人员,我们这里有很多患有阿尔滋海默症的老人,他们的子女因为工作忙很少来看他们,他们由于思念和疾病,经常会把我认成他们的女儿,拉着我一起过生日,这就导致已经快四十的我连着过了三天十几岁的生日。

key_facts: I am a nursing home caregiver
Elderly residents have Alzheimer's disease
Residents mistake the caregiver for their child
Different ages correspond to different residents
Consecutive birthdays are due to multiple residents celebrating in turn

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Penta Kill
condition: This is the fifth person you've killed. Although you feel a little guilty, you believe it was all worth it.
solution: You are playing the game 'Honor of Kings' and you stole your teammate's kill.

zh.title: 五杀
zh.condition: 这是你杀得第五个人,虽然心里有些愧疚,但你相信一切都是值得的。
zh.solution: 你在玩游戏王者荣耀,并抢了队友人头。

key_facts: The 'killing' took place in a virtual world.
This happened in a video game.
The game is a multiplayer online battle arena.
The 'fifth person' refers to a 'penta kill' achievement in the game.
The feeling of 'guilt' is related to a teammate.
The guilt is because you stole a teammate's kill.
Feeling it was 'worth it' is because of the sense of achievement in the game.
The 'person' refers to an in-game character or a kill count.

title: Marriage
condition: They could not marry. "First bow to heaven and earth - second bow to ancestors -" After the sounds, they fell to the ground, completing their wedding under everyone's gaze.
solution: They were soldiers on the battlefield, protecting the entire village during wartime. They were also a couple in love, but homosexuality was not allowed in that era. They had hidden their relationship well, but were eventually betrayed by a friend and sent to the execution ground. They did not die in the smoke of war, but died at the hands of the village they had fought so hard to protect. On the execution ground, they knelt facing each other, softly reciting "First bow to heaven and earth - second bow to ancestors." After the gunshots, they fell forward, completing their 'marital bow' to each other, thus completing their wedding in front of everyone.

zh.title: 成婚
zh.condition: 他们不能成婚,"一拜天地——二拜高堂——"声响之后,他们倒在地上,在众人的注视下完成了婚礼。
zh.solution: 他们是战场上的士兵,在战事中守护了整个村子。同时他们是一对恋人,但是同性恋在那个年代是不被允许的,他们一直隐藏的很好,却最终还是被好友背叛,送上了刑场,他们没有死在战争的硝烟中,而死于他们拼命所护的村子。在刑场上,他们面对面跪坐,小声念着"一拜天地——二拜高堂",枪响之后,两人面对面倒下,完成了"夫妻对拜",在众人面前完成了婚礼。

key_facts: They were same-sex lovers whose relationship was not accepted by society at the time
They did not die in battle, but were killed by the village they protected
"First bow to heaven and earth - second bow to ancestors" was their spontaneous act before death, not a traditional wedding ritual
"They fell to the ground" means they died by execution, not a posture after a wedding
"Completed their wedding under everyone's gaze" signifies they fulfilled their commitment to each other through their deaths

title: It's Dark
condition: Don't come to my house when it's dark. At eight, Mom hides under the bed. At nine, Dad drags you to drink. At ten, Sister gets up; she doesn't like you much. You're really unlucky.
solution:
Dad was a hopeless alcoholic. When he got drunk, he would beat everyone in the family. Mom could only hug me and my sister and hide under the bed. Until Dad accidentally killed Mom. Sister, to protect me, killed Dad and was taken away by the police.
The huge psychological trauma caused me to develop multiple personalities. I told my boyfriend not to come to my house when it's dark, but he still came. At eight o'clock, the Mom personality hid under the bed; at nine o'clock, the Dad personality dragged him to drink; at ten o'clock, the Sister personality woke up, saw the drunk boyfriend, thought he was like Dad, and, afraid I would repeat the same mistakes, killed him.

zh.title: 天黑了
zh.condition: 天黑别来我家,八点妈妈躲在床下,九点爸爸拽你喝酒,十点姐姐起床了,她不太喜欢你,你真是不走运。
zh.solution:
爸爸嗜酒如命,喝的烂醉便会对家里人大打出手,妈妈只能抱着我和姐姐躲在床底下。直到爸爸失手打死了妈妈,姐姐为了保护我砍死了爸爸,被警察带走。
巨大的精神打击让我分裂出了多重人格,我嘱咐男友天黑不要来我家可他还是来了。八点钟妈妈人格躲在床下;九点钟爸爸人格拽着他喝酒;十点钟姐姐人格苏醒,看见烂醉的男友,以为他和爸爸一样,怕我重蹈覆辙,于是将他杀掉了。

key_facts: The narrator suffers from severe mental problems due to past family tragedy.
The narrator exhibits different personalities of deceased family members.
These personalities emerge and act at specific times during the night.
The visitor came to the narrator's house at night despite warnings.
The visitor was ultimately killed by one of the narrator's personalities.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Sister
condition: Guests came over to the house. Grandma was holding the younger sister, and the little girl was holding her sister's tiny hand. 'Your sister is so cute, like a doll!' Every time a guest praised her sister, the little girl was very happy! But soon after, both her sister and grandma died, and the little girl collapsed.
solution: The little girl loved dolls, especially cutting off the limbs to play with them. At night, when the little girl was asleep, grandma would secretly sew the doll back together. The little girl thought dolls had 'self-healing abilities.' Her newborn sister had big eyes and looked very cute. Every time guests came over, they said the sister looked like a doll. The little girl then thought her sister also had 'self-healing abilities.' One day, when there were no adults at home, her sister died, and the little girl, along with the whole family, collapsed. Upon learning the reason, grandma felt guilty and committed suicide.

zh.title: 妹妹
zh.condition: 家里来了客人,奶奶抱着妹妹,小女孩牵着妹妹小小的手指,“你妹妹太可爱了,像个洋娃娃!”每听到客人夸奖妹妹的话,小女孩就非常开心!可是不久后,妹妹和奶奶都死了,小女孩崩溃了。
zh.solution: 小女孩很喜欢洋娃娃,尤其喜欢把娃娃的四肢剪下来玩。夜里,小女孩睡着了奶奶就偷偷给她把娃娃缝回去。于是小女孩以为洋娃娃都有‘自愈能力’。而刚出生没多久的妹妹有一双大眼睛,长得非常可爱,每次客人来都说妹妹就像个洋娃娃一样。小女孩便以为妹妹也有‘自愈能力’,于是这天家里没有长辈时,妹妹死了,小女孩和全家人都奔溃了,奶奶得知原因后更是愧疚自杀了。

key_facts: The girl thought dolls could heal themselves
Grandma secretly sewed the broken dolls back together
Guests always said the sister looked like a doll
The girl hurt her sister as she did with the dolls
Grandma committed suicide due to guilt

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Three Brothers
condition: There were three brothers. The eldest and the second were twins. The eldest died in a car accident, leaving the second brother and the youngest brother. One day, the youngest brother walked into the second brother's room, saw him looking in the mirror, and killed him. Why?
solution: The three brothers loved each other very much. After the eldest brother's accidental death, the remaining second and youngest brothers were very sad. That day, the youngest brother entered the second brother's room and saw him in front of the mirror. He suddenly had a flash of inspiration and thought of a way to have two older brothers again. So, the youngest brother took a saw and cut the second brother in half, so he would have two older brothers again.

zh.title: 三兄弟
zh.condition: 有三个兄弟,大哥和二哥是双胞胎,大哥因一次车祸死亡,剩下二哥和小弟。有一天小弟走进二哥的房间看见二哥照镜子,便把二哥杀了。请问为什么?
zh.solution: 这三兄弟十分相亲相爱,在大哥意外死亡后,剩下的二哥和小弟都很难过。这天小弟进入二哥房中,看见镜子前的二哥忽然灵光一闪,想到再次拥有两个哥哥的方法。于是小弟拿了锯子,将二哥从中剖成两半,如此以来就有两个哥哥了。

key_facts: The three brothers had a very good relationship.
The eldest brother's death was an accident.
The eldest and second brothers looked identical.
The mirror played a key role in the second brother's death.
The youngest brother deeply missed his deceased older brother.
The youngest brother's motive for killing the second brother was related to the number of brothers.
The youngest brother believed that killing the second brother could fulfill a certain wish.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Sister Drum
condition: "Sister..." The visitor was a bloody mess. I knew I couldn't escape.
solution: The village had a custom of making human skin drums, requiring human skin to be flayed alive and made into sacrificial drums. This year, I was chosen. That night, locked in the temple, I was terrified. I didn't want to die; I wanted to live. My twin sister came to visit me, so I deceived her, letting her take my place as the sacrifice, and I escaped from the village with its evil custom. Due to extreme resentment, my flayed sister turned into a vengeful ghost! Bloody and without her skin, she found me and called me "Sister." I knew I couldn't escape...

zh.title: 阿姐鼓
zh.condition: "妹妹......"来访者血肉模糊,我知道我逃不掉了。
zh.solution: 村里有制作人皮鼓的习俗,需要把人皮生剥后制成祭祀用的鼓,今年选到了我。被关进寺庙的那晚我很害怕,我不想死,我想活着。双胞胎姐姐正好来看我,于是我欺骗了姐姐,让她代替我成为了祭祀的人,而我逃出了拥有恶习的村庄。由于极度怨恨,被剥了皮的姐姐化身成了厉鬼!失去人皮血肉模糊的她找到了我,叫我"妹妹",我知道我逃不掉了......

key_facts: The story's background includes a custom of human sacrifice (human skin drums)
I deceived my twin sister, making her take my place as the sacrifice
The sister, after being flayed, transformed into a vengeful ghost seeking revenge
"Bloody mess" refers to the sister's state after being flayed
I realized I couldn't escape my sister's revenge
