title: Hospital
condition: At night, Ah Wei stayed up late playing games and suddenly fainted. His roommate rushed him to the hospital. At the hospital, the doctor performed emergency aid but stated they were helpless. The roommate accompanied the doctor to place Ah Wei in the morgue and hurried back to inform others. On the way, he received a chilling text message.
solution: On the way back, the roommate received a message from Ah Wei's phone, which read, "It's so cold, save me." The roommate was shocked and prepared to go back to rescue Ah Wei. But soon after, they received another message. "I'm the doctor, just playing a small prank on you." The roommate became even more scared, because Ah Wei's phone did not have fingerprint or facial recognition unlock.

zh.title: 医院
zh.condition: 夜晚,阿伟熬夜打游戏,突然晕倒在地室友急忙将他送往医院。到了医院,医生急救后表示无能为力。室友陪医生将阿伟放到了停尸间,赶忙回去通知其他人,路上却收到了让人毛骨悚然的短信。
zh.solution: 室友回去的路上,收到了来自阿伟手机的信息,上面写着"好冷啊,救我。"室友大惊,准备回去营救阿伟。可是不一会儿,他们又收到一条信息。"我是医生,刚刚和你们开个小玩笑。"室友更加害怕了,因为阿伟的手机并没有指纹解锁和面部解锁。

key_facts: The roommate received two text messages
Ah Wei sent a distress signal from the morgue
The doctor possessed and used Ah Wei's phone
Ah Wei's phone lacked biometric locks (fingerprint/face)
The unlocked phone exposed the doctor's suspicious behavior

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Return Home
condition: On the rural road, the passing residents stared at me. I disdained the rural customs, avoiding the procession. After returning home, there was no familiar sound, and I knew something was wrong.
solution: I am the owner of a chemical factory. I built a factory in my hometown, polluting the local land. The locals believed in the land and nature; when the chemical plant was built, they agreed because they didn't understand and thought it was profitable, but later the land gradually deteriorated, so they harbored hatred towards me. Also, there was a custom of hanging wind chimes at every doorstep to attract souls and protect the home, and the incessant tinkling of countless wind chimes in the wind irritated me. When I returned home, I didn't hear the familiar sound of wind chimes. The villagers had removed the wind chimes as revenge, which led to my parents being killed by invading spirits, and the procession I saw on the road was actually my parents' funeral procession. I also won't live much longer.

zh.title: 归乡
zh.condition: 在乡间的路上,路过的居民都在盯着我看。我鄙弃着乡下的风俗,避让行过的队伍。回家之后,却没有熟悉的声音,我知道,事情糟了。
zh.solution: 我是化学工厂的主人,在家乡建立了一座工厂,污染了当地的土地。本地人信仰土地,自然,在建立化学厂时因为不懂觉得有利可图所以同意,但后来土地逐渐恶化,所以对我具有恨意。且具有家家在门口挂风铃引魂保家宅平安的习俗,风吹过无数风铃叮当作响令我烦躁。而我回家后没有听到熟悉的风铃声,是村民为了报复我取走了风铃,导致父母被侵入的孤魂野鬼杀死,路上行过的队伍其实是为我父母送葬的队伍,而我也命不久矣了。

key_facts: Missing wind chime sounds are a key anomaly
Villagers removed wind chimes as an act of revenge
Factory pollution led to villagers' hatred
The passing procession was for the parents' funeral
The staring was due to the villagers' hatred

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Nursery Rhyme
condition: Mom killed me, Dad ate me, my siblings sat under the dining table, picked up my bones, and buried them in a cold stone tomb.
solution: I am a fox, caught by poachers and imprisoned in an abandoned mansion. It's built of stone and always cold. There are many other siblings with me in the cage. These people catch us to breed, reproduce, and slaughter us. From our perspective, they are 'Mom and Dad.' They profit greatly from our fur, and they don't waste our meat, eating it all. So, all that's left of us are scattered white bones, forever buried in this abandoned stone 'tomb.'

zh.title: 童谣
zh.condition: 妈妈杀了我,爸爸吃了我,兄弟姐妹坐在餐桌底下,捡起我的骨头,埋进冰冷的石墓里。
zh.solution: 我是狐狸,被偷猎者抓起来关到了废弃的豪宅里,这里是用石头建成的每天都很寒冷,和我呆在笼子里的还有很多其他的兄弟姐妹们。这些人抓我们过来进行培育、繁殖和屠杀,在我们的视角里,他们就是"爸爸妈妈"。利用我们的皮毛牟取暴利,同时他们也不浪费我们的肉,全部都吃进了肚子里。于是我们只剩下了被他们抛得到处都是森森白骨,永远埋葬在这座被废弃的石头"坟墓"里。

key_facts: "I" and "siblings" are animals, not humans
"Mom" and "Dad" refer to the humans who hunted and ate these animals
I was killed for my fur and meat, not due to internal family violence
"Bones" being "buried in a cold stone tomb" refers to the animal remains being discarded in a cold, abandoned building after slaughter
This is a story about animals being slaughtered and exploited by humans, told from the perspective of the hunted animal

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Miao
condition: Miao disappeared for a long time. When I saw him again, he was no longer the same.
solution: My cat Miao didn't come back for a long time after going out once. Just as I felt hopeless about finding him, I found Miao sitting obediently at the doorstep. But I always felt that he was different from before. However, I didn't think much about it, just thinking that he might have matured after going out and experiencing some things. It wasn't until today, when I was giving the cat a bath, that I was surprised to find that this cat had marks on its feet that were different from Miao's. I guess Miao must have entrusted its offspring to me, but it can never come back.

zh.title: 米奥
zh.condition: 米奥消失了好久了,再次见到他时,他已经不是那个他了。
zh.solution: 我家的小猫米奥在一次出门之后很久都没有回来,正当我感到找寻无望的时候,却发现了乖乖端坐在家门口的米奥,但是我总感觉它和以前不一样了,不过我也没有多想,只是觉得可能他自己出去历练一番之后变得成熟了,直到今天给小猫洗澡的时候,我惊讶的发现,这只小猫的脚上有和米奥不一样的印记。我猜,这应该是米奥将它的孩子托付给我了,可是它却回不来了。

key_facts: Miao disappeared and came back
Miao seemed different
The cat had different marks on its feet
Miao entrusted its offspring to me
Miao can never come back

title: The 18th Floor
condition: Xiao Ming lives on the 18th floor. Sometimes when he comes home, he takes the elevator directly to the 18th floor, but other times he takes it to the 15th floor and then climbs the stairs to the 18th. Why?
solution: Xiao Ming is a small child and can't reach the button for the 18th floor, but he can when he has an umbrella.

zh.title: 十八楼
zh.condition: 小明家住十八楼,有时他回家会直接乘电梯到十八楼,但有时他会先乘到十五楼,再爬楼梯到十八楼,为什么?
zh.solution: 小明还小,按不到 18 楼的按钮,但他带伞的时候就能做到。

key_facts: Xiao Ming is a child and is not tall enough.
He cannot always reach the 18th-floor elevator button.
The 15th floor is the highest button he can consistently reach.
When he can't reach the 18th-floor button, he presses the 15th.
He then climbs the stairs for the remaining 3 floors.
Sometimes he can go directly to the 18th floor.
This depends on whether he is carrying a certain tool.
This tool is an umbrella.
He uses the umbrella to press the 18th-floor button.

title: Selfish One
condition: The drunkard abandoned Selfish One. None of my sheep died. I put candy and its tail in its mouth. Seven years later, I met him with golden eyebrows. 'This little selfish one, unexpectedly...' I smiled
solution:
A drunkard abandoned his dog, and I picked it up and raised it. Because it loved candy and was very protective of its food, I named it 'Selfish One.' Selfish One was a Shiba Inu with golden eyebrows. It didn't like sheep, but unfortunately, I had many sheep at home. Once, wolves came. To protect the sheep I loved, Selfish One fought with the wolf pack and eventually died tragically, while my sheep remained unharmed.
There's a prairie legend that if you put a dead dog's tail in its mouth, it will be reincarnated as a human in the next life. I wanted to try it. In addition, I also put its favorite candy in Selfish One's mouth. Seven years later, I happened to meet a little boy with golden eyebrows. He smiled at me and gave me candy. His mother said in surprise from the side, 'This little selfish one, he's actually willing to give you his favorite candy!' I smiled; it seemed like I had reunited with my precious one.

zh.title: 自私鬼
zh.condition: 酒鬼丢掉了自私鬼,我的羊一只都没死,我在嘴巴里放了糖和尾巴,七年后,我遇见了金色眉毛的他,“这个小自私鬼,竟然...”我笑了
zh.solution:
一个酒鬼丢掉了自己的狗狗,被我捡来养了。因为它喜欢吃糖,很护食,我给它取名“自私鬼”自私鬼是一只柴犬,眉毛是金黄色的,它不喜欢羊,偏偏我家里养了很多羊。一次,狼来了,为了保护我喜欢的羊,自私鬼和狼群搏斗,最终惨死,而我的羊完好无损。
草原传说,给死去的狗狗嘴里放进去它的尾巴,来世便会转生为人,我想试试。此外,我还在自私鬼的嘴巴里,放了它最喜欢的糖果。七年后,我偶遇了一个金色眉毛的小男孩,他冲着我笑,还给我糖。他的妈妈在一旁惊奇地说:“这个小自私鬼,竟然舍得把他最爱吃的糖给你呀!我笑了,我好像和我的宝贝重逢了。

key_facts: 'Selfish One' is the name of the dog raised by the narrator.
This dog died fighting wolves to protect the narrator's flock of sheep.
According to local legend, putting things in a dead dog's mouth is to allow it to be reincarnated as a human.
The boy encountered seven years later has the dog's previous physical features (golden eyebrows).
The boy's nickname and his act of sharing candy are consistent with the dog's previous characteristics.

title: Coming Home After Drinking
condition: A man was walking home after drinking. As he walked down the street, all the streetlights were out, and there was no moonlight, and he was wearing all black. Suddenly, a car without its headlights on came speeding towards him, about to hit him. Fortunately, the driver saw the man and slammed on the brakes, saving his life.
solution: It was daytime. The man had been drinking all night and was only heading home the next morning.

zh.title: 酒后回家
zh.condition: 一名男子酒后徒步回家。当他走在大街上的时候,街灯已经全灭了,也没有月光,而他穿着一身黑。突然一辆没开大灯的汽车飞驰而来,眼看就要撞着他。幸好司机看见了这个男人,一脚刹车救了他的性命。
zh.solution: 此时正是白天,这个男子喝了一夜,第二天早上才回家。

key_facts: The description 'all streetlights were out' and 'no moonlight' does not mean the environment was dark.
The driver being able to see the pedestrian is unrelated to the light source information in the description.
The state of the streetlights and moon aligns with the actual time.
The actual environmental visibility at the time was very high.
The time the man was returning home is key to understanding the entire scene.

title: Little Red Dress
condition: My sister chose a little red dress for me. I wore it to school. When I came home that night, I found a corpse.
solution: My mother and my teacher were having an affair. They would always be intimate when my father wasn't home. My little red dress was the signal for the teacher; whenever I wore the red dress to school, it meant my father wouldn't be home that night. This day, Mom was busy, and my sister chose a little red dress for me. The teacher saw it, thought Dad wasn't home, and came to our house to find Mom. Dad happened to catch them, and then Dad killed him.

zh.title: 小红裙
zh.condition: 姐姐为我选了一件小红裙,我穿着去上学了,晚上回家发现了一具尸体。
zh.solution: 我的母亲和老师有染,他们总趁着父亲不在时温存。而为老师提供信息的就是我的小红裙,每当我穿着小红裙去上学就说明那晚父亲准不在。这天妈妈忙,姐姐为我选了一件小红裙,老师看见以为父亲不在家,便来我家找母亲,正好被父亲撞上,然后父亲杀了他。

key_facts: Mother and teacher had an inappropriate relationship
The little red dress served as a signal for adultery
Implied father's absence from home
The corpse is the teacher
Father is the killer
Discovery of the rendezvous led to the murder

title: Cost
condition: There's a contract that can achieve miracles and fulfill any 'hope,' at the cost of becoming a magical warrior, destined to fight despairing witches for life, protecting the world, but this war is endless.
solution: Every magical warrior has corresponding cherished things and people they want to protect in their hearts. Therefore, they make a wish and bear corresponding responsibilities for that wish. Although they save many people in their fight against witches, each battle with a witch is a narrow escape from death. Thus, in continuous combat, they forget their initial expectations and hopes, accumulating resentment and jealousy. Therefore, for every despairing witch eliminated, a magical warrior will turn into a despairing witch, making the war endless.

zh.title: 代价
zh.condition: 有一个契约能实现奇迹满足任何"希望",代价是成为魔法战士,究其一生背负与绝望魔女战斗的命运,守护世界,但这场战争却永无止境。
zh.solution: 每一个成为魔法战士的人,心中都有着相对应的珍惜事物与想保护的人,因此,他们会许下愿望,且为了这个愿望承担相应的责任。虽然在与魔女斗争中,他们救了很多人,但是每一次和魔女斗争都是九死一生的,于是在不停的战斗中他们会遗忘最初的期许与希望,积累怨恨与嫉妒。因此,消灭了多少绝望魔女,就会有多少魔法战士变成绝望魔女。

key_facts: The 'hope' of magical warriors is related to the people and things they cherish
The battle against despairing witches is extremely arduous, often a narrow escape from death
In prolonged combat, magical warriors gradually forget their initial 'hope'
Magical warriors accumulate negative emotions like resentment and jealousy during battle
Magical warriors will eventually transform into new 'despairing witches' due to negative emotions, making the war endless

title: Amusement Park
condition: A mother and son were playing in an amusement park. A few days later, they died at home.
solution: During their outing, the mother and son took a selfie and accidentally captured a fleeing criminal in the photo. They uploaded their amusement park photos online, and unfortunately, the criminal saw them. Other photos of the mother and son revealed their home address, which the criminal found, and soon after, he came to their home and killed them both.

zh.title: 游乐园
zh.condition: 一对母子在游乐园中游玩,几天后死在了家中。
zh.solution: 这对母子在游玩过程中自拍却不小心拍到了一个正在逃逸的罪犯,他们把游玩的照片传到网上,不巧被这名罪犯看到。这对母子的其它照片暴漏了她们家的位置,被罪犯查到,并在不久后上门杀了这两人。

key_facts: They took photos at the amusement park.
An unexpected person was captured in the photos.
The photos were detrimental to the murderer.
The photos were uploaded online.
The murderer found their address through the online photos.

title: Scarecrow
condition: A little girl lived with her grandparents. One day while watching TV, she heard the sound of a sickle in the rice field. Later when she went to the field and said something to her grandmother, the grandmother committed suicide. What happened?
solution: The grandfather favored boys over girls and mistreated her, so the grandmother killed him. To dispose of the body, she turned him into a scarecrow and let birds peck at it. The sickle sound was actually the grandmother killing the grandfather. The girl thought the scarecrow was her grandfather, so she asked 'Grandma, doesn't grandpa feel pain?' Overcome with guilt, the grandmother killed herself.

zh.title: 稻草人
zh.condition: 小女孩和她的外公外婆一起生活。有一天,小女孩在家看电视时听到了外面稻田有镰刀的声音,不久小女孩到了稻田里,过后就对干活的外婆说了一句话,外婆听完就自杀了,请推理。
zh.solution: 外公重男轻女,对女孩非常不好,为此外婆杀了外公。外婆为了清除尸体,把外公粉成了稻草人,并让鸟啄食尸体。声响其实是外婆用镰刀杀掉外公发出的,小女孩以为稻草人就是外公,所以对外婆说了句“外婆,外公不会痛吗?”外婆听完因愧疚而自杀。

key_facts: The sickle sound wasn't for farming
The grandfather was already dead
The scarecrow was the grandfather's corpse
The girl mistook the scarecrow for her grandfather
The grandmother's suicide was from guilt

title: No Survivors
condition: Went downstairs, someone was smashed to death. Went upstairs, someone was burned to death. Came home, and I was electrocuted to death.
solution: The person upstairs was drinking on the balcony, which was lined with empty wine bottles. As dusk approached, the person upstairs was about to turn on the light when the switch malfunctioned and shocked him. He accidentally knocked an empty wine bottle off the balcony. He looked downstairs and thought, "Oh no, I've caused trouble." The person downstairs was hit in the back of the head and died instantly. The person upstairs quickly collected all the empty wine bottles. Just then, "I" happened to leave my house and saw the person downstairs lying on the ground with a broken wine bottle, realizing that something had been thrown from above, but looking up, I couldn't tell which apartment it came from. Actually, "I" was going downstairs to set off some fireworks, since it was New Year's. Even though someone died, "I" didn't plan to change my plans. Coincidentally, because it was too close to the residential building, the large fireworks "I" set off ignited flammable materials on the upstairs window sill. I felt a bad premonition and rushed upstairs to help put out the fire, but no matter how I knocked, the door wouldn't open. It turned out the person upstairs was already heavily drunk and couldn't be woken up. Helpless, "I" immediately called 119 and a locksmith. When the fire truck arrived, the fire was quickly brought under control, but the person upstairs had already suffocated. The person who was smashed to death was actually a frequent thief of ground wires, and today he had made a good haul, but unfortunately, he wouldn't see tomorrow's sun. Because the entire building's ground wires were stolen, the appliances in various households experienced varying degrees of leakage. The upstairs switch's leakage was also caused by the cut ground wire. "I" was wet all over from the water sprayed by the fire truck during the rescue. Returning home, "I" was careless and didn't dry my hands before using the electric kettle, and was electrocuted by the leaking casing of the kettle.

zh.title: 无人生还
zh.condition:
下楼一看,有人被砸死了。
上楼一看,有人被烧死了。
回到家里,自己被电死了。
zh.solution: 楼上正在阳台上喝酒,阳台边缘摆满了空酒瓶。天色渐晚,楼上正准备开灯,没想到开关漏电吓了他一跳,他不小心把一个空酒瓶撞下了楼。他往楼下一看"坏了,这下闯祸了",楼下被击中后脑当场毙命。楼上赶紧把空酒瓶都收了起来。这时"我"正好出门,看到了倒在地上的楼下和破碎的酒瓶,意识到发生了高空抛物,但抬头一看,也不知是哪家人家抛的。其实"我"下楼是准备放点烟花爆竹,毕竟过年了。虽然死了人,但"我"不准备改变计划。好巧不巧,由于离居民楼太近,"我"放的大型烟花点燃了楼上窗台摆放的易燃物。我大感不妙,赶紧上楼想要帮忙灭火,但怎么叫门都不开。原来楼上早已喝得酩酊大醉,怎么都叫不醒。无奈之下"我"立马打了119,找来了开锁匠。消防车来了之后很快将火势控制住了,但楼上也已经窒息而死。被砸死的人其实是个偷地线惯犯,今天也是剪了个盆满钵满,只可惜他再也见不到明天的太阳了。由于整栋楼的地线被偷,各户人家的电器都发生了不同程度的漏电。楼上的开关漏电也是地线被剪所致。因为救火时消防车喷的水,"我"身上都湿了。回到家中的"我"一时疏忽,在使用电热水壶前没有把手擦干,被电热水壶漏电的外壳电死了。

key_facts: Stolen ground wires caused a chain of electrical leaks
Electrical shock led to high-altitude projectile smashing the wire thief
Protagonist's fireworks accidentally ignited upstairs
Upstairs resident, drunk, suffocated in the fire
Protagonist got wet from firefighting, later died from electrical leakage

title: Affectionate Couple
condition: After Xiao Ming cheated, his wife came back to life. They both achieved their wishes. "You two are truly affectionate."
solution: Xiao Ming cheated. To legitimize his mistress, he pretended to love his wife while secretly plotting with the mistress to kill his wife with poison and disfigure her body. Finally, the mistress underwent plastic surgery to resemble his wife and appeared by Xiao Ming's side, thus avoiding suspicion. However, his wife found out about all this. So, she turned the tables, swapped the poison, killed the mistress, and disfigured her face. Xiao Ming thought his wife died as per his and the mistress's plot, while the wife successfully killed and impersonated the mistress, surviving. Her husband genuinely loved her, from their respective perspectives, both their wishes were fulfilled.

zh.title: 恩爱夫妻
zh.condition: 小明出轨后,妻子死而复生。他们都实现了自己的愿望。"你们真恩爱呀。"
zh.solution: 小明出轨了,为了让小三名正言顺的出现在他身边,他一边假装疼爱妻子,一边暗中和小三密谋将妻子用毒药杀害并且破坏尸体的脸部,最后让小三整容成妻子的样子出现在小明身边,由此摆脱嫌疑。但是这一切被妻子知道了,于是她将计就计将毒药调换把小三反杀并破坏脸部。小明以为妻子在他和小三的密谋下死了,妻子则是成功杀死并冒充小三活了下来,丈夫还发自真心的疼爱自己,从各自的角度看,两人的愿望都实现了。

key_facts: The wife killed the mistress and impersonated her
The husband believed the original plan to kill his wife succeeded
Facial disfigurement was used for identity confusion
Both parties' wishes were achieved through mutual deception
The poison swap was the key to the plan's reversal

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Dog
condition:
Dad loves me, the dog loves me too. I successfully got into university.
Suddenly a big fire, the dog's leg was broken, Dad died.
solution: My mother was trafficked into the mountains and sold to my father. She was chained like a dog in a kennel, suffering humiliation. Until I was born, Mom finally stopped resisting and took care of me meticulously. Everyone praised my dad for taming this 'dog'. Until the night I left the mountains, Mom finally felt relieved. She took out the hidden machete, cut off the leg bound by the iron chain, crawled out from the darkness, and lit a massive fire. The firelight was as bright as day, engulfing the entire village.

zh.title: 狗
zh.condition:
爸爸爱我,狗也爱我。我顺利考上了大学。
突然一场大火,狗腿断了,爸爸死了。
zh.solution: 我的妈妈是被人贩子拐卖进山里卖给爸爸的,她像狗一样被铁链拴在狗窝里,受尽屈辱。直到生下了我,妈妈终于不再反抗细心照顾我,旁人都夸赞我爸驯服了这条狗。直到我走出大山那个夜晚,妈妈终于放心了,她取出藏好的砍刀,砍断了捆着铁链的腿,从黑暗中爬出来,点燃了漫天的大火,火光亮如白昼,吞噬了整个村子。

key_facts: 'Dog' actually refers to 'my' mother.
Mother was a victim of trafficking and imprisonment (chained).
'The dog's leg was broken' refers to the mother cutting off her own leg to break free from the chains.
Mother's actions coincided with 'me' (the narrator) getting into university and leaving home.
The fire was set by the mother for revenge and freedom, leading to the father's death.

title: Autograph
condition: A celebrity signed for a fan and died that night.
solution: At a signing event, this fan was last in line. Believing the final autograph would be most valuable, she killed the celebrity to ensure hers was the last signature.

zh.title: 粉丝签名
zh.condition: 有个明星给了粉丝签名,当天晚上就死了。
zh.solution: 当天是该明星的粉丝签名会,而她正是最后一个签名的人,她认为如果我手里的签名是最后一个签名,卖出去价格肯定很高。于是就决定杀死那个明星。

key_facts: The fan killed for the autograph
It was the celebrity's final signature
The fan wanted the rarest signature
The killer was the last fan
The death wasn't accidental

title: Business
condition: The man did a piece of business as usual, but his family, who usually supported him, was very angry this time.
solution: When the man was young, he was a human trafficker and made a fortune from it. His family was also very happy. However, after getting older, the man developed Alzheimer's disease. He forgot he was out playing with his grandson and sold him. The family was very angry.

zh.title: 生意
zh.condition: 男人照常做了一笔生意,但是以往很支持他的家人,这次非常愤怒。
zh.solution: 男人年轻的时候是人贩子,靠此发家致富,家里人也很开心,然而年纪大了之后,男人患上老年痴呆,忘记自己是带孙子出来玩的,转手就卖了。家人非常愤怒。

The family had previously benefited from or supported this 'business'.
The man now suffers from a disease causing severe memory loss.
The 'business' this time involved a family member, unlike before.

title: Forward or Backward
condition: Forward, or backward? I bet on backward. 'BOOM!' I looked up at the scene around me and knew it was over.
solution: Our tank was in a standoff with the enemy. They knew we were behind an obstacle. We had to choose whether to move forward or backward to return fire. We chose to bet on moving backward. Unfortunately, the enemy was also aiming at the rear of the obstacle. Our tank was hit. The crew was either knocked unconscious or killed. We could no longer fight back.

zh.title: 前还是后
zh.condition: 前,还是后,我选择赌后,“咚!”,我抬头看见周围的情景后我知道要完了。
zh.solution: 我们开的坦克和敌方形成对峙,敌方知道我们在障碍物后方,我们需要选择往前开或往后开对敌方进行还击,我们选择赌后,不幸的是敌方也盯着障碍物后方,我们的坦克被击中了,成员要么陷入昏迷或要么死亡,我们已无法组织还击。

This vehicle is a military weapon.
'Forward' and 'backward' are directions of movement.
The 'BOOM' is the sound of a shell hitting.
The story takes place on a battlefield.
My' choice led to our defeat.

title: The Janitor
condition: One night, a woman went into a public restroom. The lights were dim, and she saw a janitor inside. The woman greeted him and quickly went into a stall. The next day, the police questioned her about a murder that occurred in the restroom at the same time last night, asking why she didn't call for help. Please deduce.
solution: The killer had just finished the murder in the restroom when he heard someone coming in. To avoid being discovered, he disguised himself as a janitor mopping the floor. Due to the dim lighting, what the woman saw and greeted as a janitor mopping was actually the killer holding the victim upside down, using the victim's hair to mop the floor.

zh.title: 清洁工
zh.condition: 一女子某晚进了公厕,里面的灯很昏暗,只见厕所里刚好还有一个清洁工,女子打了声招呼便匆忙地进了隔间,第二天,警察因昨晚相同时间厕所发生了杀人案而找上她,质问了她当时为什么没有报警,请推理。
zh.solution: 凶手在厕所刚杀完人,就听见外面有人进来,为了不暴露,打扮成了在拖地的清洁工,由于灯光的昏暗,女子打招呼所看到的拖地清洁工,其实是凶手倒立着死者,用死者的头发在拖地。

key_facts: The 'janitor' was holding something.
The 'janitor's' tool was not a normal cleaning tool.
The 'janitor' was the killer.
The victim was the tool in the 'janitor's' hands.
The victim was in an upside-down position.

title: Siblings
condition: A brother and sister live upstairs from me. The brother is very outgoing, while the sister is quiet but a famous streamer. I watch her stream every day. I really like her, and finally, one day she noticed me. I made a sound, and now she accompanies me every day except when streaming.
solution: I am a pervert and have always liked a female streamer, so I found an opportunity to sneak into her house and hide under her bed. I secretly watched her streams every day, but what I didn't know was that her twin brother was actually the one streaming every day. Her brother, because he loved his sister, imprisoned her and also impersonated her in life, including streaming. One day, the sister was accidentally killed by her brother during a struggle. The sister's head hung down to the ground, making direct eye contact with me, who was hiding under the bed. I screamed instinctively out of fear and was discovered by the brother. So the brother killed me and buried me with his sister's body.

zh.title: 兄妹
zh.condition: 我家楼上住着一对兄妹,哥哥十分开朗,妹妹沉默寡言却是一个知名主播,我每天都会看她直播。我很喜欢她,终于有一天她注意到我了,我发出了声音,现在她每天除了直播都会陪着我了。
zh.solution: 我是一个变态,一直喜欢一个女主播,于是我找机会潜入他家藏到了床底下。并每天都偷窥她直播,然而我不知道的是,其实每天直播的都是她的双胞胎哥哥,她的哥哥因为喜欢妹妹便将她囚禁了,并在生活中也扮演着妹妹,包括直播。有一天,妹妹在挣扎中被哥哥失手误杀。妹妹的头垂到了地上,正好与藏在床底的我对视,我吓的下意识大喊了一声,被哥哥发现了。于是哥哥将我杀死并和妹妹的尸体埋在了一起。

key_facts: I hid under the bed, peeping at the female streamer's life
The streamer was actually the female streamer's brother
The brother had a twisted love for his sister, thus imprisoning and impersonating her
The sister was accidentally killed by her brother
I made eye contact with the deceased and was exposed by my frightened scream
The final 'companionship' refers to being buried together

title: Last Rose
condition: I received a beautiful bouquet of roses with a card attached, saying "I'm sorry," but I ignored it. A few days later, I was filled with regret.
solution: My lover and I were in a cold war due to some arguments and misunderstandings. During this period, she sent a bouquet of flowers and a card with "I'm sorry" written on it, but I was still angry and didn't respond, nor did I notice the back of the card. I knew she always loved me, so I took her for granted. But what I didn't expect was that she had a terminal illness and sent this bouquet and card before her death. The back of the card contained her farewell and her confession of "I will always love you," and I failed to be by her side when she needed me most. Therefore, I was filled with immense regret.

zh.title: 最后的玫瑰
zh.condition: 我收到了一束美丽的玫瑰花,上面附着一张卡片,写着"对不起",但我并不加以理会。几天后,我懊悔不已。
zh.solution: 我和爱人因为一些争吵与误会陷入冷战,在冷战期间,她送来了一束鲜花和写着"对不起"的卡片,但我还在气头上并不加以回应,也没注意到卡片的背面。我知道她一直爱我,所以我有恃无恐。但我没想到的是,她患上了绝症,临终前送上了这束花和这张卡片,这张卡片的背面写的是她的告别和她"永远爱着我"的告白,而我却未能在她最需要我的时候站在她身旁,因此我懊悔不易。

key_facts: My lover and I were in a cold war
My lover sent flowers and a card to reconcile, but I ignored it
The back of the card contained important information I didn't discover
My lover had a terminal illness, and the flowers were a final farewell
My regret stems from missing my lover's last goodbye and failing to be there for her

title: Fortune Teller
condition: 'I don't want the accurate one, I want the inaccurate one,' I thought.
solution: I am the housekeeper of a wealthy household. I embezzled the family heirloom. The wealthy master couldn't find it anywhere, so he asked me to find a fortune teller to divine where the heirloom went. I was afraid it would really be divined, so I decided to find an inaccurate fortune teller.

zh.title: 算卦先生
zh.condition: “灵的不要,不灵的才要呢”我想到。
zh.solution: 我是一名富户的管家,监守自盗了富户的传家宝,富户怎么也找不到,就让我去找一个算卦的先生算一算传家宝去了哪,我害怕真被算出来,决定找一个不灵的先生来。

This service is related to finding lost items or revealing the truth.

Choosing the 'inaccurate' one is to proactively avoid an unfavorable outcome, not a random choice.

title: Promise
condition: Watching that mother kowtow endlessly, I called the newspaper office. Both of us chose to exchange reputation for life.
solution: By chance, I saw a mother's plea for help. Her child urgently needed a large sum of money for medical treatment, but her plea went unnoticed. I decided to contact her and proposed an extreme condition: if she was willing to kowtow live on stream for an hour, I would cover her child's medical expenses. The mother agreed. After the live stream ended, I suddenly posted online, breaking my promise, and anonymously submitted the incident to the media, attaching a photo of her deceased husband who had once helped me. The media quickly reported it, and the mother's tragic situation aroused widespread sympathy, while I was accused of repaying kindness with ingratitude. Anger and sympathy turned into a flood of donations, and ultimately, her child was successfully cured. Although I was regarded as a liar by the public, I had fulfilled my repayment of kindness.

zh.title: 诺言
zh.condition: 我看着那位母亲不停的磕头,打通了报社的电话。我们两个都选择了用名誉换取生命。
zh.solution: 在一次偶然的机会中,我看到一位母亲的求助,她的孩子急需一大笔钱治病,但她的求助却无人关注。我决定与她联系,并提出一个极端的条件:如果她愿意直播磕头一个小时,我将包下她孩子的医疗费。母亲同意了,在直播结束后,我却突然发帖食言,并匿名将这一事件投稿给媒体,同时附上了一张她已逝的丈夫曾经帮助过我的照片。媒体迅速报道,母亲的悲惨遭遇引起了广泛的同情,而我则被指责为恩将仇报。愤怒和同情化作了捐款的洪流,最终,她的孩子成功治愈。尽管我被公众当作骗子,我也完成了我的报恩。

key_facts: 'Life' refers to the mother's critically ill child.
I deliberately broke the promise to pay the medical expenses.
My purpose was to create greater public opinion by playing the villain.
I had a past debt of gratitude to this mother's family; this act was to repay that kindness.
The mother's kowtowing was a pre-arranged 'performance'.
Public condemnation of me ultimately led to huge donations that saved the child.

title: Fragrance
condition: My new apartment always had a strange fragrance, but I couldn't find the source.
solution: Three months ago, I rented this apartment near the city center at a very low price. Everything about it was good, except there was always a strange fragrance in the room, and I searched for a long time but couldn't find its source. Later, the police caught a murderer, who turned out to be the former tenant of this apartment. He came to this apartment when identifying the bodies. Oh my god, he had dismembered the victims one by one and built them into the walls, spraying perfume to cover the smell of the corpses. I finally knew where the perfume came from.

zh.title: 香味
zh.condition: 我新租公寓总是有股香味,但我找不到来源。
zh.solution: 三个月前我以一个很低的价格租下了这间靠近市中心的公寓。这里哪里都好,就是房间总有股奇怪的香味,我找了很久都没有找到来源。后来,警察抓到了杀人凶手,那位凶手正是这间公寓的前租户,他指认尸体时来到了这间公寓。天哪,他将被害人一一分尸砌进了墙里,为了掩盖尸臭喷上了香水。我终于知道香水是哪里来了。

key_facts: The apartment rent was unusually cheap, suggesting an unusual reason
The apartment's fragrance was not natural, but used to cover a certain smell
The former tenant was a murderer and was linked to the apartment's unusual circumstances
The victims' bodies were hidden inside the apartment walls
The fragrance was used to mask the smell of decaying bodies

title: Will
condition: Father wrote a will, leaving almost all his inheritance to that spirit medium, put it in a letter, and mailed it to the lawyer. A month later, Father died.
solution: Ever since my younger brother passed away, Father became obsessed with spirit mediums. He even invited one home and occasionally held séances. He always said he could really hear his son's voice again. In reality, the spirit medium was just a fraud, and Father knew he was a fraud. He just didn't want to face the painful truth in his final days. When Father wrote the will, he used ink whose writing would naturally disappear, only using real ink to leave one sentence: 'I love you, my children.' Because there was no will (due to the disappearing ink), Father's inheritance was still divided equally among us.

zh.title: 遗嘱
zh.condition: 父亲写下遗嘱,将几乎所有遗产留给了那个灵媒师,装在信里寄给了律师。一个月后,父亲死了。
zh.solution: 自从弟弟走后,父亲就迷上了灵媒,他甚至请了一位灵媒师回家,不时举办降灵会,他总说他真的又听到了儿子的声音。实际上,灵媒师只是个骗子,父亲也知道他是个骗子,他只是在最后的日子里不想面对惨痛的事实,父亲写遗嘱时用了字迹会自然消失的墨水,只用真正的墨水留下了一句话“我爱你们,我的孩子”。由于没有遗嘱,父亲的遗产还是平分给了我们。

key_facts: The will was written with special ink that would disappear.
Father knew the spirit medium was a fraud.
Father had a son who had already passed away.
Father pretended to believe the spirit medium for psychological comfort.
The will letter also contained real information written in normal ink.
Ultimately, the will became invalid because the writing disappeared.

title: Perfect Crime
condition: He killed his lover with a pair of scissors, but there wasn't a single drop of blood at the scene.
solution: His lover met with an accident and was declared brain dead after rescue attempts failed, only able to be kept alive by machines. He couldn't bear to watch his lover lying on the hospital bed, growing thinner day by day, yet never waking up again. So he decided to cut the machine's power cord with scissors, allowing his lover to pass away peacefully in the hospital. He killed his lover with a pair of scissors, but there wasn't a single drop of blood at the scene.

zh.title: 完美犯罪
zh.condition: 他用一把剪刀杀死了他的爱人,现场却连一滴血迹都没有。
zh.solution: 他的爱人遭遇意外,抢救失败后被宣布脑死亡,只能靠机器维持生命。他不忍心看着自己的爱人躺在病床上日渐消瘦,却永远不会再醒来,于是他决定用剪刀把机器的电源线剪断,让爱人在医院安详地离开人世,他用一把剪刀杀死了他的爱人,现场却连一滴血迹都没有。

key_facts: Before being 'killed,' the lover was in a special state of existence (e.g., dependent on machines for life support).
The scissors were not used on the lover's body.
The act of 'killing' here refers to terminating the life support process.
There was no blood because no open physical wound was inflicted.
The man's motive was related to ending his lover's suffering.

title: The Knocking Sound
condition: A couple was on a road trip. Their car broke down on a mountain road at night. The husband got out to find a place with a signal to call for help. Knowing from the news that a serial killer was on the loose nearby and it was pitch black, the husband told his wife before leaving to only open the car door if he knocked exactly three times. A long time passed, and the wife heard knocking many times, but never exactly three times.
solution: Shortly after the husband left, he was killed by the sadistic serial killer who was waiting for him. Out of extreme morbid curiosity, the killer dragged his body back to the car and hung him from a tree next to it. The wind was strong that night, and the body swayed with the wind, so his feet frequently hit the car door, making knocking sounds many times.

zh.title: 敲门声
zh.condition: 有一对夫妻自驾游,半夜在山路上抛锚了,丈夫准备下车去远处能接收到信号的地方求救,因为来之前知道新闻上说附近有一位连环杀人案的在逃犯,并且夜晚漆黑看不清楚,所以丈夫在下车前和妻子约定敲车门三下就给开门。过了很久,妻子听到了很多次敲门声,但每次都不是三下。
zh.solution: 丈夫刚走不久就被守株待兔的变态杀人犯给杀了,杀人犯出于极致的恶趣味,拖着他的尸体回到了车旁边,把他吊在了车旁边的树上,当时风很大,尸体随风摇摆,所以双脚时常会碰撞到车门发出声音许多次。

key_facts: The husband was killed shortly after he left.
The killer was waiting for him nearby.
The husband's body was brought back near the car.
The husband's body was hung from a tree next to the car.
The knocking was not done intentionally by a person.
The strong wind that night is related to the knocking sound.
The knocking sound was produced by the husband's body hitting the car door.
The killer did this out of a sense of morbid curiosity.

title: The Nanny
condition: Lately, the nanny has been slacking off, and the house is a mess. I went to the living room to complain to my father, but he said, 'We don't have a nanny.' I went back to my bedroom to question the nanny, but she said, 'Your father passed away a year ago. Today is the anniversary of his death.' Who should I believe? I ran out of the house and bumped into our neighbor, Mrs. Zhang. What she said made me completely break down. Please deduce.
solution: After my father passed away, I missed him so much that I often imagined scenes of him being alive. Over time, unable to distinguish fantasy from reality, I developed multiple personalities. Lacking care, I imagined a nanny to take care of my daily life. That day, the neighbor Mrs. Zhang said, 'There have been burglaries in the neighborhood recently. You're all alone, so be careful.'

zh.title: 保姆
zh.condition: 最近保姆总是偷懒,家里乱糟糟的,我跑去客厅跟父亲告状,父亲却说:"我们家没请保姆。", 我回到卧室质问保姆,保姆却说:"你爸爸已经去世一年了,今天是他的忌日。"我到底该相信谁?于是我冲出家门,正好撞见邻居张阿姨,张阿姨的一席话,让我彻底崩溃了,请推理。
zh.solution: 爸爸去世后,我因过度思念常常幻想他在世的场景,久而久之,分不清幻想还是现实的我患上了人格分裂,但由于缺乏照顾,我便幻想出一个照顾我饮食起居的保姆。那天邻居张阿姨说的是"最近小区招人盗窃,你一个人要注意安全。"

key_facts: 'My' father has indeed passed away.
The 'nanny' is not a real person.
The 'nanny' is a figment of 'my' imagination.
'I' suffer from a mental illness.
'I' started having fantasies due to excessive grief over my father.
'I' imagined the nanny to be taken care of.
The neighbor Mrs. Zhang's words confirmed that 'I' live alone.
Mrs. Zhang was warning about being careful and preventing theft.

title: The Box
condition: The Baron invited a couple to a banquet at his mansion. However, the husband suddenly told his wife he had urgent matters and couldn't attend. He personally went to the Baron's mansion to explain. The next day, his body was found in a box at the Baron's house.
solution: The man was naturally suspicious and had suspected his wife of cheating multiple times, beating her, but not divorcing her due to lack of evidence. This time, the man again suspected his wife was having an affair with the Baron. He pretended he couldn't attend the banquet, and after personally visiting the Baron to explain, he hid in the Baron's house, intending to find evidence of his wife's infidelity. However, all of this was anticipated by the wife. To get rid of her suspicious husband and the Baron who was harassing her, she killed the man hidden in the box during the banquet and framed the Baron, killing two birds with one stone.

zh.title: 男爵家的箱子
zh.condition: 男爵邀请一对夫妻来自己府上赴宴,可丈夫突然和妻子说自己有急事无法赴约,他亲自来到男爵府上解释。第二天,他的尸体被发现在男爵家的一口箱子里。
zh.solution: 男子生性多疑,曾经多次怀疑妻子出轨,对其拳打脚踢,却又因找不到证据不与妻子离婚,这一次,男子又怀疑妻子与男爵有染,假意说无法赴宴,在亲自登门像男爵解释后藏在了男爵家,想要伺机找到妻子出轨的证据。然而,这一切都在妻子的意料之中,为了摆脱掉多疑的丈夫和骚扰她的男爵,她在宴会期间杀了藏在箱子里的男子,嫁祸给男爵,一箭双雕。

key_facts: The real murderer is the wife.
The husband hid in the box to catch them in the act of adultery.
The husband had a history of domestic violence.
The wife anticipated the husband's actions and made a plan.
The Baron was not the wife's lover, but a harasser.
The wife's goal was to 'kill two birds with one stone,' eliminating two people at once.

title: Boyfriend
condition: In the beginning, my boyfriend loved me very much, but later he started bullying me, always snatching the best food for himself. In the end, he died.
solution: We were both pigs. My boyfriend used to always let me have the best food, but then he changed, always snatching the best food for himself, even pushing and nudging me hard to get food. I thought he no longer loved me, until one day, our owner took him away with a knife. Hearing my boyfriend's agonizing squeals, I finally understood: he had heard that the owner was going to kill one of us, so he decided to fatten himself up to save my life. I'm sorry, I misunderstood you...

zh.title: 男朋友
zh.condition: 开始的时候男朋友他很爱我,但后来他开始欺负我了,总是抢最好的食物自己吃,最后他死了。
zh.solution: 我们都是小猪,我男朋友以前总是把最好的食物让给我,但他后来变了,总是抢最好的食物自己吃,甚至为了抢食而使劲地推我拱我。我以为他已经不再爱我,直到有一天,我们的主人拿着刀把他带走了。听到男朋友痛苦的嚎叫,我终于明白了,他是听说了主人要杀掉我们当中的一个,才决定把自己养肥,以此来保住我的性命。对不起,冤枉你了...

Food snatching was intentional fattening

Boyfriend sacrificed himself for love

title: The Water Weeds
condition: A man was walking by a river with his girlfriend when she suddenly fell in. The man quickly jumped into the water to find her but couldn't. He left heartbroken. Years later, he revisited the place and saw an old man fishing. The fish the old man caught had no water weeds on them. He asked the old man why the fish weren't covered in weeds. The old man said, 'Don't you know? This river has never had any water weeds.' Upon hearing this, the man suddenly jumped into the river and committed suicide.
solution: The man had once grabbed his girlfriend's hair but thought it was water weeds and let go. His girlfriend essentially died at his hands.

zh.title: 水草
zh.condition: 有个男子跟他女友去河边散步,突然他的女友掉进河里了,那个男子就急忙跳到水里去找,可没找到他的女友,他伤心的离开了这里。过了几年后,他故地重游,这时看到有个老人家在钓鱼,可那老人家钓上来的鱼身上没有水草,他就问那老人家为什么鱼身上没有沾到一点水草,那老人家说:“你不知道啊,这河从没有长过水草。”说到这时那男子突然跳到水里,自杀了。
zh.solution: 男子曾抓到女友头发,却以为是水草松手了,女友几乎等于死在男子手里。

key_facts: The man had grabbed something while trying to save his girlfriend.
At the time, he mistook what he grabbed for water weeds.
Because of this misunderstanding, he let go.
He had actually grabbed his girlfriend's hair.
This river has no water weeds at all.
The old man's words revealed the fact that there were no weeds in the river.
The man realized he had let go of his girlfriend.
He understood that his girlfriend's death was related to him letting go.
The man committed suicide out of intense guilt.

title: Noodle Soup
condition: An older man had a wife, child, and lover who kept urging him to divorce. After refusing, one day he found both lover and child dead at home with a message on the wall. What was it?
solution: The man was actually gay. Since the male lover couldn't bear children, he refused to leave his wife. In revenge, the lover killed the child, placed it in his own abdomen after disemboweling himself, then wrote in blood: 'I'm pregnant with your child.'

zh.title: 同性恋
zh.condition: 有个中年老男人,他有个妻子和孩子,还有一个情人,情人总是劝他和他老婆离婚,但是老男人拒绝了他,有一天他发现情人和孩子都死在了家中,墙上还有一句话,是什么?
zh.solution: 老男人其实是同性恋,因为情人生不了孩子,老男人才拒绝和他在一起。情人为此非常不甘,杀了孩子然后自己切腹把孩子放在肚子里,再自杀。墙上是情人用孩子的血写的“我怀了你的孩子”

key_facts: The man had both wife and lover
Lover urged divorce but was refused
The man was homosexual
Lover killed child then himself
Wall message: 'I'm pregnant'

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Renovation Noise
condition: The continuous renovation noise for months kept me from sleeping, making me dazed and feeling like someone was spying on me. Yesterday it finally stopped, which was great. Today, I went out to celebrate with a friend and got drunk. My friend, half-drunk, walked me home. The elevator was broken, so we climbed the stairs. 'Huh, something feels off about your place,' my friend said. 'You're just drunk, don't worry. Lock the door well. I'm heading back.' The next day, my friend found out I was missing. Please deduce.
solution: I had once rejected a wealthy suitor. Unwilling to give up, he bought the apartment downstairs at a high price. The renovation noise was from him redecorating his place. The suitor stalked me daily, had people enter my apartment when I was away, and renovated his place to be an exact replica of mine, even installing the same lock. That day, he saw that my friend and I were both drunk. He sabotaged the elevator and changed the floor numbers. Because the elevator was broken, we took the wrong floor and entered his apartment. After my friend left, I was imprisoned by him when he suddenly appeared.

zh.title: 装修声
zh.condition: 连续好几个月的装修声吵得我睡不着,精神恍惚,老觉得有人偷窥我。昨天终于没有了,真好。今天约朋友庆祝,喝醉了。朋友半醉送我回家,电梯坏了,我们爬楼梯终于到了家。我:"咦,家里有点不对劲?"朋友说。"你喝多了,别担心,反锁好门。我先回去啦。"而第二天,朋友发现我失踪了,请推理。
zh.solution: 我曾经拒绝了一个有钱的追求者,追求者因为不甘,高价买下了楼下的房子。听到的装修声就是他装修房子的声音。追求者每天都跟踪我,在我不在家的时候就安排人进入我的房子,并且一比一按照我家的装修,装修他的房子,还将我家的门锁一起装到了他家。那天跟踪我的时候,他发现我和朋友都喝醉了。于是弄坏了电梯,并且将楼层的提示更换了。因为电梯坏了导致我们走错楼层,进入了他的家。等朋友走后,我便被突然出现的他囚禁了起来。

key_facts: The renovation noise came from the apartment downstairs.
The resident downstairs was a suitor 'I' had rejected.
The downstairs apartment was renovated to be identical to 'my' home.
The locks on both apartments were also changed to be the same.
The elevator was deliberately broken.
The floor signs in the stairwell had been tampered with.
'I' and my friend went to the wrong floor.
'I' entered the suitor's apartment downstairs.
After my friend left, 'I' was imprisoned by the suitor.
Feeling something was 'off' was because it wasn't 'my' real home.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Lighthouse Keeper
condition: A man turned off the light and went to bed. The next morning, he opened the window and committed suicide. Why?
solution: He was a lighthouse keeper. He misjudged the time and turned off the lighthouse light. The next morning, he saw the shipwrecks and realized his mistake.

zh.title: 灯塔管理员
zh.condition: 一个人关灯睡觉,第二天早上他打开窗户后自杀了。为什么?
zh.solution: 他是灯塔管理员,他记错了时间,关掉了灯塔,第二天看见沉船意识到了自己的错误。

key_facts: The man was a lighthouse keeper
He turned off the lighthouse light
Turning off the light caused a shipwreck
He saw numerous shipwrecks from his window in the morning
He chose suicide due to immense guilt

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Online Shopping
condition: Xiao Ming is an online shopping enthusiast who loves Browse shopping websites. These sites always recommend things he likes and wants to buy. Recently, the website has frequently recommended frozen dumplings to him. Later, Xiao Ming died.
solution: Xiao Ming was a shopping enthusiast who spent all his time Browse shopping websites, not working or earning money. Xiao Hong was so angry that she wanted to chop him into pieces. Xiao Hong thought about this day and night, and in her sleep, she mumbled: "Chop him into filling with a cleaver." His phone heard this and started recommending frozen dumplings to Xiao Ming. Xiao Ming didn't understand why dumplings were being recommended and didn't sense his wife's murderous intent. One day, Xiao Hong actually did it, and he died.

zh.title: 网购
zh.condition: 小明是个网购达人,非常喜欢逛购物网站,购物网站也总是能推荐到他喜欢的、想买的东西。最近网站经常给他推荐速冻水饺。后来小明死了。
zh.solution: 小明是个购物达人,天天不干活不赚钱,沉迷逛购物网站。小红好生气恨不得剁碎了他。小红日日夜夜想这件事,晚上睡觉的时候说梦话:用菜刀把他剁成馅儿。手机听到了,就给小明推荐速冻饺子。小明不明白推荐水饺是为什么,也没察觉老婆的杀意。后来某一天,小红真的动手了,他就死了。

key_facts: One method of shopping website recommendation algorithms is through phone eavesdropping
The wife mumbled in her sleep about chopping Xiao Ming into filling
The wife's mumbling was overheard by the phone
Xiao Ming was immersed in online shopping and idle
The wife had murderous intent towards Xiao Ming, and he eventually died

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Art Teacher
condition: I was an art teacher at a school. After my first class, I committed suicide.
solution: I asked the students to draw their mothers. I found that all the mothers they drew only had bodies and no limbs. It turned out that the people in this village were very poor and couldn't find wives, so they had to buy them from outside. To prevent the women from escaping, they cut off their hands and feet. When I realized this and wanted to escape, I found the doorway already full of villagers. There was no escape, so I chose to commit suicide.

zh.title: 美术老师
zh.condition: 我在一所学校当美术老师,上完第一节课后,我自杀了。
zh.solution: 我让学生画自己的妈妈,发现他们画的妈妈都只有身体没有四肢,原来这个村的人很穷讨不到媳妇只能去外面买,为了防止女人逃跑,就将她们手脚砍下,当我意识到这一点时想逃走,却发现门前已经站满村民,已经逃不了了,于是选择自杀.

key_facts: The suicide is related to the content of the art class.
The 'mother' figures drawn by the students shared a common abnormality (no limbs).
The teacher realized through the drawings that there was trafficking of women in the village.
The villagers resorted to extreme measures (cutting off hands and feet) to prevent women from escaping.
The teacher realized they were also in danger and could not escape.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Christmas Gift
condition: Today Dad told me to go to bed early, but late at night, I heard a knock at the door. Curious, I pushed open the door to see if Dad had prepared the Christmas gift. In the living room, a red Christmas tree was covered with decorations, an un-stuffed turkey was on the dining table, and a green Santa Claus was hidden in the fireplace. Then, another knock echoed from outside the door.
solution: I am red-green colorblind. Tonight is Christmas Eve. Dad lied to Mom that he would be working late, but actually, he was preparing Christmas gifts for us. Mom believed him and brought a strange uncle home. Dad, who had been hiding in the house all along, collapsed. He killed this strange uncle, skinned him, and threw the skin into the fireplace. Dad disemboweled Mom and placed her on the dining table, hanging her entrails on the Christmas tree. Afterward, Dad also hanged himself from the eaves outside the main door. The wind blew Dad's body, creating the knocking sound.

zh.title: 圣诞礼物
zh.condition: 今天爸爸让我早点睡觉,可深夜我却听到了敲门声,我好奇推开门去看,是不是爸爸准备好了圣诞礼物,客厅里一颗红色的圣诞树上挂满了装饰品,还没填料的火鸡摆在餐桌上,绿色的圣诞老人藏在了壁炉里,这时门外又响起了敲门声。
zh.solution: 我是一个红绿色盲,今天是平安夜,爸爸骗妈妈他要加班到很晚,实际是他要给我们准备圣诞礼物,可妈妈信以为真,带了一个陌生的叔叔到家里,一直藏在家里的爸爸崩溃了,他杀死了这个陌生的叔叔,把他的皮剥了下来后扔进了壁炉里。爸爸把妈妈的肚子掏空了摆在了餐桌上,掏出来的东西挂在了圣诞树上,随后爸爸也在大门外的屋檐上上吊自杀了,风吹动爸爸的尸体,传来了敲门声。

key_facts: My red-green colorblindness led to color misidentification
Christmas decorations were actually human organs and skin
The turkey on the dining table was actually the mother's corpse
The Santa Claus in the fireplace was actually the lover's skin
Father witnessed mother's infidelity, then committed murder and suicide
The knocking sound from outside the door originated from the father's hanging body

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Family Photo
condition: As Xiao Ming was about to leave home, he accidentally looked up at the family photo. In that instant, he realized he was done for.
solution: Xiao Ming's family was invaded by a killer. Everyone in the family was killed except Xiao Ming, who hid under the bed and escaped. When it became quiet outside, he quietly crawled out, ready to leave home and call the police. But when he saw the family photo, he suddenly realized that the assailant would also see the family photo. Turning his head, a pair of eyes was staring at him from behind.

zh.title: 全家福
zh.condition: 当小明正准备离开家时,他无意中抬头,看了一眼全家福那一瞬间他意识到自己完蛋了。
zh.solution: 小明家里被杀人魔闯入,全家都遇害了只有小明躲在床底,逃过一劫,当外面安静后,他悄悄爬出,准备离开家报警。但看到全家福时他猛然意识到,歹徒也会看见全家福,一转头,后面一双眼晴正盯着他。

key_facts: Everyone in the family except Xiao Ming was killed
Xiao Ming survived by hiding
The family photo exposed the survivor's information
Realized the killer used the family photo
The killer had not left the scene
The killer was behind Xiao Ming

title: The Anatomy 'Teacher'
condition: A man had liked a woman for a long time. The woman proposed a condition: if he could meet it, she would be his girlfriend. He eventually met the condition, but the woman went insane. Please deduce.
solution: The woman actually liked the man too, but his grades were very poor. To encourage him, she made a pact to get into the same university as him. In the end, the woman got into medical school alone, while the man failed the entrance exam. The woman went insane because she never expected the man to enter the same university as an 'anatomy teacher'—a cadaver for her dissection class.

zh.title: 人体老师
zh.condition: 某男子喜欢一女子好久了,女子提了一个条件说只要他做到她就答应做他女朋友,后来他做到了,而女子却疯了,请推理。
zh.solution: 女子其实也喜欢男子,但因为男子成绩非常不好,为了鼓励他,约定了和男子考进同所大学。 最终女子一个人上了医学院,男子却没考上。女子疯了是因为没想到男子却是以解剖课的人体老师身份和她进了同所大学。

key_facts: The condition was to get into the same university.
The woman was admitted to medical school.
The man failed to get into the university.
The man entered the university in a non-student capacity.
The man's appearance was related to medicine.
The man became a specimen for the anatomy class.
The woman recognized him in class.
She lost her mind as a result.

title: Orange
condition: I took an orange from Grandma's room for Dad, but Dad was terrified.
solution: Our family wasn't wealthy. Grandma loved me very much when she was alive. She bought me many oranges, which I loved. After Grandma passed away, Dad concealed the news of her death to continue receiving subsidies. I saw that the window in Grandma's room was open, and oranges hung all over the branches outside the window. I thought Grandma had sent them. Later I learned that even in her final moments, Grandma hadn't forgotten me; that orange tree symbolized her endless love and her presence with me.

zh.title: 橘子
zh.condition: 我从奶奶房间拿了个橘子给爸爸,爸爸却惊恐万分。
zh.solution: 我们家并不富裕,奶奶生前一直很爱我。给我买了很多我喜欢的橘子。奶奶去世后,爸爸为了继续领补助,隐瞒了奶奶去世的消息。我看到奶奶房间的窗户开了,窗户外树枝上挂满了橘子。我以为是奶奶送来的,后来我才知道原来奶奶的最后时刻也没有忘记我,那棵橘子树代表她无尽的爱和陪伴我的象征。

key_facts: Grandma had actually passed away.
Dad concealed Grandma's death for a specific reason (e.g., for benefits).
The oranges were not normally stored in Grandma's room but came from a special source outside the room (an orange tree outside the window).
The child did not know Grandma had passed away and misunderstood the origin of the oranges.
Dad's fear was related to the appearance of the oranges and the possibility of his concealed secret being revealed.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Anger
condition: Watching his angry back, I could finally start doing what I wanted to do.
solution: When I presented the groundbreaking discovery to my superior, he flew into a rage, sternly forbade me from continuing the research, and demanded that everything be sealed. But from his deliberately amplified anger and some subtle habitual actions that contradicted his anger, I saw through his disguise. I understood that this discovery was too sensitive, and he had to 'deny' it with the most intense posture to protect me and this laboratory. His seemingly decisive 'ban' actually cleared the obstacles for me. Under the guise that everyone thought I had stopped here, I gained the freedom to act secretly. Watching his angry back as he left, I knew clearly that he had, in this way, won me a precious opportunity to continue seeking the truth. Now, I can go find the key evidence that he secretly hoped I would find.

zh.title: 愤怒
zh.condition: 看着他愤怒的背影,我终于能开始做我想做的事了。
zh.solution: 当我将那个颠覆性的发现呈给我的上司时,他勃然大怒,厉声禁止我继续研究,并要求封存一切。但我从他刻意放大的怒火和一些细微的、与愤怒相悖的习惯动作中,看穿了他的伪装。我明白,这个发现太过敏感,他必须用最激烈的姿态来“否定”它,才能保护我和这个实验室。他看似决绝的“禁令”,实际上却为我扫清了障碍。在所有人都以为我已止步于此的表象下,我获得了秘密行动的自由。看着他怒气冲冲离去的背影,我清楚,他以这种方式,为我争取到了继续探寻真相的宝贵机会。现在,我可以去寻找那个他暗中期望我找到的关键证据了。

key_facts: 'He' and I have a superior-subordinate relationship.
His anger is a disguise, not his true emotion.
The real purpose of his feigned anger is to protect me.
I reported a sensitive and significant research finding to him.
His public 'ban' provided cover for me to secretly continue my research.
What I want to do is precisely what he expects me to secretly accomplish.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
condition: Gurgle gurgle... Rock, paper, scissors! How could this be? The next day, the police found my body.
solution: After a breakup, I drank a lot alone. On my way home, I went to a public restroom. It was very dark inside. I suddenly had the idea to play rock, paper, scissors with the mirror. Unexpectedly, my reflection won... It turned out it wasn't a mirror, but a window. Opposite the window stood a murderer.

zh.title: 石头剪刀布
zh.condition: 咕噜咕噜......石头剪刀布!怎么会这样?第二天警方发现了我的尸体。
zh.solution: 我因为分手独自喝了很多酒,回家的路上去了公共厕所,厕所里很黑,我突发奇想对着镜子玩石头剪刀布,没想到镜中的我赢了......原来那并不是一面镜子,而是一个窗户,窗尸对面站着一个杀人犯。

key_facts: The dark environment where the game took place is key.
The surface thought to be a mirror was actually transparent.
The deceased played rock, paper, scissors with an object that looked like a mirror.
The result of rock, paper, scissors was physically impossible (the other side won).
There was someone on the other side of the 'mirror' in the dark.
The person on the other side of the 'mirror' caused my death.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Black Cat
condition: She died, the police came, the cat meowed, and I was done for.
solution: I greatly disliked my wife and the black cat that was always close to her. Finally, one day, drunk, I accidentally killed my wife. I was terrified and didn't know how to deal with it. I suddenly remembered there was an unfinished wall in the basement, so I walled my wife inside. The police listed me as a suspect and came to inspect me multiple times, but I always deceived them with my flawless acting. One gloomy day, just like the day I killed my wife, the police came again. I listlessly agreed and, at their request, took them to the basement. A cat's meow echoed from the silent basement. The police sensed something was wrong and smashed open that wall... My eyes widened in horror. I then realized I had walled up the black cat, who was inseparable from my wife, along with her. But how was it still alive...? The black cat glanced at me and continued to meow at the police. I knew I was done for.

zh.title: 黑猫
zh.condition: 她死了,警察来了,猫叫了,我完了。
zh.solution: 我很看不惯我的妻子,以及一直和她亲近的黑猫。终于有一天酒醉后我把妻子误杀了,我很害怕,不知道如何处理。突然想到地下室有一股没有砌好的墙,于是我把妻子封进了墙里。警察将我列为嫌疑人,多次来检查我,每次都被我天衣无缝的演技骗过去。某一天天阴沉沉的,跟我杀死妻子那天一样,警察又来了。我百无聊赖地答应着,应他们要求把他们带进了地下室,寂静的地下室传来猫叫,警察发现不对劲砸开了那堵墙......我惊恐地瞪大了眼睛,才发现自己把与妻子形影不离的黑猫也砌进墙里了,可是它是怎么活下来的......黑猫撇了我一眼,继续朝那群警察叫,我知道我完了。

key_facts: I killed my wife and hid her body in the wall
I also walled up the black cat, which was inseparable from my wife, with her
The police discovered the anomaly and found the body due to the cat's meow
The black cat's meow was key to revealing the truth
My plan ultimately failed due to the appearance of the black cat

title: Turn Off the Light
condition: I was home alone and forgot to turn off the light before going to bed. When I suddenly realized in the middle of the night that I had forgotten to turn off the light, I burst into tears.
solution: My beloved had just passed away. He used to turn off the light for me every night before he died. The moment I realized I had forgotten to turn off the light, I suddenly became painfully aware that my beloved was truly gone, and no one would ever thoughtfully turn off the light for me again. Overwhelming grief and longing surged through me, making me burst into tears.

zh.title: 关灯
zh.condition: 我独自在家,晚上睡觉前忘了关灯。当我半夜突然意识到我忘了关灯时。我却嚎啕大哭起来。
zh.solution: 因为我的爱人刚刚去世,他生前每晚都会帮我关灯,当我意识到自己忘了关灯的那一刻,我突然无比清晰地意识到,爱人真的不在了,再也不会有人像他那样贴心地为我关灯了。巨大的悲伤和思念涌上心头让我忍不住嚎啕大哭。

key_facts: The habit of turning off the light was associated with a loved one
Before his death, the loved one used to turn off the light for me when I forgot
Forgetting to turn off the light triggered the realization
The light being on symbolized the loved one's eternal absence
Seeing the light triggered deep sadness and longing, causing me to cry profusely

title: One Last Time
condition: 'This is the last time,' the man said and stuck out his tongue. Shortly after, he died, with his tongue still out.
solution: The man was in a casino. Every time he lost a bet, he would cut off a part of his body. 'The last time' referred to the fact that only his tongue was left to reach for the cards.

zh.title: 最后一次
zh.condition: "这是最后一次了"男子说完伸出了舌头。不久后他死了,舌头还在外面。
zh.solution: 男子在的场所是赌场,每赌输一次就砍掉自己的身体部位,而最后一次是指他只有舌头可以够到牌了。

key_facts: The event took place in a casino.
The man was gambling.
The price for losing a bet was losing a body part.
The man had already lost multiple body parts.
Sticking out his tongue was his way of participating in the gamble.
His tongue was the last part of his body he could use to reach the cards.
'One last time' referred to betting with his tongue.
The man died from self-mutilation.

title: Beasts of Burden
condition: It was the period of the American Westward Expansion. A cowboy rode his little white horse to hunt wild buffalo. He found that the buffalo always saw his white horse from afar, so he came up with an idea: paint the horse brown. This method worked, but he was even less successful at hunting buffalo.
solution: The horse was indeed harder to see, but the smell of the paint made it easier to be smelled.

zh.title: 牛马
zh.condition: 其时是美国西部大开发时期。一名牛仔骑上他的小白马去猎野牛。他发现野牛总是远远就看见他的白马,于是想出一个办法:把马用颜料刷成棕色。这个办法起效了,但他反而更猎不着野牛了。
zh.solution: 马确实更难被看见了,但颜料的味道让它更容易被闻见了。

key_facts: The disguise successfully reduced the horse's visual visibility.
Solving the visual problem introduced a new sensory problem.
The smell of the paint is key.
Buffalo have a very keen sense of smell.
The horse was more easily detected by the buffalo through smell.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Passing the Exam
condition: A was sent to an interstellar combat command school for rigorous simulated battle training, during which he rarely got a good night's sleep. Though the final exam was difficult, he managed to pass. But when the examiner leaned in and whispered a few words in his ear, A broke down.
solution: The military simulation training and final exam that A experienced were, in fact, real-time command of an interstellar war. The battles often erupted suddenly, day or night, requiring A to wake up quickly and get into a state of command. After he passed the exam, the examiner revealed the truth: with his unparalleled military genius, A had not only passed the assessment but had also personally commanded a fleet to completely annihilate an entire enemy civilization. What he thought was training was actually a meticulously planned war—a genocide against an intelligent species. He was devastated because he knew he was not a hero who saved humanity, but a butcher with blood on his hands.

zh.title: 考试通过
zh.condition: A被送往星际战斗指挥学校,接受严酷的军事模拟遭遇战训练,训练期间他很少能睡上好觉。虽然毕业考试很难,但他还是艰难地通过了考试,但当考官凑到他耳边低语数句后,A却崩溃了。
zh.solution: A所经历的军事模拟训练与毕业大考,其实是真实的星际战争指挥,战斗总是不分白天黑夜突发进行,A需要从睡梦中快速醒来进入状态。考试通过后,考官告知A的真相是:他凭借无人能及的军事天赋,成功通过了考核,同时亲手指挥舰队,彻底击溃了整个敌对文明。原来他所以为的训练,其实是一场精心策划的战争,针对一个智慧种族的灭绝计划。他痛苦是因为他知道他不是什么拯救人类的英雄,而是双手沾满血迹的屠夫。

key_facts: The 'simulation' was not fake.
A was commanding a real war.
The examiner told him the truth.
A's breakdown came from immense guilt.
He annihilated a civilization.

title: Power Outage
condition: A woman saw that there were no lights in the window and knew her husband had died.
solution: Her husband relied on medical equipment to stay alive. The woman saw that the lights were out and realized there had been a power outage, and her husband had died.

zh.title: 停电
zh.condition: 女人看见窗户里没有灯光,知道她丈夫死了。
zh.solution: 丈夫依靠医疗设备维持生命,女人看见熄灯了,于是知道停电了,丈夫死了。

key_facts: Her husband relied on medical equipment to stay alive
The woman saw there were no lights in the window
The power outage caused the life support equipment to fail
The husband died due to the power outage
The power outage meant the loss of her husband's life

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Egg Fried Rice
condition: I ordered a bowl of egg fried rice. While eating the fried rice, I reported the business. The business closed down, but I ended up in jail.
solution: Because I got off work very late, I ordered takeout. After the takeout arrived, I was eating it and thought it was strange, 'Why does the meat here taste weird?' I was so scared I immediately reported the business. It turned out I had tasted human flesh in the takeout. When the inspection department came, they investigated the shop and indeed found problems. The shop owner was cutting corners, using dead rats to pass off as fresh meat. Sure enough, the business closed down. But when I was giving my statement, I blurted out that I tasted human flesh. But how would I know what human flesh tastes like? My own slip-up revealed a murder case from ten years ago where I killed someone and then ate them...

zh.title: 蛋炒饭
zh.condition: 我点了一碗蛋炒饭,我吃着炒饭,把商家给举报了,商家关门了,可我却入狱了。
zh.solution: 因为下班很晚,我点了一份外卖。等到外卖来了以后,我吃着外卖觉得奇怪,这里的肉怎么怪怪的?吓得赶紧把商家给举报了,原来我当时在外卖中吃出了人肉的味道,等到检察部门的人来了后,就对这家店铺进行了盘查果然查出了问题,原来店家以次充好,拿死老鼠来当新鲜肉糊弄。果不其然,商家倒闭了。可是我录口供的时候脱口而出,尝出了人的味道,可是我怎么知道人肉是什么味道呢?自己的漏洞,揭露了十年前我杀人最后把人吃了的命案...

key_facts: The meat in the takeout was problematic (not normal meat).
The business actually used rat meat.
"I" tasted human flesh.
The reason "I" knew the taste of human flesh was abnormal.
"I" had a past experience of killing someone.
"I" had a past experience of cannibalism.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: The Gift
condition: The gift has been received. The fish has taken the bait.
solution: The diplomat received the exquisite wooden box from his 'friend.' A faint, cold smile touched his lips; he knew it contained a listening device. He placed it conspicuously in the room. A few days earlier, intelligence had informed him about the suspicious gift, and his superiors had instructed him to play along. When his counterpart entered the room, the diplomat deliberately spoke at length about a fictitious project. The false information would be transmitted through the listening device to his rivals, luring them into making a wrong move. That night, he reported to his superior: 'The gift has been received. The fish has taken the bait.'

zh.title: 礼物
zh.condition: 礼物已经收到,鱼儿已经上钩
zh.solution: 外交官收到了那份来自友人的精美木质礼盒。他嘴角勾起一抹不易察觉的冷笑,他知道里面装有窃听器,将其安置在房间显眼处。几天前,情报部门已告知他这份礼物的蹊跷,上级指示他顺势而为。当同行者踏入房间时,外交官故意高谈阔论一份子虚乌有的项目,假消息会通过窃听器传到对手耳中,诱使他们做出错误判断。当晚,他向上级汇报:“礼物已经收到,鱼儿已经上钩。”

key_facts: The protagonist is a diplomat or a spy.
The 'gift' has a hidden secret.
There is a listening device in the gift.
The protagonist knew the secret of the gift in advance.
The 'fish' refers to the opponent.
It's a plot to turn the tables.

title: Sewage
condition: There is a chemical plant in the village, and this year it has become extremely popular.
solution: The factory continuously discharged sewage into the village's river, which emitted a large amount of hydrogen sulfide gas (highly flammable and explosive). On New Year's Day, when villagers set off firecrackers by the river, the fire interacted with the flammable gas, causing a severe fire. The chemical plant's popularity was due to the many deaths, as blood flowed into the river.

zh.title: 污水
zh.condition: 村里有家化工厂,今年它变得红极了。
zh.solution: 工厂持续排放污水到村里的河流,河流排放了大量硫化氢(易燃易爆)气体,在新年这一天,村民们在河边放鞭炮,火光与易燃气体反应导致了一场极为严重的火灾。而化工厂的红是因为很多人死去了,血液流入了河流。

key_facts: The chemical plant polluted the river with sewage
The sewage contained flammable hydrogen sulfide gas
Villagers setting off firecrackers by the river caused a fire
The fire resulted in severe casualties
The plant's red color was dyed by blood

title: Eating Meat
condition: Today I was weaned. My mother asked me to eat meat, but I didn't want to. Later, I had a younger brother, and my younger brother loved to eat meat. I died.
solution: I was an abandoned baby, adopted by a she-wolf. After being weaned, wolf-mom fed me raw meat, but my teeth and stomach were not adapted to this kind of food. Later, wolf-mom gave birth to a wolf-brother. She no longer needed me to satisfy her excess maternal love, so she bit me to death and fed me to her wolf-brother.

zh.title: 吃肉
zh.condition: 今天我断奶了,我的妈妈让我吃肉,我不愿意吃,后来我有了弟弟,弟弟很爱吃肉,我死了。
zh.solution: 我是一个弃婴,被母狼收养了,断奶后狼妈喂我吃生肉,但我的牙齿和肠胃不适应这种食物后来狼妈生了狼弟弟,她不需要我来满足她多余的母爱了,于是把我咬死喂给了狼弟弟。

key_facts: The 'mother' in the story is not human.
The 'meat' provided by the 'mother' might not be suitable for human consumption (e.g., raw meat).
The birth of the younger brother changed the 'mother's' attitude and needs towards the narrator.
The narrator's body eventually became a food source for the younger brother.
It was the 'mother' who directly caused the narrator's death.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Doll
condition: A man was buried in a grave with a doll and notebook containing one sentence. What was it?
solution: The man had preserved his deceased daughter's body as a doll. His horrified wife killed him, burying them together with the note: 'Now you can be together forever.'

zh.title: 洋娃娃
zh.condition: 坟墓里埋了一个男子,旁边放了一个洋娃娃和笔记本,笔记本写了一句话,是什么?
zh.solution: 男子有个病死的女儿,为了悼念她,把女儿做成了洋娃娃,妻子无法理解丈夫的做法,所以杀了丈夫,把他们葬在了一起,笔记本上写的是“你们可以永远在一起了”。

key_facts: The doll contained daughter's remains
The man was killed by his wife
Wife couldn't accept his actions
Note explained burial reason
Grave contained man and doll

title: Lure
condition: Monday, I numbly applied the secret mask. Tuesday, Xiaomei said, 'Your scar is treatable.' I had a car accident years ago, and the glass scarred my right face. Wednesday, my skin received compliments from everyone. Thursday, Xiaoli took me to a lantern exhibit, and everyone wore masks. The most striking was the host's smooth, pale skin. Saturday, I went to see Xiaoli, and she told me my skin would definitely be the most beautiful.
solution: Tuesday, Xiaomei said, 'Your scar is treatable.' I had a car accident years ago, and the glass scarred my right face. Xiaomei told me about a charity cosmetic organization, claiming it was very reputable and had helped many people. Thursday, Xiaoli took me to the lantern exhibit, and the lanterns looked strange, made from various materials. The exhibition host’s smooth, pale skin stood out. At the event, everyone wore masks, likely to cover their faces. Saturday, although the lantern exhibition was the theme, it was still a free cosmetic surgery event. The organizers used persuasive theories, and I began to trust them completely. I decided to book a surgery appointment with Xiaoli. After signing the contract, she assured me that my skin would improve. Monday, I arrived for surgery, and after being anesthetized, the doctor applied an eroding agent to my face and used a recovery cream to speed up the skin regeneration. Wednesday, my face was ruined, and it was all scar tissue. I angrily went to find Xiaoli, but she seemed unsurprised. Her eyes showed a trace of cruelty. She said, 'I told you, your skin would definitely be the most beautiful.' Then she turned me into a human skin lantern and exhibited me at the party.

zh.title: 香饵
zh.condition: 星期一 我麻木地敷上了秘制面膜。星期二 小美说“你的伤疤有救了”。我在几年前发生车祸,被玻璃刮坏了右脸。星期三 我的肌肤得到了大家的称赞。星期四 小丽带我去看了灯笼展,展会上大家都戴着面具。亮眼的是宴会主人莹白光滑的肌肤。星期六 我去找小丽,她告诉我我的皮肤一定会是最漂亮的。
zh.solution: 星期二 小美说“你的伤疤有救了”。我在几年前发生车祸,被玻璃刮坏了右脸。这次小美告诉我,她知道一家慈善美容机构,据说十分权威并且已经拯救了很多人的皮肤。星期四 小丽带我去看了灯笼展,灯笼看起来十分诡异,材质各异。这是宴会主人用不同受害者的皮肤制成的。展会上大家都戴着面具,应该都是想要追求美丽的人。亮眼的是宴会主人莹白光滑的肌肤。星期六 前天的宴会虽然是一场灯笼展,但是主题还是这次的免费医美活动,大家更关注医美活动本身,并未细细研究灯笼的样式。经过主办方的各种理论洗脑,我对他们已经深信不疑,所以我去找小丽,想要预约一场手术,签完合同后,她告诉我,我的皮肤一定会变好的。星期一 我按照合约的要求来到手术台,注射麻醉剂后,医生在我的脸上厚敷了侵蚀剂,再用恢复膏让皮肤快速再生。星期三 我的脸被毁了,全脸都成了疤痕。我愤怒地去找小丽,小丽似乎并不吃惊,眼中透出一抹狠厉。她说,我说过,你的皮肤一定会是最漂亮的。于是她将我被做成了人皮灯笼,成为宴会展品之一。

key_facts: False promises from a cosmetic institution
The horrific truth behind the lantern exhibition
The disastrous consequences of cosmetic surgery
Betrayed trust
The price of beauty

title: Writing Furiously
condition: He wrote furiously in his room, confusing the soldiers on the front line. He changed the course of the battle but was not welcomed by the victorious nation.
solution: A prisoner of war, in order to survive, deceived the enemy by claiming he had informants in his home country. He provided them with a large amount of fabricated intelligence, which inadvertently made a major contribution to the righteous cause. However, because he did not belong to any official faction and his home country's intelligence agency had no record of him, he was not welcomed after the war and became an unsung hero.

zh.title: 奋笔疾书
zh.condition: 他在房间中奋笔疾书,前线的士兵却晕头转向,他改变了战局,却不受战胜国的接待。
zh.solution: 一个俘虏为了活命,欺骗敌军自己有本国的线人,向敌军提供大量个人杜撰的虚假情报,为正义事业做出了重大贡献,但因为不属于任何一方势力,本国情报部门没有他的档案,所以在战争结束后不受待见,成为了无名英雄。

key_facts: His' identity is a prisoner of war.
What he wrote was false intelligence.
He was deceiving the enemy.
His actions helped his own country.
He was not a spy for either side.
He ultimately became an unsung hero.

title: Strange
condition: 'Sob, sob...' 'Where is your mother?' ... 'Where is your father?' ... He wanted to say more, but she smiled and declined, until the bus slowly pulled up in front of them.
solution: He is an old man, and also this woman's father. They are waiting for the bus together. The old man asks, 'Where is your mother?' The woman says her mother has passed away. The old man asks, 'Where is your father?' The woman is evasive, saying her father is sick and costs a lot of money each month. The old man continues to show concern and offer advice, but the woman just smiles, thanks him for his kindness, and gently declines. A moment later, the bus arrives. The woman wipes away a tear, stands up calmly, and reaches out to the old man: 'Let's go, Dad. The bus is here.'

zh.title: 奇怪
zh.condition: “呜呜呜......”,“你妈妈呢?”......“你爸爸呢?”......他想继续开口但她却笑着拒绝了,直到公交车缓缓停在他们面前。
zh.solution: 他是老人,也是这个女人的爸爸,他们一起在车站等车。老人问“你的妈妈呢?”女人说我妈妈去世了。老人问“你爸爸呢?”女人含糊其辞,说爸爸生了病,每月要花很多钱。老人还在继续关心她帮她出主意,但女人露出了一丝微笑,说谢谢你的关心并婉拒了老人的关心。过了一会儿公交车来了,女人擦了擦眼泪,平静地站起身,伸出手去拉老人:“走吧,爸爸。车来了。”

key_facts: The two people talking are related.
They are father and daughter.
The father has a memory problem.
The father does not recognize his own daughter.
The woman is talking to her father who has amnesia.

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Four-Year-Old Mother
condition: A kindergarten child claimed her mother was only four years old. Puzzled, I visited their home and witnessed a horrifying scene...
solution: I saw women chained inside, guarded by a brutal man. The child smiled unnaturally - she wasn't five but twenty-five, suffering from a growth disorder. The man was her brother. Posing as a child, she lured teachers home to imprison them as 'wives' for her brother. Her 'four-year-old mother' was actually a woman imprisoned for four years.

zh.title: 四岁的妈妈
zh.condition: 幼儿园五岁的小朋友,竟然说她的妈妈只有四岁,我很疑惑,便提出了去她家家访,随后我在她家看到了让我惊恐的一幕...
zh.solution: 我在她家看到了一个个被铁链拴着的女人,而一旁站着一个长相凶狠丑陋的彪形大汉。幼儿园的那个小朋友突然露出了不属于她这个年龄该有的诡笑...原来她不止五岁,而是二十五岁,只是从小得了一种长不大的病,而那个彪形大汉则是她的哥哥,她是为了给她哥哥找女人,便哄骗我们这些幼师来到家里进行囚禁...而她那"四岁的妈妈",是已经被骗来四年的女人...

key_facts: The child's appearance didn't match her age
She had a growth disorder
The intimidating man present
The child's unnatural smile
The imprisoned women
She sought women for her brother
The 'four-year-old mother' was a ruse

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Good Child
condition: Dad messed up the floor, and Mom didn't want to cook again. Such a grown-up, still so naughty, unlike me, I want to be a good child.
solution: I am an orphan. My parents abandoned me because I was disobedient, so I vowed to be a good child. My current parents adopted me. I tried to be obedient, but they still thought I wasn't suitable and wanted to send me away. Dad's blood spilled all over the floor, making it dirty. Mom was motionless in the kitchen, seemingly unable to cook. I looked at my blood-stained hands; a good child would not be abandoned, so it seems I am still a good child.

zh.title: 好孩子
zh.condition: 爸爸把地面弄脏了,妈妈又不想做饭了,这么大的人还是这么顽皮,不像我,我要做一个好孩子。
zh.solution: 我是一个孤儿,当初我的父母嫌我不听话而抛弃了我,所以我发誓一定要做一个好孩子。现在的爸妈领养了我。我努力听话但是他们还是觉得我不合适,要把我送走。爸爸的血流了一地,把地面都弄脏,妈妈在厨房里一动不动,看样子是做不了饭。我看着自己沾满了鲜血的双手,一个好孩子是不会被抛弃的,看来我还是一个好孩子呢。

key_facts: My definition of a 'good child' was twisted, believing that not being abandoned meant being a good child
My parents have been killed by me
My motive for murder was to prevent being abandoned again
Dirty floor refers to father's bloodstains
Mom not cooking refers to mother's death

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Three Phone Calls
condition: You received a third call from the teacher, telling you not to go to school anymore. You burst into tears while booking a train ticket.
solution: You are a migrant worker who left your child in your hometown. Your child, due to excellent grades, was bullied at school. Afraid of worrying her parents, she decided to hide it. To fit in, she started not doing homework, skipping classes, and deliberately answering questions incorrectly. The volunteer teacher discovered this situation and called you, but you couldn't return home. Even though the child did this, the situation didn't improve; she was still bullied by classmates, and it got worse. The child started self-harming, hoping to get your attention. The teacher called you again, and you still didn't go home. Finally, one day, the child jumped from the school building, ending her own life. You finally have to go home, to see your child one last time.

zh.title: 三个电话
zh.condition: 你第三次接到了老师的电话,让你不用去学校了。你一边崩溃大哭,一边定下一张火车票。
zh.solution: 你是一名离乡打工人员,把孩子留在了家乡。你的孩子因为优秀的成绩受到了校园霸凌,因为害怕父母担心,她决定隐瞒这件事。为了融入集体,她开始不写作业,逃课,故意答错题,支教老师发现了这个情况,打电话给你,而你没法回老家。即便孩子这么做了,情况并没有改善,还是被同学欺负,愈演愈烈,孩子开始自残,希望得到你的关心,老师又打电话给你,你依然没有回家。终于,这一天孩子从教学楼上一跃而下结束了自己的生命,你终于要回家了,见孩子最后一面。

key_facts: The first two calls from the teacher were also related to serious problems the child encountered at school.
The child was experiencing something very painful at school (e.g., bullying, exclusion).
The narrator (you) was unable to immediately return to the child's side due to work or geographical location.
The reason the teacher said 'don't go to school anymore' was because the worst, irreversible situation had happened to the child.
The train ticket was booked to go back and deal with the tragic event involving the child.
