title: Letter
condition: Xiao Gang was driving on the road when his car suddenly went out of control and crashed into the roadside. Xiao Gang died on the spot. A letter was found in his car.
solution: Xiao Gang was on his way to meet his beloved, preparing to confess his feelings and give her a love letter. But while driving, he received a message rejecting him. He became distracted and lost control of the car, ultimately leading to the tragedy, and the love letter was never delivered.

zh.title: 信
zh.condition: 小刚开车行驶在公路上突然车失控撞向了路边,小刚当场死亡。在他的车里发现了一封信。
zh.solution: 小刚本来是要去见他心爱的人,准备向对方表白并送上情书。但在开车途中他收到了对方拒绝他的消息。他一时分心失神导致车失控,最终酿成悲剧,而那封情书也没来得及送出。

key_facts: Planned to confess in person and deliver a love letter
Received a rejection message en route
Rejection message caused distraction leading to car crash
Unsuccessful confession, love letter became a relic

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Exit
condition: "I want to get out, it's so dark." "Don't worry, we'll find an exit." She got up and looked around, but saw nothing. Scared and angry, she shouted to her husband in the next room, "Come out!" The woman died.
solution: The woman was pregnant and often woke up at night during her pregnancy, so her husband slept in the next room. In the middle of the night, the woman heard a strange sound. The sound was very close, as if it was coming from inside her body. The woman was scared and looked around, but there was nothing in the unobstructed room. So she loudly called out to her husband, telling him to come out. As soon as she spoke, she felt a sharp pain coming from beneath her. She finally understood whose voice it was.

zh.title: 出口
zh.condition: "我想出去,这好黑呀。""别急,我们会找到出口的。"她起身环顾四周,可是什么也没看到,她又怕又怒,于是对睡在隔壁房的老公大喊"你快出来!"女人死了。
zh.solution: 女人怀孕了,因为孕期经常起夜,所以丈夫睡在隔壁房间。半夜,女人听到怪声。那声音离得很近,仿佛从她的身体内部散发出来。女人怕了,环顾四周,可是一览无余的房间什么都没有。于是她大声呼唤老公,让老公快出来。话音刚落,她便感受到一阵从身下传来的剧痛。她终于明白,那是谁发出的声音了。

key_facts: The sound originated from within the woman's body
The woman was pregnant
The shout was directed at the fetus in her womb (or the source of the internal noise)
"Exit" refers to the process of childbirth or the expulsion of something from within her body
Death is related to childbirth complications or drastic internal changes
The husband was in the next room, not ignoring her cry for help

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Wish (Repeated)
condition: "As you can see, I am a genie in a bottle. Since you found me, I can grant you three wishes." "Alright, all three wishes have been granted, and I must leave. But you probably don't remember, do you? You made this last wish before."
solution: He suffered from amnesia and knew nothing of his past life. One day, he found a bottle with a genie. The genie said it could grant him three wishes, so he wished to know his past. However, his past was very tragic. After learning it, he was in great pain and wished to forget everything again. Completely unaware, he picked up the bottle with the genie again and made the wish, "I want to know my past," and has lived in pain ever since.

zh.title: 愿望
zh.condition:
"如你所见,我是瓶中的精灵。既然你找到了我,我可以实现你的三个愿望。"
"好了,三个愿望都实现了,我也要离开了。不过你应该不记得了吧,这最后一个愿望,你之前许过哦?"
zh.solution: 他失忆了,对自己的前半生一无所知。有一天他捡到了一个有精灵的瓶子,精灵说可以实现他三个愿望,于是他就说要知道他的身世。但是他的身世非常悲惨,他知道之后非常痛苦,又向精灵许愿要忘掉一切。最后一无所知的他再次拿起装有精灵的瓶子,许下了"我要知道自己的身世"的愿望,从此生活在痛苦之中。

key_facts: Wished to know past life
Learning the past caused pain
Wanted to forget due to extreme pain
Genie hinted at a repetitive wish
The wishes form a loop

provenance.license_note: Repository exposes the data but no explicit license file was found.

title: Going Home
condition: 'Go home, child,' accompanied by his voice, death came for me.
solution: I am a freshwater turtle, caught and brought ashore. After several transfers, I ended up in the hands of a 'life-releaser.' However, his releasing was merely a performative self-gratification. He couldn't distinguish between freshwater turtles and sea turtles, thinking my home was the ocean. I died quickly after being thrown into the sea.

zh.title: 回家
zh.condition: “回家吧,孩子”伴随着他的声音,死亡向我袭来。
zh.solution: 我是一只淡水龟,被人捕上了岸,几经辗转来到一位放生者手中,然而,他的放生只是一种表演性质的自我感动,他分不清淡水龟和海龟的区别,以为我的家在大海,我被抛入海中后很快死亡。

key_facts: My true identity is not human, but an animal.
I am a freshwater turtle.
'He' is an ignorant life-releaser.
'Going home' refers to me being released into the sea.
My cause of death was being unable to survive in seawater.
The life-releaser's good deed was based on incorrect understanding.

title: The Painting
condition: I finally painted this picture for him, but I never imagined she would die just like that.
solution: I am a famous painter. My best friend contracted a special illness, and only one specific medicine could treat it. However, the patent for this medicine was held by the boss of a pharmaceutical company. She had always been unscrupulous and had used this patent to blackmail many people. Sure enough, she knew I had always been aloof and insisted that I paint a picture eulogizing her before she would give me the medicine. For my friend, I still painted it. What I didn't know was that my friend was aware of all this. He didn't want me to grovel for him and also hated the boss's cruelty. During the days I was engrossed in painting, he was also engrossed in preparing his murder plan. When I opened the boss's office door with the painting, I saw the boss lying in a pool of blood. Next to her was my best friend holding a gun. He gave me a sad smile and pulled the trigger on himself.

zh.title: 画
zh.condition: 我终于为他画出了这幅画,但我没有想到,她就这样死了。
zh.solution: 我是一位著名的画家,我最好的朋友生了一种特殊的病,只有一种特效药能够治疗,但这种药的专利掌握在一家药企的老板手里,她一向为富不仁,用这项专利要挟过许多人。果然,她知道我素来清高,一定要我为她画一幅歌功颂德的画才给我药,为了我的朋友,我还是画了。我不知道的是,我的朋友已知晓了这一切,他不愿我为了他卑躬屈膝,也痛恨老板的残忍,在我专心作画的日子里,他也在专心筹备自己的杀人计划。等我带着画打开老板办公室的门,看到老板已倒在血泊之中,旁边是拿着枪的我最好的朋友,他对我惨然一笑,对着自己扣下了扳机。

key_facts: 'He' is my close friend, 'she' is the pharmaceutical company boss.
My friend is seriously ill and needs a specific medicine.
The specific medicine is monopolized and controlled by 'her'.
This painting is a bargaining chip to get life-saving medicine for my friend.
'She' was killed by my friend.
The friend chose to act because he didn't want to see me humiliated for him.
After killing 'her,' the friend also committed suicide.

title: The Old Music Box
condition: A boy and a girl were neighbors since childhood. For the girl's birthday, the boy gave her an old music box. Shortly after, the girl moved away.
solution: The boy had been pursuing the girl. For her birthday, he gave her an old music box, identical to one she had as a child. The girl was very touched and agreed to be his girlfriend. Shortly after, she accidentally dropped and broke the music box, finding a photo inside. The photo was of a dog she had as a child. After the dog died, the girl was heartbroken and placed the photo in the music box's compartment, burying it with the dog. The girl realized the boy was a creep who had dug up the grave to get the music box for her, so she moved away overnight.

zh.title: 旧的八音盒
zh.condition: 男孩和女孩从小是邻居,女孩过生日时,男孩送给她一个旧的八音盒,不久后女孩搬家了。
zh.solution: 男孩一直在追女孩,女孩过生日时男孩送了她一个旧的八音盒,和她很小时候曾有过的一个八音盒一模一样,女孩很感动,就答应和男孩在一起。不久后女孩不小心把八音盒摔坏了,发现里面夹了一张照片,照片上是她小时候养过的狗狗,狗狗死后女孩很伤心,把照片放在八音盒夹层里和狗狗一起埋葬了。女孩知道了男孩是个变态,为了追她,把八音盒挖了出来,于是连夜搬走。

key_facts: This music box had special meaning for the girl.
The girl used to own an identical music box.
The old music box had been buried underground.
A photo was hidden inside the music box.
The photo was related to the girl's deceased pet dog.
The boy obtained the music box by digging up a grave.
The girl felt terrified after discovering the truth.
The girl moved away to escape the boy.

title: Good 'Brothers'
condition: She had liked the man for a long time. One day, she finally gathered the courage to confess to him, but the man said something to her... and she instantly broke down.
solution: They had been good 'brothers' since childhood, but 'he' always had different feelings for the man. He wanted to be with him, so he underwent gender reassignment surgery. As 'she', she stood before the man and confessed her love. The man looked at her and said, 'I liked the you from before.'

zh.title: 好"兄弟"
zh.condition: 她喜欢男人很久了。有一天,她终于鼓起勇气对他表白了,但是男人对她说了一句话...她瞬间就崩溃了。
zh.solution: 他们是从小一起长大的好兄弟,但是他对男人一直有不一样的感情,他一直很想和他在一起,所以他去做了变性手术,变性后的她站在男人面前表白,男人看着她却说道:"我喜欢原来的你。"

key_facts: The 'she' who confessed was originally male.
'She' and the person she confessed to grew up together.
'She' and the person she confessed to were very close.
'She' underwent gender reassignment surgery.
The man's words that made 'her' break down were related to 'her' past gender.
The man said he liked the person 'she' was before the surgery.
The complexity of this relationship stems from a change in gender identity.
The man did not reciprocate 'her' current feelings.
'Her' transformation was for the sake of love.

title: Rain Outside the Window
condition: After cleaning my new apartment all day, I went to sleep exhausted. Around midnight, I was woken up by the sound of rain outside. I was too tired to care. It wasn't until I woke up the next morning that I noticed something was wrong, and I quickly moved out.
solution: I had been stalked before, so I finally moved to a new place. After cleaning the room, I was ready to embrace a new life. The next day, I found no trace of rain outside and thought I had been hearing things. As I was about to close the window, I noticed that the window I had just cleaned yesterday was covered in dirty marks again. Looking closely, I could faintly see some fingerprints. It turned out that the sound last night wasn't rain, but someone tapping on my window with their fingers. I got goosebumps and moved out immediately.

zh.title: 窗外的雨
zh.condition: 搬家后打扫了一天的房间,我拖着疲困的身体睡去。午夜时分,我被窗外的雨声吵醒,我实在是太困了并没有在意。直到第二天一早醒来,发现了不对劲,我赶紧搬了家。
zh.solution: 我之前一直被人跟踪,好不容易换了一个新家,打扫完房间,准备第二天迎接新外面并没有下过雨的痕迹,还以为自己昨晚幻听了,正准备关上窗时,我发现昨天刚擦洗干净的窗户上竟又布满了脏印,仔细一看,还能隐隐约约看到一些指纹,原来昨晚的不是雨声,而是有人在用手指敲打我的窗,我顿时起了一身鸡皮疙瘩,赶紧搬走了。

key_facts: 'I' moved because I was being stalked before.
'I' cleaned the window before going to sleep.
'I' was woken up by a sound outside the window and thought it was rain.
The next morning, there were no signs of rain outside.
'I' noticed the clean window was dirty again.
The dirty marks on the window included fingerprints.
The sound from last night was actually someone tapping on the window.
'I' moved again out of fear.

title: Rabbit Rhyme
condition: Big Rabbit got sick, Second Rabbit checked; Third Rabbit bought medicine, Fourth Rabbit brewed it; Fifth Rabbit died, Sixth Rabbit carried; Seventh Rabbit dug a pit, Eighth Rabbit buried; Ninth Rabbit sat down and cried, Tenth Rabbit asked why it cried? Ninth Rabbit replied: Fifth Rabbit left and never came back.
solution: This is a conspiracy to murder a rabbit. Big Rabbit was sick, and to cure its illness, a rabbit had to be sacrificed as a medicinal primer. Second Rabbit was the doctor and wanted to use someone else to kill Fifth Rabbit. 'Buying medicine' refers to killing the rabbit for the primer; Third Rabbit was the killer. Sixth Rabbit 'carried' – how can one rabbit carry another? So obviously, it was being carried; Sixth Rabbit was mistakenly killed. Seventh and Eighth Rabbits were accomplices, one digging a pit and the other burying the body. Ninth Rabbit cried because it knew the truth: Fifth Rabbit had escaped and thus 'left and never came back.'

zh.title: 兔儿谣
zh.condition: 大兔子生病,二兔子瞧;三兔子买药,四兔子熬;五兔子死了,六兔子抬;七兔子挖坑,八兔子埋;九兔子坐地哭起来,十兔子问它为什么哭?九兔子回答:五兔子一去不回来。
zh.solution: 这是一个密谋杀兔事件。大兔子生病了,要治疗它的病,必须牺牲一只兔子做药引;二兔子是医生,想借刀杀了五兔子;“买药”指的是去杀掉做药引的兔子,三兔子是杀手,六兔子“抬”,一只兔子怎么抬?那么显然是被抬,六免子被误杀死了;七八两只兔子是帮凶,一个挖坑一个埋尸,九兔子哭是因为他知道了真相,五兔子逃走了,所以一去不回来。

key_facts: Curing the illness required sacrificing a rabbit as a 'medicinal primer'.
'Buying medicine' is not literal but a code for carrying out a murder.
This was a premeditated murder targeting Fifth Rabbit.
Sixth Rabbit was the actual victim (killed by mistake/as a substitute).
Fifth Rabbit did not die but successfully escaped.

title: Gained Weight
condition: I kept getting fatter, while my sister got thinner. In the end... I died.
solution: My sister and I were tricked and taken abroad, where they forced us into illegal activities. We refused to comply, so they beat and threatened us, even locking us in a dark room without food or water. To live another day meant another glimmer of hope, so we used every method to survive. But I didn't know how long this situation would last. In this plight, I decided my sister should survive first, so I drew my own blood for her to drink. One day, two days, three days. Because of repeated blood draws, my body's functions began to fail, and I developed edema. My sister also grew thinner day by day from lack of food. Just as I was losing consciousness, I said my last words to her: "Eat me, and live..."

zh.title: 胖了
zh.condition: 我越来越胖,而妹妹却越来越瘦。最终...我死了。
zh.solution: 我跟妹妹被骗到了境外,他们让我从事非法活动。我们宁死不从,于是便受到他们的毒打恐吓,甚至把我们关进了小黑屋里,不给我们水和食物。多活一天就多一点希望,为了能活下去,所有的方法都用了。可我不知道这样的处境还要持续多久,这种处境我决定让妹妹先活下来,于是我便抽出自己的血液供妹妹饮用。一天,两天,三天。因为我多次抽血引发身体各项机能出了问题,身体发生了浮肿。而妹妹也因为没有食物而日渐消瘦,我在即将失去意识的时候跟她说了最后一句话:"吃了我,活下去..."

key_facts: My weight gain was actually edema caused by blood loss
Sister's thinness was due to prolonged starvation
I fed my sister my own blood
Both were imprisoned and deprived of food
Before dying, I asked my sister to eat me to survive

title: Best Friend
condition: After graduation, I hadn't seen my best friend from school. That day, she came to see me, but with a 'thud'... we were separated by life and death.
solution: She was once my best friend at a school for the blind. After graduation, we went our separate ways. I was fortunate enough to undergo surgery to restore my sight, but she was not so lucky. She said she was coming to see me after a long time. I was full of anticipation, but when I opened the door, the most familiar voice came from an ugly-looking man. I was instantly disgusted. How could I tolerate such deception? So I led him to the rooftop and pushed him off. The 'thud' was the sound of him hitting the ground.

zh.title: 闺蜜
zh.condition: 毕业后,和学校里的闺蜜一直未见。那天她来找我了,但随着啪的一声...我们阴阳相隔。
zh.solution: 曾经的她是我在盲人学校里最好的闺蜜,毕业后便各奔东西,我很幸运的接受了复明手术,而她却没有这种幸运,许久未见的她说来找我,我满怀期待可打开门后,曾经最熟悉的声音竟然是从一个样子丑陋的男人口中发出,顿时让我作呕,我怎能忍受这样的欺骗,于是我便把他引向了天台推了下去,啪的一声指落地的声音

key_facts: The school my best friend and I attended was special.
This best friend was blind.
I was surprised by a certain aspect of my best friend.
I underwent a special surgery.
I was deceived.
My best friend's gender was not female.
We were in a high place.

title: Friend’s Sacrifice
condition: I am a mermaid, and I had a good human friend. The legend says that eating my flesh grants immortality. That day, my friend ate a piece of my flesh. My friend died, and I cried.
solution: The mermaid and her friend lived together in a village. A merchant came to buy mermaid flesh, but the friend ate a piece of it, and immediately went mad and jumped into the river. The legend of immortality from eating mermaid flesh was never believed again. The mermaid lived quietly, only she knew that after her friend ate the flesh, he said 'Take care' and jumped into the river to die.

zh.title: 友人赴死
zh.condition: 我是条美人鱼,有个很好的人类朋友。传说,吃了我的肉可以长生不老。那天,朋友割下了我的一块肉吃。朋友死了,我哭了。
zh.solution: 美人鱼和朋友在村子里相依为命,有商人向朋友买美人鱼肉,想不到朋友偷吃一口,竟然发狂跳河。吃了美人鱼肉能长生不老的传说再也没人敢相信了。美人鱼平静的生活着,只有他自己知道,朋友割下肉后说了句‘保重’,然后跳进河里死掉了。

key_facts: The mermaid and human were close friends
The legend said eating mermaid flesh grants immortality
The friend ate the mermaid’s flesh and died
After eating the flesh, the friend jumped into the river to commit suicide
The friend died to protect the mermaid

title: The Model's Advantage
condition: Xiao Li and his girlfriend are both art students, and his girlfriend's painting skills are far superior to his. However, in the final art exam, Xiao Li's score was much higher than his girlfriend's. Why?
solution: The final exam was a life drawing test. Xiao Li and his girlfriend painted each other. The girlfriend was beautiful, so even though Xiao Li's skills were not great, his painting looked decent. Xiao Li was not good-looking, so although his girlfriend's painting was very realistic, the teacher thought she had drawn the proportions asymmetrically and the facial features were distorted.

zh.title: 模特优势
zh.condition: 小李和他的女友都是美术学院的学生,而且女友的绘画技术高出小李一大截,可是期未美术考试的成绩小李却比他的女友高出很多,这是为什么?
zh.solution: 期末考试的内容是考人体画,小李和他的女友互相画对方,女友长得美丽动人,小李虽然技术不精,但还是有模有样。小李长相欠佳,虽然女友画得栩栩如生但老师看后觉得她画的比例不对称,五官变形。

key_facts: The final exam subject was life drawing.
Xiao Li and his girlfriend served as models for each other.
The girlfriend is beautiful.
Xiao Li is not good-looking.
The girlfriend's painting skills are better than Xiao Li's.
Xiao Li's painting of his girlfriend looked okay because the model was beautiful.
The girlfriend's painting of Xiao Li was very realistic.
The teacher thought the girlfriend's painting had problems with proportion and facial features.
The teacher's judgment was influenced by the model's (Xiao Li's) appearance.
Xiao Li got a high score because his model (the girlfriend) was beautiful, masking his lack of skill.
The girlfriend got a low score because of the model's (Xiao Li's) actual appearance.

title: The Timid One
condition: The timid him was so engrossed in a certain matter that he could not face death peacefully.
solution: He was a king. Because at that time it was prevalent for assassins to poison kings. He was very afraid of being poisoned himself, so he adopted a method of fighting poison with poison. That is, he drank poison every day, starting with a mild toxicity, and then increasing it day by day, to make himself resistant to poison. But one day his castle was surrounded by enemies. Unable to escape, he thought it better to commit suicide than to be executed by the enemy. He originally wanted to drink poison to commit suicide, thinking it would be less painful, but his resistance to poison made it impossible for him to die. So after drinking the poison, he had to order his soldiers to kill him with swords.

zh.title: 胆小者
zh.condition: 胆小的他因为对于某件事太过用心了,以至于他无法安乐迎向死亡
zh.solution: 他是一个国王。因为当时盛行刺客以毒暗杀国王。他非常害怕自己也被毒杀,于是他采用一种以毒攻毒的方法。那就是每天喝毒药,从一开始轻微的毒性,然后一天一天加重,使自己对毒产生抗力。但是有天他的城堡被敌人包围了。在无法逃跑的情况下,他认为与其被敌人处刑倒不如自杀一了百了。原本想要饮毒自杀,想说比较不痛苦,但是自己对毒的抗力使他没有办法死亡。于是他饮毒之后,只好再命令他的士兵们用剑把他砍死。

key_facts: His status made him an easy target for assassination.
The matter he was 'engrossed' in was to prevent a specific type of death (poisoning).
He had been systematically exposing himself to a lethal substance over a long period to build resistance.
He ultimately chose death to avoid a worse fate at the hands of his enemies.
The efforts he had made in the past to save his life ironically prevented him from choosing a 'peaceful' way to die.

title: Dad
condition: Dad was working overtime, and I was home alone... but then he suddenly came home and beat me up.
solution: To buy my girlfriend a gift, whenever my dad went out for overtime, I would livestream dressed as a woman when I was home alone. During that particular livestream, I accidentally knocked over the backdrop behind me, and he probably recognized me. As soon as I ended the stream, he beat me up without a word. Afterward, I found out that the top donor who always interacted with me and showered me with gifts, 'Daddy,' was actually my own dad.

zh.title: 爸爸
zh.condition: 爸爸在加班,我一个人在家......他却突然回家把我打了一顿。
zh.solution: 为了给我女朋友买礼物,每当我爸出去加班,我一个人在家的时候,我就会女装开直播。那次直播,我无意中碰掉了我后面的背景布,大概是被他认出来了。我刚下播,二话不说就给我打了一顿。事后我才知道,每次我表白互动打赏我的,榜一爸爸,真的是我的爸爸。

Top donor was biological father
Father resorted to violence after discovering the truth

title: Two Lives, One Shot
condition: In a sealed room, there were two corpses, a deck of playing cards, a pistol, and a spent bullet. The corpse with a bullet hole in its head had a smile on its face, while the other's face was filled with pain.
solution: This was a room on a shipwrecked boat. Two acquaintances played cards to compete for the right to use the pistol's last bullet to commit suicide. The loser would then drown when the water flooded in.

zh.title: 一枪两命
zh.condition: 一个密闭房间里,有两具尸体,一副扑克牌,一把手枪,一颗用过的子弹。头上有弹孔的那具尸体面带微笑,而另一具则满脸痛苦。
zh.solution: 这是一艘遇难的船上的房间,两个互相认识的人用打扑克的方式,竞争用手枪仅剩的子弹自杀的权利,输了的人则在水漫进来后窒息而死。

key_facts: Desperate situation on a sinking ship
Playing cards used to decide life or death
Competing for the right to the only bullet for suicide
The winner shot themselves (smiling)
The loser drowned (in pain)

title: Valentine's Day
condition: On Valentine's Day, I received flowers from him, who was married, and cried my eyes out.
solution: Since Grandma passed away last year, Grandpa has developed Alzheimer's disease and forgotten many things. Today is Valentine's Day. Grandpa quietly walked up to me, handed me a bouquet of roses, called out Grandma's name, and shyly spoke the old-fashioned sweet nothings he used to say to Grandma every Valentine's Day. I teared up, moved by their love and also missing my grandma.

zh.title: 情人节
zh.condition: 情人节这天,我收到了结过婚的他送的花,哭成了泪人
zh.solution: 自从去年奶奶去世后,爷爷患上了阿兹海默症,忘记了很多事情。今天是情人节,爷爷悄悄的走到我面前,把一束玫瑰花递给我,叫着奶奶的名字,羞涩地说着每年情人节对奶奶说的老套的情话。我泪目了,既感动于他们的爱情,也想我奶奶了。

key_facts: The flower giver mistook the recipient of the flowers.
The flower giver's behavior was influenced by memory or cognitive impairment.
This bouquet was originally intended for someone who is no longer alive.
There is a family relationship between the flower giver and the narrator, not implying an extramarital affair.
The narrator's tears stemmed from missing the deceased relative and the complex emotions of the current situation.

title: Small Yellow Croaker
condition: The small yellow croaker in the seafood market looks bright and beautiful, as if boasting its delicacy. After the fishmonger, Old Zhou, mysteriously disappeared, the harbor surveillance captured hundreds of glowing red fish swimming towards the deep sea.
solution: Old Zhou's fish business seemed prosperous on the surface. However, the beauty of the small yellow croaker was achieved through the use of industrial dyes. These dyes caused significant damage to the marine ecosystem, polluting the water and distorting the natural colors of the fish. Since no one stopped the misuse of dyes in time, the accumulated resentment from the polluted sea led the fish to silently approach Old Zhou's boat. A swarm of vengeful fish capsized his boat and pushed him into the deep sea.

zh.title: 小黄鱼
zh.condition: 水产市场的小黄鱼颜色鲜艳漂亮,似乎在夸耀着他的鲜美。摊主老周离奇失踪后,港区监控拍到数百条发光的红鱼游向深海。
zh.solution: 老周的卖鱼生意表面红火,然而他所卖的小黄鱼的美丽,却是通过工业染料染制的。这种染料对海洋生物的生态造成了极大的破坏,这些染料不仅污染了水质,还让鱼类的自然色彩失真,但由于没人及时制止,染料的滥用早已引发了海底的怨气。这股怨气的力量促使着鱼儿们向正在出海的老周悄然靠近。成群的复仇鱼儿簇拥而上,将老周的渔船顶翻,并将他推入深海。

key_facts: The small yellow croaker looks unnaturally bright
Old Zhou sold dyed fish
The dye polluted the water and ecosystem
The vengeful fish attacked Old Zhou
Surveillance captured glowing red fish

title: Класс отличников
condition: Инспектор, проверявший некую школу, заметил, что, когда бы учитель ни задал классу вопрос, в ответ тянули руки все ученики. Более того, хотя учитель каждый раз выбирал другого ученика, ответ всегда бывал правильным. Как это получалось?
solution: Учитель сказал ученикам, чтобы они вызывались отвечать независимо от того, знают ответ или не знают. Но те, кто знает ответ, должны поднимать правую руку, а те, кто не знает, — левую. Учитель каждый раз выбирал другого ученика, но всегда того, кто поднимал правую руку.

en.title: First in the class
en.condition: A man, who was examining some school, noticed that any time a teacher was asking a question, lots of pupils were ready to answer. Moreover, every time the teacher was choosing another person and the answer was always right.
en.solution: The teacher told pupils to raise up their hands no matter what question would be asked. But if they khew the answer, they should raise the right hand, otherwise - the left one. Therefore the teacher could choose among the pupils who knew the answer.

Teacher only picks students with right hand raised.

title: Последнее такси
condition: Эльдар сидел и читал газету, когда услышал шум. Когда он понял что произошло, он очень пожалел, что не поймал такси вовремя. Вскоре он покончил с собой.
solution: Эльдар был разорен. Он был коллекционером масштабных моделей такси (уменьшенные копии автомобилей), и чтобы решить свои денежные проблемы он хотел продать самый дорогой экземпляр коллекции. Он почистил его и опрометчиво поставил на край стола. Во время чтения газеты он задел стол ногой, из-за чего такси скатилось со стола и упало на пол, разбившись. Другие экземпляры коллекции не были достаточно дорогими.

en.title: The last taxi
en.condition: Oscar was sitting reading his newspaper, when he heard a noise. When he realized what had happened, he bitterly regretted not having caught the taxi in time. Shortly afterwards, he committed suicide.
en.solution: Oscar was broke. He was a miniature car models collector and, to solve his economic problems, he was going to sell his most valuable car. He had been cleaning it and did not put it down on the table properly when he finished. When he sat down and began to read his newspaper, he heard how it fell off the table. He could not catch it in time before it crashed into the floor.

title: Подарок
condition: Умирающий Билл вручил Джону подарок, и умер. Вскоре Джон тоже умер. От чего умер Джон?
solution: Джон застрелил Билла. Но перед смертью Билл успел отдать Джону чеку от гранаты, которую он только что выдернул. Затем Билл умер, а последовавший взрыв гранаты убил и Джона.

en.title: The gift
en.condition: A dying man gives another man a gift, and then the dying man dies. Shortly after that the second man dies. How come?
en.solution: The second man had shot the first man. Before he dies, the first man gives the second man a grenade pin, which he's of course just pulled from a grenade. The first man dies, then the grenade explodes and the second man dies.

key_facts: The second man shot the first man.
The dying man's gift was a grenade pin.
A grenade explosion caused the second man's death.

title: Неожиданный конец
condition: Экзотическая танцовщица отправляется на частную сессию с мужчиной. В комнате, где проходила сессия, она снимает рубашку и бюстгальтер. Мужчина подходит, смотрит на грудь и улыбается. Вскоре после этого она одевается, платит человеку и уходит.
solution: За несколько дней до этого женщина провела операцию по увеличению груди. Она назначила встречу со своим частным врачом, чтобы проверить результат операции. Человек увидел, что всё идеально и его работа выполнена хорошо. В итоге женщина оплатила счет и покинула клинику.

en.title: An unexpected ending
en.condition: An exotic dancer goes on a date for a private session with a man. In the room where they are, she takes her shirt and bra off. The man approaches, watches her breasts and smiles. Soon after, she dresses herself up, pays the man and leaves.
en.solution: The woman had undergone a breast augmentation surgery a few days earlier and she had arranged an appointment with her private doctor to review the result of the operation. The man saw that everything was perfect and that he had done a great job. Finally the woman paid the bill and left the clinic.

key_facts: The man is a doctor.
The woman had a breast augmentation surgery.
They are in a clinic for a post-surgery checkup.
The woman pays the man for the medical services.

en.title: Suffering
en.condition: When kids were watching TV, they were not frigthened so much. But when they saw others suffering, they realized that something was not right.
en.solution: It was an experiment when kids were giving blood. It showed that the kids were feeling better during this process if they were watching TV rather than if they were supported by their parents.

title: Детектив
condition: Женщина задавала вопросы своему приятелю-полицейскому, чтобы узнать больше о загадочном убийстве. Через несколько минуть полицейский с удивлением понял, что она распутала это дело.
solution: Это была подруга полицейского. Он считал её глуповатой, но предложил поиграть в данетки и рассказал историю про труп со спичкой посреди поля. Она справилась всего за несколько минут и полицейский очень удивился, потому что в прошлом сам не смог её разгадать и за полчаса.

title: Зеленая помада
condition: Каждый день он красит губы зеленой помадой. Но этого почти никто не замечает.
solution: В 20-м веке, когда телевидение было еще черно-белым, в камерах использовали красные фильтры, которые поглощали в изображении красный цвет, т.е. красная помада никак не оттеняла губы. Поэтому дикторам на телевидении при наведении макияжа, для выразительности, губы приходилось красить зеленой помадой.

en.title: Green lipstick
en.condition: Every day he puts on green lipstick. But almost no one notices it.
en.solution: In the 20th century the television was still black and white, and cameras had red filters, which absorbed red color of the image, i.e., red lipstick couldn’t be seen on the lips. Therefore, TV broadcasters had to make up their lips with green lipstick to make them look more expressive.

key_facts: He works in television broadcasting.
Television was black and white in the 20th century.
Red filters on cameras absorbed red color.
Green lipstick made lips look more expressive on black and white TV.

title: Игра восприятия
condition: Толя умер от того, что перепутал цвета.
solution: В Таиланде, если туриста кусает змея, местным врачам требуется определить породу змеи, чтобы подобрать противоядие. Сам турист в этом, как правило, не разбирается, поэтому у него спрашивают, какого цвета была змея, и по цвету определяют разновидность. Толя был дальтоником, поэтому получил противоядие не от той змеи.

en.title: Colorblind
en.condition: He died because he mixed up the colors.
en.solution: In Thailand if some snake bites you, doctor has to identify the snake's species in order to choose the right antidote. The tourist usually can not identify it, so doctor asks him/her what color the snake was, and using this information specialist defines snake's species. The man was colorblind, therefore he received a wrong antidote.

key_facts: Man was bitten by a snake in Thailand.
Identifying snake species is crucial for the right antidote.
Man was colorblind.
Colorblindness led to wrong antidote.

title: Лучший день в ее жизни
condition: Она подумала, что это лучший день в ее жизни, перед тем как умерла.
solution: В конце театральной пьесы появилась главная актриса, и публика начала аплодировать. В это время декорация на стене начала рушиться. Зрители поднялись со своих мест, крича и пытаясь предупредить актрису, но она подумала, что это были овации. Ее завалило разрушившимися декорациями.

title: Унесенные ветром

title: Темень
condition: Маргарита была на работе и спускалась по лестнице, когда внезапно потемнело. В этот момент она поняла, что её муж при смерти.
solution: Маргарита работала электриком в больнице и знала, что аварийные генераторы не работают. Недавно её мужа сбила машина и он лежал в этой больнице с аппаратурой, поддерживающей его жизнь. title: Смерть: отложено
condition: Елена никогда не могла подумать, что ее решение отправиться в путешествие на самолете спасет ей жизнь.
solution: За несколько дней до этого Елену оперировали. Перед посадкой в самолет ей, как и всем пассажирам, пришлось пройти через металлоискатель. Однако он не пропускал ее, хотя она убрала из карманов всё, что у нее было. После рентгенологического обследования выяснилось, что врачи забыли скальпель внутри ее тела. Если бы Елена не обнаружила его вовремя, она бы безусловно умерла.

en.title: Death: delayed
en.condition: Helen never thought that her decision to travel by plane would save her life.
en.solution: A few days earlier Helen had been operated on. Before boarding the plane, she had to go through the metal detector, which kept going off, despite the fact that she had removed everything metal she had on. After an X-ray examination, it was discovered that the doctors had left a scalpel inside her body. If Helen had not discovered it in time, she would died for sure.

key_facts: Helen had a surgery prior to the flight.
Metal detector went off at the airport due to a foreign object.
X-ray revealed a scalpel left inside her body.
The incident led to the discovery of the potentially fatal medical error.

title: Таинственный ключ

en.title: The mysterious key
en.condition: Every night before going to sleep, Lisa locks the door of her house and attaches the key to a string. Why?
en.solution: Lisa was a sleepwalker. Some days before, she had left her house in the middle of the night without realizing. To prevent this happening again, she began tying the key with a piece of string to a bell each night. That way, if Lisa tried to leave the house, her husband would wake up and take her back to bed.

key_facts: Lisa is a sleepwalker
She has left the house unknowingly during the night before
The string is attached to a bell
Her husband wakes up to the bell sound and ensures her safety

title: Женские разборки

Она зашла в ванную и обнаружила окровавленный костюм Ку-клукс-клана в корзине для белья, после чего взяла пилку для ногтей из аптечки, вышла и убила свою знакомую, потому что, судя по всему, костюм принадлежал ей.

solution: Тони делал покупки в магазине, он потратил много денег, поэтому на кассе ему вручили подарок: комплект кухонных ножей. Тони так спешил на работу , что побежал к машине, забыв о подарке. Кассир заметил это и побежал за Тони, чтобы отдать подарок.

title: Похожие устройства
condition: Два распространенных устройства выполняют одну и ту же функцию, но одно из них имеет огромное количество движущихся частей, а другое не имеет ни одной. Что это за устройства?
solution: Одно из этих устройств — песочные часы (часто применяемые для отсчета времени при варке яиц), а другое — солнечные часы. Оба они предназначены для измерения времени. Даже в маленьких песочных часах обычно находится более 100 000 песчинок. Можно дать подсказку отгадывающим: оба устройства изобретены очень давно.

Sundial has fewer details (a flat surface and a shadow-casting object).

title: Попугай
condition: Женщина идет в зоомагазин, чтобы купить попугая. Продавец предлагает ей одного, рассказывая, что это отличный попугай и что он может повторить всё, что услышит. Несколько дней спустя женщина, чувствуя себя обманутой, идет в магазин обратно, чтобы вернуть деньги. Однако возвращается домой с попугаем и без денег.
solution: Попугай был глухим. Он ничего не мог повторить, поскольку ничего не слышал. Однако продавец не возвратил деньги женщине, потому что он не солгал ей.

en.title: The parrot
en.condition: A woman walks into a pet store to buy a parrot. The seller offers her one, telling her that it can repeat everything it hears. Some days later the woman - feeling cheated - goes back into the store to get her money back. However, she comes back home with the parrot and not her money.
en.solution: The parrot was deaf. It could not repeat anything, since it could not hear anything. However, the seller did not return the money to the woman because he never lied to her.

The seller never lied about the parrot's abilities
The woman had no valid reason to get her money back

title: Адвокат от бога
condition: После выступления адвоката Биллу ужесточили наказание. Почему?
solution: Осенью в районном суде рассматривали дело одного бомжа, который разбил витрину магазина. Из-за выступления адвоката суд, уже склонявшийся к "условному" наказанию, осудил преступника. Адвокат сказал: "Впереди зима! Человек без крова может погибнуть. Вы же сами понимаете, что только в тюрьме подсудимый будет обут, одет и накормлен...".

en.title: Heaven born barrister
en.condition: After the barrister’s speech, Bill’s punishment was upgraded. Why?
en.solution: In autumn, a district court was hearing a case of a homeless man who had broken a shop window. Because of the barrister’s speech, the court, although drifting toward a conditional sentence, convicted the criminal. The barrister said: “Winter is coming! A homeless man can die. Don’t you understand that only in prison the defendant will have shoes, clothes, and food...”.

key_facts: Bill is a homeless man.
The crime involved breaking a shop window.
The barrister's intention was to emphasize Bill's desperate situation.
The speech led the court to believe that prison was a better option for Bill's wellbeing.

title: Здоровая рука
condition: Почему совершенно здоровая молодая девушка надела гипс себе на руку, которая не была повреждена?

title: Тишина по радио
condition: Мужчина вёл машину и слушал радио, как вдруг станция прекратила своё вещание. Спустя пару минут он съехал на обочину и сбросился с вершины скалы.
solution: Мужчина работал ведущим на радио. В этот день он совершил убийство и в качестве алиби запустил в прямой эфир заранее подготовленную запись радиотрансляции. Осознав, что станция по какой-то причине прекратила вещание и все сразу поймут, что убийца именно он, мужчина решил покончить с собой.

en.title: Radio silence
en.condition: A man is driving his car while listening to the radio when suddenly the radio goes silent. He then decides to leave the road and throw himself off the top of a cliff.
en.solution: The man was a radio broadcaster who had commited a murder. He had left a recorded radio broadcast live as an alibi. Realizing that the program he had prepared had stopped airing accidentally and that they would know that he was the culprit, he decided to end his life.

He committed a murder and set up a recorded broadcast as an alibi.
The radio going silent indicates his alibi has failed.
He decides to take his own life to avoid facing the consequences.

title: Смерть в музее
condition: Мужчина в балаклаве выбежал из музея с картиной под мышкой. Офицер полиции увидел его, выстрелил и убил. Немного позднее он совершил самоубийство. Через пару дней мужчина с картиной был похоронен и назван почетным жителем города.
solution: Холодным зимним днем, когда музей был закрыт, в нем случился пожар, и его директор пытался спасти самую ценную картину. Полицейский не заметил пожара и подумал, что вор выбежал из музея с украденной картиной. Он приказал ему остановиться, но директор был слишком глух. Когда офицер осознал, что натворил, то покончил с собой.

en.title: A death in a museum
en.condition: A man wearing a balaclava runs out of a museum carrying a painting under his arm. A police officer sees him, shoots him dead and commits suicide soon after. A couple of days later, the man with the painting is buried and named favorite son of the city.
en.solution: During a cold spell, there is fire in a museum and its director tried to save the most valuable painting from the museum's collection. The police officer had not noticed the fire and thought the man with the painting was a thief. He told him to freeze but since the director was deaf he did not hear the police officer. When the police officer realized what he had done, he committed suicide.

The museum director was trying to save the painting.
The police officer mistook the director for a thief.
The museum director was deaf.
The police officer realized his mistake and felt guilty.

title: Священная смерть
condition: Сёма умер, когда священник перестал говорить.
solution: Шестилетний мальчик принёс на литургию своего хомячка Сёму. Когда священник выступал перед прихожанами, хомяк сбежал и поднялся к алтарю. Когда священник закончил говорить он направился к своему креслу, но не увидел хомяка и раздавил его.

When the priest finished speaking and headed towards his chair, he did not see Bobby and crushed him with his foot.

The priest accidentally stepped on Bobby.

title: Личное пространство
condition: Полиция Венесуэлы несколько раз пыталась арестовать известного бандита. Они знали, где он живет. Иногда, получив ордер на его арест, они отправлялись к нему домой. Как только они входили в дом, он запирался в спальне. Полицейским ничего не оставалось делать, кроме как уйти ни с чем.
solution: Его дом стоял на границе Венесуэлы и Колумбии. Хотя входная дверь и полдома были расположены на территории Венесуэлы, спальня была расположена на территории Колумбии. Венесуэльская полиция не имела юрисдикции в Колумбии, поэтому полицейские не могли его арестовать, пока он находился в спальне.

en.title: Private space
en.condition: The Venezuelan police made a few attempts to arrest a well-known bandit. They knew where he lived. From time to time they got the arrest warrant and approached his house. When they entered the house, he locked in the bedroom. The police had nothing to do but to leave empty-handed.
en.solution: His house was on the border between Venezuela and Colombia. Although the front door and half of the house were on the territory of Venezuela, the bedroom was located on the territory of Colombia. The Venezuelan police had no jurisdiction in Colombia, so the police couldn't arrest him while he was in the bedroom.

key_facts: The house is located on the border between Venezuela and Colombia.
The bedroom is in the Colombian territory.
Venezuelan police have no jurisdiction in Colombia.

title: Открытая дверь
condition: Григорий проснулся рано утром и удивился, что дверь была открыта. Как только он перешел порог - его голова была оторвана.

en.title: Piece of Paper on the Cactus
en.condition: A man walks up to a cactus, looks at a piece of paper pinned there, and kills himself.
en.solution: The man has been wandering lost in the desert. He fears he has been walking in circles. To test this, he pins a blank piece of paper to a cactus and sets off walking. When he encounters the paper again, his fears are confirmed and he knows he will never find his way out.

key_facts: The man is lost in the desert.
He pins a paper to the cactus as a test to see if he's walking in circles.
He finds the paper again, confirming his fears.
He loses hope and takes his own life.

title: По шпалам
condition: Человек шел по рельсам и вдруг, увидел, что навстречу ему едет поезд. Тогда он побежал со всех ног навстречу приближающемуся поезду.
solution: Человек находился в тоннеле и, чтобы спастись, был вынужден бежать по путям навстречу поезду. Когда тоннель кончился, он смог спрыгнуть с рельсов в сторону. И благодаря этому остался жив.

title: Женская логика
condition: В первый день Джона ничего в поступке Мери не удивило. Во второй день Джон необычайно удивился. На третий день Джон все понял и резко изменил к лучшему свое мнение о женщинах.
solution: Мери - женщина, имевшая богатого мужа и богатого любовника. Оба с удовольствием делали ей дорогие подарки, но давали очень мало денег на карманные расходы. - В первый день Мери с мужем пришла в магазин и выбрала платье за $2000. Муж сразу заплатил, а продавец (Джон), разумеется, ничему не удивился. - Во второй день Мери пришла в тот же самый магазин с любовником и выбрала точно такое же платье, как и вчера. Любовник сразу заплатил, а продавец Джон был очень удивлен. - На третий день Мери пришла в магазин одна и сдала обратно одно из платьев, получив 2000 долларов на руки. Джон, естественно, был в полном восхищении. Автор: shshok. http://www.danetka.ru/cgi-bin/info.pl?uid=125

en.title: Woman’s reason
en.condition: On first day, nothing in Mary’s behavior surprised John. On the second day, John was extremely surprised. On the third day, John got it and switched his opinion about women for the better.
en.solution: Mary was a woman with a rich husband and a rich lover. Both enjoyed giving her expensive gifts but gave her very little pocket money. - On the first day, Mary and her husband came to the store and chose a dress that cost $2,000. The husband paid at once, and the store assistant (John) wasn’t surprised. - On the second day, Mary came to the same store with her lover and chose just the same dress as yesterday. The lover paid at once, and John the seller was very surprised. - On the third day, Mary came to the store alone and returned one of the dresses, receiving $2,000 in cash. Indeed, John was lost in admiration.

key_facts: Mary has a rich husband and a rich lover.
Both men enjoy giving her expensive gifts but limited pocket money.
Mary bought the same dress on two consecutive days with each man.
On the third day, Mary returned one of the dresses and got cash in return.

title: Ремни безопасности
condition: В больницу Сент-Джеймс направляли всех пострадавших в результате несчастных случаев в городе. Больше всего было водителей и пассажиров, пострадавших в ДТП. Чтобы уменьшить их число, городские власти сделали обязательным пользование ремнями безопасности. Водители и пассажиры стали пристегивать эти ремни, но число ДТП осталось неизменным, а число пострадавших в них людей, которые поступали в больницу, даже увеличилось. Почему?
solution: Пользование ремнями безопасности уменьшило число погибающих при ДТП. Многие люди, которые без ремня безопасности погибли бы (и попали бы в морги), оставались в живых, но получали травмы, и им требовалось лечение. Поэтому число попадающих в больницу стало больше.

en.title: Seat belts
en.condition: In some city an amount of people injured in car accidents was very high. Then it was decided by administration to make the using of seat belts oblidatory. People started to obey this rule. But the amount of crash accidents remained the same. Moreover, the number of injured people who addressed to the hospital even increased.
en.solution: The adopted law decreased the number of accidents. A lot of people who would die without seat belt stayed alive but got injured and therefore they went to the hospital. So the number of patients increased.

key_facts: Seat belts were made mandatory.
The number of fatal accidents decreased.
More people survived but were injured.
The increased number of injured people visited the hospital.

title: Беспокойный сон
condition: Виталий пришел домой уставшим. Он зашел в свою комнату и выключил свет, чтобы лечь спать. Через некоторое время, почувствовав тревогу, он включил свет и осмотрел всё вокруг. Затем он выключил свет обратно и снова попытался уснуть. Так было несколько раз, прежде чем он посмотрел под свою кровать и обнаружил там труп.
solution: Когда Виталий вошел в квартиру в ней был вор, который спрятался под кроватью. Вор перепугался и не смог справится с усиливающимся напряжением, в результате чего у него произошел сердечный приступ и он умер. В конце концов Виталий понял, что не мог спокойно спать из-за тиканья часов на руке вора.

en.title: Restless sleep
en.condition: Paul comes home tired. He goes to his room and turns off the light to sleep. After a while, feeling uneasy, he turns on the light and looks around. He turns the light back off and tries to sleep again. After repeating this several times, he takes a look under his bed and finds a dead body.
en.solution: A thief was stealing from Paul's home. When Paul arrived home, the thief hid under the bed. The tension became too much and the thief suffered a sudden heart attack Paul was unable to sleep due to the ticking of the thief's wristwatch.

title: Голодать до смерти
condition: Женщина умирает от голода, хотя она окружена пищей.
solution: Женщина держала свой магазин с консервами в небольшом городке. Как-то вечером она закрыла магазин и решила проверить погреб, где лежали все запасы консерв на будущее. title: Нераскрытый грабеж
condition: Парень зашел в аптеку и покинул её с деньгами из кассы. Хозяйка аптеки позвонила в полицию и этого парня увез полицейский, а еще через некоторое время ей вернули деньги. Этим же вечером три человека пришли в полицейский участок и сообщили о краже.
solution: Парень был сыном хозяйки аптеки. Его машину угнали и у него был важный экзамен в этот день. Он зашел в аптеку, чтобы попросить у мамы денег на такси. Мама дала ему денег, а также попросила по телефону своего мужа, который работал в полиции, подвести сына. Он подвез, а т.к. деньги сыну уже не были нужны, он отдал их отцу, а тот отвез их обратно маме. Вечером вся семья пошла в участок, чтобы сообщить об угоне машины.

en.title: An unsolved robbery
en.condition: A guy goes into a drugstore and leaves shortly after with the money from the cash register. The drugstore owner calls the Police Station and, some time later, a police officer recovers the money and takes the guy away. That evening the three people go to the police station to report a theft.
en.solution: The guy was the drugstore owner's son. His car had been stolen and he had an important exam. He had been to the drugstore to ask his mother for some money so he could take a taxi. In addition to this, the mother called her husband - who was a police officer - and asked him to bring their son to the exam. He did, and since the son did not need the money any more, he gave it back to his father, who returned it to the mother. At the end of the day, the whole family reported the car theft.

The drugstore owner's husband is a police officer.

The family went to report the car theft together.

condition: Из-за курсантов военного училища во всех магазинах города, за одни сутки, скупили всю соль.
solution: Курсантам дали задание – убрать весь снег на плацу. Так как убирать снег вручную им было лень, они решили посыпать его солью. Для этого купили по 10 пачек соли каждый. Когда бабушки в магазине увидели, что люди в военной форме запасаются солью, они решили, что грядет военное положение, и стали сеять панику и скупать соль.

title: Мяч для боулинга
condition: Мужчина толкнул шар для боулинга. Вскоре его срочно увезли в больницу. Как так получилось?
solution: Профессор физики демонстрировал закон сохранения энергии. Для этого он подвесил шар для боулинга на веревке, чтобы получился маятник. Он подтянул шар к своего лицу так, чтобы он касался носа, и отпустил его. По его задумке шар должен был отклониться, а по возвращении должен был остановиться прямо перед его носом. К несчастью, он не просто отпустил мяч, а слегка подтолкнул его, в результате чего он врезался ему в нос с такой силой, что профессор получил перелом.

en.title: Bowling ball
en.condition: A man lets go of a bowling ball. A short while later, he is rushed to the hospital.
en.solution: A physics professor is demonstrating conservation of energy by suspending a bowling ball from a piece of rope. He pulls the ball back until it's right in front of his nose, then lets go. It is supposed to swing away from him, then back at him, stopping just in front of his nose. Unfortunately, he gave the ball a slight push, resulting in the ball crashing into his nose upon its return.

He is demonstrating conservation of energy.

The ball swung back and hit his nose, causing injury.

title: Машина без водителя
condition: Автомобиль без водителя поехал; и человек умер. Как так получилось?
solution: Преступник установил машину на склоне над небольшим прилавком с хот-догами, где работает жертва. Затем он поместил в машину ледяную глыбу, чтобы удерживать педаль тормоза и поставил нейтральную передачу, после чего умчался в другой город, чтобы избежать подозрений. В этот день была положительная температура. Когда лед растаял, машина скатилась с холма на продавца хот-догов, убив его.

en.title: A car without a driver
en.condition: A car without a driver moves; a man dies. How come?
en.solution: The murderer sets the car on a slope above the hot dog stand where the victim works. He then wedges an ice block in the car to keep the brake pedal down, and puts the car in neutral, after which he flies to another city to avoid suspicion. It's a warm day; when the ice melts, the car rolls down the hill and strikes the hot dog man at his roadside stand, killing him.

key_facts: The car is set on a slope.
Ice block is used to keep the brake pedal down.
The murderer ensures an alibi by being in another city.
The warm temperature causes the ice to melt.

title: Cactus
condition: A man lies dead next to a cactus. Stuck to the cactus is a slip of paper. Why?
solution: The man was lost in the desert for days. He couldn't find any landmarks, so he started sticking slips of paper to cactuses he passed. After another day of walking, with almost no water left, he came across this cactus, which had a slip of paper on it already; he knew that he was walking in circles, so rather than wait to die of thirst he shot himself.

title: A funny vagrant
condition: The doorbell rings. Bill opens the door. On the threshold, he sees a local vagrant. - Hello, - says the vagrant, - as usual, I was going around the garbage pits and in one of them found a wallet with $1,000 and your ID. You must have thrown it away by mistake. - Right! – says Bill joyfully. - My wallet! Thank you so much! - Please check the contents - the vagrant asks. - One thousand even! – confirms Bill, counting the bills hastily. Then he takes a $20 bill out of the pack and gives it to the vagrant. - This is from me with thanks! They part, being quite content with each other. - Who was it? – Bill’s wife asks. Bill laughs and tells his wife what happened. Why’s it funny?
solution: When returning the wallet, the vagrant had high hopes for gratitude. But there was a chance that Bill wouldn’t have any broken money at hand. In the wallet, there were only $100 bills. Would Bill agree to pay such a large amount? And the vagrant made a wise decision. Before returning the wallet, he had exchanged one hundred for smaller bills – 5, 10, 20, 50, deciding that thus Bill would be able to choose the amount to thank him with. It was the vagrant’s forethought that made Bill laugh.
key_facts: The vagrant found Bill's wallet with only $100 bills.
The vagrant exchanged one $100 bill for smaller bills before returning the wallet.
Bill laughed because of the vagrant's thoughtful action to provide change for a smaller reward.

The men agreed that they needed to eat their arms to survive, but that it if one person had to lose his arm to save them, they should all lose their arms. The men were rescued before the last man's arm was eaten; this man ran away before he could be caught and forced to give up his arm. However, he bumped into one of the other survivors in the subway one day, who killed him for not living up to his end of the bargain.

solution: The native chief asked him, "What is the third baseman's name in the Abbott and Costello routine 'Who's on First'?" The man, who had no idea, said "I don't know," the correct answer. However, he was a big smart aleck, so if he had known the answer he would have pointed out that "What" was the second baseman's name. The chief, being quite humorless, would have executed him on the spot.

The correct answer is "I don't know."

title: Untitled #1174
condition: Three men die. On the pavement are pieces of ice and broken glass. Why?
solution: A large man takes the elevator from the ground floor to the third floor penthouse apartment he shares with his wife. After greeting her, he sees a man's watch on the table and assumes she's been having an affair. Thinking her boyfriend has escaped down the stairs, he rushes to the French windows and sees a good-looking man just leaving the main entrance of the building. Furious, the husband pushes the refrigerator through the window onto the young man below. The young man is killed by the refrigerator. The husband is killed from a heart attack caused by overexertion. The wife's boyfriend, who was hiding inside the refrigerator, is killed from the fall.
key_facts: Large man suspects wife of having an affair

solution: He is a guard/attendant in a leper colony. The letter (to him) tells him that he has contracted the disease. The key is the cigarette burning down between his fingers -- leprosy is fairly unique in killing off sensory nerves without destroying motor ability.

Once the call went through he gasped, "I'm at the store. I've been shot. Help!" or words to that effect. He set the phone down to await help, but none came; he'd treated the telephone pushbuttons like cash register numbers, when the arrangements of the numbers are upside down reflections of each other. The stranger he'd dialed had no way to know where "the store" was.

solution: The sailor grabbed the fire hose from the deck and used the force of the water from the hose to push the mine away from the hull of the ship. The water pressure doesn't explode the mine; WWII-style mines contain magnetic sensors which make them explode on contact with a ship's hull.

title: Untitled #1131
condition: A man is killed on a train. He is found to have written "elf" on the floor in his own blood. Why?
solution: Attached to the train was a caboose with a safe carrying a shipment of jewels. The victim, Schmidt, was the conductor guarding the shipment; he had robbed the safe himself, and had an accomplice traveling on the train under a false name to remove the loot. The accomplice killed Schmidt to keep his share. Schmidt didn't know the accomplice's false name, so he wrote the killer's berth number, 11. For greater clarity he spelled out the number as a word -- in his native German. (In the original story he didn't want "11" to be misread as two parallel lines, but Germans don't write "1" as a straight line.) This arguably belongs in section 2 for double meaning, but the double-meaninged word here is explicitly called out, so I'm going to leave it in section 1 for now.
key_facts: Schmidt was guarding a shipment of jewels.
The victim robbed the safe with an accomplice.
Accomplice had a false name and was on the train.
Schmidt wrote "elf" (11 in German) indicating the killer's berth number.
He wrote it in German to avoid confusion with parallel lines.

title: Untitled #1166
condition: Aborigines lived on an island in the middle of the ocean. However, they found a way to get rich. How did they do it?
solution: There were porcelain vases left at the ocean bottom after a shipwreck. For 100 years, the most experienced divers couldn’t get them. The aborigines invented a clever method. They caught octopuses, tied them down, and plunged into the water. Then they waited until the animals find places to hide inside porcelain bowls and vessels among the pile of ship wreckage. Octopuses turned out to be stubborn – they didn’t want to part with their favorite dwelling, even when being pulled by the rope. title: Untitled #1130

solution: He's a smuggler. On the first cruise, someone brings the contraband to his cabin, and he hides it in an air conditioning duct. Returning to the U.S., he leaves without the contraband, and so passes through customs with no trouble. On the second trip, he has the same cabin on the same ship. Because it doesn't stop anywhere, he doesn't have to go through customs when he returns, so he gets the contraband off safely.

solution: There's a car wash on that corner. On rainy days, the rain reduces traction. On sunny days, water from the car wash has the same effect. If rain is threatening, though, the car wash gets little business and thus doesn't make the road wet, so I can take the corner faster.
key_facts: There's a car wash on the corner.

In one naval encounter, their ship sank, the king died, and the prince swam to a deserted island where he spent several months building a raft or small boat. In the meantime, a regent was appointed to the island nation, and he brought peace and prosperity. When Prince Abel returned to his kingdom, Cain (a native fisherman) realized that the peace of the land would only be maintained if Abel did not reascend to his throne, and killed the prince (with a piece of driftwood or some other impromptu weapon).

title: Untitled #1091
condition: A man enters the elevator of a high rise apartment building, takes off one glove, and pushes the button for the tenth floor. The next day, the same man enters the elevator, puts on one glove, and pushes the button for the tenth floor. Why?
solution: The man is blind. His first time in the elevator, he's wearing gloves; the elevator uses buttons that work by electrical conduction through the skin; they light up at the slightest touch, but not through a glove. The man thus has to remove a glove to get the button to work. But he discovers that first day that as he runs his ungloved hand over the buttons to find the tenth floor, all the buttons are activated, and the elevator stops at all the floors. So from then on, he carries a glove with him; he puts it on when he enters the elevator, finds the right button with his gloved hand, then uses his ungloved hand to press the tenth-floor button.
key_facts: The man is blind.
Elevator buttons work by electrical conduction through the skin.
Braille labels on buttons not effective in preventing accidental activation.
He uses one glove to avoid activating multiple floors.

title: Untitled #1095
condition: If he had wanted chocolate ice cream, his brother would be alive today. Why?
solution: A young boy is going out to play one afternoon and on his way out he stops off in the garage to check for an ice cream bar in the large chest freezer the family keeps there. The freezer is new and almost empty as yet, so the boy has to prop himself up on the edge to reach into the bottom to find the ice cream. He loses his balance and falls into the freezer, with the lid latching shut over him. Right about then, his older brother arrives home from high school and asks his mom if they have any popsicles in the freezer. She says no, but she bought some chocolate ice cream that day and he can have some of that if he wishes. He decides he is not in the mood for chocolate ice cream and goes up to his room to listen to some music. His brother suffocates.
key_facts: Young boy searching for ice cream in a chest freezer
Boy falls into the freezer and gets trapped
Older brother asks for a popsicle but is offered chocolate ice cream

title: Untitled #1144
condition: Max’s Trucking Company has been delivering goods to and from local businesses for years. Max’s business is steady and his trucks drive the same routes and roads every day without any trouble. This year, Max decided to start delivering and receiving goods on Christmas Day as a way to earn additional money. When Christmas Day finally came, Max sent a few drivers out to do business with those companies that chose to remain open. Later that day, Max received a call that one of his delivery drivers had struck a bridge and severely damaged the truck. How could this happen if the drivers have always used the same route without any previous problems?
solution: On Christmas Day, many of the local businesses that contract with Max’s company had shut down for the day. Having made a final delivery, and not receiving any new goods to transport, this particular truck was empty. When returning to headquarters the empty truck had a higher profile and struck the bridge on the way back.
key_facts: Christmas Day is an exception to usual business days
The truck was empty after making its final delivery
The empty truck had a higher profile than when loaded
The higher profile caused the truck to strike the bridge

title: Untitled #1128
condition: Two brothers are involved in a murder. Though it's clear that one of them actually committed the crime, neither can be punished. Why?
solution: One of the brothers (A) confesses to the murder. At his trial, his brother (B) is called as the only defense witness; B immediately confesses, in graphic detail, to having committed the crime. The defense lawyer refuses to have the trial stopped, and A is acquitted under the "reasonable doubt" clause. Immediately afterward, B goes on trial for the murder; A is called as the only defense witness and he confesses. B is declared innocent; and though everyone knows that one of them did it, how can they tell who? Further, neither can be convicted of perjury until it's decided which of them did it... I don't know if that would actually work under the US legal system, but someone else who heard the story said that his father was on the jury for a very similar case in New York some years ago. Mark Brader points out that the brothers might be convicted of conspiracy to commit perjury or to obstruct justice, or something of that kind.
key_facts: Both brothers confess to the crime
Each brother is the only defense witness in the other's trial
Acquitted under "reasonable doubt" clause
Possible charges of conspiracy to commit perjury or obstruct justice

title: Untitled #1149
condition: Mr. Box drove up to the house where Mr. Door lived carrying a box in his hand. He was smiling as he rang the doorbell. When Mr. Door opened the door, Mr. Boxs smile melted away. Mr. Box took out a gun and shot Mr. Door. Why?
solution: Mr. Box and Mr. Door had been in the navy together years ago. They had both been on a ship that had shipwrecked in the Pacific. A group of men had survived on a liferaft but didnt have any food. Mr. Door was a navy doctor. He suggested that he would amputate each of their left arms for food. There was, however, no other doctor available to amputate Mr. Doors arm. To make it fair, Mr. Door promised that when they were back home again, he would have his arm amputated also. Mr. Door had sent Mr. Box an arm in the mail. Mr. Box assumed it was Mr. Doors arm, but when Mr. Box visited Mr. Door and saw that he still had both of his arms, he became very angry that Mr. Door had not followed through on his side of the bargain and shot him.
key_facts: Mr. Box and Mr. Door were navy colleagues
They survived a shipwreck together
Mr. Door, a navy doctor, suggested amputating each survivor's left arm for food
Mr. Door promised to amputate his arm later, but he didn't
Mr. Box received an arm in the mail, assuming it was Mr. Door's
Mr. Box realized Mr. Door didn't keep his promise when he saw both his arms intact

condition: 在一个冬夜,老王在树下看到一条冻僵的蛇,善良的他就把蛇抱在怀里带回了家。第二天,老王倒掉了瓶珍藏多年的酒,并在树上钉下了牌子。请问发生了什么?
solution: 冬夜,又黑又冻,老王看到的蛇其实是冻住的粪便,老王把冻住的粪便当成蛇抱回家泡酒了,第二天他才看清泡的原来是大便,于是丢掉了酒,并钉上了“此处禁止大小便”的牌子。
key_facts: 老王误将粪便当作蛇
老王用粪便泡酒
老王发现错误后丢掉了酒
老王在树上钉下了“此处禁止大小便”的牌子

title: Untitled #1110
condition: Hiking in the mountains, you walk past a large field and camp a few miles farther on, at a stream. It snows in the night, and the next day you find a cabin in the field with two dead bodies inside. Why?
solution: It's the cabin of an airplane that crashed there because of the snowstorm.
key_facts: The "cabin" is actually an airplane cabin.
A snowstorm caused the airplane to crash.
The two dead bodies are from the airplane crash.

title: Черная кошка

solution: Автомобиль объехал кошку, потому что было светло.

en.title: The Black Cat
en.condition: A black cat is walking through the middle of a road where there is a broken street lamp. A man is driving his vehicle with headlights that do not work. Despite all of this, he is able to avoid harming the cat.
en.solution: The man avoided the cat because it was daylight.

title: Необычная пушка
condition: В Америке создали пушку, которая стреляла курицами. Зачем?
solution: Из нее стреляли тушкой курицы в лобовое стекло самолета, чтобы проверить, разобьется ли оно при столкновении с птицей.

en.title: Chicken gun
en.condition: In the 1950s in America there was invented a chicken gun. What for?
en.solution: A chicken gun is a large-diameter, compressed-air cannon used to fire dead chickens at aircraft components in order to simulate high-speed bird strikes during the aircraft's flight. Jet engines and aircraft windshields are particularly vulnerable to damage from such strikes, and are the most common target in such tests. Whole, dead, standard-size chickens, as would be used for cooking, are thought to accurately simulate a large, live bird striking a plane in flight.

title: Умер от страха
condition: Человек проснулся, зажег спичку и увидел нечто такое, что умер от испуга. Что случилось?
solution: Человек был приговорен к очень большому сроку заключения и сидел в тюрьме. Он заплатил человеку, ведающему похоронами людей, которые умерли в тюрьме, чтобы тот помог ему бежать. План состоял в том, что, когда в тюрьме кто-нибудь умрет, узник спрячется в гробу рядом с покойником. Когда же гроб будет захоронен за стенами тюрьмы, организатор похорон выроет его и освободит человека. Узнав, что в тюрьме кто-то умер, узник привел свой план в действие. Под покровом ночи он прокрался в гроб и лег рядом с покойником. Там он уснул. Проснулся он уже тогда, когда гроб был захоронен. Он зажег спичку и увидел лицо покойника - это был тот самый человек, который должен был выкопать гроб. Среди серий сериала «Час Хичкока» (1962 – 1965 гг) был эпизод «Последний побег», в котором именно это и произошло!

en.title: Died of fright
en.condition: A man woke up, lit a match and saw something that frightened him to death.
en.solution: This man was a prisoner. He wanted to escape and asked the mortician to do something for him. When somebody in prison would die, the prisoner would hide in the coffin and would be buried along with the corpse outside the territory of prison. And after some time he would be released by this mortician. But something went wrong. When the prisoner opened his eyes after the burial and lit a match, he saw the face of the mortician. He understood that he is doomed and died of fright.

title: Мясо альбатроса
condition: Слепой человек заходит в ресторан и заказывает мясо альбатроса. Поужинав, он выходит из ресторана, достает пистолет и стреляет себе в голову.
solution: Несколько лет назад слепой человек потерпел кораблекрушение и попал с женой и другом на необитаемый остров. Несколько дней они голодали, затем жена и друг ушли на поиски пищи. Друг вернулся один и сказал, что жена, должно быть, заблудилась и вернется позже. Зато, по его словам, ему удалось наловить альбатросов. Жена так и не вернулась, а следующие несколько дней друг кормил слепого парня «мясом альбатроса». Попробовав настоящее мясо альбатроса, человек понял, что ел собственную жену, убитую его другом.

en.title: The albatross
en.condition: A man goes into a restaurant, orders albatross, eats one bite, and kills himself. Why?
en.solution: The man was in a ship that was wrecked on a desert island. When there was no food left, another passenger brought what he said was albatross but was really part of the man's wife (who had died in the wreck). The man suspects something fishy, so when they finally return to civilization, he orders albatross , realizes that what he ate before was his wife, and kills himself. (there is also a version of the riddle with an abalone instead of an albatross)

title: Смертельные туфли
condition: Женщина купила новую пару красных туфель. На следующий день она умерла во время работы. Как это произошло?
solution: Женщина работала в цирке в качестве помощника метателя ножей. Ее новые туфли были немного выше, чем предыдущие, поэтому ее коллега, обычно бросавшая ножи на одном уровне, смертельно ранила ее.

en.solution: Her husband was a magician that was doing a gun trick with an apple on her head and his eyes closed. He didn't realize that she was wearing high heals so he didn't calculate the height accurately.... so he killed her.

title: Человек со спичкой
condition: Голый человек был найден мертвым посреди пустыни. В его руке была сгоревшая спичка. Что произошло?
solution: Человек летел с другими людьми на воздушном шаре. Воздушный шар начал падать и чтобы сделать его легче, они выкинули все вещи, в том числе всю свою одежду. Этого было недостаточно и они решили, что один из них должен прыгнуть для спасения остальных. Они договорились тянуть спичку: кому выпадет сгоревшая спичка, тому придется прыгать. Этому человеку попалась сгоревшая спичка и он прыгнул, как они и договаривались.

en.title: A match
en.condition: A naked man is lying dead in the middle of a desert with a match in his hand. What happened? A man is found dead in a desert. He is naked, and lots of clothes are scattered around him, among other things. There is a match in his hand. How did he die?
en.solution: He was with several others in a hot air balloon crossing the desert. The balloon was punctured and they began to lose altitude. They tossed all their non-essentials overboard, then their clothing and food, but were still going to crash in the middle of the desert. Finally, they drew matches to see who would jump over the side and save the others; this man lost.

title: Выкуп в будке
condition: У богатого человека похитили сына. Похититель потребовал, чтобы он принес принадлежащий ему дорогой бриллиант в телефонную будку, стоящую в середине городского парка. Полицейские в штатском окружили парк, намереваясь схватить преступника или его посредника. Отец похищенного ребенка пришел к телефонной будке и выполнил все указания похитителей, но полиция не смогла ни помешать хитрому преступнику вынести алмаз из парка, ни схватить негодяя. Что он сделал?
solution: Это реальный случай, произошедший на Тайване. Когда отец пришел к телефонной будке, он нашел там почтового голубя в клетке. К нему была привязана записка, в которой говорилось, что бриллиант нужно положить в маленький мешочек, закрепленный на шее голубя, и выпустить голубя из клетки. Когда он сделал это, голубь полетел через весь город в свою голубятню, и полиция не смогла проследить за ним.

en.title: Ransom in the call-box
en.condition: The son of a rich man was kidnapped. The kidnapper wanted the rich man to bring and put the expensive diamond into the call-box located in a city park. Policemen surrounded this park, intending to catch the criminal. The father of the kidnapped child came to the call-box and did everything the kidnapper said to him, but the police could not prevent the cunning criminal from taking the diamond out of the call-box. They didn't grab the villian as well. What did he do?
en.solution: This is a real history that happened in Taiwan. When the father came to the call-box, he found a postal pigeon in the cage. There was a note attached to him, in which it was said that the diamond should be put into a small pouch attached to the neck of the pigeon, and then he should let the pigeon out of the cage. When the rich man did this, the dove flew through the city to its dovecote, and the police could not follow it.

title: Деревенский дурачок
condition: Люди, приезжавшие в живописную горную деревушку, часто удивлялись местному дурачку. Когда ему предлагали выбор между блестящей 50-центовой монетой и мятой пятидолларовой купюрой, он всегда выбирал монету, хотя она стоит вдесятеро меньше купюры. Почему он никогда не выбирал купюру?
solution: «Дурачок» был не так глуп: он понимал, что, пока он будет выбирать 50-центовую монету, люди будут предлагать ему выбор, а если он выберет пятидолларовую купюру, предложения выбора прекратятся, и он не будет получать ничего.

en.title: The village idiot
en.condition: Visitors to a scenic mountain village were often amused by the village idiot. When offered a choice between a shiny 50-cent piece and a crumpled $5 bill, he would always happily choose the half-dollar. The bill was worth ten times as much, so why did he never choose it?
en.solution: The so-called village idiot was smart enough to realize that as long as he kept choosing a 50-cent piece, people would keep offering him the choice. If he took the $5 bill once, the stream of coins would stop rolling in.

solution: Груша выращивается в бутылке, которую привязывают к ветке вскоре после того, как плод завяжется.

en.title: Pear inside a bottle
en.condition: How do you get a full-grown pear inside a bottle of brandy?
en.solution: It may be easier than putting a ship in a bottle but requires just as much patience. The pear isn’t put into the bottle; it grows inside it. When the fruit is small, the bottle is affixed to the tree branch, and the pear grows to maturity inside the bottle.

title: 忠诚的狗
condition: 小强养了一只很忠诚的狗,今天他牵着狗上街,然后小强死了。为什么?
solution: 小强这次上街突发心脏病,狗不让其他人靠近主人包括医生。耽误了治疗时间,导致了小强的死亡。

确认当时有医生在场
意识到狗阻止了陌生人靠近
还原狗'护主'反而'害主'的真相

tricks: 玩家可能会问'狗是否攻击了小强'，必须判定为'否'，因为狗的本意是保护，死因是病发延误。
玩家可能会问'是不是车祸'，必须判定为'否'，'街'只是地点，非致死原因。
玩家可能会关注'忠诚'二字，这是核心误导，'忠诚'在此处构成了物理障碍。
logic_profile.summary: 小强在街上突发心脏病，他忠诚的狗误以为靠近的医生和路人要伤害主人，拼命阻拦救援，导致小强因错过最佳抢救时间而死亡。
logic_rules: If 玩家问'狗杀了人吗？' -> Then 判定为'没有'，狗没有物理伤害主人，是间接导致死亡。
If 玩家问'小强是被咬死的吗？' -> Then 判定为'不是'，死因是心脏病。
If 玩家问'医生见死不救吗？' -> Then 判定为'不是'，医生想救但无法靠近。
If 玩家问'这是一起意外吗？' -> Then 判定为'是'，无人有主观杀意。

title: 街上的工作
condition: 我正在街上努力工作,突然一个疯疯癫癫的女人向我扑来,爸爸赶紧把我抱回了家,但随后那个女人又跟来了。
solution: “爸爸”并不是我真正的爸爸,而是将我拐走的人贩子,而那个疯癫的女人就是一直在寻找我的妈妈,那天我跟着“爸爸”在街上行乞,她一眼就认出了被折磨的不成人形的我,人贩子见事情败露,急忙将我抱回了家,妈妈为了复仇,用人贩子折磨我的方式折磨人贩子,随后杀了他,我终于可以回家了。
key_facts: 识破'工作'是乞讨
识破'爸爸'是人贩子
确认女人是生母
揭示'折磨'手法与复仇

If 玩家问'那个女人有精神病吗？' -> Then 判定为'否'，她的疯癫源于失去孩子的痛苦和重逢的激动。
If 玩家问'爸爸爱我吗？' -> Then 判定为'否'，我是他的赚钱工具。
If 玩家问'结局是悲剧吗？' -> Then 判定为'否'，虽然过程残酷，但'我'回家了。

title: 治病
condition: 他决定给经济拮据的母亲治病,却被母亲强硬地拒绝了。
solution: 生意破产的母亲患了肾衰竭,需要肾移植,他决定将自己的肾捐给母亲。他不知道的是,自己的一个肾,早在小的时候,就被因为做生意而缺钱的母亲卖掉了。
key_facts: 母亲得了肾衰竭
儿子试图捐肾
儿子少了一个肾
少掉的肾是儿时被母亲卖掉的

step2_identity_matrix.fate_feature_base: 他不知道的是，自己的一个肾，早在小的时候，就被...母亲卖掉了。

自己的一个肾...被因为做生意而缺钱的母亲卖掉了。

gate_logs.gate_C_cognitive: 【熔断警报】他(试图捐赠/不知情) vs 母亲(拒绝接受/知情)。

step3_logic_gates.logic_arbitration: 检测到认知与动机的极端对立。母亲拒绝并非因为不爱，而是因为无法偿还或无法面对罪证。

entities.母亲: 母亲/器官贩卖者(过去式)

tricks: 玩家会认为'拒绝'是因为怕花钱或不想拖累儿子，实际上是因为'无法接受'（因为儿子已经没有多余的肾了，或者她无法面对再次索取）。
玩家会默认'治病'需要的是钱，实际上需要的是'器官'。
玩家会默认儿子身体健康健全，实际上他早就残缺了。
logic_profile.summary: 母亲早年为了生意卖掉了年幼儿子的一个肾。如今母亲肾衰竭需要移植，儿子想捐肾救母，却不知自己只剩一个肾，母亲因愧疚和生理现实（取走独肾儿子必死）而强硬拒绝。
logic_rules: If 玩家问'是因为没钱吗？' -> Then 判定为'是也不是'，过去是因为没钱卖肾，现在是有钱也没法治（指无法接受儿子的捐赠）。
If 玩家问'儿子知道真相吗？' -> Then 判定为'不知道'，他以为自己很健康。
If 玩家问'母亲爱他吗？' -> Then 判定为'复杂'，过去为了生意牺牲了他，现在为了他的命拒绝了他。
If 玩家问'母亲拒绝是因为怕儿子死吗？' -> Then 判定为'是'，若取走仅剩的肾，儿子会死。

title: 自相残杀
condition: 两兄弟在酒吧喝酒。他们开始争吵。其中一人掏枪射杀了另一人。不久后他自己也不幸身亡。
solution: 两兄弟是连体人。其中一人抱怨另一人不讲卫生,口臭难忍,并掏枪杀死了他。他自己也因失血过多而死。

得知争吵原因是口臭/卫生
揭露连体人身份

step4_merge_verdict: 虽然物理上是'连体人'，但在逻辑推理阶段必须将'左半身'和'右半身'视为两个拥有独立人格的角色，直到玩家通过线索合并认知。

entities.两兄弟: 连体双胞胎（共用循环系统）
entities.另一人: 连体人之二（死者/口臭者）

tricks: 玩家会理所当然地认为'两兄弟'是两个独立的个体。
玩家会认为'不久后他自己也不幸身亡'是自杀、中毒或对方反击。
玩家会认为'争吵'是基于复杂的利益冲突，其实只是因为生理上的嫌弃（口臭）。
logic_profile.summary: 一对连体双胞胎兄弟在酒吧喝酒，其中一人因无法忍受另一人的严重口臭和不讲卫生，愤怒之下掏枪射杀了兄弟。由于两人共用循环系统，射击者随后也因失血过多而死亡。
logic_rules: If 玩家问'是哥哥自杀了吗？' -> Then 判定为'不是'，他是因失血过多而死，属于连带死亡。
If 玩家问'凶手被反杀了吗？' -> Then 判定为'不是'，死者立刻就死了，没有反击能力。
If 玩家问'他们距离很近吗？' -> Then 判定为'是'，物理距离为零。
If 玩家问'是否有第三人在场攻击？' -> Then 判定为'否'。

title: 要水拿枪
condition: 一个男人走进一家酒吧,并向酒保要了一杯水。酒保拿出一支枪并瞄准他,该名男子说:“谢谢你!”然后离开,请问发生了什么事?
solution: 该名男子打嗝,他希望喝一杯水来改善状况。酒保意识到这一点,选择拿枪吓他,男子一紧张之下,打嗝自然消失,因而衷心感谢酒保后就离开了。
key_facts: 发现男子有生理困扰(打嗝)
理解要是为了治病而非解渴
酒保的拔枪是善意的
惊吓治愈了困扰

title: 祭日
condition: 在儿子去世一周年的祭日上, 我杀死了三个来悼念他的人。
solution: 儿子生病去世,他在临终前告诉我,把他的器官捐献给有需要的人,这样他就能以另外的方式继续活在世界上。我同意了。最后儿子身上有三个器官分别捐献给了三个不同的人。在儿子的祭日上,我认出了他们,接受皮肤捐赠的男人,居然满身都是纹身,接受肺部捐赠的小伙,不停地在那吸烟,而接受肝捐赠的居然打电话约朋友晚上出去喝酒。我儿子把生的机会留给他们,但他们竟然这样继续糟践自己。我深深为儿子感到不甘,愤怒不已的我杀了他们三个。
key_facts: 儿子死于生病
儿子捐献了器官
那三人是器官受赠者
三人有纹身/吸烟/酗酒行为
我认为他们在糟践儿子的生命

step3_logic_gates.logic_arbitration: 根据汤底描述，'三个来悼念他的人' 即为三个器官受捐者集合。上下文逻辑完全重合。

step4_merge_verdict: 合并 '三个来悼念他的人'、'接受皮肤捐赠的男人'、'接受肺部捐赠的小伙'、'接受肝捐赠的' 为同一群体 '受捐赠者'。

entities.三个来悼念他的人: 三个挥霍器官的受捐赠者（纹身男、吸烟者、酗酒者）

tricks: 玩家可能会认为'杀人'是因为这三人害死了儿子，但实际上是因为他们'活着的方式'不对。
玩家可能会关注'悼念'这个行为，认为他们关系很好，但实际上他们只是因为器官移植产生的联系。
玩家可能猜测是'迷信'或'献祭'，实际上是基于'恨铁不成钢'的道德审判。
logic_profile.summary: 父亲/母亲将因病去世儿子的器官捐给了三个人。在忌日那天，发现接受皮肤的人纹身、接受肺的人吸烟、接受肝的人酗酒。认为他们在糟践儿子留下的生命，愤怒之下杀死了他们。
logic_rules: If 玩家问 '这三个人杀了儿子吗？' -> Then 判定为 '不是'，儿子是病死的。
If 玩家问 '这三个人认识儿子吗？' -> Then 判定为 '生前不认识'，是通过器官捐赠产生联系。
If 玩家问 '我杀人是为了复活儿子吗？' -> Then 判定为 '不是'，是为了泄愤/维护儿子的生命价值。
If 玩家问 '凶器重要吗？' -> Then 判定为 '不重要'，重要的是杀人动机。

title: 死亡直播
condition: 我在床上躺着看直播,刷到了一个漆黑的直播间,直播间里越来越亮,我看到了天花板,然后我死了。
solution: 我观看的这个直播间正在直播杀人,巧的是这一次要杀的人就是我。我关着灯躺在床上看直播,所以直播间里漆黑一片。主播进来后打开了灯,直播间逐渐变亮,而我也能看见天花板了。看清我位置的主播把我给杀了。
key_facts: 确认直播内容是杀人直播
确认'漆黑'是因为我关了灯
确认'变亮'是因为凶手开了灯
确认直播画面就是我的房间
还原凶手看直播定位杀人的过程
